Option Explicit

' =============================================================
'  NOTE: Sheet-name constants (S_STUD, S_CLASS, etc.) are
'  declared inside modUtils (generated by CreateModUtils).
'  They are available project-wide once AutoSetup has run.
'  The Private helpers below use them during setup only.
' =============================================================

' --- LOCAL SETUP-TIME CONSTANTS (Private to this module) ---
Private Const S_STUD    As String = "DB_Students"
Private Const S_CLASS   As String = "DB_Classes"
Private Const S_TEACH   As String = "DB_Teachers"
Private Const S_GUARD   As String = "DB_Guardians"
Private Const S_ATT     As String = "DB_Attendance"
Private Const S_FEE_STR As String = "DB_FeeStructure"
Private Const S_FEE_PAY As String = "DB_FeePayments"
Private Const S_SUBJ    As String = "DB_Subjects"
Private Const S_MARKS   As String = "DB_Marks"
Private Const S_USERS   As String = "DB_Users"
Private Const S_SETTINGS As String = "DB_Settings"
Private Const S_LOGS    As String = "DB_SystemLogs"
Private Const S_GRADES  As String = "Setup_Grades"
Private Const S_CBC     As String = "DB_CBC_Skills"
Private Const S_PHYS    As String = "DB_Physical"
Private Const S_DASH    As String = "Dashboard"
Private Const S_ROUT    As String = "REPORT OUTPUT"
Private Const S_RCLS    As String = "Report_Class"
Private Const S_TMPL    As String = "Template_ReportCard"
Private Const S_RCPT    As String = "DB_Receipts"


' =============================================================
'  MAIN ENTRY POINT  — run this via Alt+F8 → AutoSetup → Run
' =============================================================
Public Sub AutoSetup()
    On Error GoTo EH
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False

    ' --- Optional: backup before overwriting anything ---
    Dim ans As Integer
    ans = MsgBox("This will BUILD or REBUILD the entire CBC School System." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                 "Create a backup copy first?", vbYesNoCancel + vbQuestion, "AutoSetup")
    If ans = vbCancel Then
        Application.DisplayAlerts = True
        Application.ScreenUpdating = True
        Exit Sub
    End If
    If ans = vbYes Then
        On Error Resume Next
        Dim bkDir As String: bkDir = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\Backups"
        If Dir(bkDir, vbDirectory) = "" Then MkDir bkDir
        Dim bkName As String: bkName = Left(ThisWorkbook.Name, InStrRev(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".") - 1)
        Dim bkFile As String: bkFile = bkDir & "\" & bkName & "_PreUpdate_" & Format(Now, "yyyymmdd_hhnnss") & ".xlsm"
        ThisWorkbook.SaveCopyAs bkFile
        On Error GoTo EH
        MsgBox "Backup saved to:" & vbLf & bkFile, vbInformation, "Backup Complete"
    End If
    
    ' --- modules first (order matters for compilation) ---
    Call CreateClsUIHover
    Call CreateModUtils
    Call CreateModPhoto
    Call CreateModCRUD
    Call CreateModFees
    Call CreateModAttendance
    Call CreateModTeacher
    Call CreateModReports
    Call CreateModDatabase
    Call CreateModSecurity: DoEvents
    Call CreateModDashboard: DoEvents
    Call CreateModMarks: DoEvents
    Call CreateModClassReport: DoEvents
    Call CreateModAuditLog: DoEvents
    Call CreateModBackup: DoEvents
    Call CreateModPromotions: DoEvents
    Call CreateModAcademicReports: DoEvents
    Call CreateModTeacherDashboard: DoEvents
    Call CreateModReportCards: DoEvents
    Call CreateModSettings: DoEvents
    Call CreateModCBCRecords: DoEvents
    Call CreateModUserMgmt: DoEvents
    Call CreateModMouseWheel: DoEvents
    Call CreateModImport: DoEvents
    Call CreateModReceipts: DoEvents
    Call CreateModStudentDB: DoEvents
    Call CreateModLicense: DoEvents
    
    ' --- forms ---
    Call CreateLoginForm
    Call CreateMainMenu
    Call CreateAdmissionForm
    Call CreateFeesForm
    Call CreateAttendanceForm
    Call CreateTeacherForm
    Call CreateReportsForm
    Call CreateDatabaseForm
    Call CreateMarksForm
    Call CreateSettingsForm
    Call CreateCBCAssessmentForm
    Call CreatePhysicalEntryForm
    Call CreateUserMgmtForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateReportCenterForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateReportInputForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateChangePasswordForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateClassListInputForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateBackupForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateFeeReceiptForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateImportRollForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateStudentDBForm: DoEvents
    Call CreateLicenseForm: DoEvents
    
    ' --- workbook-level code ---
    Call CreateThisWorkbookCode: DoEvents
    
    ' --- ensure all data sheets exist with headers ---
    EnsureSheet S_STUD, Array("StudentID","AdmNo","Surname","OtherNames","Gender","DOB","Class","ParentName","Phone","UPI","BirthCert","Status","Allergies","SpecialNeeds","BloodGroup","Photo","Stream")
    EnsureSheet S_CLASS, Array("ClassLevel","Stream","ClassTeacher")
    EnsureSheet S_TEACH, Array("TeacherID","FullName","TSCNumber","Phone","Email","Subject","JoinDate","StaffType","Department")
    EnsureSheet S_GUARD, Array("GuardianID","StudentID","GuardianName","Phone","Relationship")
    EnsureSheet S_ATT, Array("AttendanceID","StudentID","Date","Status","Remarks")
    EnsureSheet S_FEE_STR, Array("FeeID","FeeType","Amount","ClassLevel")
    EnsureSheet S_FEE_PAY, Array("PaymentID","StudentID","FeeType","Amount","PaymentMode","ReceiptNo","Date")
    EnsureSheet S_SUBJ, Array("SubjectID","Level","SubjectName","MaxMarks")
    EnsureSheet S_MARKS, Array("MarkID","StudentID","AdmNo","Term","Year","SubjectID","Score","MaxMark","Grade","Remarks","EnteredBy")
    EnsureSheet S_USERS, Array("UserID","Username","Password","FullName","Role","Active","LastLogin","MustChange","FailedAttempts","LockedUntil")
    EnsureSheet S_SETTINGS, Array("SettingKey","SettingValue","Description")
    EnsureSheet S_LOGS, Array("LogID","Timestamp","User","Action","Details")
    EnsureSheet S_GRADES, Array("GradeCode","MinScore","MaxScore","Description","Level")
    EnsureSheet S_CBC, Array("RecordID","StudentID","Term","Year","SkillArea","Level","Remarks")
    EnsureSheet S_PHYS, Array("RecordID","StudentID","Term","Year","Height","Weight","BMI","Remarks")
    EnsureSheet S_RCPT, Array("ReceiptID","PaymentID","StudentID","ReceiptNo","Amount","Date","PrintedBy")
    EnsureSheet "DB_Promotions", Array("PromotionID","StudentID","FromClass","ToClass","AcademicYear","PromotionDate","PromotedBy")
    EnsureSheet S_ROUT, Array()
    EnsureSheet S_RCLS, Array()
    EnsureSheet S_TMPL, Array()
    EnsureSheet S_DASH, Array()
    EnsureSheet "DB_License", Array("Key", "Value")
    On Error Resume Next
    ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_License").Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' --- seed initial classes/grades/users/fees on first run ---
    SeedClassesAndGrades
    SeedDefaultAdmin
    SeedFeeStructure
    SeedDefaultSettings
    
    ' --- build dashboard ---
    Application.Run "BuildDashboard"
    
    ' --- hide all backend sheets, keep Dashboard visible ---
    Dim sh As Worksheet
    On Error Resume Next
    ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH).Visible = xlSheetVisible
    ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH).Activate
    For Each sh In ThisWorkbook.Sheets
        If sh.Name <> S_DASH Then sh.Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden
    Next sh
    On Error GoTo EH
    
    ' --- apply fullscreen kiosk mode ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Application.Run "EnableFullScreen"
    On Error GoTo EH
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    
    MsgBox "AutoSetup completed successfully!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "All modules, forms, and data sheets are ready." & vbCrLf & _
           "Close and reopen the workbook to launch the Login form." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "TIP: To protect your VBA code, run:" & vbCrLf & _
           "  Alt+F8 > ProtectVBAProject > Run", _
           vbInformation, "Setup Complete"
    Exit Sub
    
EH:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    MsgBox "AutoSetup ERROR:" & vbCrLf & Err.Description, vbCritical, "AutoSetup Failed"
End Sub

' =============================================================================
'  VBA PROJECT PROTECTION
'  Run this AFTER AutoSetup to lock your code with a password.
'  IMPORTANT: You must UNLOCK (Alt+F8 > UnprotectVBAProject) before re-running
'  AutoSetup for any updates, then re-lock afterwards.
' =============================================================================
Public Sub ProtectVBAProject()
    On Error GoTo PErr
    
    ' --- Check if "Trust access to the VBA project object model" is enabled ---
    Dim vbProj As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    Set vbProj = ThisWorkbook.VBProject
    On Error GoTo PErr
    If vbProj Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Cannot access VBA Project." & vbLf & vbLf & _
               "Please enable:" & vbLf & _
               "  File > Options > Trust Center > Trust Center Settings" & vbLf & _
               "  > Macro Settings > Check 'Trust access to the VBA project object model'" & vbLf & vbLf & _
               "Then close and reopen Excel and try again.", _
               vbCritical, "Access Denied"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- Check if already protected ---
    If vbProj.Protection = 1 Then
        MsgBox "VBA Project is already protected." & vbLf & _
               "To change the password, unlock first with UnprotectVBAProject.", _
               vbInformation, "Already Protected"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- Ask for password ---
    Dim pwd As String
    pwd = InputBox("Enter a password to protect your VBA code:" & vbLf & vbLf & _
                   "IMPORTANT: Remember this password!" & vbLf & _
                   "You will need it to unlock the code for future updates.", _
                   "Set VBA Protection Password")
    If pwd = "" Then Exit Sub
    If Len(pwd) < 4 Then
        MsgBox "Password must be at least 4 characters.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- Confirm password ---
    Dim pwd2 As String
    pwd2 = InputBox("Confirm your password:", "Confirm Password")
    If pwd2 <> pwd Then
        MsgBox "Passwords do not match. Protection cancelled.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- Use VBE SendKeys to set protection ---
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    ' Open VBA Editor and ensure it has focus
    Dim vbe As Object: Set vbe = Application.VBE
    vbe.MainWindow.Visible = True
    DoEvents
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:02")
    
    ' Select this project
    Set vbProj = ThisWorkbook.VBProject
    On Error Resume Next
    vbe.ActiveVBProject = vbProj
    On Error GoTo PErr
    DoEvents
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
    
    ' --- Try to open VBA Project Properties dialog ---
    ' Method 1: Try via CommandBars on the VBE "Menu Bar"
    Dim ctrl As Object
    Dim menuBar As Object
    
    On Error Resume Next
    ' Try the VBE Menu Bar first
    Set menuBar = vbe.CommandBars("Menu Bar")
    If Not menuBar Is Nothing Then
        Set ctrl = menuBar.FindControl(ID:=2578, Recursive:=True)
    End If
    
    ' Fallback: try CommandBars(1)
    If ctrl Is Nothing Then
        Set ctrl = vbe.CommandBars(1).FindControl(ID:=2578, Recursive:=True)
    End If
    On Error GoTo PErr
    
    If ctrl Is Nothing Then
        ' Method 2: Use SendKeys to open Tools menu directly
        ' Alt+T opens Tools menu in VBE, then E for Properties
        AppActivate Application.VBE.MainWindow.caption
        DoEvents
        Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
        
        SendKeys "%t", True    ' Alt+T = Tools menu
        DoEvents
        Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
        SendKeys "e", True     ' E = VBAProject Properties
        DoEvents
        Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:02")
    Else
        ' Ensure VBE window is active before executing
        On Error Resume Next
        AppActivate Application.VBE.MainWindow.caption
        On Error GoTo PErr
        DoEvents
        Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
        
        ctrl.Execute
        DoEvents
        Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:02")
    End If
    
    ' --- Navigate to Protection tab ---
    ' The Properties dialog has 2 tabs: General and Protection
    ' Use Ctrl+Tab or click Protection tab
    SendKeys "^{TAB}", True      ' Ctrl+Tab to Protection tab
    DoEvents
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
    
    ' Toggle "Lock project for viewing" checkbox
    SendKeys " ", True
    DoEvents
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
    
    ' Move to Password field and type password
    SendKeys "{TAB}", True
    DoEvents
    SendKeys pwd, True
    DoEvents
    
    ' Move to Confirm Password field and type password
    SendKeys "{TAB}", True
    DoEvents
    SendKeys pwd, True
    DoEvents
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:01")
    
    ' Click OK
    SendKeys "{ENTER}", True
    DoEvents
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:02")
    
    ' Close VBA Editor
    On Error Resume Next
    vbe.MainWindow.Visible = False
    On Error GoTo 0
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    
    ' Verify protection was applied
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim protCheck As Long
    protCheck = ThisWorkbook.VBProject.Protection
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If protCheck = 1 Then
        MsgBox "VBA Project Protected Successfully!" & vbLf & vbLf & _
               "Your code is now locked. No one can view or edit it without the password." & vbLf & vbLf & _
               "IMPORTANT: Save the workbook (Ctrl+S) to preserve the protection." & vbLf & vbLf & _
               "To unlock for updates: Alt+F8 > UnprotectVBAProject > Run", _
               vbInformation, "Code Protected"
    Else
        MsgBox "Protection may not have been applied correctly." & vbLf & vbLf & _
               "Please verify manually:" & vbLf & _
               "1. Press Alt+F11 to open VBA Editor" & vbLf & _
               "2. Go to Tools > VBAProject Properties" & vbLf & _
               "3. Click the Protection tab" & vbLf & _
               "4. Check 'Lock project for viewing'" & vbLf & _
               "5. Enter your password in both fields" & vbLf & _
               "6. Click OK and save the workbook", _
               vbExclamation, "Verify Protection"
    End If
    Exit Sub

PErr:
    On Error Resume Next
    Application.VBE.MainWindow.Visible = False
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    On Error GoTo 0
    MsgBox "Protection Error: " & Err.Description & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "This usually happens when Excel blocks VBA project access." & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "FIX: Enable 'Trust access to the VBA project object model':" & vbLf & _
           "  File > Options > Trust Center > Trust Center Settings" & vbLf & _
           "  > Macro Settings > Check the box" & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "OR use the manual method:" & vbLf & _
           "  1. Press Alt+F11 to open VBA Editor" & vbLf & _
           "  2. Go to Tools > VBAProject Properties > Protection tab" & vbLf & _
           "  3. Check 'Lock project for viewing' and set password" & vbLf & _
           "  4. Click OK and save (Ctrl+S)", _
           vbCritical, "Protection Error"
End Sub

' =============================================================================
'  UNLOCK VBA PROJECT
'  Run this before re-running AutoSetup for updates.
' =============================================================================
Public Sub UnprotectVBAProject()
    MsgBox "To unlock the VBA project:" & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "1. Press Alt+F11 to open the VBA Editor" & vbLf & _
           "2. Double-click the project name in the left panel" & vbLf & _
           "3. Enter your password when prompted" & vbLf & _
           "4. Go to Tools > VBAProject Properties > Protection" & vbLf & _
           "5. Uncheck 'Lock project for viewing'" & vbLf & _
           "6. Clear both password fields" & vbLf & _
           "7. Click OK" & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "After unlocking, you can run AutoSetup for updates," & vbLf & _
           "then run ProtectVBAProject again to re-lock.", _
           vbInformation, "Unlock VBA Project"
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Ensure a worksheet exists with optional headers
' =============================================================
Private Sub EnsureSheet(shName As String, headers As Variant)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(shName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If ws Is Nothing Then
        Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Count))
        ws.Name = shName
    End If
    If Not IsArray(headers) Then Exit Sub
    If UBound(headers) < LBound(headers) Then Exit Sub
    ' Only write headers if row 1 col 1 is empty
    If ws.Cells(1, 1).Value = "" Then
        Dim j As Long
        For j = LBound(headers) To UBound(headers)
            ws.Cells(1, j - LBound(headers) + 1).Value = headers(j)
        Next j
        ' Bold header row
        ws.Range(ws.Cells(1, 1), ws.Cells(1, UBound(headers) - LBound(headers) + 1)).Font.Bold = True
    End If
    ws.Visible = xlSheetVisible
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Seed classes and grades on first run
' =============================================================
Private Sub SeedClassesAndGrades()
    ' --- Classes ---
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS)
    If ws.Cells(2, 1).Value <> "" Then Exit Sub  ' Already seeded
    Dim classes As Variant, streams As Variant
    classes = Array("PP1","PP2","G1","G2","G3","G4","G5","G6","G7","G8","G9")
    streams = Array("A","B")
    Dim r As Long: r = 2
    Dim i As Long, s As Long
    For i = LBound(classes) To UBound(classes)
        For s = LBound(streams) To UBound(streams)
            ws.Cells(r, 1) = classes(i)
            ws.Cells(r, 2) = streams(s)
            r = r + 1
        Next s
    Next i
    
    ' --- Grades ---
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_GRADES)
    If ws.Cells(2, 1).Value <> "" Then Exit Sub
    Dim gc As Variant, mn As Variant, mx As Variant, desc As Variant, lv As Variant
    gc = Array("EE1","EE2","ME1","ME2","AE1","AE2","BE1","BE2")
    mn = Array(90, 75, 58, 41, 31, 21, 11, 0)
    mx = Array(100, 89, 74, 57, 40, 30, 20, 10)
    desc = Array("Exceeding Expectations (High)","Exceeding Expectations","Meeting Expectations (High)","Meeting Expectations","Approaching Expectations (High)","Approaching Expectations","Below Expectations (High)","Below Expectations")
    lv = Array(8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1)
    For i = LBound(gc) To UBound(gc)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 1) = gc(i)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 2) = mn(i)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 3) = mx(i)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 4) = desc(i)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 5) = lv(i)
    Next i
    
    ' --- Subjects ---
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)
    If ws.Cells(2, 1).Value <> "" Then Exit Sub
    Dim subs As Variant, slv As Variant, smx As Variant
    subs = Array("English","Kiswahili","Mathematics","Integrated Science","Social Studies","Religious Education","Creative Arts","Agriculture","Home Science","Physical Education")
    slv = Array("Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary","Upper Primary")
    smx = Array(100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100)
    For i = LBound(subs) To UBound(subs)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 1) = i + 1
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 2) = slv(i)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 3) = subs(i)
        ws.Cells(i + 2, 4) = smx(i)
    Next i
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Seed default admin user
' =============================================================
Private Sub SeedDefaultAdmin()
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)
    If ws.Cells(2, 1).Value <> "" Then Exit Sub  ' Already seeded
    ws.Cells(2, 1) = 1
    ws.Cells(2, 2) = "admin"
    ' Hash the default password instead of storing plain text
    Dim h As Double: h = 5381: Dim ci As Integer
    Dim defPw As String: defPw = "admin123"
    For ci = 1 To Len(defPw): h = (h * 33 + Asc(Mid(defPw, ci, 1))): If h > 2147483647# Then h = h - 4294967296#
    Next ci
    ws.Cells(2, 3) = CStr(Abs(h))
    ws.Cells(2, 4) = "System Administrator"
    ws.Cells(2, 5) = "Admin"
    ws.Cells(2, 6) = "Yes"
    ws.Cells(2, 7) = ""
    ws.Cells(2, 8) = "MUST_CHANGE"  ' Force admin to change default password on first login
    ws.Cells(2, 9) = 0
    ws.Cells(2, 10) = ""
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Seed fee structure on first run
' =============================================================
Private Sub SeedFeeStructure()
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_STR)
    If ws.Cells(2, 1).Value <> "" Then Exit Sub  ' Already seeded
    
    ' Kenya CBC Public School Fee Structure (per term, KSh)
    ' Sources: MoE Gazette 2015, TSC/BOG circulars 2024
    ' Columns: FeeID | FeeType | Amount | ClassLevel
    Dim classes As Variant
    classes = Array("PP1","PP2","G1","G2","G3","G4","G5","G6","G7","G8","G9")
    ' Amounts per fee type per class index
    Dim fAmtTuition As Variant:  fAmtTuition  = Array(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 10000, 10000, 12000)
    Dim fAmtActivity As Variant: fAmtActivity = Array(1500, 1500, 2500, 2500, 2500, 3500, 3500, 3500, 5000, 5000, 5500)
    Dim fAmtLunch As Variant:    fAmtLunch    = Array(2000, 2000, 3000, 3000, 3000, 3500, 3500, 3500, 4500, 4500, 4500)
    Dim fAmtExam As Variant:     fAmtExam     = Array(500, 500, 800, 800, 800, 1000, 1000, 1000, 1500, 1500, 2000)
    Dim r As Long: r = 2
    Dim i As Long
    Dim cls As String
    For i = LBound(classes) To UBound(classes)
        cls = CStr(classes(i))
        If fAmtTuition(i) > 0 Then
            ws.Cells(r, 1) = "FEE" & Format(r - 1, "000"): ws.Cells(r, 2) = "School Development Levy": ws.Cells(r, 3) = fAmtTuition(i): ws.Cells(r, 4) = cls: r = r + 1
        End If
        ws.Cells(r, 1) = "FEE" & Format(r - 1, "000"): ws.Cells(r, 2) = "Activity Fee":        ws.Cells(r, 3) = fAmtActivity(i): ws.Cells(r, 4) = cls: r = r + 1
        ws.Cells(r, 1) = "FEE" & Format(r - 1, "000"): ws.Cells(r, 2) = "Lunch Contribution":   ws.Cells(r, 3) = fAmtLunch(i):    ws.Cells(r, 4) = cls: r = r + 1
        ws.Cells(r, 1) = "FEE" & Format(r - 1, "000"): ws.Cells(r, 2) = "Exam & KNEC Fee":      ws.Cells(r, 3) = fAmtExam(i):     ws.Cells(r, 4) = cls: r = r + 1
    Next i
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Seed default settings on first run
' =============================================================
Private Sub SeedDefaultSettings()
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SETTINGS)
    If ws.Cells(2, 1).Value <> "" Then Exit Sub  ' Already seeded
    ' SettingKey | SettingValue | Description
    ws.Cells(2, 1) = "SCHOOL_NAME":    ws.Cells(2, 2) = "MAGANA PRIMARY SCHOOL":  ws.Cells(2, 3) = "Name of the school displayed in reports and dashboard"
    ws.Cells(3, 1) = "CURRENT_TERM":   ws.Cells(3, 2) = "Term 1":                ws.Cells(3, 3) = "Active academic term (Term 1, Term 2, Term 3)"
    ws.Cells(4, 1) = "CURRENT_YEAR":   ws.Cells(4, 2) = "2026":                  ws.Cells(4, 3) = "Active academic year"
    ws.Cells(5, 1) = "AUTO_BACKUP":    ws.Cells(5, 2) = "YES":                   ws.Cells(5, 3) = "Auto-backup on close (YES/NO). Backs up every 4 hours."
    ws.Cells(6, 1) = "BACKUP_KEEP":    ws.Cells(6, 2) = "10":                    ws.Cells(6, 3) = "Maximum number of backup files to keep (oldest purged)"
    ws.Cells(7, 1) = "SCHOOL_MOTTO":   ws.Cells(7, 2) = "Education for All":     ws.Cells(7, 3) = "School motto shown on report cards"
    ws.Cells(8, 1) = "SCHOOL_ADDRESS": ws.Cells(8, 2) = "P.O. Box 100, Kenya":   ws.Cells(8, 3) = "School postal address for official documents"
    ws.Cells(9, 1) = "SCHOOL_PHONE":   ws.Cells(9, 2) = "0700-000-000":          ws.Cells(9, 3) = "School phone number"
    ws.Cells(10, 1) = "SCHOOL_EMAIL":  ws.Cells(10, 2) = "info@magana.ac.ke":    ws.Cells(10, 3) = "School email address"
    ws.Cells(11, 1) = "SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH": ws.Cells(11, 2) = "":                  ws.Cells(11, 3) = "File name of the uploaded system logo (MUST reside in same folder)"
    ws.Cells(12, 1) = "SCHOOL_LOGO_BMP":  ws.Cells(12, 2) = "":                  ws.Cells(12, 3) = "Auto-generated BMP version of the logo for Login form display"
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Add or replace a VBA standard module
' =============================================================
Private Function AddMod(modName As String) As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents.Remove _
        ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents(modName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    Set AddMod = ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents.Add(1)  ' vbext_ct_StdModule
    AddMod.Name = modName
End Function

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: Add or replace a VBA UserForm
' =============================================================
Private Function AddForm(frmName As String, caption As String, _
                         w As Single, h As Single) As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents.Remove _
        ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents(frmName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    Set AddForm = ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents.Add(3)  ' vbext_ct_MSForm
    AddForm.Name = frmName
    AddForm.Properties("Caption") = caption
    AddForm.Properties("Width") = w
    AddForm.Properties("Height") = h
End Function

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: AL – Add Label control
' =============================================================
Private Sub AL(d As Object, n As String, cap As String, _
               l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, _
               Optional h As Single = 16, Optional fs As Single = 9)
    Dim ctl As Object: Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", n)
    ctl.caption = cap: ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t
    ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h: ctl.Font.Size = fs
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: AT – Add TextBox control
' =============================================================
Private Sub AT(d As Object, n As String, _
               l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, _
               Optional h As Single = 20)
    Dim ctl As Object: Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", n)
    ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t: ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: AB – Add CommandButton control
' =============================================================
Private Sub AB(d As Object, n As String, cap As String, _
               l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, h As Single, _
               bc As Long, fc As Long)
    Dim ctl As Object: Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.CommandButton.1", n)
    ctl.caption = cap: ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t
    ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h
    ctl.BackColor = bc: ctl.ForeColor = fc
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: AC – Add ComboBox control
' =============================================================
Private Sub AC(d As Object, n As String, _
               l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, _
               Optional h As Single = 20)
    Dim ctl As Object: Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", n)
    ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t: ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h
    ctl.Style = 2  ' fmStyleDropDownList
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: ALF – Add Label inside a Frame control
' =============================================================
Private Sub ALF(d As Object, frameName As String, n As String, cap As String, _
                l As Single, t As Single, _
                Optional w As Single = 80, Optional h As Single = 14, _
                Optional fs As Single = 8)
    Dim ctl As Object
    Set ctl = d.Controls(frameName).Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", n)
    ctl.caption = cap: ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t
    ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h: ctl.Font.Size = fs
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: ATF – Add TextBox inside a Frame control
' =============================================================
Private Sub ATF(d As Object, frameName As String, n As String, _
                l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, _
                Optional h As Single = 18)
    Dim ctl As Object
    Set ctl = d.Controls(frameName).Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", n)
    ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t: ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: ABF – Add CommandButton inside a Frame control
' =============================================================
Private Sub ABF(d As Object, frameName As String, n As String, cap As String, _
                l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, h As Single, _
                bc As Long, fc As Long)
    Dim ctl As Object
    Set ctl = d.Controls(frameName).Controls.Add("Forms.CommandButton.1", n)
    ctl.caption = cap: ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t
    ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h
    ctl.BackColor = bc: ctl.ForeColor = fc
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  HELPER: ACF – Add ComboBox inside a Frame control
' =============================================================
Private Sub ACF(d As Object, frameName As String, n As String, _
                l As Single, t As Single, w As Single, _
                Optional h As Single = 18)
    Dim ctl As Object
    Set ctl = d.Controls(frameName).Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", n)
    ctl.Left = l: ctl.Top = t: ctl.Width = w: ctl.Height = h
    ctl.Style = 2
End Sub

' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM 2 – MAIN MENU (Navigation Hub)
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateMainMenu()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmMainMenu", "CBC School System - Main Menu", 660, 500)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblT", "CBC SCHOOL MANAGEMENT SYSTEM", 0, 0, 660, 36, 14
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblT").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblT").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblT").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 36, 660, 3
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "lblSub", "Welcome! Select a module below to get started.", 0, 44, 660, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblSub").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblSub").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblSub").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === ROW 1: STUDENT MANAGEMENT ===
    AL d, "lblSec1", "  STUDENT MANAGEMENT", 20, 68, 620, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblSec1").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSec1").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblSec1").BackColor = &H1F3864
    
    AB d, "btnAdm", ChrW(9654) & " Student Admission", 20, 90, 200, 36, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnAdm").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnAtt", ChrW(9654) & " Daily Attendance", 230, 90, 200, 36, &H6A1B9A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnAtt").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnCBC", ChrW(9654) & " CBC Assessment", 440, 90, 200, 36, &H00695C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCBC").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === ROW 2: ACADEMIC ===
    AL d, "lblSec2", "  ACADEMIC", 20, 138, 620, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblSec2").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSec2").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblSec2").BackColor = &H2E7D32
    
    AB d, "btnMarks", ChrW(9654) & " Enter Marks", 20, 160, 200, 36, &H388E3C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnMarks").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnRpt", ChrW(9654) & " Reports Center", 230, 160, 200, 36, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnRpt").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnImport", ChrW(9654) & " Import Data", 440, 160, 200, 36, &HFF6F00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnImport").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === ROW 3: FINANCE & STAFF ===
    AL d, "lblSec3", "  FINANCE & STAFF", 20, 208, 620, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblSec3").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSec3").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblSec3").BackColor = &H1B5E20
    
    AB d, "btnFee", ChrW(9654) & " Fee Collection", 20, 230, 200, 36, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFee").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnTch", ChrW(9654) & " Staff Records", 230, 230, 200, 36, &H5A3416, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnTch").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnDb", ChrW(9654) & " Database Browser", 440, 230, 200, 36, &H3E2723, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDb").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === ROW 4: ADMINISTRATION ===
    AL d, "lblSec4", "  ADMINISTRATION", 20, 278, 620, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblSec4").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSec4").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblSec4").BackColor = &H5A3416
    
    AB d, "btnSettings", ChrW(9654) & " System Settings", 20, 300, 200, 36, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSettings").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnBackup", ChrW(9654) & " Backup Manager", 230, 300, 200, 36, &HE65100, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnBackup").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnUsers", ChrW(9654) & " User Management", 440, 300, 200, 36, &H4527A0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnUsers").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === EXIT BUTTON ===
    AB d, "btnExit", ChrW(10005) & "  LOGOUT / EXIT", 230, 360, 200, 38, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.", 20, 440, 620, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HE8EBF0: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    ' --- UserForm code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnAdm_Click():      frmAdmission.Show:     End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFee_Click():      frmFees.Show:          End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnAtt_Click():      frmAttendance.Show:    End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnTch_Click():      frmTeacher.Show:       End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnRpt_Click():      frmReports.Show:       End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDb_Click():       frmDatabase.Show:      End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnImport_Click():   Call ImportNominalRoll: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnMarks_Click():    frmEnterMarks.Show:    End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSettings_Click(): frmSettings.Show:      End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCBC_Click():      frmCBCAssessment.Show: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnBackup_Click():   frmBackup.Show:        End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnUsers_Click():    frmUserMgmt.Show:      End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnExit_Click():     Unload Me:             End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -------------------------------------------------------------
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateAdmissionForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmAdmission", "CBC Student Admission", 680, 460)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    Dim ctl As Object
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblT", "CBC STUDENT ADMISSION", 0, 0, 680, 28, 12
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblT").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblT").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblT").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc2", "", 0, 28, 680, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc2").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc2").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SEARCH BAR PANEL ===
    AL d, "lblSrchBg", "", 20, 38, 640, 28
    d.Controls("lblSrchBg").BackColor = &HF6F8FA: d.Controls("lblSrchBg").Caption = ""
    d.Controls("lblSrchBg").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblSrchBg").BorderColor = &HD0D0D0
    
    Dim lSrchIco As Object: Set lSrchIco = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "lblSrchIco")
    lSrchIco.Caption = ChrW(9654) & " Search Learner:"
    lSrchIco.Left = 30: lSrchIco.Top = 44: lSrchIco.Width = 100: lSrchIco.Height = 16: lSrchIco.Font.Size = 9: lSrchIco.Font.Bold = True: lSrchIco.BackStyle = 0: lSrchIco.ForeColor = &H444444

    AT d, "txtSearch", 130, 41, 340, 20
    d.Controls("txtSearch").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnFind", ChrW(9654) & " FIND", 480, 40, 80, 24, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === PHOTO PANEL (right side, self-contained) ===
    AL d, "lblPhotoBg", "", 470, 75, 190, 200
    d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").BackColor = &HF6F8FA: d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").Caption = ""
    d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").BorderColor = &HD0D0D0
    
    AL d, "lblPhotoTitle", "  STUDENT PHOTO", 470, 75, 190, 18, 8
    d.Controls("lblPhotoTitle").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblPhotoTitle").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblPhotoTitle").BackColor = &H1F3864
    
    Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Image.1", "imgPhoto")
    ctl.Left = 500: ctl.Top = 100: ctl.Width = 130: ctl.Height = 130
    ctl.BorderStyle = 1: ctl.BackColor = &HFFFFFF: ctl.PictureSizeMode = 1
    ctl.BorderColor = &HD0D0D0
    
    AB d, "btnPhoto", ChrW(9998) & " Upload Photo", 500, 238, 130, 28, &H00695C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnPhoto").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnPhoto").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === ROW 1 ===
    AL d, "la", "Learner ID:", 20, 82, 80: AT d, "txtSID", 105, 80, 140
    d.Controls("la").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("la").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("la").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("la").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("la").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtSID").Height = 20
    AL d, "lb", "Adm No.:", 255, 82, 80: AT d, "txtAdm", 340, 80, 115
    d.Controls("lb").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lb").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lb").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lb").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lb").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtAdm").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 2 ===
    AL d, "lc", "Surname:", 20, 106, 80: AT d, "txtFN", 105, 104, 140
    d.Controls("lc").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lc").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lc").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lc").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lc").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtFN").Height = 20
    AL d, "ld", "Other Names:", 255, 106, 80: AT d, "txtLN", 340, 104, 115
    d.Controls("ld").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("ld").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("ld").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("ld").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("ld").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtLN").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 3 ===
    AL d, "le", "Birth Date:", 20, 130, 80: AT d, "txtDOB", 105, 128, 140
    d.Controls("le").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("le").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("le").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("le").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("le").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtDOB").Height = 20
    AL d, "lf", "Gender:", 255, 130, 80: AC d, "cmbGen", 340, 128, 115
    d.Controls("lf").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lf").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lf").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lf").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lf").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("cmbGen").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 4 ===
    AL d, "lg", "Class Lvl:", 20, 154, 80: AC d, "cmbCls", 105, 152, 140
    d.Controls("lg").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lg").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lg").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lg").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lg").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("cmbCls").Height = 20
    AL d, "lgStr", "Stream:", 255, 154, 80: AC d, "cmbStream", 340, 152, 115
    d.Controls("lgStr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lgStr").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lgStr").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lgStr").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lgStr").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("cmbStream").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 5 ===
    AL d, "lh", "UPI No.:", 20, 178, 80: AT d, "txtUPI", 105, 176, 140
    d.Controls("lh").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lh").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lh").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lh").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lh").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtUPI").Height = 20
    AL d, "li", "Birth Cert:", 255, 178, 80: AT d, "txtBC", 340, 176, 115
    d.Controls("li").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("li").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("li").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("li").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("li").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtBC").Height = 20

    ' === ROW 6 ===
    AL d, "lj", "Status:", 20, 202, 80: AC d, "cmbSts", 105, 200, 140
    d.Controls("lj").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lj").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lj").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lj").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lj").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("cmbSts").Height = 20
    AL d, "lk", "Adm Date:", 255, 202, 80: AT d, "txtDt", 340, 200, 115
    d.Controls("lk").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lk").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lk").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lk").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lk").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtDt").Height = 20
    
    ' === SECTION DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv", "", 20, 230, 640, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblDiv").Caption = ""
    
    ' === ROW 7 ===
    AL d, "pa", "Guardian:", 20, 240, 80: AT d, "txtGN", 105, 238, 350
    d.Controls("pa").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pa").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("pa").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("pa").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pa").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtGN").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 8 ===
    AL d, "pb", "Phone:", 20, 264, 80: AT d, "txtGP", 105, 262, 140
    d.Controls("pb").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pb").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("pb").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("pb").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pb").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtGP").Height = 20
    AL d, "pc", "Blood Grp:", 255, 264, 65: AC d, "cmbBG", 325, 262, 130
    d.Controls("pc").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pc").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("pc").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("pc").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pc").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("cmbBG").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 9 ===
    AL d, "pd", "Allergies:", 20, 288, 80: AT d, "txtAlg", 105, 286, 350
    d.Controls("pd").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pd").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("pd").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("pd").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pd").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtAlg").Height = 20
    
    ' === ROW 10 ===
    AL d, "pe", "Spl Needs:", 20, 312, 80: AT d, "txtSN", 105, 310, 350
    d.Controls("pe").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pe").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("pe").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("pe").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pe").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("txtSN").Height = 20
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnSave", ChrW(10003) & " SAVE", 20, 348, 100, 28, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnUpdate", ChrW(8634) & " UPDATE", 126, 348, 100, 28, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnUpdate").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnUpdate").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnDelete", ChrW(10005) & " DELETE", 232, 348, 100, 28, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDelete").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnDelete").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnReset", "RESET", 338, 348, 100, 28, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnReset").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnReset").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE SCREEN", 540, 348, 120, 28, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.", 20, 395, 640, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HE8EBF0: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    ' --- UserForm code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & "Public CurrentRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateAdmDropdowns(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtSID"").Value = NextStudentID()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtDt"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbSts"").Value = ""Active""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtSID"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  CurrentRow = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbCls_Change():  Call PopulateStreams(Me, Me.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click():   Call SaveStudent(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSearch_Click(): Call FindStudent(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFind_Click():   Call FindStudent(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnUpdate_Click(): Call UpdateStudent(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelete_Click(): Call DeleteStudent(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnReset_Click():  Call ResetAdmForm(Me):  End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnPhoto_Click():  Call BrowsePhoto(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click():  Unload Me:              End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM 3 – FEE COLLECTION
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateFeesForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmFees", "Fee Collection", 560, 430)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblT", "FEE COLLECTION", 0, 0, 560, 28, 12
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblT").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblT").BackColor = &H1B5E20: d.Controls("lblT").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 28, 560, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' --- Margin: 20 ---
    AL d, "la", "Adm No.", 20, 47, 70: AT d, "txtAdm", 95, 45, 120
    d.Controls("la").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtAdm").Height = 20
    AB d, "btnFind", "FIND STUDENT", 230, 44, 110, 24, &HFB8C00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Bold = True
    
    AL d, "lb", "Student Name", 20, 73, 70: AT d, "txtName", 95, 71, 245
    d.Controls("lb").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtName").Height = 20: d.Controls("txtName").Enabled = False
    
    AL d, "lc", "Fee Type", 20, 99, 70: AC d, "cmbType", 95, 97, 245
    d.Controls("lc").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbType").Height = 20
    
    AL d, "ld", "Amt Due (KSh)", 20, 125, 70: AT d, "txtDue", 95, 123, 120
    d.Controls("ld").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("txtDue").Height = 20: d.Controls("txtDue").Enabled = False
    AL d, "le", "Amount Paid", 230, 125, 70: AT d, "txtPaid", 300, 123, 120
    d.Controls("le").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("txtPaid").Height = 20
    
    AL d, "lf", "Balance", 20, 151, 70: AT d, "txtBal", 95, 149, 120
    d.Controls("lf").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtBal").Height = 20: d.Controls("txtBal").Enabled = False
    AL d, "lg", "Payment Mode", 230, 151, 70: AC d, "cmbMode", 300, 149, 120
    d.Controls("lg").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbMode").Height = 20
    
    AL d, "lh", "Receipt No.", 20, 177, 70: AT d, "txtRcp", 95, 175, 120
    d.Controls("lh").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtRcp").Height = 20: d.Controls("txtRcp").Enabled = False
    AL d, "li", "Date", 230, 177, 70: AT d, "txtDt", 300, 175, 120
    d.Controls("li").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtDt").Height = 20
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv1", "", 20, 205, 520, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv1").BackColor = &HE0E0E0: d.Controls("lblDiv1").Caption = ""
    
    ' === PRIMARY ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnCollect", ChrW(10003) & " COLLECT FEE", 20, 215, 250, 32, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCollect").Font.Size = 10
    AB d, "btnHist", ChrW(9776) & " VIEW HISTORY", 290, 215, 250, 32, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnHist").Font.Size = 10
    
    ' === RECEIPT SECTION HEADER ===
    AL d, "lblRcpH", "  RECEIPT PRINTING", 20, 260, 520, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblRcpH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblRcpH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblRcpH").BackColor = &H5A3416
    
    ' === RECEIPT BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnPrintRcp", ChrW(9113) & " PRINT LAST RECEIPT", 20, 288, 150, 27, &H795548, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnPrintRcp").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnPrintRcp").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnRcpHist", ChrW(9776) & " RECEIPT HISTORY", 185, 288, 150, 27, &HFF6F00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnRcpHist").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnRcpHist").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnBulkPrint", ChrW(9114) & " BULK PRINT (4-UP)", 350, 288, 170, 27, &H6A1B9A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnBulkPrint").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnBulkPrint").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv2", "", 20, 325, 520, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv2").BackColor = &HE0E0E0: d.Controls("lblDiv2").Caption = ""
    
    ' === BOTTOM BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnReset", "RESET FORM", 20, 335, 100, 28, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnReset").Font.Size = 8
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE WINDOW", 420, 335, 100, 28, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 8
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.", 20, 375, 520, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call InitFeeForm(Me): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFind_Click():    Call FindStudentFee(Me):  End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbType_Change():   Call AutoFillAmt(Me):    End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtPaid_Change()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rawDue As String: rawDue = Replace(Me.Controls(""txtDue"").Value, "","", """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rawPaid As String: rawPaid = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtPaid"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsNumeric(rawDue) And IsNumeric(rawPaid) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim due As Double: due = CDbl(rawDue)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim paid As Double: paid = CDbl(rawPaid)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtBal"").Value = Format(due - paid, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If paid > due And due > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(9888) & "" OVERPAYMENT: Amount exceeds balance by KSh "" & Format(paid - due, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ElseIf paid > 0 And paid <= due Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Remaining after payment: KSh "" & Format(due - paid, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCollect_Click(): Call CollectFee(Me):       End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnHist_Click():    Call FeeHistory(Me):       End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnPrintRcp_Click(): Call PrintLastReceipt(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnRcpHist_Click(): frmFeeReceipt.Show vbModeless: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnBulkPrint_Click(): frmFeeReceipt.Show vbModeless: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnReset_Click():   Call ResetFeeForm(Me):     End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click():   Unload Me:                 End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Ensure clean close - navigate back to Dashboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dWs As Worksheet: Set dWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""Dashboard"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not dWs Is Nothing Then dWs.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM 4 – DAILY ATTENDANCE
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateAttendanceForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmAttendance", "Daily Attendance", 580, 460)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "DAILY ATTENDANCE", 0, 0, 580, 28, 12
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &H6A1B9A
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc2", "", 0, 28, 580, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc2").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc2").Caption = ""
    
    ' === FILTER PANEL ===
    AL d, "lblFltBg", "", 20, 38, 540, 36
    d.Controls("lblFltBg").BackColor = &HF6F8FA: d.Controls("lblFltBg").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblFltBg").BorderColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblFltBg").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "la", "Class:", 30, 48, 40, 14, 9: AC d, "cmbCls", 70, 46, 70
    d.Controls("la").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("la").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("la").BackStyle = 0
    d.Controls("cmbCls").Style = 2: d.Controls("cmbCls").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbCls").Height = 20

    d.Controls("txtDt").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtDt").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("txtDt").Height = 20

    d.Controls("lblHdrBg").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblHdrBg").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblHdrBg").Font.Bold = True

    Dim lSt As Object: Set lSt = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstS")
    lSt.Left = 20: lSt.Top = 106: lSt.Width = 540: lSt.Height = 220
    lSt.ColumnCount = 3: lSt.ColumnWidths = "80;300;120"
    lSt.BorderStyle = 1: lSt.Font.Size = 9: lSt.BackColor = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === QUICK ACTIONS ===
    AL d, "lc", "Set Status:", 20, 338, 65, 14, 9: AC d, "cmbSt", 90, 336, 110
    d.Controls("lc").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lc").ForeColor = &H444444

    d.Controls("btnAll").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnAll").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === BOTTOM ACTION BAR ===
    AB d, "btnSave", ChrW(10003) & "  SAVE ATTENDANCE", 20, 370, 380, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Bold = True

    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.", 20, 410, 540, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HE8EBF0: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call InitAttForm(Me): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbCls_Change():  Call PopulateStreams(Me, Me.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnLoad_Click():  Call LoadClassAtt(Me):     End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnMark_Click():  Call MarkOneAtt(Me):       End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnAll_Click():   Call MarkAllPresent(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click():  Call SaveAllAtt(Me):       End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Call UnhookMouseWheel: Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstS_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstS"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

Private Sub CreateTeacherForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmTeacher", "Staff Management", 560, 460)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblT", "STAFF / TEACHER RECORDS", 0, 0, 560, 28, 12

    d.Controls("lblT").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("lblT").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc2", "", 0, 28, 560, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc2").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc2").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SEARCH BAR PANEL ===
    AL d, "lblSrchBg", "", 20, 36, 520, 28

    d.Controls("lg").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("lg").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lg").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lg").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lg").BackStyle = 0
    d.Controls("txtJD").Height = 20
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv1", "", 20, 274, 520, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv1").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblDiv1").Caption = ""
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS (Row 1: primary actions) ===
    AB d, "btnSave", ChrW(10003) & " SAVE", 20, 284, 110, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnUpdate", ChrW(8634) & " UPDATE", 140, 284, 110, 30, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnUpdate").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnUpdate").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnDel", ChrW(10005) & " DELETE", 260, 284, 110, 30, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDel").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnDel").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnFind", ChrW(9654) & " FIND RECORD", 380, 284, 130, 30, &HFB8C00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS (Row 2: secondary) ===
    AB d, "btnReset", "RESET FORM", 20, 325, 110, 26, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnReset").Font.Size = 8
    AB d, "btnCrtUsr", ChrW(9654) & " CREATE USER", 150, 325, 140, 26, &H4527A0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCrtUsr").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnCrtUsr").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnCls", "CLOSE", 400, 325, 110, 26, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCls").Font.Size = 8
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.", 20, 368, 520, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    ' === USERFORM CODE ===
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & "Public CurrentRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call InitTeacherForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  CurrentRow = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click(): Call SaveTeacher(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnUpdate_Click(): Call UpdateTeacher(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSearch_Click(): Call FindTeacher(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFind_Click(): Call FindTeacher(Me):   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDel_Click():  Call DeleteTeacher(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnRst_Click():  Call ResetTeacherForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnReset_Click(): Call ResetTeacherForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCls_Click():  Unload Me:              End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCrtUsr_Click(): Call CreateUserFromStaffForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub optTeacher_Click(): Call ToggleStaffType(Me, True): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub optStaff_Click(): Call ToggleStaffType(Me, False): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtSearch_KeyDown(ByVal kc As MSForms.ReturnInteger, ByVal Sh As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If kc = 13 Then Call FindTeacher(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM 6 – REPORTS
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateReportsForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmReports", "CBC Reports Center", 420, 280)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblT", "CBC SYSTEM REPORTS", 0, 0, 420, 28, 12
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblT").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblT").BackColor = &H1F4E79: d.Controls("lblT").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Report Buttons ---
    AB d, "btn1", "CLASS LIST REPORT", 40, 45, 340, 32, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn1").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btn2", "ATTENDANCE SUMMARY", 40, 85, 340, 32, &H6A1B9A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn2").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btn3", "FEE ARREARS REPORT", 40, 125, 340, 32, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn3").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btn4", "STUDENT POPULATION", 40, 165, 340, 32, &H388E3C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn4").Font.Size = 9
    
    AB d, "btnCls", "CLOSE REPORTS", 140, 220, 140, 28, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCls").Font.Size = 9
    
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn1_Click(): Call RptClassList:   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn2_Click(): Call RptAttSummary:  End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn3_Click(): Call RptFeeArrears:  End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn4_Click(): Call RptStudCount:   End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCls_Click(): Unload Me:         End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM 7 – DATABASE BROWSER
' -------------------------------------------------------------
' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM 7 â€“ DATABASE BROWSER  (Professional Rebuild)
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateDatabaseForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmDatabase", "System Database Browser", 740, 540)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFAFAFA
    f.Properties("ScrollBars") = 0

    ' --- Layout constants with proper margins ---
    ' NOTE: VBA form Height includes title bar (~28pt), so internal ≈ 510.
    '       We calculate from intH=500 to guarantee a safe bottom margin.
    Dim fW As Single: fW = 724     ' usable form width
    Dim intH As Single: intH = 500 ' conservative internal height
    Dim lpW As Single: lpW = 160   ' left panel width
    Dim rpL As Single: rpL = 162   ' right panel left (lpW + 2 divider)
    Dim rpW As Single: rpW = fW - rpL  ' right panel width (~562)
    Dim hdrH As Single: hdrH = 30  ' header height
    Dim accH As Single: accH = 2   ' accent bar
    Dim tbH As Single: tbH = 40    ' toolbar height (comfortable)
    Dim pagH As Single: pagH = 26  ' pagination bar (comfortable)
    Dim stH As Single: stH = 20    ' status bar
    Dim panTop As Single: panTop = hdrH + accH  ' 32
    Dim tbTop As Single: tbTop = panTop
    Dim tbDivY As Single: tbDivY = tbTop + tbH
    Dim fraTop As Single: fraTop = tbDivY + 1
    Dim stY As Single: stY = intH - stH          ' status bar top = 480
    Dim pagY As Single: pagY = stY - pagH - 2     ' pagination top = 452
    Dim fraH As Single: fraH = pagY - fraTop - 2   ' data area height
    Dim panH As Single: panH = stY + stH - panTop

    ' === HEADER ===
    AL d, "lblT", "  " & ChrW(9679) & "  SYSTEM DATABASE BROWSER", 0, 0, fW, hdrH, 11
    With d.Controls("lblT")
        .Font.Bold = True: .ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: .BackColor = &H3E2723
        .Font.Name = "Segoe UI": .TextAlign = 1
    End With
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, hdrH, fW, accH
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""

    ' === LEFT PANEL ===
    AL d, "lblPanel", "", 0, panTop, lpW, panH
    d.Controls("lblPanel").BackColor = &HF0F0F0: d.Controls("lblPanel").Caption = ""

    AL d, "lblPanHdr", "  " & ChrW(9776) & "  TABLES", 0, panTop, lpW, 22, 9
    With d.Controls("lblPanHdr")
        .Font.Bold = True: .ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: .BackColor = &H5D4037
    End With

    AT d, "txtTblSearch", 4, panTop + 26, lpW - 28, 20
    d.Controls("txtTblSearch").Font.Size = 9

    AB d, "btnTblFind", ChrW(9654), lpW - 22, panTop + 25, 20, 22, &H795548, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnTblFind").Font.Size = 9

    Dim lTbl As Object: Set lTbl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstTables")
    lTbl.Left = 2: lTbl.Top = panTop + 50: lTbl.Width = lpW - 4: lTbl.Height = panH - 52
    lTbl.Font.Size = 9: lTbl.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    lTbl.BorderStyle = 0: lTbl.BackColor = &HF0F0F0

    ' === VERTICAL DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblVDiv", "", lpW, panTop, 2, panH
    d.Controls("lblVDiv").BackColor = &HDADADA: d.Controls("lblVDiv").Caption = ""

    ' === TOOLBAR ===
    AL d, "lblTbBg", "", rpL, tbTop, rpW, tbH
    d.Controls("lblTbBg").BackColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblTbBg").Caption = ""

    Dim tbY As Single: tbY = tbTop + 10  ' button vertical center

    AL d, "lblSrch", ChrW(9906) & " Search:", rpL + 8, tbY + 2, 52, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblSrch").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lblSrch").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("lblSrch").Font.Bold = True

    AT d, "txtSearch", rpL + 62, tbY, 150, 20
    d.Controls("txtSearch").Font.Size = 9

    ' --- Action buttons with comfortable spacing ---
    Dim bx As Single: bx = rpL + 218
    AB d, "btnFind", ChrW(9654) & " FIND", bx, tbY, 52, 22, &H3E2723, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnFind").Font.Bold = True

    AB d, "btnClear", "CLEAR", bx + 56, tbY, 46, 22, &H9E9E9E, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClear").Font.Size = 8

    AB d, "btnExport", ChrW(8659) & " CSV", bx + 106, tbY, 50, 22, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnExport").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnExport").Font.Bold = True

    AB d, "btnDelRow", ChrW(10005) & " ROW", bx + 160, tbY, 50, 22, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDelRow").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnDelRow").Font.Bold = True

    AB d, "btnRefresh", ChrW(8635) & " REFRESH", bx + 214, tbY, 64, 22, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnRefresh").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnRefresh").Font.Bold = True

    AB d, "btnPrint", ChrW(9113) & " PRINT", bx + 282, tbY, 56, 22, &H5A3416, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnPrint").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnPrint").Font.Bold = True

    AL d, "lblTbDiv", "", rpL, tbDivY, rpW, 1
    d.Controls("lblTbDiv").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblTbDiv").Caption = ""

    ' === SCROLLABLE DATA FRAME ===
    Dim fra As Object: Set fra = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraData")
    fra.Left = rpL: fra.Top = fraTop: fra.Width = rpW: fra.Height = fraH
    fra.BorderStyle = 0: fra.Caption = ""
    fra.ScrollBars = 1  ' fmScrollBarsHorizontal
    fra.ScrollWidth = rpW
    fra.KeepScrollBarsVisible = 0
    fra.BackColor = &HFFFFFF

    Dim lHdr As Object: Set lHdr = fra.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstHeaders")
    lHdr.Left = 0: lHdr.Top = 0: lHdr.Width = rpW: lHdr.Height = 20
    lHdr.Font.Bold = True: lHdr.ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: lHdr.BackColor = &H5D4037
    lHdr.Font.Name = "Consolas": lHdr.Font.Size = 9
    lHdr.ColumnCount = 1: lHdr.IntegralHeight = False: lHdr.BorderStyle = 0

    Dim lDat As Object: Set lDat = fra.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstData")
    lDat.Left = 0: lDat.Top = 20: lDat.Width = rpW: lDat.Height = fraH - 22
    lDat.ColumnCount = 1
    lDat.Font.Size = 9: lDat.Font.Name = "Consolas": lDat.BorderStyle = 0
    lDat.BackColor = &HFFFFFF: lDat.IntegralHeight = False

    ' === PAGINATION BAR ===
    AL d, "lblPagBg", "", rpL, pagY, rpW, pagH
    d.Controls("lblPagBg").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblPagBg").Caption = ""

    AB d, "btnPrev", ChrW(9664) & " PREV", rpL + 6, pagY + 3, 60, 20, &H546E7A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnPrev").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "lblPage", "Page 1 / 1", rpL + 72, pagY + 5, 90, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblPage").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("lblPage").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lblPage").BackStyle = 0

    AB d, "btnNext", "NEXT " & ChrW(9654), rpL + 168, pagY + 3, 60, 20, &H546E7A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnNext").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "lblRCount", "0 records  |  0 columns", rpL + 240, pagY + 5, 180, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblRCount").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblRCount").BackStyle = 0

    AB d, "btnClose", ChrW(10005) & " CLOSE", rpL + rpW - 72, pagY + 3, 66, 20, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Bold = True

    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblSt", "  " & ChrW(9679) & "  Ready - select a table from the left panel.", 0, stY, fW, stH, 9
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &H3E2723: d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF

    ' === USERFORM CODE (with Resize handler) ===
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public CurPage  As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public TotalPages As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public PageSize As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  CurPage = 1: TotalPages = 1: PageSize = 50" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.txtTblSearch.Value = ""Filter tables...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.txtSearch.Value = ""Search all columns...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call InitDbForm(Me): Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Resize handler ---
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Resize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fW As Single, fH As Single" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lpW As Single, rpL As Single, rpW As Single" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim panTop As Single, tbH As Single, pagH As Single, stH As Single" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fraTop As Single, fraH As Single, pagY As Single, stY As Single, panH As Single" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fW = Me.InsideWidth: fH = Me.InsideHeight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fW < 400 Then fW = 400" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fH < 340 Then fH = 340" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lpW = 160: rpL = 162: rpW = fW - rpL" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  panTop = 32: tbH = 40: pagH = 26: stH = 20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fraTop = panTop + tbH + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  stY = fH - stH" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  pagY = stY - pagH - 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fraH = pagY - fraTop - 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fraH < 60 Then fraH = 60" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  panH = stY + stH - panTop" & vbCrLf
    ' Header
    c = c & "  Me.lblT.Width = fW: Me.lblAcc.Width = fW" & vbCrLf
    ' Left panel
    c = c & "  Me.lblPanel.Height = panH: Me.lblPanHdr.Width = lpW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.lblVDiv.Height = panH" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.lstTables.Height = panH - 52" & vbCrLf
    ' Toolbar bg
    c = c & "  Me.lblTbBg.Left = rpL: Me.lblTbBg.Width = rpW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.lblTbDiv.Left = rpL: Me.lblTbDiv.Width = rpW: Me.lblTbDiv.Top = panTop + tbH" & vbCrLf
    ' Data frame
    c = c & "  Me.fraData.Left = rpL: Me.fraData.Top = fraTop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.fraData.Width = rpW: Me.fraData.Height = fraH" & vbCrLf
    ' Pagination bar
    c = c & "  Me.lblPagBg.Left = rpL: Me.lblPagBg.Top = pagY: Me.lblPagBg.Width = rpW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.btnPrev.Top = pagY + 3: Me.btnPrev.Left = rpL + 6" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.lblPage.Top = pagY + 5: Me.lblPage.Left = rpL + 72" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.btnNext.Top = pagY + 3: Me.btnNext.Left = rpL + 168" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.lblRCount.Top = pagY + 5: Me.lblRCount.Left = rpL + 240" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.btnClose.Top = pagY + 3: Me.btnClose.Left = rpL + rpW - 72" & vbCrLf
    ' Status bar
    c = c & "  Me.lblSt.Top = stY: Me.lblSt.Width = fW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstTables_Click(): Me.CurPage = 1: Call LoadTable(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnTblFind_Click(): Call FilterTableList(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtTblSearch_Enter()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.txtTblSearch.Value = ""Filter tables..."" Then Me.txtTblSearch.Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtTblSearch_Exit(ByVal Cancel As MSForms.ReturnBoolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(Me.txtTblSearch.Value) = """" Then Me.txtTblSearch.Value = ""Filter tables...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtSearch_Enter()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.txtSearch.Value = ""Search all columns..."" Then Me.txtSearch.Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtSearch_Exit(ByVal Cancel As MSForms.ReturnBoolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(Me.txtSearch.Value) = """" Then Me.txtSearch.Value = ""Search all columns...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtSearch_KeyDown(ByVal kc As MSForms.ReturnInteger, ByVal sh As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If kc = 13 Then Me.CurPage = 1: Call FilterTable(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFind_Click(): Me.CurPage = 1: Call FilterTable(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClear_Click(): Me.txtSearch.Value = """": Me.CurPage = 1: Call FilterTable(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnRefresh_Click(): Me.CurPage = 1: Call LoadTable(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnExport_Click(): Call ExportCSV(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelRow_Click(): Call DeleteSelectedRow(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnPrint_Click(): Call PrintTable(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnPrev_Click(): If Me.CurPage > 1 Then Me.CurPage = Me.CurPage - 1: Call RenderPage(Me): End If: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnNext_Click(): If Me.CurPage < Me.TotalPages Then Me.CurPage = Me.CurPage + 1: Call RenderPage(Me): End If: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: Call UnhookMouseWheel: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: Call UnhookMouseWheel: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstData_MouseMove(ByVal Btn As Integer, ByVal Sh As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.fraData.Controls(""lstData"")): On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  CLASS MODULE: clsUIHover (UI/UX Textbox Hover States)
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateClsUIHover()
    Dim c As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents.Remove ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents("clsUIHover")
    On Error GoTo 0
    Set c = ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents.Add(2) ' vbext_ct_ClassModule
    c.Name = "clsUIHover"
    Dim t$: t = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    t = t & "Public WithEvents txt As MSForms.TextBox" & vbCrLf
    t = t & "Public WithEvents cmb As MSForms.ComboBox" & vbCrLf
    t = t & "Private Const ACTIVE_COLOR As Long = &HE8F0FE" & vbCrLf ' Light Blue
    t = t & "Private Const INACT_COLOR As Long = &HFFFFFF" & vbCrLf ' White
    t = t & "Private Sub txt_Enter(): On Error Resume Next: txt.BackColor = ACTIVE_COLOR: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    t = t & "Private Sub txt_Exit(ByVal Cancel As MSForms.ReturnBoolean): On Error Resume Next: txt.BackColor = INACT_COLOR: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    t = t & "Private Sub cmb_Enter(): On Error Resume Next: cmb.BackColor = ACTIVE_COLOR: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    t = t & "Private Sub cmb_Exit(ByVal Cancel As MSForms.ReturnBoolean): On Error Resume Next: cmb.BackColor = INACT_COLOR: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c.CodeModule.AddFromString t
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modUtils
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModUtils()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modUtils")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    ' --- shared constants (accessible by all generated modules) ---
    c = c & "Public GlobalUIHoverCol As Collection" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_STUD As String = ""DB_Students""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_CLASS As String = ""DB_Classes""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_TEACH As String = ""DB_Teachers""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_GUARD As String = ""DB_Guardians""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_ATTEND As String = ""DB_Attendance""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_FEE_STR As String = ""DB_FeeStructure""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_FEE_PAY As String = ""DB_FeePayments""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_RPT As String = ""REPORT OUTPUT""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_DASH As String = ""Dashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_USERS As String = ""DB_Users""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_SUBJ As String = ""DB_Subjects""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_MARKS As String = ""DB_Marks""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_GRADE As String = ""Setup_Grades""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_LOGS As String = ""DB_SystemLogs""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_SETT As String = ""DB_Settings""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_RPT_CLS As String = ""Report_Class""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_TMP_RPT As String = ""Template_ReportCard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_CBC_SKILLS As String = ""DB_CBC_Skills""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_PHYSICAL As String = ""DB_Physical""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_RCPT As String = ""DB_Receipts""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const S_PROMO As String = ""DB_Promotions""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public LoggedInRole As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public LoggedInName As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public LoggedInUser As String  ' Username for reliable lookup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const cSID = 1, cADM = 2, cFN = 3, cLN = 4, cGEN = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const cDOB = 6, cCLS = 7, cPN = 8, cPH = 9, cUPI = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const cBC = 11, cST = 12, cALG = 13, cSN = 14, cBG = 15, cPHO = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Const cSTRM = 17" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub EnsureDashboardSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sh As Worksheet, found As Boolean: found = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each sh In ThisWorkbook.Sheets" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sh.Name = S_DASH Then found = True: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not found Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    With ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(Before:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Name = S_DASH" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function NextStudentID() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  NextStudentID = ""STU-"" & Format(Date, ""yy"") & Format(lr, ""0000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetLevelFromClass(ByVal cls As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case Left(cls, 2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""PP"": GetLevelFromClass = ""PP""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""G1"", ""G2"", ""G3"": GetLevelFromClass = ""Lower Primary""" & vbCrLf
