    c = c & "    Case ""G4"", ""G5"", ""G6"": GetLevelFromClass = ""Upper Primary""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""G7"", ""G8"", ""G9"": GetLevelFromClass = ""Junior Sec""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case Else: GetLevelFromClass = ""Upper Primary""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub PopulateAdmDropdowns(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbGen""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Male"": .AddItem ""Female"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbSts""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Active"": .AddItem ""Left"": .AddItem ""Suspended"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbBG"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each bg In Array(""A+"",""A-"",""B+"",""B-"",""O+"",""O-"",""AB+"",""AB-"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbBG"").AddItem bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbCls"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub PopulateClassDropdown(frm As Object, ctrlName As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(ctrlName).Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Classes"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not dict.Exists(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(ctrlName).AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      dict.Add CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value), 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub PopulateStreams(frm As Object, cls As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbStream"") Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Classes"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = cls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If ws.Cells(i, 2).Value <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").ListCount = 1 Then frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").ListIndex = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetStudentIDFromAdmNo(admNo As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cADM).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value) = admNo Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetStudentIDFromAdmNo = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSID).Value): Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetSubID(sn As String, cl As String) As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lvl As String: lvl = GetLevelFromClass(cl)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ws.Cells(i, 3).Value = sn And ws.Cells(i, 2).Value = lvl Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetSubID = ws.Cells(i, 1).Value: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetSubName(subID As Long) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ws.Cells(i, 1).Value = subID Then GetSubName = ws.Cells(i, 3).Value: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetMaxForSub(subID As Long) As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ws.Cells(i, 1).Value = subID Then GetMaxForSub = ws.Cells(i, 4).Value: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetCBCLevel(perc As Double) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 90: GetCBCLevel = ""EE1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 80: GetCBCLevel = ""EE2""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 65: GetCBCLevel = ""ME1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 50: GetCBCLevel = ""ME2""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 40: GetCBCLevel = ""AE1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 30: GetCBCLevel = ""AE2""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 15: GetCBCLevel = ""BE1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case Else: GetCBCLevel = ""BE2""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetCBCPoints(perc As Double) As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 90: GetCBCPoints = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 80: GetCBCPoints = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 65: GetCBCPoints = 6" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 50: GetCBCPoints = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 40: GetCBCPoints = 4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 30: GetCBCPoints = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 15: GetCBCPoints = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case Else: GetCBCPoints = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetCBCDescriptor(perc As Double) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 80: GetCBCDescriptor = ""Exceeding Expectations""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 50: GetCBCDescriptor = ""Meeting Expectations""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case perc >= 30: GetCBCDescriptor = ""Approaching Expectations""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case Else: GetCBCDescriptor = ""Below Expectations""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetLevelFromScore(perc As Double) As String: GetLevelFromScore = GetCBCLevel(perc): End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetGradeLevel(perc As Double) As String: GetGradeLevel = GetCBCLevel(perc): End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ScaleForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub CenterForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- UI/UX: DPI SCALING AWARENESS ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dpi As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dpi = Application.ActiveWindow.PointsToScreenPixelsX(72) / 96" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If dpi > 1.2 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Zoom = Int(100 / dpi)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Width = frm.Width * (1 / dpi)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Height = frm.Height * (1 / dpi)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- UI/UX: BREADCRUMB ESCAPE ROUTING ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnClose"").Cancel = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- UI/UX: DYNAMIC TAB INDEXING AND ACTIVE HOVER STATES ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If GlobalUIHoverCol Is Nothing Then Set GlobalUIHoverCol = New Collection" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fHov As New Collection, ctl As Object, h As Object, tIdx As Integer" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tIdx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each ctl In frm.Controls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Select Case TypeName(ctl)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Case ""TextBox"", ""ComboBox"", ""CommandButton""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "              ctl.TabIndex = tIdx: tIdx = tIdx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If TypeName(ctl) = ""TextBox"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Set h = New clsUIHover: Set h.txt = ctl: fHov.Add h" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ElseIf TypeName(ctl) = ""ComboBox"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Set h = New clsUIHover: Set h.cmb = ctl: fHov.Add h" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ctl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GlobalUIHoverCol.Add fHov, frm.Name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- UI/UX: CENTERING ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim scrW As Single: scrW = Application.UsableWidth" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim scrH As Single: scrH = Application.UsableHeight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If scrW < 200 Or scrH < 200 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.StartUpPosition = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Left = (scrW - frm.Width) / 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Top = (scrH - frm.Height) / 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Top < 5 Then frm.Top = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Left < 5 Then frm.Left = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub AutoSaveWorkbook()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayAlerts = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Save" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayAlerts = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modPhoto
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModPhoto()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modPhoto")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mPhotoPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "'  LoadPictureAny – PNG/GIF/TIFF auto-conversion via WIA" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "'  Windows Imaging Automation is built into Windows Vista+" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "'  Converts unsupported formats to temp BMP for LoadPicture()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Function LoadPictureAny(ByVal fPath As String) As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo FallBack" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ext As String: ext = LCase(Mid(fPath, InStrRev(fPath, ""."") + 1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ext = ""png"" Or ext = ""tif"" Or ext = ""tiff"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim wiaImg As Object: Set wiaImg = CreateObject(""WIA.ImageFile"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    wiaImg.LoadFile fPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim wiaProc As Object: Set wiaProc = CreateObject(""WIA.ImageProcess"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    wiaProc.Filters.Add wiaProc.FilterInfos(""Convert"").FilterID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    wiaProc.Filters(1).Properties(""FormatID"") = ""{B96B3CAB-0728-11D3-9D7B-0000F81EF32E}""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    wiaProc.Filters(1).Properties(""Quality"") = 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set wiaImg = wiaProc.Apply(wiaImg)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim tmpBmp As String: tmpBmp = Environ$(""TEMP"") & ""\vba_photo_"" & Format$(Now, ""yyyymmddhhnnss"") & "".bmp""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Dir(tmpBmp) <> """" Then Kill tmpBmp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    wiaImg.SaveFile tmpBmp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set LoadPictureAny = LoadPicture(tmpBmp)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: Kill tmpBmp: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set wiaImg = Nothing: Set wiaProc = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set LoadPictureAny = LoadPicture(fPath)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "FallBack:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set LoadPictureAny = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "'  BrowsePhoto – File picker with full format support" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub BrowsePhoto(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fd As FileDialog: Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Title = ""Select Student Photo"": fd.Filters.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Filters.Add ""All Images"", ""*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp;*.gif"": fd.AllowMultiSelect = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fd.Show = -1 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mPhotoPath = fd.SelectedItems(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pic As Object: Set pic = LoadPictureAny(mPhotoPath)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not pic Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       Set frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = pic" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""Photo loaded successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       MsgBox ""Could not load the selected image."" & vbCrLf & ""Please ensure it is a valid JPG, PNG, or BMP file."", vbCritical, ""Invalid Picture""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       mPhotoPath = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       Set frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "'  SavePhoto – Copy selected photo to StudentPhotos folder" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub SavePhoto(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mPhotoPath = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pFolder As String: pFolder = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\StudentPhotos""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(pFolder, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir pFolder" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fName As String: fName = frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value & ""_"" & frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value & Mid(mPhotoPath, InStrRev(mPhotoPath, "".""))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dest As String: dest = pFolder & ""\"" & fName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  FileCopy mPhotoPath, dest" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mPhotoPath = ""StudentPhotos\"" & fName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "'  LoadPhoto – Load existing student photo (any format)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' =============================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadPhoto(frm As Object, pPath As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If pPath = """" Then Set frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = Nothing: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim full As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If InStr(pPath, "":"") > 0 Then full = pPath Else full = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & pPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(full) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pic As Object: Set pic = LoadPictureAny(full)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not pic Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       Set frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = pic" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       mPhotoPath = pPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "       Set frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function GetPhotoPath() As String: GetPhotoPath = mPhotoPath: End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ClearPhoto()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mPhotoPath = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modCRUD  (Student Save / Search / Update / Delete)
'  SMART SAVE: If CurrentRow > 0, updates existing record.
'  New record created ONLY when CurrentRow = 0 (first-time admission).
'  Duplicate AdmNo validation prevents duplicate records.
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModCRUD()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modCRUD")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & "Public CurrentDataRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    ' --- ValidateAdmForm: comprehensive validation for all fields ---
    c = c & "Private Function ValidateAdmForm(frm As Object) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ValidateAdmForm = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Surname is required!"", vbExclamation, ""Validation Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtFN"").SetFocus: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Other Names is required!"", vbExclamation, ""Validation Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtLN"").SetFocus: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbGen"").Value = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please select Gender!"", vbExclamation, ""Validation Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbGen"").SetFocus: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please select a Class!"", vbExclamation, ""Validation Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").SetFocus: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Admission Number is required!"", vbExclamation, ""Validation Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").SetFocus: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ValidateAdmForm = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- IsDuplicateAdmNo: check if AdmNo already exists (skip current row) ---
    c = c & "Private Function IsDuplicateAdmNo(admNo As String, skipRow As Long) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  IsDuplicateAdmNo = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(admNo) = """" Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If i <> skipRow Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value))) = UCase(Trim(admNo)) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        IsDuplicateAdmNo = True: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- WriteStudentData: shared helper to write all fields to a row ---
    c = c & "Private Sub WriteStudentData(frm As Object, ws As Worksheet, r As Long, isNew As Boolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If isNew Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, cSID) = frm.Controls(""txtSID"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cADM) = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cFN) = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cLN) = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cGEN) = frm.Controls(""cmbGen"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cDOB) = frm.Controls(""txtDOB"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cCLS) = frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cSTRM) = frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cPN) = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtGN"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cPH) = frm.Controls(""txtGP"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cUPI) = frm.Controls(""txtUPI"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cBC) = frm.Controls(""txtBC"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cST) = frm.Controls(""cmbSts"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cALG) = frm.Controls(""txtAlg"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cSN) = frm.Controls(""txtSN"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, cBG) = frm.Controls(""cmbBG"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SavePhoto(frm): ws.Cells(r, cPHO).Value = GetPhotoPath()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- SaveStudent (SMART: updates existing if loaded from search, creates new only for first-time admission) ---
    c = c & "Public Sub SaveStudent(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === Validate all required fields ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ValidateAdmForm(frm) Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim admVal As String: admVal = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === CASE 1: Editing an existing record (loaded from search) ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Check for duplicate AdmNo (skip the current row being edited)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If IsDuplicateAdmNo(admVal, frm.CurrentRow) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""Admission Number '"" & admVal & ""' is already assigned to another student!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Cannot save duplicate Admission Number."", vbCritical, ""Duplicate Admission Number""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").SetFocus: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim rUpd As Long: rUpd = frm.CurrentRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call WriteStudentData(frm, ws, rUpd, False)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AuditLog(""Update"", ""Saved/Updated student: "" & frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value & "" "" & frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value & "" (ADM: "" & admVal & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Student record updated successfully (Row "" & rUpd & "")!"", vbInformation, ""Record Saved""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Saved: "" & frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value & "" "" & frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value & "" (Row "" & rUpd & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === CASE 2: New first-time admission (CurrentRow = 0) ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Check for duplicate AdmNo (no row to skip)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsDuplicateAdmNo(admVal, 0) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Admission Number '"" & admVal & ""' already exists in the database!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Each student must have a unique Admission Number."" & vbLf & ""Use FIND to search for the existing student if you need to edit their record."", vbCritical, ""Duplicate Admission Number""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").SetFocus: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rNew As Long: rNew = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteStudentData(frm, ws, rNew, True)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Admission"", ""Admitted new student: "" & frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value & "" "" & frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value & "" (ADM: "" & admVal & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""New student admitted successfully (Row "" & rNew & "")!"", vbInformation, ""Student Admitted""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ResetAdmForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- SafeSetCombo: prevents Error 380 ---
    c = c & "Public Sub SafeSetCombo(frm As Object, ctrlName As String, val As Variant)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim v As String: v = CStr(val)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If v = """" Then frm.Controls(ctrlName).Value = """": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Try to find value in list first" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cmb As Object: Set cmb = frm.Controls(ctrlName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, found As Boolean: found = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To cmb.ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(cmb.List(i)) = UCase(v) Then cmb.ListIndex = i: found = True: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not found Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cmb.AddItem v" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cmb.Value = v" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- FindStudent (reads from inline search textbox) ---
    c = c & "Public Sub FindStudent(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtSearch"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If s = """" Then s = Trim(InputBox(""Enter Adm No, Student ID, or Name:"", ""Search Student""))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If s = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" " & ChrW(10007) & " No students in database."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim matches() As Long, mCnt As Long: mCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim matches(1 To lr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, su As String: su = UCase(s)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i,cSID).Value)) = su Or UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i,cADM).Value)) = su Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      mCnt = mCnt + 1: matches(mCnt) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ElseIf InStr(1, UCase(ws.Cells(i,cFN).Value & "" "" & ws.Cells(i,cLN).Value), su, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      mCnt = mCnt + 1: matches(mCnt) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mCnt = 0 Then frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" " & ChrW(10007) & " No match for '"" & s & ""'"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pick As Long: pick = matches(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mCnt > 1 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim msg As String: msg = mCnt & "" students found. Enter number to select:"" & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 1 To mCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      msg = msg & j & "". "" & ws.Cells(matches(j),cADM).Value & "" - "" & ws.Cells(matches(j),cFN).Value & "" "" & ws.Cells(matches(j),cLN).Value & "" ("" & ws.Cells(matches(j),cCLS).Value & "")"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sel As String: sel = InputBox(msg, ""Select Student"", ""1"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sel = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim idx As Long: idx = Val(sel)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If idx < 1 Or idx > mCnt Then frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Invalid selection."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    pick = matches(idx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadStudentRow(frm, ws, pick)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- LoadStudentRow helper (Error-safe ComboBox setting) ---
    c = c & "Private Sub LoadStudentRow(frm As Object, ws As Worksheet, r As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.CurrentRow = r" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSID"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cFN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cLN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbGen"", ws.Cells(r, cGEN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDOB"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cDOB).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbCls"", ws.Cells(r, cCLS).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateStreams(frm, CStr(ws.Cells(r, cCLS).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbStream"", ws.Cells(r, cSTRM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtGN"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cPN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtGP"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cPH).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtUPI"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cUPI).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtBC"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cBC).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbSts"", ws.Cells(r, cST).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtAlg"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cALG).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSN"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cSN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbBG"", ws.Cells(r, cBG).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(r, 18).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadPhoto(frm, CStr(ws.Cells(r, cPHO).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" " & ChrW(10003) & " Editing: "" & ws.Cells(r, cFN) & "" "" & ws.Cells(r, cLN) & "" (Row "" & r & "") - Click SAVE to update""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: frm.Controls(""txtSearch"").Value = """": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- UpdateStudent (also uses smart save - updates existing record) ---
    c = c & "Public Sub UpdateStudent(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow = 0 Then MsgBox ""Search for a student first before updating."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Use the FIND button to search, then edit and click UPDATE or SAVE."", vbExclamation, ""No Student Loaded"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Delegate to SaveStudent which handles both new and existing records" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SaveStudent(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- DeleteStudent (with sheet protection handling) ---
    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteStudent(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow = 0 Then MsgBox ""Search for a student first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nm As String: nm = ws.Cells(frm.CurrentRow, cFN).Value & "" "" & ws.Cells(frm.CurrentRow, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""DELETE student '"" & nm & ""'?"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""This action CANNOT be undone!"", vbYesNo + vbCritical, ""Confirm Delete"") = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(frm.CurrentRow).Delete xlUp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Delete"", ""Deleted student: "" & nm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Student '"" & nm & ""' deleted."", vbInformation, ""Deleted""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ResetAdmForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- ResetAdmForm ---
    c = c & "Public Sub ResetAdmForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ctl As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each ctl In frm.Controls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Select Case TypeName(ctl)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""TextBox"": ctl.Value = """" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""ComboBox"": ctl.Value = """" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ctl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSID"").Value = NextStudentID()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbSts"").Value = ""Active"": frm.CurrentRow = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = Nothing: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ClearPhoto: frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""Reset. Ready for new entry.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modFees  (Smart Balance Tracking per Fee Category)
'  Amount Due = Fee Structure Amount - SUM(all prior payments for that fee type)
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModFees()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modFees")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public gLastReceiptNo As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public gLastPayRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private gFeeStudentID As String  ' StudentID of the loaded student" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Helper: GetStudentClassAndID - returns class and sets studentID ---
    c = c & "Private Function GetStudentClassAndID(admNo As String, ByRef outSID As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetStudentClassAndID = """": outSID = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(admNo) = """" Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cADM).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value) = admNo Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetStudentClassAndID = UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      outSID = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Helper: GetFeeStructureAmount - gets full fee for type+class ---
    c = c & "Public Function GetFeeStructureAmount(feeType As String, stuClass As String) As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetFeeStructureAmount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' First pass: class-specific match" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If stuClass <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = feeType And UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value))) = stuClass Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        GetFeeStructureAmount = CDbl(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value): Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Second pass: any match on fee type" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = feeType Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetFeeStructureAmount = CDbl(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value): Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Helper: GetTotalPaid - sums all payments by student for a fee type ---
    c = c & "Public Function GetTotalPaid(studentID As String, feeType As String) As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetTotalPaid = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If studentID = """" Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, totalPd As Double: totalPd = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = studentID And CStr(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value) = feeType Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If IsNumeric(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value) Then totalPd = totalPd + CDbl(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetTotalPaid = totalPd" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- InitFeeForm ---
    c = c & "Public Sub InitFeeForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtRcp"").Value = ""RCP-"" & Format(Now, ""yymmddhhnn"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbMode""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Cash"": .AddItem ""M-Pesa"": .AddItem ""Bank"": .AddItem ""Cheque"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbType"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Get student class (if adm already filled) for class-filtered list" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim stuCls As String: stuCls = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sAdm As String: sAdm = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sAdm <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim tmpSID As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    stuCls = GetStudentClassAndID(sAdm, tmpSID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    gFeeStudentID = tmpSID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Populate fee types filtered by student class; fallback to all" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim added As Object: Set added = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fCls As String: fCls = UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fType As String: fType = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If (stuCls = """" Or fCls = stuCls Or fCls = """") And Not added.Exists(fType) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""cmbType"").AddItem fType" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      added(fType) = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- FindStudentFee: now stores StudentID for balance lookups ---
    c = c & "Public Sub FindStudentFee(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As String: s = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If s = """" Then MsgBox ""Enter Adm No."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cADM).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value) = s Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtName"").Value = ws.Cells(i, cFN) & "" "" & ws.Cells(i, cLN)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      gFeeStudentID = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Re-populate fee types filtered by this student's class" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call InitFeeForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Restore the name (InitFeeForm may clear it)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtName"").Value = ws.Cells(i, cFN) & "" "" & ws.Cells(i, cLN)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value = s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Student found: "" & frm.Controls(""txtName"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Student not found."", vbExclamation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- AutoFillAmt: SMART - calculates actual outstanding balance ---
    c = c & "Public Sub AutoFillAmt(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selType As String: selType = frm.Controls(""cmbType"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If selType = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Get student class and ID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim stuCls As String, stuID As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sAdm As String: sAdm = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sAdm <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    stuCls = GetStudentClassAndID(sAdm, stuID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    gFeeStudentID = stuID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    stuCls = """": stuID = gFeeStudentID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Step 1: Get the full fee amount from fee structure" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fullFee As Double: fullFee = GetFeeStructureAmount(selType, stuCls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Step 2: Sum all previous payments by this student for this fee type" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalPaid As Double: totalPaid = GetTotalPaid(stuID, selType)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Step 3: Calculate outstanding balance" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim outstanding As Double: outstanding = fullFee - totalPaid" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If outstanding < 0 Then outstanding = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Display the outstanding balance as Amount Due" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDue"").Value = Format(outstanding, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtBal"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Show payment history summary in status bar" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If totalPaid > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & selType & "": Full Fee = "" & Format(fullFee, ""#,##0"") & "" | Paid = "" & Format(totalPaid, ""#,##0"") & "" | Balance = "" & Format(outstanding, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & selType & "": Fee = "" & Format(fullFee, ""#,##0"") & "" (No prior payments)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' If fully paid, notify and disable payment" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If outstanding = 0 And fullFee > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" "" & selType & "" is FULLY PAID! (Total: "" & Format(fullFee, ""#,##0"") & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnCollect"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox selType & "" is fully paid for this student."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Full Fee: KSh "" & Format(fullFee, ""#,##0"") & vbLf & ""Total Paid: KSh "" & Format(totalPaid, ""#,##0""), vbInformation, ""Fully Paid""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnCollect"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- CollectFee (enhanced: validates against outstanding, saves + offers receipt print) ---
    c = c & "Public Sub CollectFee(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtName"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Find student first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsNumeric(frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Value) Then MsgBox ""Enter amount paid."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If CDbl(frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Value) <= 0 Then MsgBox ""Amount must be greater than zero."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbMode"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select payment mode."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbType"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select fee type."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Validate: prevent overpayment" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim paidNow As Double: paidNow = CDbl(frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dueVal As Double: dueVal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsNumeric(Replace(frm.Controls(""txtDue"").Value, "","", """")) Then dueVal = CDbl(Replace(frm.Controls(""txtDue"").Value, "","", """"))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If dueVal = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""This fee category is already fully paid!"" & vbLf & ""No payment is required."", vbExclamation, ""Already Paid""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If paidNow > dueVal Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Amount paid (KSh "" & Format(paidNow, ""#,##0"") & "") exceeds the outstanding balance (KSh "" & Format(dueVal, ""#,##0"") & "")."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Maximum payable for this fee type is KSh "" & Format(dueVal, ""#,##0"") & ""."" & vbLf & ""Please correct the amount."", vbCritical, ""Overpayment Blocked""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").SetFocus: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Validate date" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsDate(frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please enter a valid date (dd/mm/yyyy)."", vbExclamation, ""Invalid Date""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtDt"").SetFocus: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 1) = ""PAY-"" & Format(r - 1, ""00000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Use stored StudentID or look it up ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sID As String: sID = gFeeStudentID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sID = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD): Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cADM).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(sW.Cells(j, cADM).Value) = frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value Then sID = CStr(sW.Cells(j, cSID).Value): Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 2) = sID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 3) = frm.Controls(""cmbType"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 4) = paidNow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 5) = frm.Controls(""cmbMode"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 6) = frm.Controls(""txtRcp"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 7) = frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  gLastReceiptNo = frm.Controls(""txtRcp"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  gLastPayRow = r" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Fee Collection"", ""Collected "" & Format(paidNow, ""#,##0"") & "" for student "" & frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value & "" ("" & frm.Controls(""cmbType"").Value & "") Receipt: "" & gLastReceiptNo)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Auto-refresh Fee Arrears report if currently displayed ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rptWs As Worksheet: Set rptWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""REPORT OUTPUT"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not rptWs Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If InStr(1, CStr(rptWs.Cells(1, 1).Value), ""FEE ARREARS"", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call RptFeeArrears" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Calculate new balance after this payment" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim newBal As Double: newBal = dueVal - paidNow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If newBal < 0 Then newBal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Fee Collected! Receipt: "" & gLastReceiptNo & "" | Remaining: KSh "" & Format(newBal, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ans As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ans = MsgBox(""Fee Collected Successfully!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Receipt No: "" & gLastReceiptNo & vbLf & ""Amount Paid: KSh "" & Format(paidNow, ""#,##0"") & vbLf & ""Remaining Balance: KSh "" & Format(newBal, ""#,##0"") & vbLf & vbLf & ""Print receipt now?"", vbYesNo + vbInformation, ""Fee Collected"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans = vbYes Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim payR As Long: payR = r" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Hide" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call GenerateSingleReceipt(payR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ResetFeeForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- PrintLastReceipt ---
    c = c & "Public Sub PrintLastReceipt(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo PLErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gLastPayRow = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' No last receipt in memory, find the last one from sheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    gLastPayRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If gLastPayRow < 2 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10007) & "" No payments recorded yet.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""No payments have been recorded yet."" & vbLf & ""Collect a fee first, then you can print the receipt."", vbExclamation, ""No Payments""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Generating receipt for payment row "" & gLastPayRow & ""...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim payR As Long: payR = gLastPayRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Hide" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateSingleReceipt(payR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Receipt generated successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "PLErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: frm.Show vbModeless: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10007) & "" Print Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error printing receipt: "" & Err.Description & vbLf & ""Error: "" & Err.Number, vbCritical, ""Print Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- FeeHistory ---
    c = c & "Public Sub FeeHistory(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmFeeReceipt.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- ResetFeeForm ---
    c = c & "Public Sub ResetFeeForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtAdm"") = """": frm.Controls(""txtName"") = """": frm.Controls(""txtDue"") = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtPaid"") = """": frm.Controls(""txtBal"") = """": frm.Controls(""cmbType"") = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbMode"") = """": frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtRcp"").Value = ""RCP-"" & Format(Now, ""yymmddhhnn"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Ready.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H666666" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtPaid"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnCollect"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  gFeeStudentID = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- YearEndFeeClose: carry forward outstanding balances as arrears ---
    c = c & "' === Year-End Fee Close: Carry forward outstanding balances ==='" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub YearEndFeeClose()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CloseErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Ask for the closing year ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim closeYr As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  closeYr = InputBox(""Enter the YEAR to close (e.g. 2025):"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Outstanding fee balances for this year will be"" & vbLf & ""carried forward as 'Arrears ("" & Year(Now) - 1 & "")' into the new year."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""This cannot be undone."", ""Year-End Fee Close"", CStr(Year(Now) - 1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If closeYr = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsNumeric(closeYr) Then MsgBox ""Invalid year."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Confirm ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Are you sure you want to carry forward all outstanding fee balances from "" & closeYr & ""?"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""A new fee type 'Arrears ("" & closeYr & "")' will be created"" & vbLf & ""and each student's outstanding balance will be recorded."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""This action cannot be undone."", vbYesNo + vbExclamation, ""Confirm Year-End Fee Close"") = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False: Application.Cursor = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fW As Worksheet: Set fW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pW As Worksheet: Set pW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: fW.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": pW.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": sW.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo CloseErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim arrType As String: arrType = ""Arrears ("" & closeYr & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Check for duplicate: see if arrears already carried forward ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim chk As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For chk = 2 To pW.Cells(pW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(pW.Cells(chk, 3).Value) = arrType And CStr(pW.Cells(chk, 5).Value) = ""Carry Forward"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""Arrears for "" & closeYr & "" have already been carried forward."" & vbLf & ""This operation cannot be performed again."", vbExclamation, ""Already Processed""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next chk" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Add arrears fee type to fee structure (for ALL classes) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Get unique classes from students" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim clsDict As Object: Set clsDict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim si As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For si = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(si, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sCls As String: sCls = UCase(Trim(CStr(sW.Cells(si, cCLS).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Not clsDict.Exists(sCls) Then clsDict.Add sCls, True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next si" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Check if arrears fee type already exists in structure, add if not" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim clsKey As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each clsKey In clsDict.Keys" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim found As Boolean: found = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fk As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For fk = 2 To fW.Cells(fW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(fW.Cells(fk, 2).Value) = arrType And UCase(Trim(CStr(fW.Cells(fk, 4).Value))) = CStr(clsKey) Then found = True: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next fk" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not found Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim nr As Long: nr = fW.Cells(fW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      fW.Cells(nr, 1).Value = ""FEE-"" & Format(nr - 1, ""000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      fW.Cells(nr, 2).Value = arrType" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      fW.Cells(nr, 3).Value = 0   ' Amount=0 (per-student, not flat)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      fW.Cells(nr, 4).Value = CStr(clsKey)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next clsKey" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Calculate and carry forward each student's balance ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim studAffected As Long: studAffected = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalArrears As Double: totalArrears = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For si = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(si, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sID As String: sID = CStr(sW.Cells(si, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim studCls As String: studCls = UCase(Trim(CStr(sW.Cells(si, cCLS).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Calculate total fees for this student's class (exclude arrears type)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim totalFee As Double: totalFee = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For fk = 2 To fW.Cells(fW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim fCl As String: fCl = UCase(Trim(CStr(fW.Cells(fk, 4).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If CStr(fW.Cells(fk, 2).Value) <> arrType Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          If fCl = studCls Or fCl = """" Then totalFee = totalFee + CDbl(fW.Cells(fk, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next fk" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Calculate total paid (exclude carry-forward entries)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim totalPd As Double: totalPd = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim pk As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For pk = 2 To pW.Cells(pW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If CStr(pW.Cells(pk, 2).Value) = sID And CStr(pW.Cells(pk, 5).Value) <> ""Carry Forward"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          If IsNumeric(pW.Cells(pk, 4).Value) Then totalPd = totalPd + CDbl(pW.Cells(pk, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next pk" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim outstanding As Double: outstanding = totalFee - totalPd" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If outstanding > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ' Record negative payment = creates a debt in the arrears fee type" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim pr As Long: pr = pW.Cells(pW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 1).Value = ""ARR-"" & Format(pr - 1, ""00000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 2).Value = sID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 3).Value = arrType" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 4).Value = -outstanding   ' Negative = debt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 5).Value = ""Carry Forward""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 6).Value = ""CF-"" & closeYr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        pW.Cells(pr, 7).Value = ""31/12/"" & closeYr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        studAffected = studAffected + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        totalArrears = totalArrears + outstanding" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next si" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If studAffected = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""No outstanding fee balances found for "" & closeYr & ""."" & vbLf & ""All students are fully paid!"", vbInformation, ""Year-End Fee Close""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Year-End Fee Close Complete!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Year Closed: "" & closeYr & vbLf & ""Students with Arrears: "" & studAffected & vbLf & ""Total Arrears Carried Forward: KSh "" & Format(totalArrears, ""#,##0"") & vbLf & vbLf & ""A new fee type '"" & arrType & ""' has been created."" & vbLf & ""Students can now pay their arrears through the Fee Collection form."", vbInformation, ""Year-End Fee Close""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CloseErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error during Year-End Close: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical, ""Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modAttendance
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModAttendance()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modAttendance")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub InitAttForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbCls"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbSt""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Present"": .AddItem ""Absent"": .AddItem ""Sick"": .AddItem ""Excused"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadClassAtt(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select a class."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstS""): lst.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value And CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value) = frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value And ws.Cells(i, cST).Value = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.AddItem ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(r, 1) = ws.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & ws.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(r, 2) = ""?"": r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If: Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = r & "" students loaded.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub MarkOneAtt(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstS"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lst.ListIndex = -1 Then MsgBox ""Select a student."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbSt"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select a status."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.List(lst.ListIndex, 2) = frm.Controls(""cmbSt"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub MarkAllPresent(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstS"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To lst.ListCount - 1: lst.List(i, 2) = ""Present"": Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""All marked Present.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub SaveAllAtt(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstS"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lst.ListCount = 0 Then MsgBox ""Load class first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_ATTEND)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, cnt As Long: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To lst.ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If lst.List(i, 2) <> ""?"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 1) = ""ATT-"" & Format(r - 1, ""00000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 2) = lst.List(i, 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 3) = frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 4) = lst.List(i, 2): r = r + 1: cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If: Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Attendance"", ""Saved "" & cnt & "" attendance records for class "" & frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value & "" on "" & frm.Controls(""txtDt"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox cnt & "" attendance records saved!"", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""Saved "" & cnt & "" records.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modTeacher
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModTeacher()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modTeacher")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    ' === TOGGLE STAFF TYPE (Teacher vs Support Staff) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub ToggleStaffType(frm As Object, isTeacher As Boolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lf"").Visible = isTeacher" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbSub"").Visible = isTeacher" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lDept"").Visible = Not isTeacher" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Visible = Not isTeacher" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If isTeacher Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lc"").Caption = ""TSC Number""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Mode: Teacher  |  Learning Area enabled.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lc"").Caption = ""ID/Ref No.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Mode: Support Staff  |  Department enabled.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === INIT ===
    c = c & "Public Sub InitTeacherForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TEACH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value = ""T"" & Format(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row, ""000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtJD"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbSub"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each s In Array(""Mathematics"",""English"",""Kiswahili"",""Science & Technology"",""Integrated Science"",""Social Studies"",""CRE/IRE/HRE"",""Creative Arts"",""Pre-Technical Studies"",""Business Studies"",""Agriculture"",""Physical & Health Education"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbSub"").AddItem s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each s In Array(""Bursar/Accounts"",""Secretary/Admin"",""ICT Support"",""Lab Technician"",""Library"",""Kitchen/Catering"",""Transport/Driver"",""Security/Guard"",""Cleaner/Janitor"",""Groundskeeper"",""Matron/Patron"",""Counselor"",""Other"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").AddItem s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""optTeacher"").Value = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ToggleStaffType(frm, True)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === SAVE ===
    c = c & "Public Sub SaveTeacher(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value) = """" Then MsgBox ""Name required!"", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim isTeacher As Boolean: isTeacher = frm.Controls(""optTeacher"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sType As String: If isTeacher Then sType = ""Teacher"" Else sType = ""Staff""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TEACH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tID As String: tID = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim existRow As Long: existRow = 0: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = tID Then existRow = i: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If existRow > 0 Then r = existRow Else r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,1)=frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value: ws.Cells(r,2)=frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,3)=frm.Controls(""txtTSC"").Value: ws.Cells(r,4)=frm.Controls(""txtTP"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,5)=frm.Controls(""txtTE"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If isTeacher Then ws.Cells(r,6)=frm.Controls(""cmbSub"").Value Else ws.Cells(r,6)=frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,7)=frm.Controls(""txtJD"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,8)=sType" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not isTeacher Then ws.Cells(r,9)=frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim action As String: If existRow > 0 Then action = ""Updated"" Else action = ""Added""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Staff Management"", action & "" "" & sType & "": "" & frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value & "" (ID: "" & frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" "" & sType & "" '"" & frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value & ""' "" & LCase(action) & "" successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If existRow = 0 Then Call ResetTeacherForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === FIND (uses inline txtSearch, sets CurrentRow) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub FindTeacher(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtSearch"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If s = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    s = InputBox(""Enter Staff/Teacher ID or Name:"", ""Search"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If s = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TEACH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = s Or InStr(1, CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value), s, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value = ws.Cells(i, 1): frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value = ws.Cells(i, 2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtTSC"").Value = ws.Cells(i, 3): frm.Controls(""txtTP"").Value = ws.Cells(i, 4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtTE"").Value = ws.Cells(i, 5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtJD"").Value = ws.Cells(i, 7)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sType As String: sType = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 8).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sType = ""Staff"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""optStaff"").Value = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Call ToggleStaffType(frm, False)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 9).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""optTeacher"").Value = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Call ToggleStaffType(frm, True)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""cmbSub"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.CurrentRow = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" Found: "" & ws.Cells(i, 2).Value & "" ["" & IIf(sType = """", ""Teacher"", sType) & ""]  -  Edit fields and click UPDATE.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If: Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(10005) & "" No staff record found for '"" & s & ""'.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === UPDATE (requires CurrentRow from a previous Find) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub UpdateTeacher(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please search and find a record first before updating."", vbExclamation, ""Update Staff""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Use Search to find a record first, then click UPDATE.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value) = """" Then MsgBox ""Full Name is required!"", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim isTeacher As Boolean: isTeacher = frm.Controls(""optTeacher"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sType As String: If isTeacher Then sType = ""Teacher"" Else sType = ""Staff""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TEACH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = frm.CurrentRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,2)=frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,3)=frm.Controls(""txtTSC"").Value: ws.Cells(r,4)=frm.Controls(""txtTP"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,5)=frm.Controls(""txtTE"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If isTeacher Then ws.Cells(r,6)=frm.Controls(""cmbSub"").Value Else ws.Cells(r,6)=frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,7)=frm.Controls(""txtJD"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,8)=sType" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not isTeacher Then ws.Cells(r,9)=frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Staff Management"", ""Updated "" & sType & "": "" & frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value & "" (ID: "" & frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" "" & sType & "" '"" & frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value & ""' updated successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === DELETE (requires CurrentRow from a previous Find) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteTeacher(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please search and find a record first before deleting."", vbExclamation, ""Delete Staff""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Use Search to find a record first, then click DELETE.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim staffName As String: staffName = frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim staffID As String: staffID = frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Are you sure you want to DELETE staff record:"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Name: "" & staffName & vbLf & ""ID: "" & staffID, vbYesNo + vbCritical, ""Confirm Delete"") = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TEACH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(frm.CurrentRow).Delete xlUp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Staff Management"", ""Deleted: "" & staffName & "" (ID: "" & staffID & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" Staff '"" & staffName & ""' deleted successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ResetTeacherForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === RESET (clears form, resets CurrentRow, clears search) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub ResetTeacherForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTN"")="""": frm.Controls(""txtTSC"")="""": frm.Controls(""txtTP"")="""": frm.Controls(""txtTE"")="""": frm.Controls(""cmbSub"")="""": frm.Controls(""cmbDept"")=""""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: frm.Controls(""txtSearch"").Value = """": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.CurrentRow = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call InitTeacherForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Ready.  Enter new staff or search for existing.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").ForeColor = &H666666" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === CREATE USER FROM STAFF FORM (opens user mgmt with pre-filled data) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub CreateUserFromStaffForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tID As String: tID = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtTID"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tName As String: tName = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtTN"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If tID = """" Or tName = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please enter or find a staff record first."" & vbLf & ""The Staff ID and Full Name are required."", vbExclamation, ""Create User"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Check if user already exists for this staff ID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uWs As Worksheet: Set uWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To uWs.Cells(uWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If LCase(CStr(uWs.Cells(i, 2).Value)) = LCase(tID) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""A system user with Login ID '"" & tID & ""' already exists."" & vbLf & ""Username: "" & uWs.Cells(i, 2).Value & vbLf & ""Role: "" & uWs.Cells(i, 5).Value, vbExclamation, ""User Exists"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Determine role from staff type" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim staffRole As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""optTeacher"").Value Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    staffRole = ""Teacher""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim dept As String: dept = frm.Controls(""cmbDept"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If InStr(1, dept, ""Bursar"", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then staffRole = ""Bursar"" Else staffRole = ""Teacher""" & vbCrLf
