    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Open user mgmt form with pre-filled data" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uf As Object: Set uf = frmUserMgmt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = tID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = tName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = staffRole" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value = ""Yes""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""txtPassword"").SetFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9654) & "" Creating user from staff record: "" & tName & "" ["" & staffRole & ""]  -  Enter a password.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  uf.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modReports
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModReports()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modReports")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Shared helper: prepare report sheet (unprotect, clear, make visible) ---
    c = c & "Private Function PrepareReportSheet() As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rpt As Worksheet: Set rpt = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_RPT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Clean up old shapes (back buttons etc.) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sh As Shape: For Each sh In rpt.Shapes: sh.Delete: Next sh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set PrepareReportSheet = rpt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Format header row ---
    c = c & "Private Sub FormatHeader(rpt As Worksheet, lastCol As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(2, lastCol)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(2, lastCol)).Interior.Color = &HF0E0D0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(""A:"" & Chr(64 + lastCol)).AutoFit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ======= 1. CLASS LIST REPORT =======
    c = c & "Public Sub RptClassList()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmClassListInput.Show vbModal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RptErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateClassListReport(cls As String, Optional savePath As String = """", Optional saveFormat As String = """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rpt As Worksheet: Set rpt = PrepareReportSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1) = ""CLASS LIST REPORT: "" & UCase(cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Bold = True: rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Size = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 1) = ""No"": rpt.Cells(2, 2) = ""Adm No"": rpt.Cells(2, 3) = ""Surname""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 4) = ""Other Names"": rpt.Cells(2, 5) = ""Gender"": rpt.Cells(2, 6) = ""Stream"": rpt.Cells(2, 7) = ""Status""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, r As Long, cnt As Long: r = 3: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = cls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 1) = cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 2) = ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 3) = ws.Cells(i, cFN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 4) = ws.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 5) = ws.Cells(i, cGEN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 6) = ws.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 7) = ws.Cells(i, cST).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call FormatHeader(rpt, 7)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Save to file if requested ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If savePath <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim saveOK As Boolean: saveOK = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If saveFormat = ""PDF"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.PageSetup.Orientation = xlLandscape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.PageSetup.FitToPagesWide = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.PageSetup.FitToPagesTall = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.ExportAsFixedFormat xlTypePDF, savePath, xlQualityStandard, , , , , False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      saveOK = (Err.Number = 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Copy" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ActiveWorkbook.SaveAs savePath, xlOpenXMLWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      saveOK = (Err.Number = 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ActiveWorkbook.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If saveOK Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Shell ""explorer.exe """""" & savePath & """""", vbNormalFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""Report saved successfully!"" & vbLf & vbLf & savePath, vbInformation, ""Report Saved""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""Could not save file. The report is still available on the report sheet."", vbExclamation, ""Save Warning""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(rpt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupReportNavigation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ChrW(10003) & "" Class List Report: "" & cnt & "" students in "" & cls & "".""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report"", ""Generated Class List Report for class: "" & cls & IIf(savePath <> """", "" | Saved to: "" & savePath, """"))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RptErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Error generating Class List: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ======= 2. ATTENDANCE SUMMARY =======
    c = c & "Public Sub RptAttSummary()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_ATTEND)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rpt As Worksheet: Set rpt = PrepareReportSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1) = ""ATTENDANCE SUMMARY REPORT""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Bold = True: rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Size = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 1) = ""Status"": rpt.Cells(2, 2) = ""Count"": rpt.Cells(2, 3) = ""Percentage""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim total As Long: total = lr - 1: If total < 0 Then total = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pCnt As Long: pCnt = Application.CountIf(ws.Range(""D:D""), ""Present"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim aCnt As Long: aCnt = Application.CountIf(ws.Range(""D:D""), ""Absent"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sCnt As Long: sCnt = Application.CountIf(ws.Range(""D:D""), ""Sick"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim eCnt As Long: eCnt = Application.CountIf(ws.Range(""D:D""), ""Excused"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(3, 1) = ""Total Records"": rpt.Cells(3, 2) = total" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(4, 1) = ""Present"": rpt.Cells(4, 2) = pCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If total > 0 Then rpt.Cells(4, 3) = Format(pCnt / total * 100, ""0.0"") & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(5, 1) = ""Absent"": rpt.Cells(5, 2) = aCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If total > 0 Then rpt.Cells(5, 3) = Format(aCnt / total * 100, ""0.0"") & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(6, 1) = ""Sick"": rpt.Cells(6, 2) = sCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If total > 0 Then rpt.Cells(6, 3) = Format(sCnt / total * 100, ""0.0"") & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(7, 1) = ""Excused"": rpt.Cells(7, 2) = eCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If total > 0 Then rpt.Cells(7, 3) = Format(eCnt / total * 100, ""0.0"") & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call FormatHeader(rpt, 3)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(rpt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupReportNavigation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Attendance summary generated. "" & total & "" total records."", vbInformation, ""Attendance Summary""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report"", ""Generated Attendance Summary Report."")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RptErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error generating Attendance Summary: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ======= 3. FEE ARREARS REPORT (Professional 2-Row Header) =======
    c = c & "Public Sub RptFeeArrears()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fP As Worksheet: Set fP = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fS As Worksheet: Set fS = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rpt As Worksheet: Set rpt = PrepareReportSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- 1. Collect distinct fee types from DB_FeeStructure ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fsLR As Long: fsLR = fS.Cells(fS.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fpLR As Long: fpLR = fP.Cells(fP.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim feeTypes As Object: Set feeTypes = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 2 To fsLR" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ft As String: ft = Trim(CStr(fS.Cells(k, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ft <> """" And Not feeTypes.Exists(ft) Then feeTypes.Add ft, feeTypes.Count + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nFees As Long: nFees = feeTypes.Count" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nFees = 0 Then MsgBox ""No fee types defined in Fee Structure."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim feeArr() As String: ReDim feeArr(1 To nFees)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fKey As Variant: Dim fIdx As Long: fIdx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each fKey In feeTypes.Keys: fIdx = fIdx + 1: feeArr(fIdx) = CStr(fKey): Next fKey" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- 2. Build TWO-ROW professional header ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Layout: 1=No, 2=AdmNo, 3=Name, 4=Class | Per fee: Due,Paid,Bal | Owed | TotDue,TotPaid,Balance" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lastCol As Long: lastCol = 4 + nFees * 3 + 1 + 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Row 1: Report title banner ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(1, 1), rpt.Cells(1, lastCol)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Value = ""FEE ARREARS REPORT - "" & Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Bold = True: rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Size = 12" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Interior.Color = RGB(31,56,100): rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Rows(1).RowHeight = 22" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Row 2: Merged fee-type group headers ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 1)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 1).Value = ""#""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 2), rpt.Cells(3, 2)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 2).Value = ""ADM NO""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 3), rpt.Cells(3, 3)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 3).Value = ""STUDENT NAME""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 4), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 4).Value = ""CLASS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Merge fixed cols format" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).Interior.Color = RGB(31,56,100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, 4)).VerticalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim f As Long, c1 As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For f = 1 To nFees" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    c1 = 5 + (f - 1) * 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Row 2: Merge fee type name across 3 sub-cols" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, c1), rpt.Cells(2, c1 + 2)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Abbreviate long fee names for compact headers" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim shortName As String: shortName = feeArr(f)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shortName = Replace(shortName, ""School Development"", ""Sch Dev"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shortName = Replace(shortName, ""Contribution"", ""Contr"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shortName = Replace(shortName, ""& KNEC"", """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Len(shortName) > 14 Then shortName = Left(shortName, 13) & "".""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Cells(2, c1).Value = UCase(shortName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Cells(2, c1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Cells(2, c1).VerticalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Row 3: Sub-headers Due/Paid/Bal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Cells(3, c1) = ""Due"": rpt.Cells(3, c1 + 1) = ""Paid"": rpt.Cells(3, c1 + 2) = ""Bal""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(3, c1), rpt.Cells(3, c1 + 2)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Alternating group colors" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim grpClr As Long, grpClr2 As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If f Mod 2 = 1 Then grpClr = RGB(46,125,50): grpClr2 = RGB(232,245,233) Else grpClr = RGB(21,101,192): grpClr2 = RGB(227,242,253)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, c1), rpt.Cells(2, c1 + 2)).Interior.Color = grpClr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, c1), rpt.Cells(2, c1 + 2)).Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(3, c1), rpt.Cells(3, c1 + 2)).Interior.Color = grpClr2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next f" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Owed count column (between fee groups and TOTALS) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim owedCol As Long: owedCol = 4 + nFees * 3 + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, owedCol), rpt.Cells(3, owedCol)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, owedCol).Value = ""Owed""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, owedCol).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, owedCol).VerticalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, owedCol), rpt.Cells(3, owedCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(120,63,4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, owedCol), rpt.Cells(3, owedCol)).Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tDC As Long: tDC = owedCol + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tPC As Long: tPC = tDC + 1: Dim tBC As Long: tBC = tDC + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Row 2: Merge TOTALS across 3 cols" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, tDC), rpt.Cells(2, tBC)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, tDC).Value = ""TOTALS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, tDC).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, tDC), rpt.Cells(2, tBC)).Interior.Color = RGB(183,28,28)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, tDC), rpt.Cells(2, tBC)).Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Row 3: Total sub-headers" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(3, tDC) = ""Due"": rpt.Cells(3, tPC) = ""Paid"": rpt.Cells(3, tBC) = ""Bal""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(3, tDC), rpt.Cells(3, tBC)).Interior.Color = RGB(255,235,238)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(3, tDC), rpt.Cells(3, tBC)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Format header rows 2-3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, lastCol)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, lastCol)).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(3, lastCol)).Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Rows(2).RowHeight = 18: rpt.Rows(3).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- 3. Student data (starts row 4) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, r As Long, cnt As Long: r = 4: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gDue As Double, gPd As Double: gDue = 0: gPd = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(i, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim stuCls As String: stuCls = UCase(Trim(CStr(sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim stuID As String: stuID = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sDue As Double, sPd As Double: sDue = 0: sPd = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sOwed As Long: sOwed = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For f = 1 To nFees" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        c1 = 5 + (f - 1) * 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim due As Double: due = GetFeeStructureAmount(feeArr(f), stuCls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim pd As Double: pd = GetTotalPaid(stuID, feeArr(f))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim bl As Double: bl = due - pd: If bl < 0 Then bl = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        rpt.Cells(r, c1) = due: rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 1) = pd: rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2) = bl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        rpt.Cells(r, c1).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 1).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2).NumberFormat = ""#,##0""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If bl > 0 And pd = 0 Then rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2).Font.Color = RGB(198,40,40): rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If bl > 0 And pd > 0 Then rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2).Font.Color = RGB(230,126,34)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If bl = 0 And due > 0 Then rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2).Font.Color = RGB(39,174,96)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If bl > 0 Then sOwed = sOwed + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        sDue = sDue + due: sPd = sPd + pd" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next f" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sBal As Double: sBal = sDue - sPd: If sBal < 0 Then sBal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 1) = cnt: rpt.Cells(r, 2) = sW.Cells(i, cADM).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 3) = sW.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 4) = sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, owedCol) = sOwed" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, owedCol).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sOwed > 0 Then rpt.Cells(r, owedCol).Font.Color = RGB(198,40,40): rpt.Cells(r, owedCol).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, tDC) = sDue: rpt.Cells(r, tPC) = sPd: rpt.Cells(r, tBC) = sBal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, tDC).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, tPC).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, tBC).NumberFormat = ""#,##0""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, tBC).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sBal > 0 Then rpt.Cells(r, tBC).Font.Color = RGB(198,40,40)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sBal = 0 Then rpt.Cells(r, tBC).Font.Color = RGB(39,174,96)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If cnt Mod 2 = 0 Then rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(245,245,245)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      gDue = gDue + sDue: gPd = gPd + sPd: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- 4. Grand totals with per-column sums ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(r, 1) = "" "": rpt.Cells(r, 3) = ""GRAND TOTAL"": rpt.Cells(r, 3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For f = 1 To nFees" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    c1 = 5 + (f - 1) * 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim colDue As Double, colPd As Double, colBl As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    colDue = 0: colPd = 0: colBl = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim tr As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For tr = 4 To r - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      colDue = colDue + CDbl(rpt.Cells(tr, c1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      colPd = colPd + CDbl(rpt.Cells(tr, c1 + 1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      colBl = colBl + CDbl(rpt.Cells(tr, c1 + 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next tr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Cells(r, c1) = colDue: rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 1) = colPd: rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2) = colBl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rpt.Cells(r, c1).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 1).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, c1 + 2).NumberFormat = ""#,##0""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next f" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Owed column grand total" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gOwed As Long: gOwed = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For tr = 4 To r - 1: gOwed = gOwed + CLng(rpt.Cells(tr, owedCol).Value): Next tr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(r, owedCol) = gOwed" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(r, owedCol).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(r, tDC) = gDue: rpt.Cells(r, tPC) = gPd: rpt.Cells(r, tBC) = gDue - gPd" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(r, tDC).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, tPC).NumberFormat = ""#,##0"": rpt.Cells(r, tBC).NumberFormat = ""#,##0""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(31,56,100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- 5. Professional formatting ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Borders.Weight = xlHairline" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(2, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Borders.Color = RGB(180,180,180)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Thicker border under header row 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(3, 1), rpt.Cells(3, lastCol)).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(3, 1), rpt.Cells(3, lastCol)).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Color = RGB(0,0,0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Thicker border above grand total" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Borders(xlEdgeTop).Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Borders(xlEdgeTop).Color = RGB(0,0,0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Data area formatting" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(4, 5), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(4, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Font.Size = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(4, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(4, 1), rpt.Cells(r, 1)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(4, 4), rpt.Cells(r, 4)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- 6. Optimized column widths for A4 landscape ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(1).ColumnWidth = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(2).ColumnWidth = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(3).ColumnWidth = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(4).ColumnWidth = 4.5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For fc = 5 To owedCol - 1: rpt.Columns(fc).ColumnWidth = 6: Next fc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(owedCol).ColumnWidth = 3.5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Columns(tDC).ColumnWidth = 7: rpt.Columns(tPC).ColumnWidth = 7: rpt.Columns(tBC).ColumnWidth = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupReportPageLayout(rpt, ""FEE ARREARS REPORT"", lastCol)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.PageSetup.PrintArea = rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(1, 1), rpt.Cells(r, lastCol)).Address" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(rpt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupReportNavigation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim owedCnt As Long: owedCnt = 0: Dim oi As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For oi = 4 To r - 1: If rpt.Cells(oi, tBC).Value > 0 Then owedCnt = owedCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next oi" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox cnt & "" students listed. "" & owedCnt & "" with outstanding balances."" & vbLf & ""Total Arrears: KSh "" & Format(gDue - gPd, ""#,##0""), vbInformation, ""Fee Arrears Report""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report"", ""Generated Fee Arrears Report: "" & cnt & "" students, "" & owedCnt & "" with arrears."")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RptErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error generating Fee Arrears Report: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ======= 4. STUDENT COUNT BY CLASS =======
    c = c & "Public Sub RptStudCount()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cW As Worksheet: Set cW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Classes"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rpt As Worksheet: Set rpt = PrepareReportSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1) = ""STUDENT COUNT BY CLASS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Bold = True: rpt.Cells(1, 1).Font.Size = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(2, 1) = ""No"": rpt.Cells(2, 2) = ""Class"": rpt.Cells(2, 3) = ""Students"": rpt.Cells(2, 4) = ""Active"": rpt.Cells(2, 5) = ""Left""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, r As Long, cnt As Long, totalAll As Long: r = 3: cnt = 0: totalAll = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To cW.Cells(cW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim clsName As String: clsName = CStr(cW.Cells(i, 1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not dict.Exists(clsName) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      dict.Add clsName, 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim nTotal As Long: nTotal = 0: Dim nActive As Long: nActive = 0: Dim nLeft As Long: nLeft = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For j = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If CStr(sW.Cells(j, cCLS).Value) = clsName Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          nTotal = nTotal + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          If CStr(sW.Cells(j, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then nActive = nActive + 1 Else nLeft = nLeft + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 1) = cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 2) = clsName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 3) = nTotal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 4) = nActive" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rpt.Cells(r, 5) = nLeft" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      totalAll = totalAll + nTotal: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Cells(r, 1) = """": rpt.Cells(r, 2) = ""TOTAL"": rpt.Cells(r, 3) = totalAll" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Range(rpt.Cells(r, 1), rpt.Cells(r, 5)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call FormatHeader(rpt, 5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rpt.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(rpt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupReportNavigation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Report generated. "" & totalAll & "" total students across "" & cnt & "" classes."", vbInformation, ""Student Count""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report"", ""Generated Student Count by Class Report."")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RptErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error generating Student Count Report: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub


' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  ThisWorkbook – Show Login on open, hide backend
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateThisWorkbookCode()
    ' --- ThisWorkbook module ---
    Dim twb As Object: Set twb = ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents("ThisWorkbook")
    If twb.CodeModule.CountOfLines > 0 Then twb.CodeModule.DeleteLines 1, twb.CodeModule.CountOfLines
    Dim c$: c = "Private Sub Workbook_Open()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call EnsureDashboardSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call HideBackend" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MigrationHashPasswords" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ShowLoginBackground" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call EnableFullScreen" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmLogin.Show" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub Workbook_BeforeClose(Cancel As Boolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call DisableFullScreen" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LoggedInName <> """" Then Call ScheduledBackup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Saved = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    twb.CodeModule.AddFromString c
    
    ' --- Dashboard sheet module (double-click to open forms) ---
    Dim ds As Object, sh As Worksheet
    Set ds = Nothing
    For Each sh In ThisWorkbook.Sheets
        If sh.Name = S_DASH Then
            On Error Resume Next
            Set ds = ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents(sh.CodeName)
            On Error GoTo 0
            Exit For
        End If
    Next sh
    If Not ds Is Nothing Then
        If ds.CodeModule.CountOfLines > 0 Then ds.CodeModule.DeleteLines 1, ds.CodeModule.CountOfLines
        Dim d$: d = "Private Sub Worksheet_BeforeDoubleClick(ByVal Target As Range, Cancel As Boolean)" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "  Cancel = True: Call DashboardClick" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "Private Sub Worksheet_Activate()" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "  ' When user returns to Dashboard, clear report navigation overrides" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "  Call ClearReportNavigation" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
        d = d & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
        ds.CodeModule.AddFromString d
    End If
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmLogin – Splash + Authentication
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateLoginForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmLogin", "CBC MIS Login", 540, 350)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HEDE8E3  ' Warm light gray outer
    
    ' === LEFT PANEL (Deep Teal-Blue gradient) ===
    Dim pLeft As Object: Set pLeft = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "pnlLeft")
    pLeft.Left = 40: pLeft.Top = 30: pLeft.Width = 180: pLeft.Height = 260
    pLeft.BackColor = &H704010: pLeft.Caption = ""  ' Deep teal RGB(16,64,112)
    
    ' === RIGHT PANEL (White card) ===
    Dim pRight As Object: Set pRight = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "pnlRight")
    pRight.Left = 220: pRight.Top = 30: pRight.Width = 280: pRight.Height = 260
    pRight.BackColor = &HFFFFFF: pRight.Caption = ""
    
    ' === LOGO SHIELD (on Left Panel) ===
    Dim cir As Object: Set cir = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "lblCircle")
    cir.Left = 90: cir.Top = 80: cir.Width = 80: cir.Height = 80
    cir.BackColor = &H7B9B3C: cir.Caption = ""  ' Rich green RGB(60,155,123)
    
    ' Shield icon + school initials (placeholder - updated by Initialize)
    AL d, "lblLogo", ChrW(9670) & vbCrLf & "...", 92, 88, 76, 68, 14
    d.Controls("lblLogo").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblLogo").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("lblLogo").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblLogo").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblLogo").BackStyle = 0
    
    ' Logo Image (hidden by default)
    Dim imgLogo As Object: Set imgLogo = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Image.1", "imgLogo")
    imgLogo.Left = 90: imgLogo.Top = 80: imgLogo.Width = 80: imgLogo.Height = 80
    imgLogo.PictureSizeMode = 1 ' fmPictureSizeModeStretch
    imgLogo.BorderStyle = 0: imgLogo.BackStyle = 0: imgLogo.Visible = False
    
    ' School motto on left panel (placeholder - updated by Initialize)
    AL d, "lblMotto", "...", 55, 175, 150, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblMotto").ForeColor = &HDBC8A0: d.Controls("lblMotto").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblMotto").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("lblMotto").BackStyle = 0: d.Controls("lblMotto").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === RIGHT PANEL TITLE (placeholder - updated by Initialize) ===
    AL d, "lblSchName", "Loading...", 230, 55, 260, 20, 12
    d.Controls("lblSchName").ForeColor = &H704010: d.Controls("lblSchName").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("lblSchName").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblSchName").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("lblSchName").BackStyle = 0
    
    AL d, "lblSys", "CBC Management Information System", 230, 76, 260, 15, 8
    d.Controls("lblSys").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblSys").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblSys").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("lblSys").BackStyle = 0
    
    ' Thin accent line under title
    AL d, "lblLine", "", 280, 96, 160, 2
    d.Controls("lblLine").BackColor = &H7B9B3C: d.Controls("lblLine").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "lblSecure", ChrW(9654) & " Secure Login", 250, 110, 200, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblSecure").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lblSecure").Font.Name = "Segoe UI Semibold"
    d.Controls("lblSecure").BackStyle = 0
    
    ' === USERNAME FIELD ===
    AL d, "lblUser", "Username :", 250, 148, 70, 14, 9
    d.Controls("lblUser").ForeColor = &H666666: d.Controls("lblUser").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("lblUser").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblUser").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtUser", 325, 145, 150
    d.Controls("txtUser").Height = 22: d.Controls("txtUser").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtUser").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("txtUser").BackColor = &HF2F5F0: d.Controls("txtUser").ForeColor = &H999999: d.Controls("txtUser").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("txtUser").Value = "Enter username"
    
    ' === PASSWORD FIELD ===
    AL d, "lblPass", "Password :", 250, 185, 70, 14, 9
    d.Controls("lblPass").ForeColor = &H666666: d.Controls("lblPass").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("lblPass").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblPass").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtPass", 325, 182, 150
    d.Controls("txtPass").Height = 22: d.Controls("txtPass").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtPass").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("txtPass").BackColor = &HF2F5F0: d.Controls("txtPass").ForeColor = &H999999: d.Controls("txtPass").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("txtPass").Value = "Enter password"
    
    ' === BUTTONS (Blue Login + Gray Exit) ===
    AB d, "btnLogin", ChrW(9654) & " LOGIN", 260, 230, 100, 30, &H7B9B3C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnLogin").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnLogin").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("btnLogin").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    AB d, "btnExit", "EXIT", 370, 230, 100, 30, &H704010, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' === ERRORS & FOOTER ===
    AL d, "lblErr", "", 230, 270, 260, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblErr").ForeColor = &HC62828: d.Controls("lblErr").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("lblErr").BackStyle = 0
    
    AL d, "lblFoot", ChrW(9670) & " CBC School MIS v4.0", 0, 305, 540, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblFoot").ForeColor = &HA0A0A0: d.Controls("lblFoot").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("lblFoot").BackStyle = 0
    
    ' --- form code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Dynamically load school name, initials, and motto from DB_Settings ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ws Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim i As Long, sName As String, sMotto As String, sLogo As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Select Case UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Case ""SCHOOL_NAME"": sName = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Case ""SCHOOL_MOTTO"": sMotto = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Case ""SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH"": sLogo = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Update school name label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sName <> """" Then Me.Controls(""lblSchName"").Caption = UCase(sName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Try to load school logo ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim hasLogo As Boolean: hasLogo = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' First try the BMP version (best for LoadPicture)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bmpFile As String: bmpFile = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)) = ""SCHOOL_LOGO_BMP"" Then bmpFile = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim tryPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Try BMP first" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If bmpFile <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tryPath = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & bmpFile" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Dir(tryPath) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Me.Controls(""imgLogo"").Picture = LoadPicture(tryPath)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If Err.Number = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Me.Controls(""imgLogo"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Me.Controls(""lblCircle"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Me.Controls(""lblLogo"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          hasLogo = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Fallback: try original file (JPG/BMP work, PNG may not)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not hasLogo And sLogo <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tryPath = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & sLogo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Dir(tryPath) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Me.Controls(""imgLogo"").Picture = LoadPicture(tryPath)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If Err.Number = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Me.Controls(""imgLogo"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Me.Controls(""lblCircle"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Me.Controls(""lblLogo"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          hasLogo = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Fallback: generate initials ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not hasLogo And sName <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim initials As String: initials = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(Trim(sName), "" "")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim p As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For p = LBound(parts) To UBound(parts)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If Len(parts(p)) > 0 Then initials = initials & UCase(Left(parts(p), 1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next p" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Len(initials) > 4 Then initials = Left(initials, 4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblLogo"").Caption = ChrW(9670) & vbCrLf & initials" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Update motto label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sMotto <> """" Then Me.Controls(""lblMotto"").Caption = sMotto" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtUser_Enter()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""txtUser"").Value = ""Enter username"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtUser"").Value = """": Me.Controls(""txtUser"").ForeColor = &H222222" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtUser_Exit(ByVal Cancel As MSForms.ReturnBoolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(Me.Controls(""txtUser"").Value) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtUser"").Value = ""Enter username"": Me.Controls(""txtUser"").ForeColor = &H999999" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtPass_Enter()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""txtPass"").Value = ""Enter password"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtPass"").Value = """": Me.Controls(""txtPass"").ForeColor = &H222222" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtPass"").PasswordChar = ""*""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtPass_Exit(ByVal Cancel As MSForms.ReturnBoolean)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(Me.Controls(""txtPass"").Value) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtPass"").PasswordChar = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtPass"").Value = ""Enter password"": Me.Controls(""txtPass"").ForeColor = &H999999" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnLogin_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim u As String: u = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtUser"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim p As String: p = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtPass"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If u = """" Or u = ""Enter username"" Or p = """" Or p = ""Enter password"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ""Please enter credentials."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuthenticateUser(u, p, Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnExit_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If CloseMode = 0 And LoggedInRole = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If MsgBox(""You have not logged in. Exit application?"", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, ""Exit"") = vbYes Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ThisWorkbook.Close SaveChanges:=False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Cancel = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modSecurity
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModSecurity()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modSecurity")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function HashPass(ByVal p As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim h As Double: h = 5381: Dim i As Integer" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To Len(p): h = (h * 33 + Asc(Mid(p, i, 1))): If h > 2147483647# Then h = h - 4294967296#" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  HashPass = CStr(Abs(h))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub AuthenticateUser(user As String, pass As String, frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo AuthErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, h As String, cVal As String: h = HashPass(pass)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Const MAX_ATTEMPTS As Long = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Const LOCKOUT_MINUTES As Long = 15" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If LCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)) = LCase(user) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' --- Check if account is deactivated ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 6).Value) = ""No"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Account deactivated. Contact administrator.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Call AuditLog(""Security"", ""Blocked login attempt for deactivated user: "" & user)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' --- Check brute-force lockout ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim failCount As Long: failCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error Resume Next: failCount = CLng(ws.Cells(i, 9).Value): On Error GoTo AuthErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim lockUntil As String: lockUntil = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 10).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If lockUntil <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If Now < CDate(lockUntil) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Dim minsLeft As Long: minsLeft = CLng(DateDiff(""n"", Now, CDate(lockUntil))) + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          frm.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Account locked. Try again in "" & minsLeft & "" min.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Call AuditLog(""Security"", ""Locked-out login attempt for: "" & user)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cVal = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If cVal = h Or (Len(cVal) < 10 And cVal = pass) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ' --- SUCCESS: Clear lockout, record login ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        LoggedInRole = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 5).Value): LoggedInName = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value): LoggedInUser = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo AuthErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If cVal = pass Then ws.Cells(i, 3).Value = h ' Auto-hash migration" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Cells(i, 7).Value = Format(Now, ""yyyy-mm-dd hh:nn:ss"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Cells(i, 9).Value = 0: ws.Cells(i, 10).Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim mustChg As Boolean: mustChg = (CStr(ws.Cells(i, 8).Value) = ""MUST_CHANGE"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Protect Password:=""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Call AuditLog(""Login"", ""User "" & LoggedInName & "" logged in as "" & LoggedInRole)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Unload frm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If mustChg Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Call ForceChangePassword(user, i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          If Not CheckLicenseOrActivate() Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Call BuildDashboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ' --- FAILED: Increment counter, maybe lock ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo AuthErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        failCount = failCount + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Cells(i, 9).Value = failCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If failCount >= MAX_ATTEMPTS Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          ws.Cells(i, 10).Value = Format(DateAdd(""n"", LOCKOUT_MINUTES, Now), ""yyyy-mm-dd hh:nn:ss"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          ws.Protect Password:=""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          frm.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Too many failed attempts. Locked for "" & LOCKOUT_MINUTES & "" min.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Call AuditLog(""Security"", ""Account LOCKED after "" & failCount & "" failed attempts: "" & user)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Protect Password:=""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim attLeft As Long: attLeft = MAX_ATTEMPTS - failCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Invalid password. "" & attLeft & "" attempt(s) remaining.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Call AuditLog(""Security"", ""Failed login attempt "" & failCount & ""/"" & MAX_ATTEMPTS & "" for: "" & user)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Invalid credentials.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "AuthErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblErr"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Authentication error. Contact admin.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Force Change Password (after reset) ----
    c = c & "Public Sub ForceChangePassword(uname As String, rowIdx As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmChangePassword.Tag = uname & ""|"" & rowIdx & ""|FORCED""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmChangePassword.Show vbModal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Change My Password (self-service) ----
    c = c & "Public Sub ChangeMyPassword()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If LCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)) = LCase(LoggedInUser) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frmChangePassword.Tag = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) & ""|"" & i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frmChangePassword.Show vbModal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub MigrationHashPasswords()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS): Dim i As Long, p As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    p = ws.Cells(i, 3).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Len(p) < 10 Or Not IsNumeric(p) Then ws.Cells(i, 3).Value = HashPass(p)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ===== NAVIGATION: Back to Dashboard (fullscreen-safe) =====
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' NavigateToDashboard: safely return to Dashboard from" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' any report sheet while in fullscreen/kiosk mode." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' Called by back buttons, Esc key, Ctrl+Home, etc." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub NavigateToDashboard()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Hide current report sheet back to VeryHidden ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim curSh As String: curSh = ActiveSheet.Name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If curSh <> S_DASH And curSh <> ""_LoginBG"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Clean up any back-button shapes on report sheets" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim s As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For Each s In ActiveSheet.Shapes" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Left(s.Name, 7) = ""btnBack"" Then s.Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ActiveSheet.Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Activate Dashboard ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dWs As Worksheet: Set dWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dWs.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dWs.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dWs.Range(""A1"").Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.ScrollRow = 1: ActiveWindow.ScrollColumn = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Re-apply fullscreen/kiosk mode ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call EnableFullScreen" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' SetupReportPageLayout: Professional A4 print setup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub SetupReportPageLayout(ws As Worksheet, title As String, lastCol As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.PageSetup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PaperSize = xlPaperA4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Orientation = xlLandscape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Zoom = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesWide = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesTall = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .TopMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .BottomMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .RightMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterHorizontally = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftHeader = title" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .RightHeader = ""Printed: "" & Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterFooter = ""Page &P of &N""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PrintArea = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1, 1), ws.Cells(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row, lastCol)).Address" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' AddBackToDashboardButton: Places a prominent floating" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' BACK button on a report sheet for easy return." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub AddBackToDashboardButton(ws As Worksheet)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Delete any existing back button first" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each s In ws.Shapes" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Left(s.Name, 7) = ""btnBack"" Then s.Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Compute position: top-right of visible area ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim btnW As Single: btnW = 185" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim btnH As Single: btnH = 36" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim scrW As Single: scrW = ActiveWindow.UsableWidth" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If scrW < 300 Then scrW = 800" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim btnL As Single: btnL = scrW - btnW - 20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If btnL < 50 Then btnL = 50" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Create stylish rounded-rect button ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set s = ws.Shapes.AddShape(5, btnL, 8, btnW, btnH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Name = ""btnBackDash""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(15, 20, 45)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 150, 136): s.Line.Weight = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Shadow.Type = msoShadow21: s.Shadow.Blur = 6" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ChrW(9664) & ""  BACK TO DASHBOARD""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 11" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.OnAction = ""NavigateToDashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Placement = 3: s.PrintObject = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set s = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(1, btnL + 20, 8 + btnH + 2, btnW - 40, 14)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Name = ""btnBackHint""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ""Press ESC or Ctrl+Home to return""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = RGB(140, 140, 140)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Fill.Visible = msoFalse: s.Line.Visible = msoFalse" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Placement = 3: s.PrintObject = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' SetupReportNavigation: Configures Esc key and right-click" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' menu for navigating back from report sheets." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' Called each time a report sheet is activated." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub SetupReportNavigation()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Map ESC key to NavigateToDashboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.OnKey ""{ESCAPE}"", ""NavigateToDashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Map Ctrl+Home as alternative" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.OnKey ""^{HOME}"", ""NavigateToDashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Add right-click context menu item" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cb As Object: Set cb = Application.CommandBars(""Cell"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Remove any existing one first" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ctrl As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each ctrl In cb.Controls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ctrl.Caption = """ & ChrW(9664) & " Back to Dashboard"" Then ctrl.Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ctrl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Add new one at the top" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ctrl = cb.Controls.Add(Type:=1, Before:=1, Temporary:=True)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ctrl.Caption = """ & ChrW(9664) & " Back to Dashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ctrl.OnAction = ""NavigateToDashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ctrl.BeginGroup = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ClearReportNavigation: Removes Esc/Ctrl+Home overrides" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' and the right-click menu item when returning to Dashboard." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ======================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ClearReportNavigation()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Restore default ESC behaviour" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.OnKey ""{ESCAPE}""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.OnKey ""^{HOME}""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Remove context menu item" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cb As Object: Set cb = Application.CommandBars(""Cell"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ctrl As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each ctrl In cb.Controls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ctrl.Caption = """ & ChrW(9664) & " Back to Dashboard"" Then ctrl.Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ctrl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub HideBackend()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim n" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each n In Array(S_STUD, S_CLASS, S_TEACH, S_GUARD, S_ATTEND, S_FEE_STR, S_FEE_PAY, S_RPT, S_USERS, S_SUBJ, S_MARKS, S_GRADE, S_LOGS, S_SETT, S_RPT_CLS, S_TMP_RPT, S_CBC_SKILLS, S_PHYSICAL)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CStr(n)).Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next n" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH).Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ShowBackend()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sh As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each sh In ThisWorkbook.Worksheets" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    sh.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub Logout()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  LoggedInRole = """": LoggedInName = """": LoggedInUser = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect Password:=""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sh As Shape: For Each sh In ws.Shapes: sh.Delete: Next sh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Show plain background behind login form" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ShowLoginBackground" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmLogin.Show" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ===== NEW: ShowLoginBackground / HideLoginBG helpers =====
    c = c & "' ===================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ShowLoginBackground: Create/activate a rich dark-navy" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' splash sheet so the Dashboard is NEVER visible behind" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' the login form." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ===================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ShowLoginBackground()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Const BG_SH As String = ""_LoginBG""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bg As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set bg = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set bg = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(BG_SH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If bg Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.DisplayAlerts = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set bg = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(Before:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    bg.Name = BG_SH" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.DisplayAlerts = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: bg.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": bg.Unprotect: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Paint the background ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Read school name + subtitle dynamically" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bgSchName As String: bgSchName = ""CBC MIS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bgSubTitle As String: bgSubTitle = ""CBC School Management Information System""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim stWs As Worksheet: Set stWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not stWs Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bgI As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For bgI = 2 To stWs.Cells(stWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Select Case UCase(CStr(stWs.Cells(bgI, 1).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Case ""SCHOOL_NAME"": If Len(Trim(CStr(stWs.Cells(bgI, 2).Value))) > 0 Then bgSchName = Trim(CStr(stWs.Cells(bgI, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Case ""SCHOOL_MOTTO"": If Len(Trim(CStr(stWs.Cells(bgI, 2).Value))) > 0 Then bgSubTitle = Trim(CStr(stWs.Cells(bgI, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next bgI" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Cells.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Soft slate-blue base fill" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Cells.Interior.Color = RGB(200, 215, 235)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Lighter accent band rows 5-9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Rows(""5:9"").Interior.Color  = RGB(215, 228, 245)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Slightly deeper accent rows 18-22" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Rows(""18:22"").Interior.Color = RGB(185, 205, 228)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Watermark text (centered) — uses dynamic school name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Range(""A13"").Value = UCase(bgSchName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    With .Range(""A13"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Name  = ""Segoe UI Light""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Size  = 36" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Bold  = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Color = RGB(30, 65, 120)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Italic = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Range(""A14"").Value = bgSubTitle" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    With .Range(""A14"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Name  = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Size  = 12" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Font.Color = RGB(65, 110, 175)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Hide spreadsheet chrome" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.DisplayGridlines          = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.DisplayHeadings           = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.DisplayHorizontalScrollBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.DisplayVerticalScrollBar   = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.DisplayWorkbookTabs        = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub HideLoginBackground()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Const BG_SH As String = ""_LoginBG""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(BG_SH).Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ===== FULLSCREEN / KIOSK helpers (in standard module so globally callable) =====
    c = c & "Public Sub EnableFullScreen()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Application.WindowState <> xlMaximized Then Application.WindowState = xlMaximized" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ActiveWindow.WindowState <> xlMaximized Then ActiveWindow.WindowState = xlMaximized" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayFullScreen = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayFormulaBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayStatusBar  = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ShowWindowsInTaskbar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  DoEvents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayFormulaBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ActiveWindow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayGridlines          = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayHeadings           = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayHorizontalScrollBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayVerticalScrollBar   = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayWorkbookTabs        = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub DisableFullScreen()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayFullScreen = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayFormulaBar = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayStatusBar  = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ShowWindowsInTaskbar = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ActiveWindow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayGridlines           = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayHeadings            = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayHorizontalScrollBar = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayVerticalScrollBar   = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .DisplayWorkbookTabs        = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modDashboard – Full-Screen Professional Dashboard
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModDashboard()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modDashboard")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Function CalculateAttendanceRate() As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_ATTEND)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then CalculateAttendanceRate = 1: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim p As Long: p = Application.CountIf(ws.Range(""D:D""), ""Present"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If (lr - 1) > 0 Then CalculateAttendanceRate = p / (lr - 1) Else CalculateAttendanceRate = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Function GetTopPerformanceLevel() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: GetTopPerformanceLevel = ""No Data""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Build dictionary of max marks per SubjectID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sjW As Worksheet: Set sjW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim maxDict As Object: Set maxDict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To sjW.Cells(sjW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sKey As String: sKey = CStr(sjW.Cells(j, 1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not maxDict.Exists(sKey) Then maxDict.Add sKey, Val(sjW.Cells(j, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Calculate average percentage across all marks" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalPerc As Double: totalPerc = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sc As Double: sc = Val(ws.Cells(j, 7).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim subID As String: subID = CStr(ws.Cells(j, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim mx As Double: mx = 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If maxDict.Exists(subID) Then mx = maxDict(subID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If mx > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      totalPerc = totalPerc + (sc / mx) * 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt = 0 Then Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim avgPerc As Double: avgPerc = totalPerc / cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetTopPerformanceLevel = GetCBCDescriptor(avgPerc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- BuildDashboard ----
    c = c & "Public Sub BuildDashboard()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo DashErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call EnsureDashboardSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 2: Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet, sW As Worksheet, fW As Worksheet, sF As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nAll As Long, fCol As Double, shp As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Visible = -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect Password:=""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear: On Error GoTo DashErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws.ProtectContents Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Cannot unprotect Dashboard."", vbExclamation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sh As Shape: For Each sh In ws.Shapes: sh.Delete: Next sh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells.Clear: Err.Clear: On Error GoTo DashErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Activate: ActiveWindow.DisplayGridlines = False: ActiveWindow.DisplayHeadings = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === DYNAMIC SIZING: measure screen at current state ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim scrW As Single: scrW = ActiveWindow.UsableWidth" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If scrW < 600 Then scrW = 600" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim scrH As Single: scrH = ActiveWindow.UsableHeight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If scrH < 400 Then scrH = 400" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pad As Single: pad = 12" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim innerW As Single: innerW = scrW - (pad * 2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === VERTICAL AUTO-FIT: scale heights to fit screen ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Base layout requires ~700pt vertically; scale down if needed" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim vFac As Single: vFac = scrH / 700" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If vFac > 1 Then vFac = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If vFac < 0.55 Then vFac = 0.55" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdrH As Single: hdrH = Int(58 * vFac): If hdrH < 44 Then hdrH = 44" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim kpiH As Single: kpiH = Int(75 * vFac): If kpiH < 52 Then kpiH = 52" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim btnH As Single: btnH = Int(50 * vFac): If btnH < 36 Then btnH = 36" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gap As Single: gap = Int(14 * vFac): If gap < 8 Then gap = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim secGap As Single: secGap = Int(18 * vFac): If secGap < 10 Then secGap = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim secHdrH As Single: secHdrH = Int(26 * vFac): If secHdrH < 20 Then secHdrH = 20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim kpiGap As Single: kpiGap = Int(18 * vFac): If kpiGap < 10 Then kpiGap = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === HEADER BAR ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddShape(1, 0, 0, scrW, hdrH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(15, 20, 45): shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddShape(1, 0, hdrH, scrW, 3)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 150, 136): shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- School Logo/Crest ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim logoSz As Single: logoSz = hdrH - 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim schNmD As String: schNmD = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_NAME"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If schNmD = """" Then schNmD = ""CBC MIS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sLogoD As String: sLogoD = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hasDLogo As Boolean: hasDLogo = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sLogoD <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lgPath As String: lgPath = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & sLogoD" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Dir(lgPath) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddPicture(lgPath, msoFalse, msoTrue, 12, 5, logoSz, logoSz)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      hasDLogo = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not hasDLogo Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddShape(9, 12, 5, logoSz, logoSz)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 150, 136): shp.Line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 215, 0): shp.Line.Weight = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim logoInit As String: logoInit = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim wParts() As String: wParts = Split(schNmD, "" "")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim wp As Long: For wp = 0 To UBound(wParts)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Len(wParts(wp)) > 0 Then logoInit = logoInit & Left(wParts(wp), 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next wp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Len(logoInit) > 3 Then logoInit = Left(logoInit, 3)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ChrW(9733) & vbLf & logoInit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = vbWhite: shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = Int(10 * vFac): If shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size < 8 Then shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: shp.TextFrame.VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.MarginTop = 0: shp.TextFrame.MarginBottom = 0: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim titL As Single: titL = logoSz + 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(1, titL, 4, 500, 24)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ChrW(9733) & ""  "" & UCase(schNmD) & ""  |  CBC MANAGEMENT SYSTEM""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = vbWhite: shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = Int(14 * vFac): If shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size < 10 Then shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(1, titL, hdrH - 22, 500, 18)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ChrW(9670) & "" Academic Year "" & Year(Date) & ""  |  "" & Format(Now, ""dddd, dd MMMM yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = RGB(0, 200, 180): shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- User badge ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim badgeTxt As String: badgeTxt = ChrW(9679) & "" "" & LoggedInName & "" ("" & LoggedInRole & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LoggedInName = """" Then badgeTxt = ChrW(9679) & "" User""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddShape(5, scrW - 240, Int(hdrH / 2) - 16, 220, 32)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 150, 136): shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text = badgeTxt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = vbWhite: shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI"": shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: shp.TextFrame.VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear: On Error GoTo DashErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === KPI DATA ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sW = Nothing: Set fW = Nothing: Set sF = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set fW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY): Set sF = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear: On Error GoTo DashErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  nAll = 0: If Not sW Is Nothing Then nAll = Application.CountA(sW.Range(""B:B"")) - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nAll < 0 Then nAll = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fCol = 0: If Not fW Is Nothing Then fCol = Application.Sum(fW.Range(""D:D""))" & vbCrLf
