    c = c & "  Dim fDue As Double: fDue = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not sF Is Nothing Then fDue = (Application.Sum(sF.Range(""C:C"")) * nAll)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fOut As Double: fOut = fDue - fCol: If fOut < 0 Then fOut = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim attR As String: attR = Format(CalculateAttendanceRate(), ""0%"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === KPI CARDS (5 across, dynamic width + height) ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim kpiW As Single: kpiW = (innerW - 4 * 10) / 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim kpiT As Single: kpiT = hdrH + 3 + kpiGap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeKPI(ws, ""k1"", ChrW(9734) & "" TOTAL LEARNERS"", CStr(nAll), pad, kpiT, kpiW, kpiH, RGB(46, 125, 50))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeKPI(ws, ""k2"", ChrW(9745) & "" ATTENDANCE RATE"", attR, pad + kpiW + 10, kpiT, kpiW, kpiH, RGB(251, 140, 0))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeKPI(ws, ""k3"", ChrW(9830) & "" FEE COLLECTIONS"", ""KSh "" & Format(fCol, ""#,##0""), pad + (kpiW + 10) * 2, kpiT, kpiW, kpiH, RGB(21, 101, 192))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeKPI(ws, ""k4"", ChrW(9888) & "" FEES OUTSTANDING"", ""KSh "" & Format(fOut, ""#,##0""), pad + (kpiW + 10) * 3, kpiT, kpiW, kpiH, RGB(198, 40, 40))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeKPI(ws, ""k5"", ChrW(9733) & "" PERFORMANCE"", GetTopPerformanceLevel(), pad + (kpiW + 10) * 4, kpiT, kpiW, kpiH, RGB(106, 27, 154))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === NAVIGATION BUTTONS (4 columns, dynamic) ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim btnW As Single: btnW = (innerW - 3 * 10) / 4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim secY As Single: secY = kpiT + kpiH + kpiGap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Section: ADMINISTRATION ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeHdr(ws, ChrW(9881) & ""  ADMINISTRATION"", pad, secY, innerW, secHdrH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + secHdrH + 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnAdm"", ChrW(10010) & "" ADMISSION"" & vbLf & ""    Enrol new learners"", pad, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(46, 125, 50))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnPup"", ChrW(9679) & "" STUDENT DATABASE"" & vbLf & ""    Manage records"", pad + btnW + 10, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(0, 121, 107))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnAtt"", ChrW(9745) & "" ATTENDANCE"" & vbLf & ""    Daily tracking"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 2, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(106, 27, 154))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnFee"", ChrW(9830) & "" FEES COLLECTION"" & vbLf & ""    Manage payments"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 3, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(27, 94, 32))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + btnH + gap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnArr"", ChrW(9888) & "" ARREARS REPORT"" & vbLf & ""    Outstanding fees"", pad, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(230, 81, 0))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnDb"",  ChrW(9776) & "" DATA EXPLORER"" & vbLf & ""    Advanced tools"", pad + btnW + 10, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(78, 52, 46))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnTch"", ChrW(9998) & "" STAFF PORTAL"" & vbLf & ""    Teacher records"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 2, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(0, 105, 92))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnImp"", ChrW(10548) & "" IMPORT ROLL"" & vbLf & ""    Import from Excel"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 3, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(255, 111, 0))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Section: ACADEMIC ENGINE ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + btnH + gap + secGap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeHdr(ws, ChrW(9998) & ""  ACADEMIC ENGINE"", pad, secY, innerW, secHdrH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + secHdrH + 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnMks"", ChrW(9998) & "" MARKS ENTRY"" & vbLf & ""    Whole-class grid"", pad, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(21, 101, 192))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnRpt"", ChrW(9776) & "" CBC REPORT CARDS"" & vbLf & ""    All Reports"", pad + btnW + 10, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(100, 60, 31))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnCbc"", ChrW(10003) & "" CBC SKILLS"" & vbLf & ""    Core Competencies"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 2, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(46, 125, 50))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnPhy"", ChrW(10010) & "" PHYSICAL/HEALTH"" & vbLf & ""    BMI tracking"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 3, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(0, 121, 107))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Section: SYSTEM & SECURITY ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + btnH + gap + secGap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeHdr(ws, ChrW(9888) & ""  SYSTEM & SECURITY"", pad, secY, innerW, secHdrH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + secHdrH + 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnSet"", ChrW(9881) & "" SETTINGS"" & vbLf & ""    Classes/Subjects"", pad, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(84, 110, 122))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LoggedInRole = ""Admin"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnBkp"", ChrW(9658) & "" BACKUP"" & vbLf & ""    Create backup"", pad + btnW + 10, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(55, 71, 79))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnRst"", ChrW(8634) & "" RESTORE"" & vbLf & ""    From backup"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 2, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(121, 85, 72))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnPrm"", ChrW(8679) & "" ANNUAL PROMOTE"" & vbLf & ""    End of year"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 3, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(40, 53, 147))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  secY = secY + btnH + gap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LoggedInRole = ""Admin"" Or LoggedInRole = ""Headteacher"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnFeeClose"", ChrW(9830) & "" YEAR-END FEE CLOSE"" & vbLf & ""    Carry forward arrears"", pad, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(183, 28, 28))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnUsr"", ChrW(9679) & "" USER MGMT"" & vbLf & ""    Manage accounts"", pad + btnW + 10, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(136, 14, 79))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnChPw"", ChrW(9679) & "" CHANGE PASSWORD"" & vbLf & ""    My security"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 2, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(69, 39, 160))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call MakeNav(ws, ""btnLog"", ChrW(8594) & "" LOGOUT"" & vbLf & ""    Exit system"", pad + (btnW + 10) * 3, secY, btnW, btnH, RGB(198, 40, 40))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === FOOTER BAR ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim footY As Single: footY = secY + btnH + Int(10 * vFac)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If footY < scrH - 24 Then footY = scrH - 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddShape(1, 0, footY, scrW, 22)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(245, 245, 245): shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(1, 20, footY + 3, scrW - 40, 18)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ChrW(9733) & "" CBC School MIS v2.0  |  "" & ChrW(9679) & "" Logged in: "" & LoggedInName & ""  |  "" & ChrW(9201) & "" "" & Format(Now, ""hh:nn AM/PM"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = RGB(120, 120, 120): shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.Fill.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ApplyRoleAccess(ws)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Hide login BG + reveal dashboard in one frame ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call HideLoginBackground" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A1"").Select: ActiveWindow.ScrollRow = 1: ActiveWindow.ScrollColumn = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Final fullscreen enforcement ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call EnableFullScreen" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "DashErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Dashboard Error: "" & Err.Description, vbExclamation, ""Dashboard""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' ---- RefreshDashboardKPIs: lightweight live update of KPI card values ----
    c = c & "Public Sub RefreshDashboardKPIs()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_DASH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet, fW As Worksheet, sF As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sW = Nothing: Set fW = Nothing: Set sF = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set fW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sF = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Calculate KPI values ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nAll As Long: nAll = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not sW Is Nothing Then nAll = Application.CountA(sW.Range(""B:B"")) - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nAll < 0 Then nAll = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fCol As Double: fCol = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not fW Is Nothing Then fCol = Application.Sum(fW.Range(""D:D""))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fDue As Double: fDue = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not sF Is Nothing Then fDue = Application.Sum(sF.Range(""C:C"")) * nAll" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fOut As Double: fOut = fDue - fCol: If fOut < 0 Then fOut = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim attR As String: attR = Format(CalculateAttendanceRate(), ""0%"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim perfLvl As String: perfLvl = GetTopPerformanceLevel()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Update KPI shapes by name ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim shp As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' k1: Total Learners" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes(""k1"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not shp Is Nothing Then Call UpdateKPIText(shp, ChrW(9734) & "" TOTAL LEARNERS"", CStr(nAll))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' k2: Attendance Rate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes(""k2"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not shp Is Nothing Then Call UpdateKPIText(shp, ChrW(9745) & "" ATTENDANCE RATE"", attR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' k3: Fee Collections" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes(""k3"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not shp Is Nothing Then Call UpdateKPIText(shp, ChrW(9830) & "" FEE COLLECTIONS"", ""KSh "" & Format(fCol, ""#,##0""))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' k4: Fees Outstanding" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes(""k4"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not shp Is Nothing Then Call UpdateKPIText(shp, ChrW(9888) & "" FEES OUTSTANDING"", ""KSh "" & Format(fOut, ""#,##0""))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' k5: Performance" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set shp = ws.Shapes(""k5"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not shp Is Nothing Then Call UpdateKPIText(shp, ChrW(9733) & "" PERFORMANCE"", perfLvl)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' ---- UpdateKPIText: helper to update shape text preserving formatting ----
    c = c & "Private Sub UpdateKPIText(shp As Shape, tit As String, val As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim oldClr As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Preserve the value color from the existing shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim oldTxt As String: oldTxt = shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim titLen As Long: titLen = InStr(oldTxt, vbLf) - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If titLen > 0 And titLen < Len(oldTxt) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    oldClr = shp.TextFrame.Characters(titLen + 2, Len(oldTxt) - titLen - 1).Font.Color" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    oldClr = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Set new text" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text = tit & vbLf & val" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Reapply formatting" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters(1, Len(tit)).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters(1, Len(tit)).Font.Color = RGB(128, 128, 128)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shp.TextFrame.Characters(1, Len(tit)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim vStart As Long: vStart = Len(tit) + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If vStart <= Len(shp.TextFrame.Characters.Text) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.Characters(vStart, Len(val)).Font.Size = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    shp.TextFrame.Characters(vStart, Len(val)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If oldClr <> 0 Then shp.TextFrame.Characters(vStart, Len(val)).Font.Color = oldClr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- MakeKPI: informational card (dynamic width + height) ----
    c = c & "Private Sub MakeKPI(ws As Worksheet, nm As String, tit As String, val As String, L As Single, T As Single, w As Single, h As Single, clr As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As Shape, sBar As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set s = ws.Shapes.AddShape(5, L, T, w, h)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Name = nm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(224, 224, 224): s.Line.Weight = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Shadow.Type = msoShadow25: s.Shadow.Blur = 6: s.Shadow.Transparency = 0.8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sBar = ws.Shapes.AddShape(1, L, T, 4, h)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sBar.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = clr: sBar.Line.Visible = msoFalse: sBar.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Text = tit & vbLf & val" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters(1, Len(tit)).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters(1, Len(tit)).Font.Color = RGB(128, 128, 128)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters(1, Len(tit)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim vStart As Long: vStart = Len(tit) + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If vStart <= Len(s.TextFrame.Characters.Text) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    s.TextFrame.Characters(vStart, Len(val)).Font.Size = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    s.TextFrame.Characters(vStart, Len(val)).Font.Color = clr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    s.TextFrame.Characters(vStart, Len(val)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.MarginLeft = 10: s.TextFrame.MarginTop = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- MakeHdr: full-width section divider (dynamic height) ----
    c = c & "Private Sub MakeHdr(ws As Worksheet, tit As String, L As Single, T As Single, w As Single, h As Single)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As Shape, sBar As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set sBar = ws.Shapes.AddShape(1, L, T, 3, h)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sBar.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 150, 136): sBar.Line.Visible = msoFalse: sBar.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set s = ws.Shapes.AddShape(1, L + 3, T, w - 3, h)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(235, 238, 248)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Line.Visible = msoFalse" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Text = ""  "" & tit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- MakeNav: clickable button (dynamic size) ----
    c = c & "Private Sub MakeNav(ws As Worksheet, nm As String, cap As String, L As Single, T As Single, w As Single, h As Single, clr As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As Shape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set s = ws.Shapes.AddShape(5, L, T, w, h)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Name = nm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = clr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Line.Visible = msoFalse" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Shadow.Type = msoShadow21: s.Shadow.Blur = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Text = cap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.MarginLeft = 8: s.TextFrame.MarginTop = 6" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.TextFrame.HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.OnAction = ""DashboardClick""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s.Placement = 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Role Access ----
    c = c & "Public Sub ApplyRoleAccess(ws As Worksheet)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case LoggedInRole" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""Bursar""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes(""btnAdm"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes(""btnAtt"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes(""btnMks"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""Headteacher""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes(""btnFee"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes(""btnArr"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Click Router ----
    c = c & "Public Sub DashboardClick()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nm As String: nm = Application.Caller" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case nm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnAdm"": frmAdmission.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnPup"": frmStudentDB.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnFee"": frmFees.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnArr"": Call RptFeeArrears" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnAtt"": frmAttendance.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnTch"": frmTeacher.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnMks"": frmEnterMarks.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnRpt"": Call ReportCardMenu" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnDb"":  frmDatabase.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnBkp"": frmBackup.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnRst"": frmBackup.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnPrm"": Call BulkPromoteStudents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnFeeClose"": Call YearEndFeeClose" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnSet"": frmSettings.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnLog"": Call Logout" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnCbc"": frmCBCAssessment.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnPhy"": frmPhysicalEntry.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnUsr"": frmUserMgmt.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnImp"": Call ImportNominalRoll" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""btnChPw"": Call ChangeMyPassword" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmEnterMarks – Whole-Class Marks Entry Grid
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateMarksForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmEnterMarks", "CBC Whole-Class Marks Entry", 700, 510)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "WHOLE-CLASS MARKS ENTRY", 0, 0, 700, 40, 14
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &H1F3864
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 40, 700, 3
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &H889632: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' === FILTER FRAME (visual background only) ===
    AL d, "lblFltBg", " MARKS ENTRY FILTERS", 20, 52, 660, 65
    d.Controls("lblFltBg").BackColor = &HF6F8FA: d.Controls("lblFltBg").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblFltBg").BorderColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblFltBg").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("lblFltBg").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblFltBg").ForeColor = &H444444
    
    ' Filter Row 1 (on form surface - accessible via frm.Controls)
    AL d, "lC", "Class:", 35, 70, 40, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lC").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lC").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lC").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbClass", 80, 68, 75
    d.Controls("cmbClass").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbClass").Style = 2
    
    AL d, "lSt", "Stream:", 170, 70, 45, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lSt").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lSt").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lSt").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbStream", 220, 68, 75
    d.Controls("cmbStream").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbStream").Style = 2
    
    AL d, "lSb", "Subject:", 315, 70, 50, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lSb").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lSb").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lSb").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbSubject", 370, 68, 300
    d.Controls("cmbSubject").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbSubject").Style = 2
    
    ' Filter Row 2 (on form surface)
    AL d, "lT", "Term:", 35, 95, 40, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lT").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lT").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lT").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbTerm", 80, 93, 75
    d.Controls("cmbTerm").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbTerm").Style = 2
    
    AL d, "lY", "Year:", 170, 95, 40, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lY").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lY").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lY").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbYear", 215, 93, 55
    d.Controls("cmbYear").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbYear").Style = 2
    
    AB d, "btnLoad", ChrW(9654) & " LOAD CLASS GRID", 420, 91, 250, 22, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnLoad").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnLoad").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === GRID HEADER (Dark Blue) ===
    AL d, "lblHdrBg", "", 20, 125, 660, 22
    d.Controls("lblHdrBg").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblHdrBg").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "hNo", "#", 25, 128, 30, 16, 9
    d.Controls("hNo").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hNo").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hNo").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("hNo").BackStyle = 0
    AL d, "hAdm", "Adm No", 65, 128, 75, 16, 9
    d.Controls("hAdm").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hAdm").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hAdm").BackStyle = 0
    AL d, "hName", "Student Full Name", 145, 128, 250, 16, 9
    d.Controls("hName").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hName").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hName").BackStyle = 0
    AL d, "hScore", "Score", 405, 128, 60, 16, 9
    d.Controls("hScore").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hScore").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hScore").TextAlign = 2: d.Controls("hScore").BackStyle = 0
    AL d, "hMax", "Max", 475, 128, 45, 16, 9
    d.Controls("hMax").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hMax").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hMax").BackStyle = 0
    AL d, "hGrade", "Computed Rating", 525, 128, 145, 16, 9
    d.Controls("hGrade").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hGrade").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hGrade").BackStyle = 0
    
    ' === SCROLLABLE GRID FRAME (No borders) ===
    Dim fraGrid As Object: Set fraGrid = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraGrid")
    fraGrid.Left = 20: fraGrid.Top = 147: fraGrid.Width = 660: fraGrid.Height = 270
    fraGrid.Caption = "": fraGrid.BorderStyle = 0
    fraGrid.ScrollBars = 2: fraGrid.ScrollHeight = 350: fraGrid.BackColor = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' Underline to finish grid
    AL d, "lblGridBtm", "", 20, 417, 660, 2
    d.Controls("lblGridBtm").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblGridBtm").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SYSTEM STATUS / PROGRESS ===
    AL d, "lblProg", "Progress: Ready to load", 20, 425, 300, 14, 9
    d.Controls("lblProg").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblProg").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    ' === STATUS LABEL (referenced by modMarks for load/save messages) ===
    AL d, "lblStat", " Ready.", 330, 425, 350, 14, 9
    d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H2E7D32: d.Controls("lblStat").TextAlign = 3
    
    ' === BOTTOM ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnSaveAll", ChrW(10003) & " SAVE ALL", 20, 445, 120, 32, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSaveAll").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnClearAll", "CLEAR", 150, 445, 80, 32, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClearAll").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnReport", ChrW(9776) & " Rpt Card", 240, 445, 110, 32, &H5A3416, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnReport").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnClassRpt", ChrW(9776) & " Class Rpt", 360, 445, 110, 32, &H6A1B9A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClassRpt").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE ENTRY", 530, 445, 150, 32, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' --- Form code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call InitEnterMarks(Me): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbClass_Change(): Call PopulateStreams(Me, Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value): Call LoadClassSubjects(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnLoad_Click(): Call LoadClassMarks(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSaveAll_Click(): Call SaveAllMarks(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClearAll_Click(): Call ClearAllScores(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnReport_Click(): Call OpenReportFromMarks(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClassRpt_Click(): Call ClassReportFromMarks(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Call UnhookMouseWheel: Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub fraGrid_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheel(Me.Controls(""fraGrid"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modMarks – Whole-Class Academic Engine
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModMarks()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modMarks")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Module-level storage for student data ---
    c = c & "Private mStudIDs() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mAdmNos() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mStudCount As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mMaxMark As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    ' === INIT ===
    c = c & "Public Sub InitEnterMarks(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbClass"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbTerm""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Term 1"": .AddItem ""Term 2"": .AddItem ""Term 3"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbYear""): .Clear: .AddItem ""2025"": .AddItem ""2026"": .AddItem ""2027"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value = ""2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value = ""Term 1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStudCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === LOAD SUBJECTS FOR SELECTED CLASS ===
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadClassSubjects(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbSubject"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value: If cls = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lvl As String: lvl = GetLevelFromClass(cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = lvl Then frm.Controls(""cmbSubject"").AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === LOAD CLASS — CORE GRID BUILDER ===
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadClassMarks(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo LdErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim strm As String: strm = frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subj As String: subj = frm.Controls(""cmbSubject"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Or subj = """" Or trm = """" Or yr = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please select Class, Subject, Term and Year."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Get max mark for this subject ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lvl As String: lvl = GetLevelFromClass(cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sjW As Worksheet: Set sjW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mMaxMark = 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To sjW.Cells(sjW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sjW.Cells(j, 3).Value) = subj And CStr(sjW.Cells(j, 2).Value) = lvl Then mMaxMark = Val(sjW.Cells(j, 4).Value): Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Clear existing grid controls ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ctl As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do While frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls.Count > 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls.Remove 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Gather students from DB ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStudCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim mStudIDs(1 To lr): ReDim mAdmNos(1 To lr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = cls And CStr(sW.Cells(i, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If strm = """" Or CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value) = strm Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mStudCount = mStudCount + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mStudIDs(mStudCount) = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mAdmNos(mStudCount) = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mStudCount = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""No active students found in "" & cls & "" "" & strm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.Cursor = 1: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Load existing marks into dictionary for quick lookup ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mkW As Worksheet: Set mkW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subID As Long: subID = GetSubID(subj, cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To mkW.Cells(mkW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 4).Value) = trm And CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 5).Value) = yr And Val(mkW.Cells(j, 6).Value) = subID Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      dict(CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 2).Value)) = mkW.Cells(j, 7).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Build grid rows ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rowH As Long: rowH = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yPos As Long: yPos = 4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim filled As Long: filled = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fra As Object: Set fra = frm.Controls(""fraGrid"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To mStudCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Find student name ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sName As String: sName = """": Dim admN As String: admN = mAdmNos(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(sW.Cells(j, cSID).Value) = mStudIDs(i) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        sName = sW.Cells(j, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(j, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Row background (alternating) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bg As Long: If i Mod 2 = 0 Then bg = &HF5F0EB Else bg = &HFFFFFF" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- No. label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lbNo As Object: Set lbNo = fra.Controls.Add(""Forms.Label.1"", ""lblNo_"" & i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbNo.Left = 5: lbNo.Top = yPos + 1: lbNo.Width = 30: lbNo.Height = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbNo.Caption = i: lbNo.TextAlign = 2: lbNo.BackColor = bg: lbNo.Font.Size = 8: lbNo.ForeColor = &H888888" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Adm No label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lbAdm As Object: Set lbAdm = fra.Controls.Add(""Forms.Label.1"", ""lblAdm_"" & i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbAdm.Left = 45: lbAdm.Top = yPos + 1: lbAdm.Width = 75: lbAdm.Height = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbAdm.Caption = admN: lbAdm.BackColor = bg: lbAdm.Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Name label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lbNm As Object: Set lbNm = fra.Controls.Add(""Forms.Label.1"", ""lblNm_"" & i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbNm.Left = 125: lbNm.Top = yPos + 1: lbNm.Width = 250: lbNm.Height = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbNm.Caption = sName: lbNm.BackColor = bg: lbNm.Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Score textbox ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim txSc As Object: Set txSc = fra.Controls.Add(""Forms.TextBox.1"", ""txtScore_"" & i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    txSc.Left = 385: txSc.Top = yPos: txSc.Width = 55: txSc.Height = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    txSc.Font.Size = 9: txSc.TextAlign = 2: txSc.TabIndex = i - 1: txSc.BorderStyle = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Max label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lbMx As Object: Set lbMx = fra.Controls.Add(""Forms.Label.1"", ""lblMx_"" & i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbMx.Left = 450: lbMx.Top = yPos + 1: lbMx.Width = 40: lbMx.Height = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbMx.Caption = ""/ "" & CStr(CLng(mMaxMark)): lbMx.BackColor = bg: lbMx.Font.Size = 8: lbMx.ForeColor = &H888888" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Grade label ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lbGr As Object: Set lbGr = fra.Controls.Add(""Forms.Label.1"", ""lblGr_"" & i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbGr.Left = 495: lbGr.Top = yPos + 1: lbGr.Width = 150: lbGr.Height = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lbGr.Caption = ""---"": lbGr.BackColor = bg: lbGr.ForeColor = &H2E7D32: lbGr.Font.Size = 8: lbGr.Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Pre-fill existing mark ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If dict.Exists(mStudIDs(i)) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      txSc.Value = CStr(dict(mStudIDs(i)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim perc As Double: perc = (Val(txSc.Value) / mMaxMark) * 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lbGr.Caption = GetGradeLevel(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      filled = filled + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    yPos = yPos + rowH" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Set scroll height ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.ScrollHeight = yPos + 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Loaded "" & mStudCount & "" students for "" & cls & "" "" & strm & "" - "" & subj & "" ("" & trm & "" "" & yr & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblProg"").Caption = ""Progress: "" & filled & "" of "" & mStudCount & "" entered""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "LdErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error loading class: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === SAVE ALL MARKS ===
    c = c & "Public Sub SaveAllMarks(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo SvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mStudCount = 0 Then MsgBox ""Load a class first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subj As String: subj = frm.Controls(""cmbSubject"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subID As Long: subID = GetSubID(subj, cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If subID = 0 Then MsgBox ""Subject not found!"", vbCritical: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo SvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim saved As Long: saved = 0: Dim skipped As Long: skipped = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, sc As Double, r As Long, j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To mStudCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim scTxt As String: scTxt = Trim(frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls(""txtScore_"" & i).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If scTxt = """" Or Not IsNumeric(scTxt) Then skipped = skipped + 1: GoTo NxtStud" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    sc = CDbl(scTxt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sc < 0 Or sc > mMaxMark Then skipped = skipped + 1: GoTo NxtStud" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Delete existing mark for this student/subject/term/year ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row To 2 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(ws.Cells(j, 2).Value) = mStudIDs(i) And CStr(ws.Cells(j, 4).Value) = trm And CStr(ws.Cells(j, 5).Value) = yr And Val(ws.Cells(j, 6).Value) = subID Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Rows(j).Delete: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Write new mark ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""MK-"" & Format(r - 1, ""0000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = mStudIDs(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 3).Value = mAdmNos(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 4).Value = trm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 5).Value = yr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 6).Value = subID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 7).Value = sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 8).Value = mMaxMark" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 9).Value = GetGradeLevel((sc / mMaxMark) * 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 10).Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 11).Value = LoggedInName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Update grade label in grid ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls(""lblGr_"" & i).Caption = GetGradeLevel((sc / mMaxMark) * 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    saved = saved + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "NxtStud:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblProg"").Caption = ""Progress: "" & saved & "" of "" & mStudCount & "" entered""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Saved "" & saved & "" marks. "" & skipped & "" skipped (empty/invalid).""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox saved & "" marks saved for "" & subj & "" ("" & trm & "" "" & yr & "")."" & vbLf & skipped & "" skipped."", vbInformation, ""Marks Saved""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Exams"", ""Bulk saved "" & saved & "" marks for "" & cls & "" - "" & subj & "" "" & trm & "" "" & yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "SvErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error saving marks: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === REPORT CARD FROM MARKS FORM ===
    c = c & "Public Sub OpenReportFromMarks(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RFErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mStudCount = 0 Then MsgBox ""Load a class first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If trm = """" Or yr = """" Then MsgBox ""Select Term and Year first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg As String: msg = ""Enter student row number (1 to "" & mStudCount & ""):"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 1 To mStudCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If k <= 15 Then msg = msg & k & "". "" & mAdmNos(k) & "" - "" & frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls(""lblNm_"" & k).Caption & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mStudCount > 15 Then msg = msg & ""... ("" & mStudCount - 15 & "" more)"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim inp As String: inp = InputBox(msg, ""Report Card - Select Student"", ""1"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If inp = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = Val(inp)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If idx < 1 Or idx > mStudCount Then MsgBox ""Invalid number."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateCBCReport(mStudIDs(idx), trm, yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RFErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error generating report: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === CLEAR ALL SCORES ===
    c = c & "Public Sub ClearAllScores(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mStudCount = 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Clear all entered scores?"", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To mStudCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls(""txtScore_"" & i).Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""fraGrid"").Controls(""lblGr_"" & i).Caption = ""---""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblProg"").Caption = ""Progress: 0 of "" & mStudCount & "" entered""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modClassReport – CBC Class Assessment Summary
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModClassReport()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modClassReport")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateClassAssessment(cls As String, strm As String, trm As String, yr As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CRErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Gather subjects for class level ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lvl As String: lvl = GetLevelFromClass(cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sjW As Worksheet: Set sjW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subjNames() As String, subjIDs() As Long, subjMax() As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nSubj As Long: nSubj = 0: Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To sjW.Cells(sjW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sjW.Cells(j, 2).Value) = lvl Then nSubj = nSubj + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nSubj = 0 Then MsgBox ""No subjects found for "" & lvl, vbExclamation: GoTo CRDone" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim subjNames(1 To nSubj): ReDim subjIDs(1 To nSubj): ReDim subjMax(1 To nSubj)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To sjW.Cells(sjW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sjW.Cells(j, 2).Value) = lvl Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      idx = idx + 1: subjNames(idx) = CStr(sjW.Cells(j, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      subjIDs(idx) = CLng(sjW.Cells(j, 1).Value): subjMax(idx) = Val(sjW.Cells(j, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Gather students ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sIDs() As String, sAdm() As String, sNames() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nStud As Long: nStud = 0: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = cls And CStr(sW.Cells(i, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If strm = """" Or CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value) = strm Then nStud = nStud + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nStud = 0 Then MsgBox ""No active students in "" & cls & "" "" & strm, vbExclamation: GoTo CRDone" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim sIDs(1 To nStud): ReDim sAdm(1 To nStud): ReDim sNames(1 To nStud)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  idx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = cls And CStr(sW.Cells(i, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If strm = """" Or CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value) = strm Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        idx = idx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        sIDs(idx) = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        sAdm(idx) = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        sNames(idx) = sW.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Load all marks into dictionary ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mkW As Worksheet: Set mkW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mlr As Long: mlr = mkW.Cells(mkW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To mlr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 4).Value) = trm And CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 5).Value) = yr Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim ky As String: ky = CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 2).Value) & ""|"" & CStr(mkW.Cells(j, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      dict(ky) = mkW.Cells(j, 7).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Prepare Report_Class sheet ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet, shFound As Boolean: shFound = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sh As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each sh In ThisWorkbook.Sheets" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sh.Name = S_RPT_CLS Then Set ws = sh: shFound = True: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not shFound Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Count))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Name = S_RPT_CLS" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": ws.Unprotect: Err.Clear: On Error GoTo CRErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.DisplayPageBreaks = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI"": ws.Cells.Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Read school name from DB_Settings ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim schoolName As String: schoolName = ""MAGANA PRIMARY SCHOOL""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim stW As Worksheet: Set stW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SETT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim si As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For si = 2 To stW.Cells(stW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(CStr(stW.Cells(si, 1).Value)) = ""SCHOOL_NAME"" And Len(Trim(CStr(stW.Cells(si, 2).Value))) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      schoolName = CStr(stW.Cells(si, 2).Value): Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next si" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear: On Error GoTo CRErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- HEADER ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdrCol As Long: hdrCol = nSubj + 6" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(1, 1), ws.Cells(1, hdrCol)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(1, 1).Value = UCase(schoolName) & ""  -  REPUBLIC OF KENYA"": ws.Cells(1, 1).Font.Size = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(1, 1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(1, 1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(1).RowHeight = 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, 1), ws.Cells(2, hdrCol)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(2, 1).Value = ""CBC CLASS ASSESSMENT REPORT"": ws.Cells(2, 1).Font.Size = 12" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(2, 1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(2, 1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(3, 1), ws.Cells(3, hdrCol)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(3, 1).Value = ""Class: "" & cls & ""  |  Stream: "" & IIf(strm = """", ""All"", strm) & ""  |  "" & trm & "" "" & yr & ""  |  Printed: "" & Format(Now, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(3, 1).Font.Size = 10: ws.Cells(3, 1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Color header rows ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(1, 1), ws.Cells(1, hdrCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(16, 64, 112)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(1, 1).Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, 1), ws.Cells(2, hdrCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(60, 155, 123)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(2, 1).Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Insert School Logo if available ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rLogo As String: rLogo = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If rLogo <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim rLP As String: rLP = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & rLogo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Dir(rLP) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes.AddPicture rLP, msoFalse, msoTrue, 2, 2, 40, 40" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- COLUMN HEADERS (Row 5) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hR As Long: hR = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(hR, 1).Value = ""#"": ws.Cells(hR, 2).Value = ""Adm No""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(hR, 3).Value = ""Student Name""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For sc = 1 To nSubj" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hR, 3 + sc).Value = subjNames(sc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(hR, nSubj + 4).Value = ""Total Pts""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(hR, nSubj + 5).Value = ""Avg %""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(hR, nSubj + 6).Value = ""Overall Grade""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Format ALL header cells: bold, dark bg, white text ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignBottom" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Rotate subject + summary columns VERTICALLY (90 degrees) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 4), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).Orientation = 90" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 4), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 4), ws.Cells(hR, hdrCol)).WrapText = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Keep #, Adm No, Student Name horizontal & larger ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, 3)).Orientation = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, 3)).Font.Size = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR, 3)).VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Tall header row to accommodate vertical text ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(hR).RowHeight = 80" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- STUDENT DATA ROWS ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dR As Long: dR = hR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalPts As Long, subjCnt As Long, perc As Double, mk As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gradeCount(1 To 8) As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subjTotals() As Double: ReDim subjTotals(1 To nSubj)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim subjStudCnt() As Long: ReDim subjStudCnt(1 To nSubj)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To nStud" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 1).Value = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 2).Value = sAdm(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 3).Value = sNames(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    totalPts = 0: subjCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim totalPerc As Double: totalPerc = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For sc = 1 To nSubj" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim lk As String: lk = sIDs(i) & ""|"" & CStr(subjIDs(sc))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If dict.Exists(lk) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mk = CDbl(dict(lk))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        perc = (mk / subjMax(sc)) * 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Cells(dR, 3 + sc).Value = GetCBCLevel(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        totalPts = totalPts + GetCBCPoints(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        totalPerc = totalPerc + perc: subjCnt = subjCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        subjTotals(sc) = subjTotals(sc) + perc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        subjStudCnt(sc) = subjStudCnt(sc) + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Cells(dR, 3 + sc).Value = ""---""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, nSubj + 4).Value = totalPts" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim avgP As Double: avgP = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If subjCnt > 0 Then avgP = totalPerc / subjCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, nSubj + 5).Value = Round(avgP, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, nSubj + 6).Value = GetCBCLevel(avgP)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Count grade distribution ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim gPt As Long: gPt = GetCBCPoints(avgP)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    gradeCount(gPt) = gradeCount(gPt) + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Alternating row color ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If i Mod 2 = 0 Then ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(240, 245, 250)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 4), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    dR = dR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- SUBJECT AVERAGES ROW ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dR = dR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 3).Value = ""Subject Mean %"": ws.Cells(dR, 3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For sc = 1 To nSubj" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If subjStudCnt(sc) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(dR, 3 + sc).Value = Round(subjTotals(sc) / subjStudCnt(sc), 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).Interior.Color = RGB(230, 240, 230)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 4), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- SUBJECT MEAN GRADE ROW ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dR = dR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 3).Value = ""Subject Mean Grade"": ws.Cells(dR, 3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For sc = 1 To nSubj" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If subjStudCnt(sc) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(dR, 3 + sc).Value = GetCBCLevel(subjTotals(sc) / subjStudCnt(sc))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 4), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- GRADE DISTRIBUTION SUMMARY ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dR = dR + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 1).Value = ""GRADE DISTRIBUTION SUMMARY"": ws.Cells(dR, 1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(dR, 1).Font.Size = 11" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, 9)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, 9)).Interior.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 1).Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dR = dR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gLabels: gLabels = Array(""BE2"", ""BE1"", ""AE2"", ""AE1"", ""ME2"", ""ME1"", ""EE2"", ""EE1"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gDescs: gDescs = Array(""1-10%"", ""11-20%"", ""21-30%"", ""31-40%"", ""41-57%"", ""58-74%"", ""75-89%"", ""90-100%"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 1).Value = ""Grade"": ws.Cells(dR, 2).Value = ""Range""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 3).Value = ""Description"": ws.Cells(dR, 4).Value = ""Students""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, 4)).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(dR, 1), ws.Cells(dR, 4)).Interior.Color = RGB(200, 220, 200)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gDescFull: gDescFull = Array(""Below Expectations"", ""Below Expectations"", ""Approaching Expectations"", ""Approaching Expectations"", ""Meeting Expectations"", ""Meeting Expectations"", ""Exceeding Expectations"", ""Exceeding Expectations"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim g As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For g = 7 To 0 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    dR = dR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 1).Value = gLabels(g)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 2).Value = gDescs(g)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 3).Value = gDescFull(g)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 4).Value = gradeCount(g + 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 4).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next g" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- CLASS MEAN ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dR = dR + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 1).Value = ""Class Mean:"": ws.Cells(dR, 1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim classTotal As Double: classTotal = 0: Dim classCnt As Long: classCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For sc = 1 To nSubj" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If subjStudCnt(sc) > 0 Then classTotal = classTotal + (subjTotals(sc) / subjStudCnt(sc)): classCnt = classCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If classCnt > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 2).Value = Round(classTotal / classCnt, 1) & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 3).Value = GetCBCLevel(classTotal / classCnt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(dR, 4).Value = GetCBCDescriptor(classTotal / classCnt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(dR, 2).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(dR, 3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Column widths (optimized for A4 landscape) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(1).ColumnWidth = 4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(2).ColumnWidth = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(3).ColumnWidth = 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For sc = 1 To nSubj: ws.Columns(3 + sc).ColumnWidth = 7: Next sc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(nSubj + 4).ColumnWidth = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(nSubj + 5).ColumnWidth = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(nSubj + 6).ColumnWidth = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Data area font and formatting ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR + 1, 1), ws.Cells(hR + nStud, hdrCol)).Font.Size = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR + 1, 2), ws.Cells(hR + nStud, 2)).HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR + 1, 3), ws.Cells(hR + nStud, 3)).HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR + 1, 1), ws.Cells(hR + nStud, hdrCol)).ShrinkToFit = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Row heights for data ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rh As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For rh = hR + 1 To hR + nStud" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Rows(rh).RowHeight = 15" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next rh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Borders: thin internal, medium outer ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tblRng As Range" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set tblRng = ws.Range(ws.Cells(hR, 1), ws.Cells(hR + nStud, hdrCol))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders.Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders.Color = RGB(180, 180, 200)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders(xlEdgeTop).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders(xlEdgeLeft).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders(xlEdgeRight).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders(xlEdgeTop).Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tblRng.Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Page Setup: A4 Landscape ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.PageSetup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Orientation = xlLandscape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PaperSize = xlPaperA4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesWide = 1: .FitToPagesTall = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Zoom = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .TopMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .BottomMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .RightMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterHorizontally = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PrintTitleRows = ""$1:$"" & hR" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftHeader = """": .CenterHeader = """": .RightHeader = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterFooter = ""&P of &N""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PrintArea = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1, 1), ws.Cells(dR, hdrCol)).Address" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear: On Error GoTo CRErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Activate and apply view settings ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.DisplayGridlines = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.FreezePanes = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(hR, 1).Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.FreezePanes = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A1"").Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Add Back to Dashboard button for fullscreen navigation ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(ws)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupReportNavigation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ChrW(10003) & "" Class Assessment Report Generated!"" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""Class: "" & cls & "" "" & IIf(strm = """", ""(All Streams)"", ""Stream "" & strm) & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    trm & "" "" & yr & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    nStud & "" students  |  "" & nSubj & "" subjects"" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""The 'Report_Class' sheet is now active."", vbInformation, ""CBC Class Report""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report"", ""Class Assessment: "" & cls & "" "" & strm & "" "" & trm & "" "" & yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CRDone:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CRErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Class Report Error (line "" & Erl & ""): "" & Err.Description, vbCritical, ""Class Report Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ClassReportFromMarks(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim strm As String: strm = frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Or trm = """" Or yr = """" Then MsgBox ""Select Class, Term and Year first."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Hide" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateClassAssessment(cls, strm, trm, yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Return to Marks Entry form?"", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, ""CBC Class Report"") = vbYes Then frm.Show Else Unload frm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modAuditLog – System Activity Logging
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModAuditLog()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modAuditLog")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub AuditLog(action As String, details As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_LOGS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""LOG-"" & Format(Now, ""yymmddhhnnss"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = Now" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 3).Value = LoggedInName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 4).Value = action" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 5).Value = details" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modBackup – Automated Data Protection & Restore
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModBackup()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modBackup")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- DataSheets: ALL data sheet names in the system ----
    ' Covers every data sheet: Students, Classes, Teachers, Guardians,
    ' Attendance, Fees, Payments, Users, Subjects, Marks, Grades,
    ' Logs, Settings, CBC, Physical, Receipts, Promotions,
    ' Report Output, Report Class, Template, Dashboard
    c = c & "Public Function DataSheets() As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  DataSheets = Array(S_STUD, S_CLASS, S_TEACH, S_GUARD, S_ATTEND, S_FEE_STR, S_FEE_PAY, S_USERS, S_SUBJ, S_MARKS, S_GRADE, S_LOGS, S_SETT, S_CBC_SKILLS, S_PHYSICAL, S_RCPT, S_PROMO, S_RPT, S_RPT_CLS, S_TMP_RPT, S_DASH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- GetBackupFolder: ensures folder exists ----
    c = c & "Private Function GetBackupFolder() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Backups""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir bp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetBackupFolder = bp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- UnprotectSheet: safe unprotect with fallback ----
    c = c & "Private Sub SafeUnprotect(ws As Worksheet)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- SafeProtect: re-protect after operations ----
    c = c & "Private Sub SafeProtect(ws As Worksheet)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  AutoBackup: Full workbook copy with verification
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub AutoBackup(Optional customName As String = """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo BkErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Creating backup...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = GetBackupFolder()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim baseName As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If customName <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    baseName = customName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    baseName = Left(ThisWorkbook.Name, InStrRev(ThisWorkbook.Name, ""."") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ts As String: ts = Format(Now, ""yyyymmdd_hhnnss"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fp As String: fp = bp & ""\"" & baseName & ""_"" & ts & "".xlsm""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.SaveCopyAs fp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(fp) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Backup FAILED - file was not created!"", vbCritical, ""Backup Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim szKB As String: szKB = Format(FileLen(fp) / 1024, ""#,##0"") & "" KB""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Backup saved: "" & fp & "" ("" & szKB & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Backup"", ""Backup saved: "" & fp & "" ("" & szKB & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PurgeOldBackups(10)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "BkErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Backup error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical, ""Backup Failed""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  BackupBeforeUpdate: Pre-AutoSetup safety check
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Function BackupBeforeUpdate() As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo BuErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hasData As Boolean: hasData = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ws Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row >= 2 Then hasData = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo BuErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not hasData Then BackupBeforeUpdate = True: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ans As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ans = MsgBox(""Existing student data detected!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""AutoSetup will update system code (modules & forms)."" & vbLf & ""Your DATA SHEETS will be preserved."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Create a safety backup before proceeding?"" & vbLf & ""(Strongly recommended)"", vbYesNoCancel + vbQuestion, ""Pre-Update Backup"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans = vbCancel Then BackupBeforeUpdate = False: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans = vbYes Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AutoBackup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Backup saved to:"" & vbLf & GetBackupFolder(), vbInformation, ""Backup Complete""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  BackupBeforeUpdate = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "BuErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Backup error: "" & Err.Description & vbLf & ""Proceeding anyway."", vbExclamation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  BackupBeforeUpdate = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  RestoreFromBackup: Professional sheet-by-sheet data restore
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub RestoreFromBackup()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RstFatal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = GetBackupFolder()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then MsgBox ""No Backups folder found."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fp As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fp = Application.GetOpenFilename(""Excel Files (*.xlsm),*.xlsm"", , ""Select Backup to Restore"", , False)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fp = False Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(CStr(fp)) = """" Then MsgBox ""File not found!"", vbCritical: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ans As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ans = MsgBox(""RESTORE data from:"" & vbLf & CStr(fp) & vbLf & vbLf & ""WARNING: This will OVERWRITE all current data!"" & vbLf & ""A backup of current data will be created first."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Continue?"", vbYesNo + vbExclamation, ""Confirm Restore"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoBackup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.EnableEvents = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bkWb As Workbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set bkWb = Workbooks.Open(CStr(fp), ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If bkWb Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Cannot open backup file!"", vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    GoTo RstCleanup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sheets As Variant: sheets = DataSheets()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim okList As String, failList As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim okCnt As Long, failCnt As Long, skipCnt As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = LBound(sheets) To UBound(sheets)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(sheets(i))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = ""Restoring: "" & sn & "" ("" & (i + 1) & ""/"" & (UBound(sheets) + 1) & "")...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim srcWs As Worksheet: Set srcWs = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim dstWs As Worksheet: Set dstWs = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set srcWs = bkWb.Sheets(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set dstWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If srcWs Is Nothing Or dstWs Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      skipCnt = skipCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If RestoreOneSheet(srcWs, dstWs) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        okCnt = okCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        okList = okList & ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" "" & sn & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        failCnt = failCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        failList = failList & ""  "" & ChrW(10007) & "" "" & sn & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  bkWb.Close SaveChanges:=False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set bkWb = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RstCleanup:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.EnableEvents = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = ""RESTORE COMPLETE"" & vbLf & String(35, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & ""Restored: "" & okCnt & "" sheets"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If failCnt > 0 Then msg = msg & ""Failed: "" & failCnt & "" sheets"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If skipCnt > 0 Then msg = msg & ""Skipped: "" & skipCnt & "" (not found)"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If okList <> """" Then msg = msg & vbLf & ""Restored:"" & vbLf & okList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If failList <> """" Then msg = msg & vbLf & ""Failed:"" & vbLf & failList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & vbLf & ""Please logout and login again to refresh.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox msg, IIf(failCnt > 0, vbExclamation, vbInformation), ""Restore Summary""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Restore"", ""Restored "" & okCnt & ""/"" & (okCnt + failCnt + skipCnt) & "" sheets from "" & CStr(fp))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RstFatal:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.EnableEvents = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not bkWb Is Nothing Then bkWb.Close SaveChanges:=False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Restore error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical, ""Restore Failed""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  RestoreOneSheet: Atomic per-sheet restore (returns True/False)
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Function RestoreOneSheet(srcWs As Worksheet, dstWs As Worksheet) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo SheetErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  RestoreOneSheet = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeUnprotect(dstWs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcLR As Long: srcLR = srcWs.Cells(srcWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcLC As Long: srcLC = srcWs.Cells(1, srcWs.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If srcLR < 1 Then srcLR = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If srcLC < 1 Then srcLC = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dstWs.Cells.Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcRng As Range" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set srcRng = srcWs.Range(srcWs.Cells(1, 1), srcWs.Cells(srcLR, srcLC))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  srcRng.Copy" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dstWs.Range(""A1"").PasteSpecial xlPasteValues" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dstWs.Range(""A1"").PasteSpecial xlPasteFormats" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dstWs.Range(""A1"").PasteSpecial xlPasteColumnWidths" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.CutCopyMode = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeProtect(dstWs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  RestoreOneSheet = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "SheetErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.CutCopyMode = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SafeProtect(dstWs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
