    c = c & "  RestoreOneSheet = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  ListBackups: Display all available backups with details
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub ListBackups()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = GetBackupFolder()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then MsgBox ""No Backups folder found."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim f As String: f = Dir(bp & ""\*.xlsm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If f = """" Then MsgBox ""No backup files found."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = ChrW(9733) & "" BACKUP FILES"" & vbLf & String(40, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalSz As Double: totalSz = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do While f <> """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fullP As String: fullP = bp & ""\"" & f" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim szB As Double: szB = FileLen(fullP)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    totalSz = totalSz + szB" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sz As String: sz = Format(szB / 1024, ""#,##0"") & "" KB""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim dt As String: dt = Format(FileDateTime(fullP), ""dd/mm/yyyy hh:nn"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    msg = msg & cnt & "". "" & f & vbLf & ""     "" & sz & ""  |  "" & dt & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    f = Dir()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & vbLf & String(40, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & ""Total: "" & cnt & "" backup(s), "" & Format(totalSz / 1048576, ""#,##0.0"") & "" MB"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & ""Location: "" & bp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox msg, vbInformation, ""Backup Manager""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  PurgeOldBackups: Keep only the N most recent backups
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub PurgeOldBackups(Optional keepCount As Long = 10)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = GetBackupFolder()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim files() As String, dates() As Date" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim f As String: f = Dir(bp & ""\*.xlsm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do While f <> """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim Preserve files(1 To cnt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim Preserve dates(1 To cnt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    files(cnt) = bp & ""\"" & f" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    dates(cnt) = FileDateTime(files(cnt))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    f = Dir()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt <= keepCount Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long, j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 1 To cnt - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = k + 1 To cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If dates(j) > dates(k) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim td As Date: td = dates(k): dates(k) = dates(j): dates(j) = td" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim tf As String: tf = files(k): files(k) = files(j): files(j) = tf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim delCnt As Long: delCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = keepCount + 1 To cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Kill files(k)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    delCnt = delCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If delCnt > 0 Then Call AuditLog(""Backup"", ""Purged "" & delCnt & "" old backups, keeping "" & keepCount & "" most recent."")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  CleanOldBackups: Remove backups older than N days (manual)
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub CleanOldBackups()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = GetBackupFolder()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim days As Long: days = 30" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim f As String: f = Dir(bp & ""\*.xlsm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim delCnt As Long: delCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do While f <> """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fp2 As String: fp2 = bp & ""\"" & f" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If DateDiff(""d"", FileDateTime(fp2), Now) > days Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Kill fp2: delCnt = delCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    f = Dir()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If delCnt > 0 Then Call AuditLog(""Backup"", ""Cleaned "" & delCnt & "" backups older than "" & days & "" days."")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  GetSheetRowCount: count data rows for a sheet
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Private Function GetSheetRowCount(sn As String) As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then GetSheetRowCount = -1: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr >= 2 Then GetSheetRowCount = lr - 1 Else GetSheetRowCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  DataSummary: Show row counts for every data sheet
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub DataSummary()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sheets As Variant: sheets = DataSheets()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg As String, totalRows As Long, totalSheets As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = ChrW(9733) & "" DATABASE SUMMARY"" & vbLf & String(45, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = LBound(sheets) To UBound(sheets)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(sheets(i))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim rc As Long: rc = GetSheetRowCount(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If rc >= 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      totalSheets = totalSheets + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      totalRows = totalRows + rc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim icon As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If rc > 0 Then icon = ChrW(10003) Else icon = ChrW(9675)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      msg = msg & ""  "" & icon & "" "" & sn & "": "" & Format(rc, ""#,##0"") & "" records"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      msg = msg & ""  "" & ChrW(10007) & "" "" & sn & "": NOT FOUND"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & vbLf & String(45, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & ""Total: "" & totalSheets & "" sheets, "" & Format(totalRows, ""#,##0"") & "" data records"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & ""Backup coverage: "" & totalSheets & ""/"" & (UBound(sheets) - LBound(sheets) + 1) & "" sheets""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox msg, vbInformation, ""Database Summary""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  ScheduledBackup: Auto-backup called on workbook close
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub ScheduledBackup()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SETT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim autoEnabled As Boolean: autoEnabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ws Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)) = ""AUTO_BACKUP"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)) = ""NO"" Or CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = ""0"" Then autoEnabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not autoEnabled Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim studWs As Worksheet: Set studWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If studWs Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If studWs.Cells(studWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = GetBackupFolder()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim f As String: f = Dir(bp & ""\*.xlsm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim latestDt As Date" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do While f <> """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fdt As Date: fdt = FileDateTime(bp & ""\"" & f)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If fdt > latestDt Then latestDt = fdt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    f = Dir()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If latestDt > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If DateDiff(""h"", latestDt, Now) < 4 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoBackup(""AutoSave"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  ExportAllDataToCSV: Export each data sheet to CSV
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub ExportAllDataToCSV()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CsvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\CSV_Export""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir bp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CsvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ts As String: ts = Format(Now, ""yyyymmdd_hhnnss"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim exportDir As String: exportDir = bp & ""\"" & ts" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MkDir exportDir" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sheets As Variant: sheets = DataSheets()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim okCnt As Long, skipCnt As Long, i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Exporting data to CSV...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = LBound(sheets) To UBound(sheets)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(sheets(i))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ws2 As Worksheet: Set ws2 = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: Set ws2 = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(sn): On Error GoTo CsvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ws2 Is Nothing Then skipCnt = skipCnt + 1: GoTo NextCSV" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lr As Long: lr = ws2.Cells(ws2.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If lr < 1 Then skipCnt = skipCnt + 1: GoTo NextCSV" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim lc As Long: lc = ws2.Cells(1, ws2.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If lc < 1 Then lc = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = ""Exporting: "" & sn & ""...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim csvPath As String: csvPath = exportDir & ""\"" & sn & "".csv""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fn As Integer: fn = FreeFile" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Open csvPath For Output As #fn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim r As Long, cc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For r = 1 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim csvLn As String: csvLn = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For cc = 1 To lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim cv As String: cv = CStr(ws2.Cells(r, cc).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If InStr(cv, "","") > 0 Or InStr(cv, """""""") > 0 Then cv = """""""" & Replace(cv, """""""", """""""""""") & """"""""""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If cc > 1 Then csvLn = csvLn & "",""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        csvLn = csvLn & cv" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next cc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Print #fn, csvLn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next r" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Close #fn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    okCnt = okCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "NextCSV:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Export"", ""Exported "" & okCnt & "" sheets to CSV: "" & exportDir)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""CSV Export Complete!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Exported: "" & okCnt & "" sheets"" & vbLf & ""Skipped: "" & skipCnt & vbLf & vbLf & ""Location:"" & vbLf & exportDir, vbInformation, ""Export Complete""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CsvErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""CSV Export error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical, ""Export Failed""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' ============================================================
    '  VerifyBackup: Compare current data vs a backup file
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Sub VerifyBackup()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo VErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fp As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fp = Application.GetOpenFilename(""Excel Files (*.xlsm),*.xlsm"", , ""Select Backup to Verify"", , False)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fp = False Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bkWb As Workbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set bkWb = Workbooks.Open(CStr(fp), ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If bkWb Is Nothing Then MsgBox ""Cannot open file!"", vbCritical: GoTo VCleanup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sheets As Variant: sheets = DataSheets()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg As String, i As Long, matchCnt As Long, diffCnt As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = ChrW(9733) & "" BACKUP VERIFICATION"" & vbLf & String(50, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & ""File: "" & Dir(CStr(fp)) & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = LBound(sheets) To UBound(sheets)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(sheets(i))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim curRows As Long: curRows = GetSheetRowCount(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bkRows As Long: bkRows = -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bkWs As Worksheet: Set bkWs = bkWb.Sheets(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not bkWs Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim bkLr As Long: bkLr = bkWs.Cells(bkWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If bkLr >= 2 Then bkRows = bkLr - 1 Else bkRows = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set bkWs = Nothing: On Error GoTo VErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sts As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If bkRows = -1 Then sts = ChrW(10007) & "" MISSING""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If bkRows >= 0 And curRows = bkRows Then sts = ChrW(10003) & "" OK"": matchCnt = matchCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If bkRows >= 0 And curRows <> bkRows Then sts = ChrW(9888) & "" DIFF("" & (curRows - bkRows) & "")"": diffCnt = diffCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    msg = msg & ""  "" & sn & "": Cur="" & curRows & "" Bak="" & bkRows & "" "" & sts & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & vbLf & ""Match: "" & matchCnt & "" | Diff: "" & diffCnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: bkWb.Close False: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "VCleanup:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox msg, IIf(diffCnt > 0, vbExclamation, vbInformation), ""Backup Verification""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "VErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: If Not bkWb Is Nothing Then bkWb.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Verify error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modPromotions – Annual Student Promotion Engine
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModPromotions()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modPromotions")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' ============================================================
    '  CBC CLASS ORDER CONSTANTS
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "' CBC class progression order" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const CLASS_ORDER As String = ""PP1,PP2,G1,G2,G3,G4,G5,G6,G7,G8,G9,ALUMNI""" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' ============================================================
    '  GetNextGrade: Returns next class in CBC ladder
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Public Function GetNextGrade(cur As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(CLASS_ORDER, "","" )" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To UBound(parts) - 1   ' -1: last (ALUMNI) has no next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(Trim(parts(i))) = UCase(Trim(cur)) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetNextGrade = parts(i + 1): Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetNextGrade = cur  ' Unknown class: leave unchanged" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' ============================================================
    '  EnsurePromotionLog: Creates DB_Promotions sheet if missing
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Private Function EnsurePromotionLog() As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Promotions"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.DisplayAlerts = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Count))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Name = ""DB_Promotions""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.DisplayAlerts = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Write header" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1,1).Value = ""PromotionID"": ws.Cells(1,2).Value = ""StudentID""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1,3).Value = ""AdmNo"": ws.Cells(1,4).Value = ""StudentName""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1,5).Value = ""FromClass"": ws.Cells(1,6).Value = ""ToClass""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1,7).Value = ""AcademicYear"": ws.Cells(1,8).Value = ""PromotedBy""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1,9).Value = ""PromotionDate""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Rows(1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Rows(1).Interior.Color = RGB(31,56,100): ws.Rows(1).Font.Color = RGB(255,255,255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": ws.Unprotect: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set EnsurePromotionLog = ws" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' ============================================================
    '  BuildClassSummary: Count active students per class
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "Private Function BuildClassSummary(sWs As Worksheet) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, lr As Long: lr = sWs.Cells(sWs.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalAct As Long: totalAct = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(Trim(CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cST).Value))) = ""ACTIVE"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim cl As String: cl = Trim(CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cCLS).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If cl <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If dict.Exists(cl) Then dict(cl) = dict(cl) + 1 Else dict(cl) = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        totalAct = totalAct + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(""PP1,PP2,G1,G2,G3,G4,G5,G6,G7,G8,G9"", "","" )" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim summaryLine As String: summaryLine = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim p As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For p = 0 To UBound(parts)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pcl As String: pcl = parts(p)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If dict.Exists(pcl) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      summaryLine = summaryLine & ""  "" & pcl & ""  ->  "" & GetNextGrade(pcl) & ""    ("" & dict(pcl) & "" students)"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next p" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Append any ALUMNI already present" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If dict.Exists(""ALUMNI"") Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    summaryLine = summaryLine & ""  ALUMNI  ->  ALUMNI  (no change, "" & dict(""ALUMNI"") & "" students)"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  BuildClassSummary = summaryLine & vbLf & ""  TOTAL ACTIVE: "" & totalAct & "" student(s)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' ============================================================
    '  AnnualPromotion: Main entry point
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "' ====================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' AnnualPromotion – Full end-of-year promotion for ALL active students" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' ====================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub AnnualPromotion()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 2  ' Hourglass" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Verify DB_Students exists ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sWs As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: Set sWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD): On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sWs Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ChrW(10007) & ""  Student database sheet not found!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Please run AutoSetup first."", vbCritical, ""Promotion Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Check there is student data ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalRows As Long: totalRows = sWs.Cells(sWs.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If totalRows < 2 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ChrW(10007) & ""  No student records found in the database."" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Import students before running the Annual Promotion."", vbExclamation, ""Promotion Cancelled""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Build pre-promotion summary ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Building class summary..."" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sumTxt As String: sumTxt = BuildClassSummary(sWs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 1 – Show preview and ask for first confirmation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim acYear As String: acYear = CStr(Year(Date)) & ""-"" & CStr(Year(Date) + 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg1 As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = String(60, ChrW(9552)) & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & ""  ANNUAL PROMOTION "" & acYear & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & String(60, ChrW(9552)) & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & ""PRE-PROMOTION CLASS DISTRIBUTION:"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & String(50, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & sumTxt & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & String(50, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & ""  G9 students will be marked ALUMNI (graduated)."" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & ""  Inactive / transferred students are NOT promoted."" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & ""  A full system backup is taken BEFORE any changes."" & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg1 = msg1 & ""  Do you want to proceed with this promotion?""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ans1 As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ans1 = MsgBox(msg1, vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, ""Annual Promotion Preview"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans1 = vbNo Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ChrW(10003) & ""  Annual Promotion cancelled. No changes were made."", vbInformation, ""Promotion Cancelled""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 2 – Second (typed) confirmation for safety" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim typedYes As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  typedYes = InputBox(""FINAL CONFIRMATION REQUIRED"" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""This will permanently update class levels for ALL active students."" & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""A system backup will be created first."" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""Type  YES  (in capitals) to confirm and begin promotion:"", _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""Annual Promotion – Final Confirmation"", """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(typedYes) <> ""YES"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ChrW(10003) & ""  Annual Promotion cancelled – confirmation not received."" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "           ""No changes were made to any student record."", vbInformation, ""Promotion Cancelled""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 3 – Auto-backup BEFORE making any changes" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Step 1/3: Creating pre-promotion backup...""  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoBackup(""PrePromotion_"" & acYear)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim backupErr As Long: backupErr = Err.Number" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If backupErr <> 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.Cursor = 1: Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bkAns As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    bkAns = MsgBox(ChrW(9888) & ""  BACKUP FAILED before promotion!"" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ""It is strongly recommended to manually back up the file before continuing."" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ""Do you want to proceed WITHOUT a backup? (NOT recommended)"", _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      vbYesNo + vbCritical + vbDefaultButton2, ""Backup Warning"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If bkAns = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = False: Application.Cursor = 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 4 – Ensure promotion history log exists" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Step 2/3: Preparing promotion log...""  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim logWs As Worksheet: Set logWs = EnsurePromotionLog()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim logRow As Long: logRow = logWs.Cells(logWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  logWs.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 5 – Unprotect DB_Students and loop through rows" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = ""Step 3/3: Promoting students...""  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: sWs.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": sWs.Unprotect: On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim promoted As Long: promoted = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim alumniCount As Long: alumniCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim unchanged As Long: unchanged = 0   ' inactive / skipped" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim errCount As Long: errCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim perClass As Object: Set perClass = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim errList As String: errList = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim promID As Long: promID = logRow   ' sequential ID for this batch" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To totalRows" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim status As String: status = UCase(Trim(CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cST).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If status <> ""ACTIVE"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      unchanged = unchanged + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GoTo NextStudent" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fromCls As String: fromCls = Trim(CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cCLS).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If fromCls = ""ALUMNI"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      unchanged = unchanged + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GoTo NextStudent" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim toCls As String: toCls = GetNextGrade(fromCls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    sWs.Cells(i, cCLS).Value = toCls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Err.Number <> 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      errCount = errCount + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cFN).Value) & "" "" & CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cLN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      errList = errList & ""  Row "" & i & "": "" & sn & "" ("" & fromCls & "") - "" & Err.Description & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Err.Clear: On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GoTo NextStudent" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Write promotion history row ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 1).Value = ""PROM-"" & Format(logRow - 1, ""000000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 2).Value = CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 3).Value = CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 4).Value = CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cFN).Value) & "" "" & CStr(sWs.Cells(i, cLN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 5).Value = fromCls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 6).Value = toCls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 7).Value = acYear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 8).Value = LoggedInName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logWs.Cells(logRow, 9).Value = Now" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    logRow = logRow + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Track per-class counts ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If perClass.Exists(fromCls) Then perClass(fromCls) = perClass(fromCls) + 1 Else perClass(fromCls) = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    promoted = promoted + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If toCls = ""ALUMNI"" Then alumniCount = alumniCount + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = ""Promoting... "" & i & ""/""& totalRows & ""  ("" & promoted & "" done)"" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "NextStudent:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 6 – Re-protect and format" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sWs.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  logWs.Columns.AutoFit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  logWs.Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = xlDefault" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo PromErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 7 – Build detailed success / partial-error report" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(""PP1,PP2,G1,G2,G3,G4,G5,G6,G7,G8,G9"", "","" )" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim breakdown As String: breakdown = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pk As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For pk = 0 To UBound(parts)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pcl2 As String: pcl2 = parts(pk)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If perClass.Exists(pcl2) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      breakdown = breakdown & ""  "" & pcl2 & ""  ->  "" & GetNextGrade(pcl2) & ""    ("" & perClass(pcl2) & "" students)"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next pk" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim finMsg As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = String(62, ChrW(9552)) & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & ""  ANNUAL PROMOTION COMPLETE  "" & acYear & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & String(62, ChrW(9552)) & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & ""  Students Promoted:      "" & promoted & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & ""  [A]  Graduated to ALUMNI:    "" & alumniCount & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & ""  "" & ChrW(9711) & ""  Skipped (inactive/ALUM):"" & unchanged & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If errCount > 0 Then finMsg = finMsg & ""  "" & ChrW(10007) & ""  Errors:                 "" & errCount & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & vbLf & ""PROMOTION BREAKDOWN:"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & String(50, ""-"") & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & breakdown" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & String(50, ""-"") & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & ""  A full backup was created before promotion."" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  finMsg = finMsg & ""  A promotion history log is saved in DB_Promotions sheet."" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If errCount > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    finMsg = finMsg & vbLf & ""ERRORS ENCOUNTERED:"" & vbLf & errList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim icon As Long: icon = IIf(errCount > 0, vbExclamation, vbInformation)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim title As String: title = IIf(errCount > 0, ""Promotion Complete (with errors)"", ""Annual Promotion Successful"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox finMsg, icon, title" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  STEP 8 – Audit log" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' ================================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Annual Promotion"", ""Year "" & acYear & "": "" & promoted & "" promoted, "" & alumniCount & "" to ALUMNI, "" & unchanged & "" skipped, "" & errCount & "" errors."")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "PromErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Save error info FIRST before any On Error statement clears it" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim savedErrNum As Long:   savedErrNum  = Err.Number" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim savedErrDesc As String: savedErrDesc = Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Cursor = xlDefault" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sWs.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next  ' keep Resume Next – do NOT GoTo 0 here (would clear Err)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim errMsg As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  errMsg = ChrW(10007) & ""  PROMOTION FAILED"" & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  errMsg = errMsg & ""Error Description:  "" & savedErrDesc & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  errMsg = errMsg & ""Error Number:       "" & savedErrNum  & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  errMsg = errMsg & ""Students promoted before failure: "" & promoted & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  errMsg = errMsg & vbLf & ""A backup was created before promotion started."" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  errMsg = errMsg & ""Restore from the Backups folder if data is inconsistent."" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox errMsg, vbCritical, ""Annual Promotion Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""PROMO ERROR"", ""Err "" & savedErrNum & "": "" & savedErrDesc & "" | promoted="" & promoted)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' ============================================================
    '  BulkPromoteStudents: Legacy alias kept for dashboard buttons
    ' ============================================================
    c = c & "' Legacy wrapper - kept for backward compatibility with existing buttons" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub BulkPromoteStudents()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AnnualPromotion" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modAcademicReports – Bulk Performance Analysis
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModAcademicReports()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modAcademicReports")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateClassReport()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = InputBox(""Enter Class (e.g. G1):"", ""Class Performance Report"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mW As Worksheet: Set mW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rW As Worksheet: On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set rW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_RPT_CLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If rW Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set rW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add: rW.Name = S_RPT_CLS" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Cells.Clear: rW.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Header ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A1:E1"").Merge: rW.Range(""A1"").Value = ""CLASS PERFORMANCE REPORT - "" & cls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A1"").Font.Size = 14: rW.Range(""A1"").Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A1"").HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A1"").Interior.Color = RGB(31,56,100): rW.Range(""A1"").Font.Color = vbWhite" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Column Headers ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A2:F2"").Value = Array(""AdmNo"", ""Name"", ""Total"", ""Average (%)"", ""CBC Level"", ""Points"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A2:F2"").Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A2:F2"").Interior.Color = RGB(200,200,200)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, r As Long, cnt As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim classSum As Double, classMax As Double, classMin As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 3: cnt = 0: classSum = 0: classMax = 0: classMin = 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value = cls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sid As String: sid = sW.Cells(i, cSID).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim adm As String: adm = sW.Cells(i, cADM).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = adm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rW.Cells(r, 2).Value = sW.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' --- Aggregation logic ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim j As Long, tot As Double, subCnt As Long, mxTot As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tot = 0: subCnt = 0: mxTot = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For j = 2 To mW.Cells(mW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If mW.Cells(j, 2).Value = sid And mW.Cells(j, 3).Value = adm Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          tot = tot + mW.Cells(j, 7).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mxTot = mxTot + mW.Cells(j, 8).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          subCnt = subCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If subCnt > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        rW.Cells(r, 3).Value = tot" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim avg As Double: avg = (tot / mxTot) * 100" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        rW.Cells(r, 4).Value = Round(avg, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        rW.Cells(r, 5).Value = GetCBCLevel(avg)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        rW.Cells(r, 6).Value = GetCBCPoints(avg)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ' --- Track class statistics ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        classSum = classSum + avg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If avg > classMax Then classMax = avg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If avg < classMin Then classMin = avg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Summary Statistics ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""CLASS STATISTICS"": rW.Cells(r, 1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Range(""A"" & r & "":E"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(240,240,240)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""Total Students:"": rW.Cells(r, 2).Value = cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""Class Mean Score:"": rW.Cells(r, 2).Value = Round(classSum / cnt, 1) & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rW.Cells(r, 2).Font.Bold = True: rW.Cells(r, 2).Font.Size = 12" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rW.Cells(r, 2).Font.Color = RGB(31,56,100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""Highest Score:"": rW.Cells(r, 2).Value = Round(classMax, 1) & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""Lowest Score:"": rW.Cells(r, 2).Value = Round(classMin, 1) & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rW.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""Overall Level:"": rW.Cells(r, 2).Value = modUtils.GetLevelFromScore(classSum / cnt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Formatting ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Columns(""A:E"").AutoFit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(rW)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rW.Activate: MsgBox ""Class Performance Report Generated!"" & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""Students: "" & cnt & vbLf & ""Mean Score: "" & Round(IIf(cnt>0,classSum/cnt,0),1) & ""%"", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Exams"", ""Generated Class Performance Report for "" & cls & "" - Mean: "" & Round(IIf(cnt>0,classSum/cnt,0),1) & ""%"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

Private Sub CreateModTeacherDashboard()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modTeacherDashboard")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub TeacherDashboard()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Load teacher-specific dashboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Teacher Dashboard loading..."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmEnterMarks.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modReportCards – CBC Individual Report Card (PDF)
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModReportCards()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modReportCards")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public gPdfSaveDir As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const HDR_CLR As Long = 1976436" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const HDR2_CLR As Long = 5455702" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const COLS As Long = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public gReportMode As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' --- Performance cache arrays ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mStudData As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mMarksData As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mSkillsData As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mPhysData As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mAttendData As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mStudIdx As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mCached As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mRankCache As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' --- CacheReportData: bulk-load all sheets into arrays ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub CacheReportData()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mCached Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet, lr As Long, lc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row: lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr >= 2 Then mStudData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1,1), ws.Cells(lr, lc)).Value Else mStudData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_MARKS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row: lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr >= 2 Then mMarksData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1,1), ws.Cells(lr, lc)).Value Else mMarksData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CBC_SKILLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row: lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr >= 2 Then mSkillsData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1,1), ws.Cells(lr, lc)).Value Else mSkillsData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_PHYSICAL)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row: lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr >= 2 Then mPhysData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1,1), ws.Cells(lr, lc)).Value Else mPhysData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_ATTEND)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row: lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr >= 2 Then mAttendData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1,1), ws.Cells(lr, lc)).Value Else mAttendData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Build student index ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set mStudIdx = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsArray(mStudData) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 2 To UBound(mStudData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      mStudIdx(CStr(mStudData(i, cSID))) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set mRankCache = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mCached = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub ClearReportCache()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStudData = Empty: mMarksData = Empty: mSkillsData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mPhysData = Empty: mAttendData = Empty" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set mStudIdx = Nothing: Set mRankCache = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mCached = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- GetSchoolInfoLocal: self-contained school settings reader ----
    c = c & "Private Sub GetSchoolInfoLocal(ByRef sN As String, ByRef sAddr As String, ByRef sPh As String, ByRef sEm As String, ByRef sMotto As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sN = ""MAGANA PRIMARY SCHOOL"": sAddr = """": sPh = """": sEm = """": sMotto = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SETT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim k As String: k = UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Select Case k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_NAME"": If Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)) <> """" Then sN = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_ADDRESS"": sAddr = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_PHONE"": sPh = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_EMAIL"": sEm = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_MOTTO"": sMotto = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- SetupA4Page: configure for A4 portrait ----
    c = c & "Private Sub SetupA4Page(ws As Worksheet, lastRow As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.PageSetup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Orientation = xlPortrait" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PaperSize = xlPaperA4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .RightMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .TopMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(0.8)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .BottomMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(0.8)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HeaderMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FooterMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterHorizontally = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesWide = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesTall = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Zoom = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PrintArea = ""A1:G"" & lastRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""A"").ColumnWidth = 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""B"").ColumnWidth = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""C"").ColumnWidth = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""D"").ColumnWidth = 12" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""E"").ColumnWidth = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""F"").ColumnWidth = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""G"").ColumnWidth = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- SecHdr: Section header bar ----
    c = c & "Private Sub SecHdr(ws As Worksheet, r As Long, t As String, cols As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r,1), ws.Cells(r,cols)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,1).Value = t: ws.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r,1).Font.Size = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,1).Font.Color = vbWhite: ws.Cells(r,1).Interior.Color = HDR2_CLR" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r,1).HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft: ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- OpenReportCardTool: from frmReports ----
    c = c & "Public Sub OpenReportCardTool(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select a student first!"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim admNo As String: admNo = Split(frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Value, "" | "")(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sID As String: sID = GetStudentIDFromAdmNo(admNo)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sID = """" Then MsgBox ""Student ID not found!"", vbCritical: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateCBCReport(sID, frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value, frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- GenerateSingleReportByAdm: show UI form ----
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateSingleReportByAdm()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  gReportMode = ""single""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmReportInput.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- ReportCardMenu: Show report center form ----
    c = c & "Public Sub ReportCardMenu()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmReportCenter.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- GetStudentRank (cached) ----
    c = c & "Public Function GetStudentRank(sID As String, cls As String, trm As String, yr As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cKey As String: cKey = cls & ""|"" & trm & ""|"" & yr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Check rank cache first ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not mRankCache Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If mRankCache.Exists(cKey & ""|"" & sID) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetStudentRank = mRankCache(cKey & ""|"" & sID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set mRankCache = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CacheReportData" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsArray(mStudData) Or Not IsArray(mMarksData) Then GetStudentRank = ""-"": Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim avgs() As Double, sids() As String, cnt As Long: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sLr As Long: sLr = UBound(mStudData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim avgs(1 To sLr): ReDim sids(1 To sLr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mLr As Long: mLr = UBound(mMarksData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sLr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mStudData(i,cCLS)) = cls And CStr(mStudData(i,cST)) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cnt = cnt + 1: sids(cnt) = CStr(mStudData(i,cSID))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim tot As Double, mx As Double: tot = 0: mx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For j = 2 To mLr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If CStr(mMarksData(j,2)) = sids(cnt) And CStr(mMarksData(j,4)) = trm And CStr(mMarksData(j,5)) = yr Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          tot = tot + CDbl(mMarksData(j,7)): mx = mx + CDbl(mMarksData(j,8))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If mx > 0 Then avgs(cnt) = (tot / mx) * 100 Else avgs(cnt) = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt = 0 Then GetStudentRank = ""-"": Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Compute all ranks and cache them ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long, rnk As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    rnk = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For k = 1 To cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If avgs(k) > avgs(i) Then rnk = rnk + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mRankCache(cKey & ""|"" & sids(i)) = rnk & "" of "" & cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mRankCache.Exists(cKey & ""|"" & sID) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    GetStudentRank = mRankCache(cKey & ""|"" & sID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    GetStudentRank = ""-""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- GenerateCBCReport: A4-optimized report card ----
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateCBCReport(sID As String, trm As String, yr As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tmp As Worksheet: Set tmp = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TMP_RPT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: tmp.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": Err.Clear: On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim shp As Shape: For Each shp In tmp.Shapes: shp.Delete: Next shp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells.UnMerge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Visible = xlSheetVisible: tmp.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.DisplayPageBreaks = False: ActiveWindow.DisplayGridlines = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells.Font.Name = ""Calibri"": tmp.Cells.Font.Size = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CacheReportData" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sName As String, sAdm As String, sCls As String, sGen As String, sDOB As String, sUPI As String, sStrm As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsArray(mStudData) Or Not mStudIdx.Exists(sID) Then MsgBox ""Student not found!"", vbCritical: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sRow As Long: sRow = mStudIdx(sID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sName = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cFN)) & "" "" & CStr(mStudData(sRow,cLN))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sAdm = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cADM)): sCls = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cCLS))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sGen = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cGEN)): sDOB = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cDOB))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sUPI = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cUPI)): sStrm = CStr(mStudData(sRow,cSTRM))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A1:G1"").Merge: tmp.Cells(1,1).Value = ""REPUBLIC OF KENYA""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(1,1).Font.Size = 8: tmp.Cells(1,1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: tmp.Rows(1).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Dynamic school info from DB_Settings ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim schN As String, schA As String, schP As String, schE As String, schM As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GetSchoolInfoLocal(schN, schA, schP, schE, schM)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A2:G2"").Merge: tmp.Cells(2,1).Value = UCase(schN)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(2,1).Font.Size = 14: tmp.Cells(2,1).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Cells(2,1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(2,1).Interior.Color = HDR_CLR: tmp.Cells(2,1).Font.Color = vbWhite: tmp.Rows(2).RowHeight = 22" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Insert School Logo if available ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rcLogo As String: rcLogo = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If rcLogo <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim rcLP As String: rcLP = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & rcLogo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Dir(rcLP) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Shapes.AddPicture rcLP, msoFalse, msoTrue, 2, tmp.Cells(2,1).Top + 1, 20, 20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mottoLine As String: mottoLine = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If schM <> """" Then mottoLine = ""Motto: "" & schM" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If schA <> """" Then: If mottoLine <> """" Then mottoLine = mottoLine & ""  |  "": mottoLine = mottoLine & schA" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If schP <> """" Then: If mottoLine <> """" Then mottoLine = mottoLine & ""  |  "": mottoLine = mottoLine & ""Tel: "" & schP" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A3:G3"").Merge: tmp.Cells(3,1).Value = mottoLine" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(3,1).Font.Size = 8: tmp.Cells(3,1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: tmp.Cells(3,1).Font.Italic = True: tmp.Rows(3).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A4:G4"").Merge: tmp.Cells(4,1).Value = ""CBC LEARNER PROGRESS REPORT - "" & trm & "" "" & yr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(4,1).Font.Size = 11: tmp.Cells(4,1).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Cells(4,1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(4,1).Interior.Color = RGB(235,238,248): tmp.Rows(4).RowHeight = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 6: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" LEARNER INFORMATION"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 7: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Learner Name:"": tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = sName: tmp.Cells(r,2).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = ""Adm No:"": tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = sAdm: tmp.Cells(r,5).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = ""UPI:"": tmp.Cells(r,7).Value = sUPI" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 8: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Class:"": tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = sCls & "" "" & sStrm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = ""Gender:"": tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = sGen" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = ""DOB:"": tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = sDOB" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,7).Value = ""Term: "" & trm & "" Year: "" & yr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A7:A8"").Font.Bold = True: tmp.Range(""C8"").Font.Bold = True: tmp.Range(""D7"").Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""E8"").Font.Bold = True: tmp.Range(""F7"").Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A6:G8"").Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous: tmp.Range(""A6:G8"").Borders.Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 10: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" 1. ACADEMIC LEARNING AREAS"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = 11" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Value = Array(""Learning Area"", ""Score"", ""Out Of"", ""Percentage"", ""Level"", ""Points"", ""Remarks"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(220,230,241)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""B"" & r & "":G"" & r).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdrRow As Long: hdrRow = r: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totS As Double, totM As Double, subCnt As Long, totPts As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  totS = 0: totM = 0: subCnt = 0: totPts = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsArray(mMarksData) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To UBound(mMarksData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mMarksData(i,2)) = sID And CStr(mMarksData(i,4)) = trm And CStr(mMarksData(i,5)) = yr Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sc As Double: sc = CDbl(mMarksData(i,7))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim mx2 As Double: mx2 = CDbl(mMarksData(i,8))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim perc As Double: If mx2 > 0 Then perc = (sc / mx2) * 100 Else perc = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = GetSubName(CStr(mMarksData(i,6)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = sc: tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = mx2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = Round(perc, 1) & ""%""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = GetCBCLevel(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = GetCBCPoints(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,7).Value = GetCBCDescriptor(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Range(""B"" & r & "":G"" & r).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If subCnt Mod 2 = 1 Then tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(245,245,250)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 15" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      totS = totS + sc: totM = totM + mx2: totPts = totPts + GetCBCPoints(perc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      subCnt = subCnt + 1: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim meanP As Double: If totM > 0 Then meanP = (totS / totM) * 100 Else meanP = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(31,56,100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Color = vbWhite: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""OVERALL"": tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = totS: tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = totM" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = Round(meanP,1) & ""%"": tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = GetCBCLevel(meanP)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = totPts: tmp.Cells(r,7).Value = GetCBCDescriptor(meanP)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""B"" & r & "":G"" & r).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & hdrRow & "":G"" & r).Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & hdrRow & "":G"" & r).Borders.Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Class Position:"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = GetStudentRank(sID, sCls, trm, yr): tmp.Cells(r,2).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = ""Mean Score:"": tmp.Cells(r,4).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = Round(meanP,1) & ""%"": tmp.Cells(r,5).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 2: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" 2. CORE COMPETENCIES & VALUES"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 15" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Competency"": tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = ""Rating"": tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = ""Remarks""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(220,230,241)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hasSkills As Boolean: hasSkills = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsArray(mSkillsData) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To UBound(mSkillsData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mSkillsData(i,2)) = sID And CStr(mSkillsData(i,3)) = trm And CStr(mSkillsData(i,4)) = yr Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = mSkillsData(i,6): tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = mSkillsData(i,7)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If mSkillsData(i,7) >= 3 Then tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = ""Good"" Else tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = ""Needs Support""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14: hasSkills = True: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not hasSkills Then tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""(No competency data)"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Italic = True: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" 3. PHYSICAL & HEALTH"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hasPh As Boolean: hasPh = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsArray(mPhysData) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To UBound(mPhysData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mPhysData(i,2)) = sID And CStr(mPhysData(i,3)) = trm And CStr(mPhysData(i,4)) = yr Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Height(cm):"": tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = mPhysData(i,5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = ""Weight(kg):"": tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = mPhysData(i,6)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = ""BMI:"": tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = mPhysData(i,7)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14: hasPh = True: r = r + 1: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not hasPh Then tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""(No physical data)"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Italic = True: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" 4. ATTENDANCE"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim aNo As Long, pNo As Long: aNo = 0: pNo = 0: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsArray(mAttendData) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To UBound(mAttendData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mAttendData(i,2)) = sID Then aNo = aNo + 1: If CStr(mAttendData(i,4)) = ""Present"" Then pNo = pNo + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Days Present:"": tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = pNo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = ""Total Days:"": tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = aNo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,5).Value = ""Attendance %:""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If aNo > 0 Then tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = Round((pNo/aNo)*100,1) & ""%"" Else tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = ""N/A""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":F"" & r).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 15" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 2: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" 5. CBC GRADING KEY"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Cells(r,1) = ""Level"": tmp.Cells(r,2) = ""Range"": tmp.Cells(r,3) = ""Pts""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""D"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge: tmp.Cells(r,4) = ""Description""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(220,230,241): tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gk: gk = Array(""EE1"",""90-100%"",8,""Exceeding Expectations (High)"", ""EE2"",""75-89%"",7,""Exceeding Expectations"", ""ME1"",""58-74%"",6,""Meeting Expectations (High)"", ""ME2"",""41-57%"",5,""Meeting Expectations"", ""AE1"",""31-40%"",4,""Approaching Expectations (High)"", ""AE2"",""21-30%"",3,""Approaching Expectations"", ""BE1"",""11-20%"",2,""Below Expectations (High)"", ""BE2"",""1-10%"",1,""Below Expectations"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim g As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For g = 0 To 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = r + 1: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 13" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = gk(g*4): tmp.Cells(r,2).Value = gk(g*4+1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    tmp.Cells(r,3).Value = gk(g*4+2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    tmp.Range(""D"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge: tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = gk(g*4+3)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":C"" & r).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If g < 2 Then tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(198,239,206)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If g >= 2 And g < 4 Then tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(255,235,156)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If g >= 4 And g < 6 Then tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(255,199,206)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If g >= 6 Then tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Interior.Color = RGB(255,163,163)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next g" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 2: Call SecHdr(tmp, r, "" 6. COMMENTS & SIGNATURES"", COLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Class Teacher's Remarks:"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 13" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous: tmp.Range(""A"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Head Teacher's Remarks:"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous: tmp.Range(""A"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Parent/Guardian Comments:"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""A"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous: tmp.Range(""A"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Class Teacher:"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""B"" & r & "":C"" & r).Merge: tmp.Range(""B"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = ""Sign:"": tmp.Cells(r,4).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""E"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,6).Value = ""Date:"": tmp.Cells(r,6).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""G"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Head Teacher:"": tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""B"" & r & "":C"" & r).Merge: tmp.Range(""B"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,4).Value = ""Stamp:"": tmp.Cells(r,4).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Range(""E"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge: tmp.Range(""E"" & r).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  r = r + 1: tmp.Range(""A"" & r & "":G"" & r).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).Value = ""Next Term Opens: ____________  |  Closing Date: ____________""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.Cells(r,1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Italic = True: tmp.Cells(r,1).Font.Size = 8: tmp.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call SetupA4Page(tmp, r)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gPdfSaveDir <> """" Then fPath = gPdfSaveDir Else fPath = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Reports""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: If Dir(fPath, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir fPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RptErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fName As String: fName = fPath & ""\"" & sAdm & ""_"" & Replace(sName, "" "", ""_"") & ""_"" & Replace(trm, "" "", """") & ""_"" & yr & "".pdf""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmp.ExportAsFixedFormat Type:=xlTypePDF, Filename:=fName, Quality:=xlQualityStandard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gReportMode <> ""batch"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AddBackToDashboardButton(tmp)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""CBC Report Card saved:"" & vbLf & fName, vbInformation, ""Report Card Generated""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report Card"", ""Generated: "" & sName & "" ("" & sAdm & "") "" & trm & "" "" & yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gReportMode <> ""batch"" Then Call ClearReportCache" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RptErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Report Card Error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- GenerateClassReportCards: Batch with progress ----
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateClassReportCards()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  gReportMode = ""batch""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmReportInput.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub RunBatchReports(cls As String, trm As String, yr As String, Optional savePath As String = """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CacheReportData" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsArray(mStudData) Then MsgBox ""No student data found!"", vbCritical: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim total As Long: total = 0: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sLr As Long: sLr = UBound(mStudData, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sLr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mStudData(i,cCLS)) = cls And CStr(mStudData(i,cST)) = ""Active"" Then total = total + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If total = 0 Then MsgBox ""No active students in "" & cls, vbExclamation: Call ClearReportCache: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Prepare save folder ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim saveDir As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If savePath <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    saveDir = savePath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: If Dir(saveDir, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir saveDir" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    gPdfSaveDir = saveDir" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Suppress Excel overhead for batch ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim oldCalc As Long: oldCalc = Application.Calculation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.EnableEvents = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tStart As Double: tStart = Timer" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim okCnt As Long, errCnt As Long, cur As Long: okCnt = 0: errCnt = 0: cur = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sLr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(mStudData(i,cCLS)) = cls And CStr(mStudData(i,cST)) = ""Active"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cur = cur + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Application.StatusBar = ""Report "" & cur & ""/"" & total & "" ("" & Int(Timer - tStart) & ""s): "" & CStr(mStudData(i,cFN)) & "" "" & CStr(mStudData(i,cLN))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call GenerateCBCReport(CStr(mStudData(i,cSID)), trm, yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Err.Number = 0 Then okCnt = okCnt + 1 Else errCnt = errCnt + 1: Err.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim elapsed As Long: elapsed = Int(Timer - tStart)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Restore Excel state ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.Calculation = oldCalc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.EnableEvents = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AddBackToDashboardButton(ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TMP_RPT))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ClearReportCache" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If savePath <> """" Then gPdfSaveDir = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim msg As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim actualDir As String: If savePath <> """" Then actualDir = saveDir Else actualDir = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Reports""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = ChrW(10003) & "" Generated: "" & okCnt & ""  "" & IIf(errCnt > 0, ChrW(10007) & "" Failed: "" & errCnt, """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & vbLf & ""Saved to: "" & actualDir" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  msg = msg & vbLf & ""Time: "" & elapsed & "" seconds""" & vbCrLf
