    c = c & "  MsgBox msg, IIf(errCnt > 0, vbExclamation, vbInformation), ""Batch Complete""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If savePath <> """" Then Shell ""explorer.exe """""" & saveDir & """""", vbNormalFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Report Card"", ""Batch: "" & okCnt & ""/"" & total & "" "" & cls & "" "" & trm & "" "" & yr & "" ("" & elapsed & ""s)"" & IIf(savePath <> """", "" | Saved to: "" & actualDir, """"))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Legacy wrapper ----
    c = c & "Public Sub GeneratePDFReport(sID As String, trm As String, yr As String): Call GenerateCBCReport(sID, trm, yr): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

Private Sub CreateModCBCRecords()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modCBCRecords")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Dedicated initializer for CBC Assessment form ---
    c = c & "Public Sub InitCBCForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CBC_SKILLS).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ).Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbClass"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbTerm""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Term 1"": .AddItem ""Term 2"": .AddItem ""Term 3"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbYear""): .Clear: .AddItem ""2025"": .AddItem ""2026"": .AddItem ""2027"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value = ""2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 0 To 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""skL"" & k).Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbSkill"" & k).Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Populate skills from DB_Subjects + CBC competencies/values ---
    c = c & "Public Sub PopulateCBCSkills(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lvl As String: lvl = GetLevelFromClass(cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 0 To 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""skL"" & k).Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbSkill"" & k).Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = lvl And idx < 25 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Caption = ws.Cells(i, 3).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Tag = ""Subject|"" & ws.Cells(i, 3).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).ForeColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      With frm.Controls(""cmbSkill"" & idx): .Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""EE - Exceeding""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""ME - Meeting""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""AE - Approaching""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""BE - Below""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .Value = ""ME - Meeting"": .Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      idx = idx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim comps: comps = Array(""Communication & Collaboration"", ""Critical Thinking"", ""Creativity"", ""Citizenship"", ""Learning to Learn"", ""Self-efficacy"", ""Digital Literacy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 0 To UBound(comps)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If idx < 25 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Caption = comps(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Tag = ""Competency|"" & comps(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Font.Bold = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).ForeColor = &H643C1F" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      With frm.Controls(""cmbSkill"" & idx): .Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""EE - Exceeding""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""ME - Meeting""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""AE - Approaching""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""BE - Below""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .Value = ""ME - Meeting"": .Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      idx = idx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim vals: vals = Array(""Respect"", ""Responsibility"", ""Unity"", ""Integrity"", ""Social Justice"", ""Peace"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 0 To UBound(vals)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If idx < 25 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Caption = vals(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Tag = ""Value|"" & vals(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Font.Bold = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).ForeColor = &H1B5E20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""skL"" & idx).Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      With frm.Controls(""cmbSkill"" & idx): .Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""EE - Exceeding""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""ME - Meeting""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""AE - Approaching""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .AddItem ""BE - Below""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        .Value = ""ME - Meeting"": .Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      idx = idx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""fraSkills"").Tag = idx" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""fraSkills"").ScrollHeight = idx * 36 + 30" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Dedicated initializer for Physical Entry form ---
    c = c & "Public Sub InitPhysicalForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbClass"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbTerm""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Term 1"": .AddItem ""Term 2"": .AddItem ""Term 3"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbYear""): .Clear: .AddItem ""2025"": .AddItem ""2026"": .AddItem ""2027"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value = ""2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Class change handler for CBC/Physical forms ---
    c = c & "Public Sub CBCClassChanged(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value: If cls = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim strm As String: On Error Resume Next: strm = frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value = cls And (strm = """" Or sW.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value = strm) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").AddItem sW.Cells(i, cADM).Value & "" | "" & sW.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hasFra As Boolean: hasFra = Not frm.Controls(""fraSkills"") Is Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If hasFra Then Call PopulateCBCSkills(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub SaveCBCAssessment(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select a learner."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CBC_SKILLS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sID As String: sID = Split(frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Value, "" | "")(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long: cnt = Val(frm.Controls(""fraSkills"").Tag)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To cnt - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If frm.Controls(""skL"" & i).Visible Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 1) = ""SKL-"" & Format(Now, ""yymmddhhnn"") & i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 2) = sID: ws.Cells(r, 3) = trm: ws.Cells(r, 4) = yr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim parts: parts = Split(frm.Controls(""skL"" & i).Tag, ""|"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 5) = parts(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 6) = parts(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim rating As String: rating = frm.Controls(""cmbSkill"" & i).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If InStr(rating, "" - "") > 0 Then rating = Left(rating, InStr(rating, "" - "") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, 7) = rating" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""CBC Assessment saved!"", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""CBC Assessment"", ""Saved CBC skills for student "" & sID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub SavePhysicalData(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Value = """" Then MsgBox ""Select a learner."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_PHYSICAL)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sID As String: sID = Split(frm.Controls(""cmbStudent"").Value, "" | "")(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim h As Double: h = Val(frm.Controls(""txtHeight"").Value) / 100 ' cm to m" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim w As Double: w = Val(frm.Controls(""txtWeight"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bmi As Double: If h > 0 Then bmi = Round(w / (h * h), 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 1) = ""PHY-"" & Format(Now, ""yymmddhhnn"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 2) = sID: ws.Cells(r, 3) = frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value: ws.Cells(r, 4) = frm.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 5) = h * 100: ws.Cells(r, 6) = w: ws.Cells(r, 7) = bmi" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 8) = frm.Controls(""txtComm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Physical data saved! BMI: "" & bmi, vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Physical"", ""Saved physical data for student "" & sID & "" - BMI: "" & bmi)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modImport – Import Nominal Roll from Excel
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModImport()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modImport")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Module-level state ===
    c = c & "Private mSrcPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mSheetName As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mColMap As Object" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === NormName: Title Case cleanup ===
    c = c & "Private Function NormName(ByVal s As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Trim(s): If s = """" Then NormName = """": Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Application.WorksheetFunction.Trim(s)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  NormName = Application.WorksheetFunction.Proper(LCase(s))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === NormGender: Normalize to M or F ===
    c = c & "Private Function NormGender(ByVal s As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = UCase(Trim(s))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""M"", ""MALE"", ""BOY"": NormGender = ""M""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case ""F"", ""FEMALE"", ""GIRL"": NormGender = ""F""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case Else: NormGender = s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === NormClass: Map common variations to system class codes ===
    c = c & "Private Function NormClass(ByVal s As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = UCase(Trim(s))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Replace(s, ""GRADE "", ""G""): s = Replace(s, ""GRADE"", ""G"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Replace(s, ""CLASS "", """"): s = Replace(s, ""PRE-PRIMARY "", ""PP"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Replace(s, ""PRE PRIMARY "", ""PP""): s = Replace(s, ""PREPRIMARY"", ""PP"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Replace(s, "" "", """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  NormClass = s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === NormPhone: Clean Kenya phone numbers ===
    c = c & "Private Function NormPhone(ByVal s As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = Trim(CStr(s))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim t As String, ch As String, i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To Len(s): ch = Mid(s, i, 1): If ch Like ""[0-9]"" Or ch = ""+"" Then t = t & ch" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Left(t, 4) = ""+254"" Then t = ""0"" & Mid(t, 5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Left(t, 3) = ""254"" And Len(t) = 12 Then t = ""0"" & Mid(t, 4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  NormPhone = t" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === IsValidClass: Check against DB_Classes ===
    c = c & "Private Function IsValidClass(ByVal cls As String) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Classes"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)) = UCase(cls) Then IsValidClass = True: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  IsValidClass = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === NextAdmNo: Generate next AdmNo in ADMyyyyNNN format ===
    c = c & "Private Function NextAdmNo(existAdm As Object) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = Format(Year(Date), ""0000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim n As Long: n = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim cand As String: cand = ""ADM"" & yr & Format(n, ""000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not existAdm.Exists(UCase(cand)) Then NextAdmNo = cand: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    n = n + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === ImportNominalRoll: legacy entry point (now shows form) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub ImportNominalRoll()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frmImportRoll.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === ScanSourceFile: Open file, detect columns, return preview data ===
    c = c & "Public Function ScanSourceFile(srcPath As String, sheetIdx As Long) As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo ScanErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim info As Object: Set info = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcWb As Workbook: Set srcWb = Workbooks.Open(srcPath, ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sheetIdx < 1 Or sheetIdx > srcWb.Sheets.Count Then sheetIdx = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcWs As Worksheet: Set srcWs = srcWb.Sheets(sheetIdx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lastCol As Long: lastCol = srcWs.Cells(1, srcWs.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcLast As Long: srcLast = srcWs.Cells(srcWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""rows"") = srcLast - 1: info(""cols"") = lastCol" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""sheets"") = srcWb.Sheets.Count" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Collect sheet names ---
    c = c & "  Dim sn As String, si As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For si = 1 To srcWb.Sheets.Count: sn = sn & srcWb.Sheets(si).Name & ""|"": Next si" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""sheetNames"") = sn" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Collect headers ---
    c = c & "  Dim hdrStr As String, j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 1 To lastCol: hdrStr = hdrStr & CStr(srcWs.Cells(1, j).Value) & ""|"": Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""headers"") = hdrStr" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Auto-detect column mapping ---
    c = c & "  Dim colAdm As Long, colFN As Long, colLN As Long, colGen As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colCls As Long, colStrm As Long, colDOB As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colGuard As Long, colPhone As Long, colUPI As Long, colBC As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdr As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 1 To lastCol" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    hdr = UCase(Trim(CStr(srcWs.Cells(1, j).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr Like ""*ADM*"" Or hdr = ""ADMISSION NUMBER"" Then If colAdm = 0 Then colAdm = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""SURNAME"" Or hdr = ""FIRST NAME"" Or hdr = ""FIRSTNAME"" Or hdr = ""FNAME"" Then If colFN = 0 Then colFN = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""OTHER NAMES"" Or hdr = ""OTHERNAMES"" Or hdr = ""LAST NAME"" Or hdr = ""LASTNAME"" Or hdr = ""LNAME"" Or hdr = ""MIDDLE NAME"" Then If colLN = 0 Then colLN = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""NAME"" Or hdr = ""STUDENT NAME"" Or hdr = ""LEARNER NAME"" Or hdr = ""FULL NAME"" Or hdr = ""NAMES"" Or hdr = ""LEARNER'S NAME"" Then If colFN = 0 Then colFN = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""GENDER"" Or hdr = ""SEX"" Then If colGen = 0 Then colGen = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""CLASS"" Or hdr = ""GRADE"" Or hdr = ""CLASS LEVEL"" Or hdr = ""CURRENT CLASS"" Then If colCls = 0 Then colCls = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""STREAM"" Or hdr = ""SECTION"" Then If colStrm = 0 Then colStrm = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr Like ""*DOB*"" Or hdr = ""DATE OF BIRTH"" Or hdr = ""BIRTH DATE"" Or hdr = ""D.O.B"" Then If colDOB = 0 Then colDOB = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr Like ""*GUARD*"" Or hdr Like ""*PARENT*"" Then If colGuard = 0 Then colGuard = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr Like ""*PHONE*"" Or hdr Like ""*TEL*"" Or hdr = ""MOBILE"" Or hdr = ""CONTACT"" Then If colPhone = 0 Then colPhone = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr = ""UPI"" Or hdr = ""UPI NUMBER"" Or hdr = ""UPI NO"" Or hdr Like ""*NEMIS*"" Then If colUPI = 0 Then colUPI = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If hdr Like ""*BIRTH CERT*"" Or hdr = ""BIRTH CERTIFICATE"" Or hdr = ""BC NO"" Then If colBC = 0 Then colBC = j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""colAdm"") = colAdm: info(""colFN"") = colFN: info(""colLN"") = colLN" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""colGen"") = colGen: info(""colCls"") = colCls: info(""colStrm"") = colStrm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""colDOB"") = colDOB: info(""colGuard"") = colGuard: info(""colPhone"") = colPhone" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""colUPI"") = colUPI: info(""colBC"") = colBC" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Preview: first 5 data rows ---
    c = c & "  Dim prev As String, pRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For pRow = 2 To Application.Min(6, srcLast)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pLine As String: pLine = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 1 To Application.Min(lastCol, 10)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      pLine = pLine & CStr(srcWs.Cells(pRow, j).Value) & ""  |  """ & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    prev = prev & pLine & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next pRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  info(""preview"") = prev" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  srcWb.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ScanSourceFile = info: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "ScanErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: srcWb.Close False: Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set info = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary""): info(""error"") = Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ScanSourceFile = info" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === RunImport: Execute the actual import with full validation ===
    c = c & "Public Sub RunImport(srcPath As String, sheetIdx As Long, frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo ImpErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcWb As Workbook: Set srcWb = Workbooks.Open(srcPath, ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcWs As Worksheet: Set srcWs = srcWb.Sheets(sheetIdx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim info As Object: Set info = ScanSourceFile(srcPath, sheetIdx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  srcWb.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set srcWb = Workbooks.Open(srcPath, ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set srcWs = srcWb.Sheets(sheetIdx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colAdm As Long: colAdm = info(""colAdm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colFN As Long: colFN = info(""colFN"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colLN As Long: colLN = info(""colLN"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colGen As Long: colGen = info(""colGen"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colCls As Long: colCls = info(""colCls"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colStrm As Long: colStrm = info(""colStrm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colDOB As Long: colDOB = info(""colDOB"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colGuard As Long: colGuard = info(""colGuard"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colPhone As Long: colPhone = info(""colPhone"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colUPI As Long: colUPI = info(""colUPI"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colBC As Long: colBC = info(""colBC"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If colFN = 0 Then srcWb.Close False: MsgBox ""No Name column detected."", vbCritical: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo ImpErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lastR As Long: lastR = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srcLast As Long: srcLast = srcWs.Cells(srcWs.Rows.Count, colFN).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim existAdm As Object: Set existAdm = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 2 To lastR" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ak As String: ak = UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(k, cADM).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ak <> """" Then existAdm(ak) = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nR As Long: nR = lastR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim imported As Long, skipped As Long, warned As Long, totalR As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim errLog As String: errLog = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  totalR = srcLast - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To srcLast" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Progress ---
    c = c & "    If (i Mod 5) = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblProgress"").Caption = ""  Importing row "" & (i - 1) & "" of "" & totalR & ""...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblBar"").Width = CLng(((i - 1) / totalR) * 340)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error GoTo ImpErr: DoEvents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Name ---
    c = c & "    Dim fName As String, lName As String, fullNm As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    fName = """": lName = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    fullNm = Trim(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colFN).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If fullNm = """" Then skipped = skipped + 1: GoTo NxtRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colLN > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      fName = NormName(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colFN).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lName = NormName(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colLN).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sp As Long: sp = InStr(fullNm, "" "")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sp > 0 Then fName = NormName(Left(fullNm, sp - 1)): lName = NormName(Mid(fullNm, sp + 1)) Else fName = NormName(fullNm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    ' --- AdmNo dedup ---
    c = c & "    Dim sAdm As String: sAdm = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colAdm > 0 Then sAdm = Trim(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colAdm).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sAdm <> """" And existAdm.Exists(UCase(sAdm)) Then skipped = skipped + 1: GoTo NxtRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sAdm = """" Then sAdm = NextAdmNo(existAdm)" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Class normalization & validation ---
    c = c & "    Dim sCls As String: sCls = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colCls > 0 Then sCls = NormClass(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colCls).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sCls <> """" And Not IsValidClass(sCls) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      warned = warned + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      errLog = errLog & ""Row "" & i & "": Class '"" & sCls & ""' not in system"" & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Gender normalization ---
    c = c & "    Dim sGen As String: sGen = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colGen > 0 Then sGen = NormGender(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colGen).Value))" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Phone normalization ---
    c = c & "    Dim sPh As String: sPh = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colPhone > 0 Then sPh = NormPhone(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colPhone).Value))" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Write row ---
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cSID).Value = NextStudentID()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cADM).Value = sAdm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cFN).Value = fName: ws.Cells(nR, cLN).Value = lName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cGEN).Value = sGen" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colDOB > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim dVal As Date: dVal = CDate(srcWs.Cells(i, colDOB).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Err.Number = 0 Then ws.Cells(nR, cDOB).Value = Format(dVal, ""dd/mm/yyyy"") Else ws.Cells(nR, cDOB).Value = CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colDOB).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Err.Clear: On Error GoTo ImpErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cCLS).Value = sCls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colStrm > 0 Then ws.Cells(nR, cSTRM).Value = Trim(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colStrm).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colGuard > 0 Then ws.Cells(nR, cPN).Value = NormName(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colGuard).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cPH).Value = sPh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colUPI > 0 Then ws.Cells(nR, cUPI).Value = Trim(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colUPI).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If colBC > 0 Then ws.Cells(nR, cBC).Value = Trim(CStr(srcWs.Cells(i, colBC).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(nR, cST).Value = ""Active""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    existAdm(UCase(sAdm)) = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    imported = imported + 1: nR = nR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "NxtRow:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  srcWb.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Import"", ""Imported "" & imported & "" students, "" & skipped & "" skipped, "" & warned & "" warnings"")" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Update form with results ---
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblBar"").Width = 340" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblProgress"").Caption = ""  Import complete!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblProgress"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim s As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = ChrW(10003) & "" IMPORT COMPLETE"" & vbLf & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = s & ""  Students Imported:   "" & imported & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = s & ""  Duplicates Skipped:  "" & skipped & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = s & ""  Warnings:            "" & warned & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  s = s & ""  Total Rows Scanned:  "" & totalR" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If errLog <> """" Then s = s & vbLf & vbLf & ""Warnings:"" & vbLf & Left(errLog, 500)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblPreview"").Caption = s" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblPrevHdr"").Caption = ""  RESULTS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblPrevHdr"").BackColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnImport"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnImport"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" DONE""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "ImpErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: If Not srcWb Is Nothing Then srcWb.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Import error at row "" & i & "": "" & Err.Description, vbCritical, ""Import Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === GenerateImportTemplate: Create a ready-to-fill Excel template ===
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateImportTemplate()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo TplErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim savPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  savPath = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Nominal_Roll_Template.xlsx""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fd As FileDialog: Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogSaveAs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Title = ""Save Nominal Roll Template""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.InitialFileName = savPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fd.Show <> -1 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  savPath = fd.SelectedItems(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Right(LCase(savPath), 5) <> "".xlsx"" Then savPath = savPath & "".xlsx""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim wb As Workbook: Set wb = Workbooks.Add(xlWBATWorksheet)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = wb.Sheets(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Name = ""Nominal Roll""" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Headers ---
    c = c & "  Dim hdrs As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  hdrs = Array(""Admission No"", ""Surname"", ""Other Names"", ""Gender"", ""Date of Birth"", ""Class"", ""Stream"", ""Parent/Guardian"", ""Phone"", ""UPI Number"", ""Birth Certificate"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim reqCols As Variant: reqCols = Array(2, 4, 6)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 0 To UBound(hdrs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1, j + 1).Value = hdrs(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Header formatting ---
    c = c & "  With ws.Range(""A1:K1"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Size = 10: .Font.Name = ""Calibri""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Color = vbWhite: .Interior.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: .RowHeight = 28" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous: .Borders.Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Mark required columns (Surname, Gender, Class) with red header ---
    c = c & "  Dim rc As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each rc In reqCols" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1, CLng(rc)).Interior.Color = RGB(198, 40, 40)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(1, CLng(rc)).Value = ws.Cells(1, CLng(rc)).Value & "" *""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next rc" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Row 2: Sub-header hints ---
    c = c & "  Dim hints As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  hints = Array(""e.g. ADM2025001"", ""Required"", ""e.g. John Doe"", ""M or F"", ""dd/mm/yyyy"", ""e.g. G1, PP1"", ""e.g. A, B"", ""Full name"", ""07xxxxxxxx"", ""NEMIS UPI"", ""BC number"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 0 To UBound(hints)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(2, j + 1).Value = hints(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.Range(""A2:K2"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Italic = True: .Font.Size = 8: .Font.Color = RGB(120, 120, 120)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Interior.Color = RGB(240, 240, 245): .RowHeight = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous: .Borders.Weight = xlHairline" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Sample data row ---
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A3:K3"").Value = Array(""ADM2025001"", ""Mwangi"", ""Amani Baraka"", ""M"", ""15/03/2017"", ""G1"", ""A"", ""Peter Mwangi"", ""0712345001"", ""UPI100000"", ""BC050000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A3:K3"").Font.Color = RGB(80, 80, 80)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A3:K3"").Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 230)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A3:K3"").Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""A3:K3"").Borders.Weight = xlHairline" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Data validation: Gender (col 4) ---
    c = c & "  With ws.Range(""D4:D500"").Validation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Add Type:=xlValidateList, Formula1:=""M,F""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .InputTitle = ""Gender"": .InputMessage = ""Select M or F""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .ErrorTitle = ""Invalid"": .ErrorMessage = ""Enter M or F only""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Data validation: Class (col 6) ---
    c = c & "  Dim clsList As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  clsList = ""PP1,PP2,G1,G2,G3,G4,G5,G6,G7,G8,G9""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.Range(""F4:F500"").Validation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Add Type:=xlValidateList, Formula1:=clsList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .InputTitle = ""Class"": .InputMessage = ""Select class level""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .ErrorTitle = ""Invalid"": .ErrorMessage = ""Select a valid class from PP1-G9""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Data validation: Stream (col 7) ---
    c = c & "  With ws.Range(""G4:G500"").Validation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Add Type:=xlValidateList, Formula1:=""A,B,C""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .InputTitle = ""Stream"": .InputMessage = ""Select stream""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Date format for DOB column ---
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""E4:E500"").NumberFormat = ""dd/mm/yyyy""" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Phone as text ---
    c = c & "  ws.Range(""I4:I500"").NumberFormat = ""@""" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Column widths ---
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""A"").ColumnWidth = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""B"").ColumnWidth = 16" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""C"").ColumnWidth = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""D"").ColumnWidth = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""E"").ColumnWidth = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""F"").ColumnWidth = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""G"").ColumnWidth = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""H"").ColumnWidth = 22" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""I"").ColumnWidth = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""J"").ColumnWidth = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""K"").ColumnWidth = 16" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Freeze header rows ---
    c = c & "  ws.Activate: ws.Range(""A4"").Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ActiveWindow.FreezePanes = True" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Alternating row colors for data area ---
    c = c & "  Dim rw As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For rw = 4 To 500 Step 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Range(""A"" & rw & "":K"" & rw).Interior.Color = RGB(248, 248, 252)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next rw" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' === INSTRUCTIONS SHEET ===
    c = c & "  Dim wsI As Worksheet: Set wsI = wb.Sheets.Add(After:=ws)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Name = ""Instructions""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(1, 1).Value = ""NOMINAL ROLL IMPORT TEMPLATE - INSTRUCTIONS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(1, 1).Font.Bold = True: wsI.Cells(1, 1).Font.Size = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(1, 1).Font.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Range(""A1:D1"").Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rI As Long: rI = 3" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Write instructions line by line to avoid VBA line continuation limit ---
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE"": wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Bold = True: wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Size = 11: wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Color = RGB(31, 78, 121): rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""1.  Go to the 'Nominal Roll' sheet"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""2.  Row 1 contains the column headers - DO NOT change them"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""3.  Row 2 shows format hints - you may delete it before importing"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""4.  Row 3 is a sample entry - replace or delete it"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""5.  Enter your student data starting from Row 4"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""6.  Save the file (.xlsx format)"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""7.  Use Import Nominal Roll in the School System to import"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""COLUMN DETAILS"": wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Bold = True: wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Size = 11: wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Color = RGB(31, 78, 121): rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Admission No   -  Optional. Auto-generated if blank (ADM2026001 format)"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Surname *      -  REQUIRED. Student's surname / first name"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Other Names    -  Optional. Middle / other names"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Gender *       -  REQUIRED. M or F only"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Date of Birth  -  Optional. Format: dd/mm/yyyy"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Class *        -  REQUIRED. PP1, PP2, G1-G9"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Stream         -  Optional. A, B, or C"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Parent/Guardian-  Optional. Full name of guardian"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Phone          -  Optional. Kenya format: 07xxxxxxxx"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  UPI Number     -  Optional. NEMIS Unique Pupil Identifier"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  Birth Certificate - Optional. Birth certificate number"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""NOTES"": wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Bold = True: wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Size = 11: wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Font.Color = RGB(31, 78, 121): rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  - Columns marked * are required"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  - Duplicate Admission Numbers are automatically skipped"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  - Class values are normalised (Grade 1 becomes G1)"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  - Gender values are normalised (Male becomes M)"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  - Phone numbers: +254 prefix is converted to 07xx format"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Cells(rI, 1).Value = ""  - All names are auto-formatted to Title Case on import"": rI = rI + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Range(""A3:A"" & rI).Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wsI.Columns(""A"").ColumnWidth = 70" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' --- Save and clean up ---
    c = c & "  ws.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayAlerts = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wb.SaveAs savPath, FileFormat:=xlOpenXMLWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.DisplayAlerts = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wb.Close False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Template saved to:"" & vbLf & vbLf & savPath & vbLf & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""Open it, fill in your student data, then use"" & vbLf & _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ""Import Nominal Roll to bring students into the system."", _" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    vbInformation, ""Template Created""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "TplErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Application.DisplayAlerts = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error creating template: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modMouseWheel – Mouse Wheel Scrolling for Frames
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModMouseWheel()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modMouseWheel")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === API Declarations (PtrSafe for Excel 2016+) ===
    c = c & "Private Declare PtrSafe Function SetWindowsHookExA Lib ""user32"" " & _
            "(ByVal idHook As Long, ByVal lpfn As LongPtr, ByVal hMod As LongPtr, ByVal dwThreadId As Long) As LongPtr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Declare PtrSafe Function UnhookWindowsHookEx Lib ""user32"" (ByVal hhk As LongPtr) As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Declare PtrSafe Function CallNextHookEx Lib ""user32"" " & _
            "(ByVal hHook As LongPtr, ByVal nCode As Long, ByVal wParam As LongPtr, ByVal lParam As LongPtr) As LongPtr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Declare PtrSafe Sub CopyMemory Lib ""kernel32"" Alias ""RtlMoveMemory"" " & _
            "(Destination As Any, Source As Any, ByVal Length As Long)" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Constants ===
    c = c & "Private Const WH_MOUSE_LL As Long = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const WM_MOUSEWHEEL As Long = &H20A" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const HC_ACTION As Long = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const SCROLL_CHANGE As Long = 24" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Types ===
    c = c & "Private Type POINTAPI" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    x As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    y As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Type" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    c = c & "Private Type MSLLHOOKSTRUCT" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    pt As POINTAPI" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mouseData As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    flags As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    time As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    dwExtraInfo As LongPtr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Type" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Module-level state ===
    c = c & "Private mHook As LongPtr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mScrollCtrl As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mIsListBox As Boolean" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Public: Install hook for a scrollable frame ===
    c = c & "Public Sub HookMouseWheel(ctrl As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set mScrollCtrl = ctrl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mIsListBox = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If mHook = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mHook = SetWindowsHookExA(WH_MOUSE_LL, AddressOf LowLevelMouseProc, 0, 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Public: Install hook for a ListBox (uses TopIndex) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub HookMouseWheelList(ctrl As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set mScrollCtrl = ctrl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mIsListBox = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If mHook = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mHook = SetWindowsHookExA(WH_MOUSE_LL, AddressOf LowLevelMouseProc, 0, 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Public: Remove hook safely ===
    c = c & "Public Sub UnhookMouseWheel()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If mHook <> 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        UnhookWindowsHookEx mHook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        mHook = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set mScrollCtrl = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' === Hook callback (supports both Frame and ListBox) ===
    c = c & "Private Function LowLevelMouseProc(ByVal nCode As Long, ByVal wParam As LongPtr, ByVal lParam As LongPtr) As LongPtr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If nCode >= HC_ACTION Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If wParam = WM_MOUSEWHEEL Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "            If Not mScrollCtrl Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                Dim hs As MSLLHOOKSTRUCT" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                CopyMemory hs, ByVal lParam, Len(hs)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                Dim hiWord As Integer" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                hiWord = (hs.mouseData \ 65536) And &HFFFF&" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                If mIsListBox Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    Dim idx As Long: idx = mScrollCtrl.TopIndex" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If hiWord > 0 Then idx = idx - 3 Else idx = idx + 3" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If idx < 0 Then idx = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If idx > mScrollCtrl.ListCount - 1 Then idx = mScrollCtrl.ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If idx >= 0 Then mScrollCtrl.TopIndex = idx" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    Dim direction As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If hiWord > 0 Then direction = -SCROLL_CHANGE Else direction = SCROLL_CHANGE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    Dim newVal As Single" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    newVal = mScrollCtrl.ScrollTop + direction" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If newVal < 0 Then newVal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    Dim maxVal As Single" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    maxVal = mScrollCtrl.ScrollHeight - mScrollCtrl.InsideHeight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If maxVal < 0 Then maxVal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    If newVal > maxVal Then newVal = maxVal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                    mScrollCtrl.ScrollTop = newVal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "                End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "            End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    LowLevelMouseProc = CallNextHookEx(mHook, nCode, wParam, lParam)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmCBCAssessment
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateCBCAssessmentForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmCBCAssessment", "CBC Core Competencies & Values", 580, 410)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblH", "CBC SKILLS ASSESSMENT", 0, 0, 580, 32, 12
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblH").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("lblH").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAccent", "", 0, 32, 580, 2
    d.Controls("lblAccent").BackColor = &H889632: d.Controls("lblAccent").Caption = ""
    
    ' --- FILTER PANEL BACKGROUND ---
    AL d, "lblFilterBg", "", 0, 34, 580, 55
    d.Controls("lblFilterBg").BackColor = &HFFF8F0: d.Controls("lblFilterBg").Caption = ""
    
    ' --- FILTER ROW: Class, Stream, Term, Year (single compact row) ---
    AL d, "lC", "Class:", 10, 42, 35, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lC").Font.Bold = True
    Dim cmCls As Object: Set cmCls = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbClass")
    cmCls.Left = 48: cmCls.Top = 40: cmCls.Width = 70: cmCls.Height = 20: cmCls.Font.Size = 8: cmCls.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": cmCls.Style = 2
    
    AL d, "lStr", "Stream:", 125, 42, 42, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lStr").Font.Bold = True
    Dim cmStr As Object: Set cmStr = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbStream")
    cmStr.Left = 170: cmStr.Top = 40: cmStr.Width = 65: cmStr.Height = 20: cmStr.Font.Size = 8: cmStr.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": cmStr.Style = 2
    
    AL d, "lT", "Term:", 242, 42, 32, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lT").Font.Bold = True
    Dim cmT As Object: Set cmT = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbTerm")
    cmT.Left = 278: cmT.Top = 40: cmT.Width = 80: cmT.Height = 20: cmT.Font.Size = 8: cmT.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": cmT.Style = 2
    
    AL d, "lY", "Year:", 366, 42, 30, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lY").Font.Bold = True
    Dim cmY As Object: Set cmY = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbYear")
    cmY.Left = 400: cmY.Top = 40: cmY.Width = 60: cmY.Height = 20: cmY.Font.Size = 8: cmY.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": cmY.Style = 2
    
    ' --- Learner row ---
    AL d, "lSt", "Learner:", 10, 66, 48, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lSt").Font.Bold = True
    Dim cmS As Object: Set cmS = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbStudent")
    cmS.Left = 62: cmS.Top = 64: cmS.Width = 508: cmS.Height = 20: cmS.Font.Size = 8: cmS.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": cmS.Style = 2
    
    ' --- Scrollable Skills Frame (compact) ---
    Dim frSk As Object: Set frSk = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraSkills")
    frSk.Left = 10: frSk.Top = 90: frSk.Width = 560: frSk.Height = 235
    frSk.ScrollBars = 2: frSk.ScrollHeight = 720: frSk.Caption = ""
    frSk.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": frSk.BackColor = &HFFFFFF: frSk.BorderStyle = 1
    
    ' --- Column headers inside frame ---
    Dim hL As Object: Set hL = d.Controls("fraSkills").Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "hdrComp")
    hL.Left = 6: hL.Top = 2: hL.Width = 220: hL.Height = 14: hL.Caption = "Competency / Value"
    hL.Font.Size = 8: hL.Font.Bold = True: hL.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": hL.ForeColor = &H5A3416
    Dim hR As Object: Set hR = d.Controls("fraSkills").Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "hdrRate")
    hR.Left = 230: hR.Top = 2: hR.Width = 300: hR.Height = 14: hR.Caption = "Rating"
    hR.Font.Size = 8: hR.Font.Bold = True: hR.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": hR.ForeColor = &H5A3416
    Dim hDiv As Object: Set hDiv = d.Controls("fraSkills").Controls.Add("Forms.Label.1", "hdrDiv")
    hDiv.Left = 6: hDiv.Top = 16: hDiv.Width = 530: hDiv.Height = 1: hDiv.BackColor = &HD0D0D0: hDiv.Caption = ""
    
    ' --- 25 skill rows: 28px apart (compact) ---
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 0 To 24
        ALF d, "fraSkills", "skL" & i, "", 6, 20 + i * 28, 220
        ACF d, "fraSkills", "cmbSkill" & i, 230, 19 + i * 28, 300
    Next i
    
    ' --- Action Buttons (compact) ---
    AB d, "btnSave", "SAVE ASSESSMENT", 10, 332, 270, 28, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE", 290, 332, 280, 28, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' --- Status Bar ---
    AL d, "lblStat", " Ready.", 10, 368, 560, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblStat").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call InitCBCForm(Me): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbClass_Change(): Call PopulateStreams(Me, Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value): Call CBCClassChanged(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbStream_Change(): Call CBCClassChanged(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click(): Call SaveCBCAssessment(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Call UnhookMouseWheel: Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub fraSkills_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheel(Me.Controls(""fraSkills"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmPhysicalEntry
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreatePhysicalEntryForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmPhysicalEntry", "Learner Physical Development", 580, 390)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblH", "PHYSICAL DEVELOPMENT & HEALTH", 0, 0, 580, 36, 14
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblH").BackColor = &H1565C0: d.Controls("lblH").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Margins: 20 ---
    AL d, "lC", "Class:", 20, 50, 40: Dim cmCls As Object: Set cmCls = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbClass"): cmCls.Left = 60: cmCls.Top = 48: cmCls.Width = 80
    AL d, "lStr", "Stream:", 155, 50, 50: Dim cmStr As Object: Set cmStr = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbStream"): cmStr.Left = 205: cmStr.Top = 48: cmStr.Width = 70
    AL d, "lTm", "Term:", 290, 50, 40: Dim cmTerm As Object: Set cmTerm = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbTerm"): cmTerm.Left = 330: cmTerm.Top = 48: cmTerm.Width = 80
    AL d, "lYr", "Year:", 430, 50, 40: Dim cmYear As Object: Set cmYear = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbYear"): cmYear.Left = 470: cmYear.Top = 48: cmYear.Width = 90
    
    AL d, "lSt", "Learner Name:", 20, 85, 80: Dim cmS As Object: Set cmS = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbStudent"): cmS.Left = 110: cmS.Top = 83: cmS.Width = 450
    
    AL d, "lDivider", "", 20, 115, 540, 1: d.Controls("lDivider").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lDivider").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "lH", "Height (cm):", 20, 135, 80: AT d, "txtHeight", 110, 133, 100
    AL d, "lW", "Weight (kg):", 290, 135, 80: AT d, "txtWeight", 390, 133, 100
    
    AL d, "lCm", "Health Observations / Special Care Instructions:", 20, 170, 300
    AT d, "txtComm", 20, 190, 540, 70: d.Controls("txtComm").MultiLine = True
    
    AB d, "btnSave", "SAVE HEALTH DATA", 20, 280, 260, 32, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE WINDOW", 300, 280, 260, 32, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    
    AL d, "lblStat", " Ready.", 20, 335, 540, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblStat").BackColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblStat").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call InitPhysicalForm(Me): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbClass_Change(): Call PopulateStreams(Me, Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value): Call CBCClassChanged(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbStream_Change(): Call CBCClassChanged(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click(): Call SavePhysicalData(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modUserMgmt – System User Management
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModUserMgmt()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modUserMgmt")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    ' === LOAD USERS INTO LIST ===
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadUsers(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) & ""  |  "" & CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value) & ""  |  "" & CStr(ws.Cells(i, 5).Value) & ""  |  "" & CStr(ws.Cells(i, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row - 1 & "" users loaded.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === INIT FORM ===
    c = c & "Public Sub InitUserMgmt(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbRole""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Admin"": .AddItem ""Teacher"": .AddItem ""Headteacher"": .AddItem ""Bursar"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbActive""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Yes"": .AddItem ""No"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value = ""Yes""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadUsers(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === ADD / UPDATE USER ===
    c = c & "Public Sub SaveUser(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo SvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uname As String: uname = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fname As String: fname = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pw As String: pw = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rl As String: rl = frm.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim act As String: act = frm.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If uname = """" Or fname = """" Or rl = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Username, Full Name and Role are required.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag = """" And Len(pw) < 6 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Password must be at least 6 characters.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag <> """" And pw <> """" And Len(pw) < 6 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" New password must be at least 6 characters.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo SvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long, i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = CLng(frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = uname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 4).Value = fname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 5).Value = rl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 6).Value = act" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If pw <> """" Then ws.Cells(r, 3).Value = HashPass(pw)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" User '"" & uname & ""' updated successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If LCase(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)) = LCase(uname) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Username '"" & uname & ""' already exists!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If pw = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Password is required for new users.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 1).Value = r - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = uname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 3).Value = HashPass(pw)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 4).Value = fname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 5).Value = rl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 6).Value = act" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" User '"" & uname & ""' created successfully.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadUsers(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""UserMgmt"", ""Saved user: "" & uname & "" ("" & rl & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "SvErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === EDIT USER ===
    c = c & "Public Sub EditUser(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex < 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Select a user from the list to edit.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 5).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag = idx" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Editing '"" & ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value & ""'. Leave password blank to keep current.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === DELETE USER ===
    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteUser(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex < 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Select a user from the list to delete.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uname As String: uname = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LCase(uname) = LCase(LoggedInUser) Or LCase(uname) = ""admin"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Cannot delete yourself or the default admin.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""btnDel"").Tag <> ""confirm_"" & uname Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnDel"").Tag = ""confirm_"" & uname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnDel"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" CONFIRM""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnDel"").BackColor = &HFF0000" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Click CONFIRM again to delete '"" & uname & ""'. Click Cancel to abort.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnDel"").Caption = ""DELETE"": frm.Controls(""btnDel"").BackColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnDel"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(idx).Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadUsers(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""UserMgmt"", ""Deleted user: "" & uname)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" User '"" & uname & ""' deleted.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === RESET PASSWORD (robust, with auto-fill) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub ResetUserPassword(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RstErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Admin-only guard ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LoggedInRole <> ""Admin"" And LoggedInRole <> ""Headteacher"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Only Admins/Headteachers can reset passwords.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex < 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Select a user from the list first.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = frm.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uname As String: uname = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fname As String: fname = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rl As String: rl = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 5).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Auto-fill fields for user context" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = uname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = fname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = rl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Two-click confirmation ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""btnReset"").Tag <> ""confirm_"" & uname Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnReset"").Tag = ""confirm_"" & uname" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnReset"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" CONFIRM RESET""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""btnReset"").BackColor = &HFF6600" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Reset password for: "" & uname & "" ("" & fname & "" - "" & rl & "")  Click again to confirm.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnReset"").Caption = ""RESET PASSWORD"": frm.Controls(""btnReset"").BackColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnReset"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Generate strong temp password (10 chars, guaranteed complexity) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Randomize Timer" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tmpPw As String, j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim upper As String: upper = ""ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTUVWXYZ""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lower As String: lower = ""abcdefghjkmnpqrstuvwxyz""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim digits As String: digits = ""23456789""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim specl As String: specl = ""!@#$%&*""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim all As String: all = upper & lower & digits" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Guarantee at least 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 digit, 1 special" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmpPw = Mid(upper, Int(Rnd * Len(upper)) + 1, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmpPw = tmpPw & Mid(lower, Int(Rnd * Len(lower)) + 1, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmpPw = tmpPw & Mid(digits, Int(Rnd * Len(digits)) + 1, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmpPw = tmpPw & Mid(specl, Int(Rnd * Len(specl)) + 1, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 5 To 10: tmpPw = tmpPw & Mid(all, Int(Rnd * Len(all)) + 1, 1): Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Shuffle the password characters" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim shuffled As String, pos As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  shuffled = tmpPw" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = Len(shuffled) To 2 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    pos = Int(Rnd * j) + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim tmp As String: tmp = Mid(shuffled, j, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Mid(shuffled, j, 1) = Mid(shuffled, pos, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Mid(shuffled, pos, 1) = tmp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  tmpPw = shuffled" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Apply reset ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo RstErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value = HashPass(tmpPw)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(idx, 8).Value = ""MUST_CHANGE""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(idx, 9).Value = 0: ws.Cells(idx, 10).Value = """"  ' Clear lockout" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""UserMgmt"", ""Password reset for: "" & uname & "" ("" & fname & "") by "" & LoggedInName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" Password reset for '"" & uname & ""' ("" & fname & "")  -  see temp password below.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTempPw"").Value = tmpPw" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTempPw"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblTempLbl"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""btnCopy"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblCopyHint"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Height = 420" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTempPw"").SetFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTempPw"").SelStart = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtTempPw"").SelLength = Len(tmpPw)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RstErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Reset error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' === FILL FROM STAFF RECORD (by ID or Name) ===
    c = c & "Public Sub FillFromStaff(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tID As String: tID = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtStaffID"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If tID = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9888) & "" Enter a Staff/Teacher ID or name and press Enter.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Check if user already exists" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uWs As Worksheet: Set uWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To uWs.Cells(uWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If LCase(CStr(uWs.Cells(i, 2).Value)) = LCase(tID) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" User '"" & tID & ""' already exists! ("" & uWs.Cells(i, 4).Value & "" - "" & uWs.Cells(i, 5).Value & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Lookup in DB_Teachers by ID or Name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tWs As Worksheet: Set tWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_TEACH)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To tWs.Cells(tWs.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 1).Value) = tID Or InStr(1, CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 2).Value), tID, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtStaffID"").Value = CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 1).Value) & ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" "" & CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sType2 As String: sType2 = CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 8).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sType2 = ""Staff"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Dim dept As String: dept = CStr(tWs.Cells(i, 9).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If InStr(1, dept, ""Bursar"", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then frm.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = ""Bursar"" Else frm.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = ""Teacher""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = ""Teacher""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value = ""Yes""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtPassword"").SetFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" Found: "" & tWs.Cells(i, 2).Value & "" ["" & IIf(sType2 = """", ""Teacher"", sType2) & ""]  -  Enter a password.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" No staff record found for: "" & tID & ""  (Check the ID or name)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmUserMgmt – System User Management
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateUserMgmtForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmUserMgmt", "System User Management", 620, 380)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblTtl", "SYSTEM USER MANAGEMENT", 0, 0, 620, 30, 12
    d.Controls("lblTtl").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblTtl").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblTtl").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblTtl").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblTtl").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc3", "", 0, 30, 620, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc3").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc3").Caption = ""
    
    ' --- User List Header ---
    AL d, "hdr", " Username      |  Full Name                |  Role           |  Status", 20, 38, 580, 18, 9
    d.Controls("hdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hdr").BackColor = &H2E7D32: d.Controls("hdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' --- User List ---
    Dim lst As Object: Set lst = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstUsers")
    lst.Left = 20: lst.Top = 56: lst.Width = 580: lst.Height = 80
    lst.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": lst.Font.Size = 9: lst.BorderStyle = 1
    
    ' --- Details Header ---
    AL d, "lblDet", "AUTHENTICATION & ROLE SETTINGS", 20, 142, 340, 18, 11
    d.Controls("lblDet").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblDet").ForeColor = &H5A3416
    
    ' --- Close Button ---
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE WINDOW", 480, 139, 120, 24, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === FROM STAFF RECORD (ID text input + Enter to search) ===
    AL d, "lblStfHdr", "  FROM STAFF RECORD  (type Staff ID or name, press Enter)", 20, 164, 580, 18, 8
    d.Controls("lblStfHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblStfHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblStfHdr").BackColor = &H4527A0: d.Controls("lblStfHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AT d, "txtStaffID", 20, 183, 460
    d.Controls("txtStaffID").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtStaffID").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("txtStaffID").Height = 22
    AB d, "btnFillStaff", ChrW(10548) & " SEARCH", 490, 183, 110, 22, &H4527A0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFillStaff").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnFillStaff").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' --- ROW 1: Username & Full Name ---
    AL d, "lU", "Login ID:", 20, 214, 80, 16, 9: AT d, "txtUsername", 100, 212, 160
    AL d, "lFN", "Full Name:", 290, 214, 80, 16, 9: AT d, "txtFullName", 370, 212, 230
    
    ' --- ROW 2: Password & Role ---
    AL d, "lPw", "Password:", 20, 240, 80, 16, 9: AT d, "txtPassword", 100, 238, 140
    d.Controls("txtPassword").PasswordChar = "*"
    AB d, "btnShowPw", ChrW(9673), 244, 237, 24, 20, &HE0E0E0, &H333333
    d.Controls("btnShowPw").Font.Size = 8
    AL d, "lRl", "Assign Role:", 290, 240, 80, 16, 9: AC d, "cmbRole", 370, 238, 230
    
    ' --- ROW 3: Active Status ---
    AL d, "lAc", "Account Status:", 20, 266, 100, 16, 9: AC d, "cmbActive", 100, 264, 120
    
    ' --- Action Buttons ---
    AB d, "btnSave", "SAVE USER", 20, 294, 120, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnEdit", "EDIT", 150, 294, 80, 30, &HFB8C00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnEdit").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnDel", "DELETE", 240, 294, 80, 30, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDel").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnReset", "RESET PASSWORD", 330, 294, 140, 30, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnReset").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnCancel", "CANCEL", 480, 294, 120, 30, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCancel").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' --- Status Bar ---
    AL d, "lblStat", "  Ready.", 20, 332, 580, 20, 9
