    d.Controls("lblStat").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblStat").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H666666: d.Controls("lblStat").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Copyable Temp Password (hidden by default, form expands when shown) ---
    AL d, "lblTempLbl", "  Temp Password (select & copy):", 20, 358, 200, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblTempLbl").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblTempLbl").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("lblTempLbl").ForeColor = &H1565C0: d.Controls("lblTempLbl").Visible = False
    AT d, "txtTempPw", 220, 356, 200
    d.Controls("txtTempPw").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtTempPw").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("txtTempPw").Font.Name = "Consolas": d.Controls("txtTempPw").ForeColor = &H1565C0
    d.Controls("txtTempPw").BackColor = &HE3F2FD: d.Controls("txtTempPw").Locked = True
    d.Controls("txtTempPw").Visible = False
    AB d, "btnCopy", "COPY", 430, 355, 60, 20, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCopy").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnCopy").Visible = False
    AL d, "lblCopyHint", "  Select the password above and press Ctrl+C to copy.", 20, 378, 470, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblCopyHint").ForeColor = &H999999: d.Controls("lblCopyHint").Font.Italic = True
    d.Controls("lblCopyHint").Visible = False
    
    ' --- Form code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mShowing As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mShowing = False: Call InitUserMgmt(Me): Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstUsers_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstUsers"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstUsers_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex < 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = Me.Controls(""lstUsers"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbRole"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 5).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbActive"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(9654) & "" Selected: "" & ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value & "" ("" & ws.Cells(idx, 4).Value & "" - "" & ws.Cells(idx, 5).Value & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H666666" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnShowPw_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mShowing = Not mShowing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mShowing Then Me.Controls(""txtPassword"").PasswordChar = """" Else Me.Controls(""txtPassword"").PasswordChar = ""*""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFillStaff_Click(): Call FillFromStaff(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtStaffID_KeyDown(ByVal KeyCode As MSForms.ReturnInteger, ByVal Shift As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If KeyCode = 13 Then KeyCode = 0: Call FillFromStaff(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click(): Call SaveUser(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnEdit_Click(): Call EditUser(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDel_Click(): Call DeleteUser(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnReset_Click(): Call ResetUserPassword(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCancel_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtUsername"").Value = """": Me.Controls(""txtFullName"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtPassword"").Value = """": Me.Controls(""txtUsername"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtPassword"").PasswordChar = ""*"": mShowing = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnDel"").Caption = ""DELETE"": Me.Controls(""btnDel"").BackColor = &HC62828: Me.Controls(""btnDel"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnReset"").Caption = ""RESET PASSWORD"": Me.Controls(""btnReset"").BackColor = &H1565C0: Me.Controls(""btnReset"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtTempPw"").Visible = False: Me.Controls(""lblTempLbl"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnCopy"").Visible = False: Me.Controls(""lblCopyHint"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Height = 380" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Cleared."": Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H666666" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCopy_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CopyErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cb As MSForms.DataObject: Set cb = New MSForms.DataObject" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  cb.SetText Me.Controls(""txtTempPw"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  cb.PutInClipboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblCopyHint"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Copied to clipboard!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblCopyHint"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CopyErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblCopyHint"").Caption = ""  Select the password and press Ctrl+C to copy.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblCopyHint"").ForeColor = &HFF6600" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmReportCenter – Consolidated Report Hub
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateReportCenterForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmReportCenter", "CBC Report Center", 420, 345)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HF5F5F5
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "CBC REPORT CENTER", 0, 0, 420, 32, 12
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &H1F3864
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 32, 420, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &H889632: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SECTION: REPORT CARDS ===
    AL d, "lblSec1", "  REPORT CARDS", 15, 42, 390, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblSec1").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSec1").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblSec1").ForeColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblSec1").BackColor = &HE8EBF0

    d.Controls("btn1").Font.Size = 9
    AL d, "lbl1", "    By Admission Number", 15, 110, 190, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lbl1").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lbl1").Font.Italic = True

    AB d, "btn2", ChrW(9776) & "  Batch Report Cards", 215, 64, 190, 44, &H883900, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn2").Font.Size = 9

    d.Controls("lbl2").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lbl2").Font.Italic = True

    d.Controls("lblSec2").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSec2").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    d.Controls("btn3").Font.Size = 9
    AL d, "lbl3", "    Student roster by class", 15, 196, 190, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lbl3").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lbl3").Font.Italic = True

    AB d, "btn4", ChrW(9745) & "  Attendance Summary", 215, 154, 190, 40, &H6A1B9A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn4").Font.Size = 9
    AL d, "lbl4", "    Presence & absence stats", 215, 196, 190, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lbl4").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lbl4").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' --- btn5: Fee Arrears ---
    AB d, "btn5", ChrW(9830) & "  Fee Arrears Report", 15, 218, 190, 40, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btn5").Font.Size = 9
    AL d, "lbl5", "    Outstanding balances", 15, 260, 190, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lbl5").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lbl5").Font.Italic = True

    d.Controls("btn6").Font.Size = 9
    AL d, "lbl6", "    Enrolment statistics", 215, 260, 190, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lbl6").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lbl6").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === STATUS & CLOSE ===
    AL d, "lblStat", "", 15, 284, 260, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H888888
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE", 295, 280, 110, 26, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === FOOTER ===
    AL d, "lblFoot", "Select a report to generate. PDFs saved to \Reports folder.", 15, 312, 390, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblFoot").ForeColor = &HAAAAAA: d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' --- Form Code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn1_Click(): Unload Me: Call GenerateSingleReportByAdm: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn2_Click(): Unload Me: Call GenerateClassReportCards: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn3_Click(): Unload Me: Call RptClassList: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn4_Click(): Unload Me: Call RptAttSummary: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn5_Click(): Unload Me: Call RptFeeArrears: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btn6_Click(): Unload Me: Call RptStudCount: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmReportInput – Professional Input for Reports + Save
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateReportInputForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmReportInput", "Report Card", 420, 430)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "GENERATE REPORT CARD", 0, 0, 420, 34, 13
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &H643C1F
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 34, 420, 3
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' === INPUT ROW 1: Adm No (single) / Class (batch) ===
    AL d, "lblAdm", "Admission No:", 25, 48, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblAdm").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblAdm").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AT d, "txtAdm", 140, 46, 240
    d.Controls("txtAdm").Font.Size = 10
    
    AL d, "lblCls", "Select Class:", 25, 48, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblCls").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblCls").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AC d, "cmbClass", 140, 46, 240
    
    ' === INPUT ROW 2: Term ===
    AL d, "lblTrm", "Term:", 25, 74, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblTrm").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblTrm").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AC d, "cmbTerm", 140, 72, 240
    
    ' === INPUT ROW 3: Year ===
    AL d, "lblYr", "Year:", 25, 100, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblYr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblYr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AC d, "cmbYear", 140, 98, 240
    
    ' === PREVIEW PANEL ===
    AL d, "lblPrevHdr", "  PREVIEW", 25, 128, 370, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").BackColor = &H5A3416
    
    AL d, "lblPrev", "  Enter details and click Lookup.", 25, 144, 370, 60, 9
    d.Controls("lblPrev").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblPrev").BackColor = &HF5F0EB: d.Controls("lblPrev").ForeColor = &H555555
    d.Controls("lblPrev").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblPrev").BorderColor = &HE0D0C0
    d.Controls("lblPrev").WordWrap = True
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv1", "", 25, 210, 370, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv1").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblDiv1").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SAVE OPTIONS SECTION (batch mode only) ===
    AL d, "lblSaveHdr", "  SAVE OPTIONS", 25, 218, 370, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").BackColor = &H5A3416
    
    ' --- File Name ---
    AL d, "lblFN", "File Name:", 25, 246, 65, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblFN").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblFN").ForeColor = &H777777
    AT d, "txtFileName", 95, 244, 300
    d.Controls("txtFileName").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' --- Save Location ---
    AL d, "lblLoc", "Location:", 25, 272, 65, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblLoc").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblLoc").ForeColor = &H777777
    AT d, "txtSavePath", 95, 270, 210
    d.Controls("txtSavePath").Font.Size = 8
    d.Controls("txtSavePath").Locked = True
    AB d, "btnBrowseSave", ChrW(9654) & " BROWSE", 312, 268, 84, 22, &H5A3416, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnBrowseSave").Font.Size = 8
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv2", "", 25, 298, 370, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv2").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblDiv2").Caption = ""
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnLookup", ChrW(9881) & " LOOKUP", 25, 310, 100, 30, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnLookup").Font.Size = 9
    
    AB d, "btnGenerate", ChrW(10003) & " GENERATE", 135, 310, 160, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnGenerate").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("btnGenerate").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("btnGenerate").Enabled = False
    
    AB d, "btnCancel", "CANCEL", 310, 310, 85, 30, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCancel").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === STATUS ===
    AL d, "lblStat", "", 25, 350, 370, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblStat").Font.Italic = True
    
    AL d, "lblFoot", "PDFs exported to chosen folder.", 25, 370, 370, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblFoot").ForeColor = &HAAAAAA: d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Italic = True
    d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Form Code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mSID As String" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Initialize ----
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").AddItem ""Term 1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").AddItem ""Term 2""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").AddItem ""Term 3""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value = ""Term 1""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbYear"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim y As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For y = Year(Date) To Year(Date) - 3 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""cmbYear"").AddItem CStr(y)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next y" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value = CStr(Year(Date))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Save defaults ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Value = ""ReportCards_"" & Format(Date, ""yyyymmdd"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Value = ThisWorkbook.Path" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gReportMode = ""batch"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Caption = ""Batch Report Cards""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblHdr"").Caption = ""BATCH REPORT CARDS""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblHdr"").BackColor = &H883900" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblAdm"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtAdm"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblCls"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnLookup"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" GENERATE ALL""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call PopulateClassDropdown(Me, ""cmbClass"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrev"").Caption = ""  Select class, term and year above.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Show save options ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblSaveHdr"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblFN"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblLoc"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnBrowseSave"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblDiv1"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblDiv2"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Caption = ""Single Report Card""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblHdr"").Caption = ""SINGLE REPORT CARD""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblAdm"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtAdm"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblCls"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnLookup"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrev"").Caption = ""  Enter admission number and click Lookup.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Hide save options in single mode ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblSaveHdr"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblFN"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblLoc"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnBrowseSave"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblDiv1"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblDiv2"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Class Change (batch mode) ----
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbClass_Change()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Then Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = False: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = cls And CStr(sW.Cells(i, cST).Value) = ""Active"" Then cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrev"").Caption = ""  Class: "" & cls & vbLf & ""  Active Students: "" & cnt & vbLf & vbLf & ""  "" & cnt & "" PDF reports will be generated.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrevHdr"").BackColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Ready to generate "" & cnt & "" reports.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Value = ""ReportCards_"" & cls & ""_"" & Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value & ""_"" & Me.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrev"").Caption = ""  No active students in "" & cls & "".""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrevHdr"").BackColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""No students found.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Browse Save Location ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnBrowseSave_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fd As FileDialog: Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFolderPicker)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Title = ""Select Save Location for Report Cards""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fd.Show = -1 Then Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Value = fd.SelectedItems(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Lookup Button (single mode) ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnLookup_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim admNo As String: admNo = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If admNo = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Please enter an admission number.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mSID = GetStudentIDFromAdmNo(admNo)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mSID = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrev"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10007) & "" No student found with Adm No: "" & admNo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblPrevHdr"").BackColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Student not found.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(sW.Cells(i, cSID).Value) = mSID Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim nm As String: nm = sW.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim cl As String: cl = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cCLS).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim gn As String: gn = CStr(sW.Cells(i, cGEN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblPrev"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Student Found"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""  Name:  "" & nm & vbLf & ""  Adm:    "" & admNo & vbLf & ""  Class:  "" & cl & ""    Gender: "" & gn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblPrevHdr"").BackColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""btnGenerate"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Click Generate to create PDF.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Generate Button ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnGenerate_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = Me.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim yr As String: yr = Me.Controls(""cmbYear"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If trm = """" Or yr = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Select Term and Year first.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gReportMode = ""batch"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim cls As String: cls = Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim savePath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sp As String: sp = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fn As String: fn = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sp <> """" And fn <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      savePath = sp & ""\"" & fn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      savePath = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call RunBatchReports(cls, trm, yr, savePath)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim localSID As String: localSID = mSID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call GenerateCBCReport(localSID, trm, yr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Cancel ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCancel_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmChangePassword – Secure Password Change
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateChangePasswordForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmChangePassword", "Change Password", 380, 340)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "CHANGE PASSWORD", 0, 0, 380, 32, 12
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &H1565C0
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 32, 380, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' === INFO ===
    AL d, "lblInfo", "  Your password was reset. Please set a new one.", 20, 42, 340, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblInfo").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblInfo").ForeColor = &H555555
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BackColor = &HFFF8E1: d.Controls("lblInfo").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BorderColor = &HFFE082: d.Controls("lblInfo").WordWrap = True
    
    ' === Old Password (shown for self-service, hidden for forced reset) ===
    AL d, "lblOld", "Old Password:", 20, 72, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblOld").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblOld").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AT d, "txtOld", 135, 70, 190
    d.Controls("txtOld").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtOld").PasswordChar = "*"
    d.Controls("txtOld").Visible = False: d.Controls("lblOld").Visible = False
    
    ' === New Password ===
    AL d, "lblNew", "New Password:", 20, 102, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblNew").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblNew").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AT d, "txtNew", 135, 100, 190
    d.Controls("txtNew").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtNew").PasswordChar = "*"
    AB d, "btnShow", ChrW(9673), 332, 99, 24, 20, &HE0E0E0, &H333333
    d.Controls("btnShow").Font.Size = 8
    
    ' === Strength Indicator ===
    AL d, "lblStrLbl", "Strength:", 20, 124, 60, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblStrLbl").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblStrLbl").ForeColor = &H999999
    AL d, "lblStr", "", 85, 124, 250, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblStr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblStr").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === Confirm Password ===
    AL d, "lblConf", "Confirm:", 20, 144, 110, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblConf").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblConf").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AT d, "txtConfirm", 135, 142, 190
    d.Controls("txtConfirm").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtConfirm").PasswordChar = "*"
    
    ' === Match Indicator ===
    AL d, "lblMatch", "", 20, 166, 340, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblMatch").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblMatch").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === Requirements ===
    AL d, "lblReq", "  Min 6 chars  |  Cannot match username  |  Cannot reuse old password", 20, 184, 340, 18, 8
    d.Controls("lblReq").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblReq").ForeColor = &H888888
    d.Controls("lblReq").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblReq").BorderStyle = 1
    
    ' === Buttons ===
    AB d, "btnSave", ChrW(10003) & " SAVE PASSWORD", 20, 212, 170, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSave").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnSave").Enabled = False
    AB d, "btnSkip", "SKIP", 200, 212, 80, 30, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSkip").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnCancel", "CANCEL", 290, 212, 70, 30, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCancel").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === Status ===
    AL d, "lblStat", "", 20, 252, 340, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblStat").Font.Italic = True
    AL d, "lblFoot", "Choose a strong password you can remember.", 20, 272, 340, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblFoot").ForeColor = &HAAAAAA: d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' --- Form Code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mShowing As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mForced As Boolean  ' True = forced reset (no old pw needed)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mShowing = False: Me.Controls(""btnSave"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Detect if this is a forced reset (MUST_CHANGE) or self-service" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(Me.Tag, ""|"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If UBound(parts) >= 2 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mForced = (parts(2) = ""FORCED"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mForced = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mForced Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblOld"").Visible = False: Me.Controls(""txtOld"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  Your password was reset by an administrator. Please set a new one.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnSkip"").Visible = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblOld"").Visible = True: Me.Controls(""txtOld"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  Enter your current password and choose a new one.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").BackColor = &HE3F2FD: Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").BorderColor = &H90CAF9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnSkip"").Visible = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnShow_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mShowing = Not mShowing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mShowing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtNew"").PasswordChar = """": Me.Controls(""txtConfirm"").PasswordChar = """""  & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""txtNew"").PasswordChar = ""*"": Me.Controls(""txtConfirm"").PasswordChar = ""*""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtNew_Change(): Call CheckStrength: Call CheckMatch: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtConfirm_Change(): Call CheckMatch: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub CheckStrength()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pw As String: pw = Me.Controls(""txtNew"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Len(pw) = 0 Then Me.Controls(""lblStr"").Caption = """": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim score As Long: score = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Len(pw) >= 6 Then score = score + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Len(pw) >= 8 Then score = score + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Len(pw) >= 10 Then score = score + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hasUp As Boolean, hasLow As Boolean, hasNum As Boolean, hasSp As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ch As String, k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 1 To Len(pw)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ch = Mid(pw, k, 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ch >= ""A"" And ch <= ""Z"" Then hasUp = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ch >= ""a"" And ch <= ""z"" Then hasLow = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ch >= ""0"" And ch <= ""9"" Then hasNum = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If InStr(""!@#$%^&*_+-"", ch) > 0 Then hasSp = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If hasUp And hasLow Then score = score + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If hasNum Then score = score + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If hasSp Then score = score + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Select Case score" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case 0, 1: Me.Controls(""lblStr"").Caption = ChrW(9632) & "" Weak"": Me.Controls(""lblStr"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case 2: Me.Controls(""lblStr"").Caption = ChrW(9632) & ChrW(9632) & "" Fair"": Me.Controls(""lblStr"").ForeColor = &HFB8C00" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case 3, 4: Me.Controls(""lblStr"").Caption = ChrW(9632) & ChrW(9632) & ChrW(9632) & "" Good"": Me.Controls(""lblStr"").ForeColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Case Else: Me.Controls(""lblStr"").Caption = ChrW(9632) & ChrW(9632) & ChrW(9632) & ChrW(9632) & "" Strong"": Me.Controls(""lblStr"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub CheckMatch()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pw As String: pw = Me.Controls(""txtNew"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cf As String: cf = Me.Controls(""txtConfirm"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Len(pw) < 6 Or Len(cf) = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblMatch"").Caption = """": Me.Controls(""btnSave"").Enabled = False: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If pw = cf Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblMatch"").Caption = ChrW(10003) & "" Passwords match"": Me.Controls(""lblMatch"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnSave"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblMatch"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Passwords do not match"": Me.Controls(""lblMatch"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnSave"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSave_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo SvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pw As String: pw = Me.Controls(""txtNew"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(Me.Tag, ""|"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If UBound(parts) < 1 Then Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""Error: invalid context."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim uname As String: uname = parts(0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = CLng(parts(1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_USERS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Validate old password for self-service changes ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not mForced Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim oldPw As String: oldPw = Me.Controls(""txtOld"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If oldPw = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Enter your current password.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim oldHash As String: oldHash = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If oldHash <> HashPass(oldPw) And oldHash <> oldPw Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Current password is incorrect.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Validate new password ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If LCase(pw) = LCase(uname) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Password cannot match username.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Prevent reusing old password" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If HashPass(pw) = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" New password cannot be the same as the old one.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Apply new password ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo SvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value = HashPass(pw)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(idx, 8).Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Security"", ""Password changed for: "" & uname)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Unload Me: Call BuildDashboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "SvErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSkip_Click(): Unload Me: Call BuildDashboard: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCancel_Click(): Unload Me: Call BuildDashboard: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmClassListInput – Professional Class Selection + Save
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateClassListInputForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmClassListInput", "Class List Report", 420, 400)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "CLASS LIST REPORT", 0, 0, 420, 34, 13
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &H1F4E79
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 34, 420, 3
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &H388E3C: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SUBTITLE ===
    AL d, "lblInfo", "  Select a class to generate the student list report.", 20, 44, 380, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblInfo").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblInfo").ForeColor = &H555555
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BackColor = &HE8F5E9: d.Controls("lblInfo").BorderStyle = 1
    
    ' === CLASS / STREAM SELECTION ===
    AL d, "lblCls", "Class:", 20, 76, 50, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblCls").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblCls").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AC d, "cmbClass", 75, 74, 110
    d.Controls("cmbClass").Font.Size = 10
    
    AL d, "lblStrm", "Stream:", 210, 76, 50, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblStrm").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblStrm").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AC d, "cmbStream", 265, 74, 130
    d.Controls("cmbStream").Font.Size = 10
    
    ' === Student count preview ===
    AL d, "lblPreview", "", 20, 100, 380, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblPreview").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblPreview").ForeColor = &H1565C0
    d.Controls("lblPreview").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv1", "", 20, 122, 380, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv1").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblDiv1").Caption = ""
    
    ' === SAVE OPTIONS SECTION ===
    AL d, "lblSaveHdr", "  SAVE OPTIONS", 20, 130, 380, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblSaveHdr").BackColor = &H5A3416
    
    ' --- Save Checkbox ---
    Dim chk As Object: Set chk = d.Controls.Add("Forms.CheckBox.1", "chkSave")
    chk.Left = 20: chk.Top = 158: chk.Width = 180: chk.Height = 18
    chk.Caption = " Save report to file": chk.Font.Size = 9
    chk.Font.Name = "Segoe UI": chk.Value = False
    
    ' --- Format ---
    AL d, "lblFmt", "Format:", 210, 160, 45, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblFmt").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblFmt").ForeColor = &H777777
    AC d, "cmbFormat", 260, 158, 135
    d.Controls("cmbFormat").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("cmbFormat").Enabled = False
    
    ' --- File Name ---
    AL d, "lblFN", "File Name:", 20, 186, 65, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblFN").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblFN").ForeColor = &H777777
    AT d, "txtFileName", 90, 184, 305
    d.Controls("txtFileName").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("txtFileName").Enabled = False
    
    ' --- Save Location ---
    AL d, "lblLoc", "Location:", 20, 214, 65, 16, 9
    d.Controls("lblLoc").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblLoc").ForeColor = &H777777
    AT d, "txtSavePath", 90, 212, 215
    d.Controls("txtSavePath").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("txtSavePath").Enabled = False
    d.Controls("txtSavePath").Locked = True
    AB d, "btnBrowseSave", ChrW(9654) & " BROWSE", 312, 210, 84, 22, &H5A3416, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnBrowseSave").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnBrowseSave").Enabled = False
    
    ' === DIVIDER ===
    AL d, "lblDiv2", "", 20, 242, 380, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv2").BackColor = &HD0D0D0: d.Controls("lblDiv2").Caption = ""
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnGenerate", ChrW(9776) & " GENERATE REPORT", 20, 254, 190, 32, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnGenerate").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("btnGenerate").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnCancel", "CANCEL", 230, 254, 165, 32, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCancel").Font.Size = 10
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblStat", "  Select a class from the dropdown above.", 20, 298, 380, 22, 9
    d.Controls("lblStat").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H888888
    d.Controls("lblStat").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblStat").BorderStyle = 1
    
    ' === FOOTER ===
    AL d, "lblFoot", "Report will open as a new sheet. You can also save it to file.", 20, 330, 380, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblFoot").ForeColor = &HAAAAAA: d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Italic = True
    d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Form Code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Classes"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject(""Scripting.Dictionary"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim cn As String: cn = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not dict.Exists(cn) Then dict.Add cn, 1: Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").AddItem cn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbStream"").AddItem ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim found As Boolean: found = False: Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 0 To Me.Controls(""cmbStream"").ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Me.Controls(""cmbStream"").List(j) = sn Then found = True: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Not found And sn <> """" Then Me.Controls(""cmbStream"").AddItem sn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value = ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Save defaults ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbFormat"").AddItem ""PDF""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbFormat"").AddItem ""Excel (.xlsx)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbFormat"").Value = ""PDF""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Value = ""ClassList_"" & Format(Date, ""yyyymmdd"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Value = ThisWorkbook.Path" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbClass_Change()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value) = Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value Then cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblPreview"").Caption = ChrW(9679) & "" "" & cnt & "" students found in "" & Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Value = ""ClassList_"" & Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value & ""_"" & Format(Date, ""yyyymmdd"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Ready to generate. Click Generate Report.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub chkSave_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim en As Boolean: en = Me.Controls(""chkSave"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""cmbFormat"").Enabled = en" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Enabled = en" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnBrowseSave"").Enabled = en" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnBrowseSave_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fd As FileDialog: Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFolderPicker)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Title = ""Select Save Location""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fd.Show = -1 Then Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Value = fd.SelectedItems(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnGenerate_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = Me.Controls(""cmbClass"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & ""  Please select a class first.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim savePath As String: savePath = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim saveFormat As String: saveFormat = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""chkSave"").Value Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fn As String: fn = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtFileName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If fn = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & ""  Please enter a file name.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sp As String: sp = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtSavePath"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If sp = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & ""  Please select a save location.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    saveFormat = Me.Controls(""cmbFormat"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ext As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If saveFormat = ""PDF"" Then ext = "".pdf"" Else ext = "".xlsx""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    savePath = sp & ""\"" & fn & ext" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateClassListReport(cls, savePath, saveFormat)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCancel_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  SEED TEST DATA: 20 Students + All Related Records
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Public Sub SeedTestData()
    On Error GoTo SeedErr
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    ' === 1. DB_Students (20 students across G1-G5, streams A/B) ===
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_Students")
    On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect "MIS2026": ws.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    
    ' Check if data exists
    If ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row >= 2 Then
        If MsgBox("Student data already exists. Overwrite with test data?", vbYesNo + vbExclamation, "Seed Test Data") = vbNo Then
            Application.ScreenUpdating = True: Exit Sub
        End If
        ws.Rows("2:" & ws.Rows.Count).Delete xlUp
    End If
    
    ' Headers
    ws.Cells(1, 1) = "StudentID": ws.Cells(1, 2) = "AdmNo": ws.Cells(1, 3) = "Surname"
    ws.Cells(1, 4) = "OtherNames": ws.Cells(1, 5) = "Gender": ws.Cells(1, 6) = "DOB"
    ws.Cells(1, 7) = "Class": ws.Cells(1, 8) = "ParentName": ws.Cells(1, 9) = "Phone"
    ws.Cells(1, 10) = "UPI": ws.Cells(1, 11) = "BirthCert": ws.Cells(1, 12) = "Status"
    ws.Cells(1, 13) = "Allergies": ws.Cells(1, 14) = "SpecialNeeds": ws.Cells(1, 15) = "BloodGroup"
    ws.Cells(1, 16) = "Photo": ws.Cells(1, 17) = "Stream"
    
    Dim fn As Variant, ln As Variant, gen As Variant, cls As Variant, strm As Variant
    Dim dob As Variant, pn As Variant, ph As Variant, bg As Variant
    fn = Array("Mwangi", "Odhiambo", "Kiplagat", "Kamau", "Wanjiku", "Abdalla", "Nyambura", "Mohamed", "Akinyi", "Mutua", "Chebet", "Karanja", "Bosibori", "Githinji", "Onyango", "Njeri", "Ali", "Amara", "Cherotich", "Wekesa")
    ln = Array("Amani Baraka", "Kevin Otieno", "Faith Jepkorir", "Daniel Kibet", "Esther Nyambura", "Fadhili Omar", "Grace Wairimu", "Hassan Juma", "Imani Achieng", "Jabari Kioko", "Kezia Jepkemoi", "Liam Njoroge", "Moraa Kemunto", "Paul Njuguna", "Brian Omondi", "Purity Wambui", "Rashid Bakari", "Sifa Halima", "Tiffany Jeptoo", "Collins Simiyu")
    gen = Array("M", "M", "F", "M", "F", "M", "F", "M", "F", "M", "F", "M", "F", "M", "M", "F", "M", "F", "F", "M")
    cls = Array("G1", "G1", "G2", "G2", "G3", "G3", "G4", "G4", "G5", "G5", "G1", "G1", "G2", "G2", "G3", "G3", "G4", "G4", "G5", "G5")
    strm = Array("A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B", "A", "B")
    dob = Array("15/03/2017", "22/06/2017", "10/01/2016", "05/09/2016", "18/04/2015", "30/11/2015", "12/07/2014", "25/02/2014", "08/08/2013", "19/12/2013", "03/05/2017", "14/10/2017", "27/03/2016", "09/07/2016", "21/01/2015", "16/08/2015", "02/04/2014", "28/11/2014", "11/06/2013", "07/09/2013")
    pn = Array("Peter Mwangi", "Mary Odhiambo", "Sarah Kiplagat", "John Kamau", "Ruth Wanjiku", "Ahmed Abdalla", "Jane Nyambura", "Fatima Mohamed", "Rose Akinyi", "David Mutua", "Elizabeth Chebet", "James Karanja", "Nancy Bosibori", "Samuel Githinji", "Grace Onyango", "Martha Njeri", "Ibrahim Ali", "Halima Amara", "Joyce Cherotich", "Moses Wekesa")
    ph = Array("0712345001", "0723456002", "0734567003", "0745678004", "0756789005", "0767890006", "0778901007", "0789012008", "0790123009", "0711234010", "0722345011", "0733456012", "0744567013", "0755678014", "0766789015", "0777890016", "0788901017", "0799012018", "0710123019", "0721234020")
    bg = Array("O+", "A+", "B+", "AB+", "O-", "A+", "B-", "O+", "A-", "B+", "O+", "AB-", "A+", "B+", "O-", "A+", "B+", "O+", "AB+", "A-")
    
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 0 To 19
        Dim r As Long: r = i + 2
        ws.Cells(r, 1) = "S" & Format(i + 1, "000")
        ws.Cells(r, 2) = "ADM" & Format(2025001 + i, "0000000")
        ws.Cells(r, 3) = fn(i): ws.Cells(r, 4) = ln(i)
        ws.Cells(r, 5) = gen(i): ws.Cells(r, 6) = dob(i)
        ws.Cells(r, 7) = cls(i): ws.Cells(r, 8) = pn(i)
        ws.Cells(r, 9) = ph(i)
        ws.Cells(r, 10) = "UPI" & Format(CLng(100000 + i * 7919), "000000")
        ws.Cells(r, 11) = "BC" & Format(CLng(50000 + i * 3571), "000000")
        ws.Cells(r, 12) = "Active"
        ws.Cells(r, 13) = IIf(i Mod 7 = 0, "Peanuts", "")
        ws.Cells(r, 14) = "": ws.Cells(r, 15) = bg(i)
        ws.Cells(r, 16) = "": ws.Cells(r, 17) = strm(i)
    Next i
    ws.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 2. DB_FeeStructure (class-based CBC Kenya structure) ===
    Dim wsFee As Worksheet: Set wsFee = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_FeeStructure")
    On Error Resume Next: wsFee.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsFee.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsFee.Cells(2, 1).Value = "" Then
        '  Header now has 4 columns: FeeID | FeeType | Amount | Class
        wsFee.Cells(1, 1) = "FeeID": wsFee.Cells(1, 2) = "FeeType"
        wsFee.Cells(1, 3) = "Amount":  wsFee.Cells(1, 4) = "Class"
        wsFee.Range("A1:D1").Font.Bold = True
        wsFee.Range("A1:D1").Interior.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100)
        wsFee.Range("A1:D1").Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
        '
        '  Kenya CBC Public School Fee Structure (per term, KSh)
        '  Sources: MoE Gazette 2015, TSC/BOG circulars 2024, KNUT data
        '  PP1/PP2  – Pre-Primary (Govt subsidised, minimal levies)
        '  G1-G3    – Lower Primary
        '  G4-G6    – Upper Primary
        '  G7-G9    – Junior Secondary School (JSS)
        '
        Dim fClasses As Variant
        fClasses = Array("PP1","PP2","G1","G2","G3","G4","G5","G6","G7","G8","G9")
        ' Amounts per fee type per tier  (Tuition levy, Activity, Lunch, Exam/Misc)
        ' Tier 0=PP, 1=Lower (G1-G3), 2=Upper (G4-G6), 3=JSS (G7-G9)
        Dim fAmtTuition As Variant: fAmtTuition = Array(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 10000, 10000, 12000)
        Dim fAmtActivity As Variant: fAmtActivity = Array(1500, 1500, 2500, 2500, 2500, 3500, 3500, 3500, 5000, 5000, 5500)
        Dim fAmtLunch   As Variant: fAmtLunch    = Array(2000, 2000, 3000, 3000, 3000, 3500, 3500, 3500, 4500, 4500, 4500)
        Dim fAmtExam    As Variant: fAmtExam     = Array(500,  500,  800,  800,  800,  1000, 1000, 1000, 1500, 1500, 2000)
        Dim fr As Long: fr = 2
        Dim fc As Long
        For fc = 0 To 10
            Dim fCls As String: fCls = CStr(fClasses(fc))
            wsFee.Cells(fr, 1) = "FEE" & Format(fr - 1, "000"): wsFee.Cells(fr, 2) = "School Development Levy": wsFee.Cells(fr, 3) = fAmtTuition(fc): wsFee.Cells(fr, 4) = fCls: fr = fr + 1
            wsFee.Cells(fr, 1) = "FEE" & Format(fr - 1, "000"): wsFee.Cells(fr, 2) = "Activity Fee":            wsFee.Cells(fr, 3) = fAmtActivity(fc): wsFee.Cells(fr, 4) = fCls: fr = fr + 1
            wsFee.Cells(fr, 1) = "FEE" & Format(fr - 1, "000"): wsFee.Cells(fr, 2) = "Lunch Contribution":       wsFee.Cells(fr, 3) = fAmtLunch(fc):   wsFee.Cells(fr, 4) = fCls: fr = fr + 1
            wsFee.Cells(fr, 1) = "FEE" & Format(fr - 1, "000"): wsFee.Cells(fr, 2) = "Exam & KNEC Fee":          wsFee.Cells(fr, 3) = fAmtExam(fc):    wsFee.Cells(fr, 4) = fCls: fr = fr + 1
        Next fc
        ' Auto-fit columns
        wsFee.Columns("A:D").AutoFit
    End If
    wsFee.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 3. DB_FeePayments (random payments for students) ===
    Dim wsPay As Worksheet: Set wsPay = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_FeePayments")
    On Error Resume Next: wsPay.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsPay.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsPay.Cells(wsPay.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then
        wsPay.Cells(1, 1) = "PayID": wsPay.Cells(1, 2) = "StudentID": wsPay.Cells(1, 3) = "FeeType"
        wsPay.Cells(1, 4) = "Amount": wsPay.Cells(1, 5) = "Mode": wsPay.Cells(1, 6) = "Receipt"
        wsPay.Cells(1, 7) = "Date"
        Dim modes As Variant: modes = Array("Cash", "M-Pesa", "Bank", "M-Pesa", "Cash")
        Dim feeTypes As Variant: feeTypes = Array("School Development Levy", "Activity Fee", "Lunch Contribution", "Exam & KNEC Fee")
        Dim amts As Variant: amts = Array(10000, 3500, 3500, 1000)
        Dim pr As Long: pr = 2
        Dim j As Long
        For i = 0 To 19
            ' Each student gets 1-2 payments
            Dim payCount As Long: payCount = IIf(i Mod 3 = 0, 2, 1)
            For j = 1 To payCount
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 1) = "PAY-" & Format(pr - 1, "00000")
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 2) = "S" & Format(i + 1, "000")
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 3) = feeTypes((i + j) Mod 4)
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 4) = amts((i + j) Mod 4)
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 5) = modes((i + j) Mod 5)
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 6) = "RCP-" & Format(pr - 1, "00000")
                wsPay.Cells(pr, 7) = Format(DateSerial(2026, 1, 10 + (i Mod 15)), "dd/mm/yyyy")
                pr = pr + 1
            Next j
        Next i
    End If
    wsPay.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 4. DB_Attendance (3 days for all 20 students) ===
    Dim wsAtt As Worksheet: Set wsAtt = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_Attendance")
    On Error Resume Next: wsAtt.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsAtt.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsAtt.Cells(wsAtt.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then
        wsAtt.Cells(1, 1) = "AttID": wsAtt.Cells(1, 2) = "StudentID": wsAtt.Cells(1, 3) = "Date"
        wsAtt.Cells(1, 4) = "Status"
        Dim attStatuses As Variant: attStatuses = Array("Present", "Present", "Present", "Absent", "Present", "Sick", "Present", "Present", "Excused", "Present")
        Dim ar As Long: ar = 2
        Dim d As Long
        For d = 0 To 2    ' 3 days
            For i = 0 To 19
                wsAtt.Cells(ar, 1) = "ATT-" & Format(ar - 1, "00000")
                wsAtt.Cells(ar, 2) = "S" & Format(i + 1, "000")
                wsAtt.Cells(ar, 3) = Format(DateSerial(2026, 2, 17 + d), "dd/mm/yyyy")
                wsAtt.Cells(ar, 4) = attStatuses((i + d) Mod 10)
                ar = ar + 1
            Next i
        Next d
    End If
    wsAtt.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 5. DB_Guardians ===
    Dim wsGuard As Worksheet: Set wsGuard = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_Guardians")
    On Error Resume Next: wsGuard.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsGuard.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsGuard.Cells(wsGuard.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then
        wsGuard.Cells(1, 1) = "GuardianID": wsGuard.Cells(1, 2) = "StudentID": wsGuard.Cells(1, 3) = "GuardianName"
        wsGuard.Cells(1, 4) = "Relationship": wsGuard.Cells(1, 5) = "Phone": wsGuard.Cells(1, 6) = "Email"
        Dim rels As Variant: rels = Array("Father", "Mother", "Mother", "Father", "Mother", "Father", "Mother", "Father", "Mother", "Father", "Mother", "Father", "Mother", "Father", "Father", "Mother", "Father", "Mother", "Mother", "Father")
        For i = 0 To 19
            Dim gr As Long: gr = i + 2
            wsGuard.Cells(gr, 1) = "G" & Format(i + 1, "000")
            wsGuard.Cells(gr, 2) = "S" & Format(i + 1, "000")
            wsGuard.Cells(gr, 3) = pn(i)
            wsGuard.Cells(gr, 4) = rels(i)
            wsGuard.Cells(gr, 5) = ph(i)
            wsGuard.Cells(gr, 6) = LCase(Replace(pn(i), " ", ".")) & "@email.co.ke"
        Next i
    End If
    wsGuard.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 6. DB_Teachers (5 teachers) ===
    Dim wsTeach As Worksheet: Set wsTeach = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_Teachers")
    On Error Resume Next: wsTeach.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsTeach.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsTeach.Cells(wsTeach.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then
        wsTeach.Cells(1, 1) = "TeacherID": wsTeach.Cells(1, 2) = "Name": wsTeach.Cells(1, 3) = "TSC"
        wsTeach.Cells(1, 4) = "Phone": wsTeach.Cells(1, 5) = "Email": wsTeach.Cells(1, 6) = "Subject"
        wsTeach.Cells(1, 7) = "JoinDate"
        Dim tNames As Variant: tNames = Array("Florence Wambui", "Joseph Maina", "Catherine Njoki", "Patrick Ouma", "Beatrice Auma")
        Dim tSubj As Variant: tSubj = Array("Mathematics", "English", "Kiswahili", "Science & Technology", "Social Studies")
        For i = 0 To 4
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 1) = "T" & Format(i + 1, "000")
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 2) = tNames(i)
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 3) = "TSC" & Format(300001 + i, "000000")
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 4) = "07" & Format(10000001 + i * 11, "00000000")
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 5) = LCase(Replace(tNames(i), " ", ".")) & "@school.ac.ke"
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 6) = tSubj(i)
            wsTeach.Cells(i + 2, 7) = "01/01/2024"
        Next i
    End If
    wsTeach.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 7. DB_Subjects ===
    Dim wsSubj As Worksheet: Set wsSubj = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_Subjects")
    On Error Resume Next: wsSubj.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsSubj.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsSubj.Cells(wsSubj.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then
        wsSubj.Cells(1, 1) = "SubjectCode": wsSubj.Cells(1, 2) = "SubjectName": wsSubj.Cells(1, 3) = "Category"
        Dim subCodes As Variant: subCodes = Array("MATH", "ENG", "KSW", "SCI", "SST", "CRE", "CART", "PHE")
        Dim subNames As Variant: subNames = Array("Mathematics", "English", "Kiswahili", "Science & Technology", "Social Studies", "CRE", "Creative Arts", "Physical & Health Education")
        Dim subCats As Variant: subCats = Array("Core", "Core", "Core", "Core", "Core", "Optional", "Optional", "Optional")
        For i = 0 To 7
            wsSubj.Cells(i + 2, 1) = subCodes(i)
            wsSubj.Cells(i + 2, 2) = subNames(i)
            wsSubj.Cells(i + 2, 3) = subCats(i)
        Next i
    End If
    wsSubj.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' === 8. DB_Marks (Math, English, Kiswahili for all 20 students) ===
    Dim wsMrk As Worksheet: Set wsMrk = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DB_Marks")
    On Error Resume Next: wsMrk.Unprotect "MIS2026": wsMrk.Unprotect: On Error GoTo SeedErr
    If wsMrk.Cells(wsMrk.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row < 2 Then
        wsMrk.Cells(1, 1) = "StudentID": wsMrk.Cells(1, 2) = "Subject": wsMrk.Cells(1, 3) = "Score"
        wsMrk.Cells(1, 4) = "OutOf": wsMrk.Cells(1, 5) = "Term": wsMrk.Cells(1, 6) = "Year"
        wsMrk.Cells(1, 7) = "Class": wsMrk.Cells(1, 8) = "ExamType"
        Dim mSubj As Variant: mSubj = Array("Mathematics", "English", "Kiswahili")
        Dim mr As Long: mr = 2
        Randomize
        For i = 0 To 19
            For j = 0 To 2
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 1) = "S" & Format(i + 1, "000")
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 2) = mSubj(j)
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 3) = Int(40 + Rnd * 61)   ' 40-100
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 4) = 100
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 5) = "Term 1"
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 6) = 2026
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 7) = cls(i)
                wsMrk.Cells(mr, 8) = "End Term"
                mr = mr + 1
            Next j
        Next i
    End If
    wsMrk.Protect "MIS2026", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Test data seeded successfully!" & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "  20 Students (G1-G5, Streams A & B)" & vbLf & _
           "  4 Fee Structure items" & vbLf & _
           "  27 Fee Payments" & vbLf & _
           "  60 Attendance records (3 days)" & vbLf & _
           "  20 Guardian records" & vbLf & _
           "  5 Teachers" & vbLf & _
           "  8 Subjects" & vbLf & _
           "  60 Marks entries (3 subjects x 20 students)" & vbLf & vbLf & _
           "You can now test Backup & Restore.", vbInformation, "Test Data Seeded"
    Exit Sub
SeedErr:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Error seeding data: " & Err.Description & " (Line: " & Erl & ")", vbCritical, "Seed Error"
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmBackup – Professional Backup Manager
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateBackupForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmBackup", "Backup Manager", 560, 540)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER ===
    AL d, "lblH", "BACKUP MANAGER", 0, 0, 560, 36, 13
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblH").BackColor = &H37474F: d.Controls("lblH").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    AL d, "lblSub", "Create, restore, and manage your database backups", 0, 38, 560, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblSub").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblSub").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblSub").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === CREATE BACKUP SECTION ===
    AL d, "lblNewH", "  CREATE NEW BACKUP", 20, 60, 520, 20, 10
    d.Controls("lblNewH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblNewH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblNewH").BackColor = &H2E7D32
    
    AL d, "lblName", "Backup Name:", 20, 88, 90, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblName").ForeColor = &H444444
    AT d, "txtName", 115, 86, 290
    d.Controls("txtName").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("txtName").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    AB d, "btnCreate", ChrW(9654) & "  CREATE BACKUP", 415, 84, 125, 26, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCreate").Font.Size = 9
    
    AL d, "lblHint", "  Leave blank for auto-name  |  A timestamp will be appended automatically", 20, 110, 520, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblHint").ForeColor = &H999999: d.Controls("lblHint").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === BACKUP LIST ===
    AL d, "lblListH", "  SAVED BACKUPS", 20, 134, 520, 20, 10
    d.Controls("lblListH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblListH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblListH").BackColor = &H1565C0
    
    ' Column headers
    AL d, "lblCol1", "  Filename", 20, 156, 280, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblCol1").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblCol1").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lblCol1").BackColor = &HF0F0F0
    AL d, "lblCol2", "Size", 300, 156, 60, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblCol2").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblCol2").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lblCol2").BackColor = &HF0F0F0: d.Controls("lblCol2").TextAlign = 3
    AL d, "lblCol3", "Date", 370, 156, 170, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblCol3").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblCol3").ForeColor = &H444444: d.Controls("lblCol3").BackColor = &HF0F0F0
    
    ' ListBox for backups
    Dim lst As Object: Set lst = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstBackups")
    lst.Left = 20: lst.Top = 172: lst.Width = 520: lst.Height = 180
    lst.Font.Size = 9: lst.Font.Name = "Consolas"
    lst.ColumnCount = 3: lst.ColumnWidths = "280;60;170"
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS (Row 1) ===
    AB d, "btnRestore", ChrW(8635) & " RESTORE", 20, 362, 120, 30, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnRestore").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnDelete", ChrW(10007) & " DELETE", 150, 362, 100, 30, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDelete").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnRefresh", ChrW(8635) & " REFRESH", 260, 362, 100, 30, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnRefresh").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnOpen", "OPEN FOLDER", 370, 362, 100, 30, &HFF6F00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnOpen").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE", 480, 362, 60, 30, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === ADVANCED TOOLS (Row 2) ===
    AL d, "lblAdv", "  ADVANCED TOOLS", 20, 398, 520, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblAdv").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblAdv").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblAdv").BackColor = &H37474F
    
    AB d, "btnSummary", ChrW(9733) & " DATA SUMMARY", 20, 420, 130, 28, &H00695C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSummary").Font.Size = 8
    AB d, "btnExport", ChrW(8681) & " EXPORT CSV", 160, 420, 120, 28, &H4527A0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnExport").Font.Size = 8
    AB d, "btnVerify", ChrW(9888) & " VERIFY BACKUP", 290, 420, 130, 28, &HE65100, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnVerify").Font.Size = 8
    AB d, "btnSchedule", ChrW(9200) & " AUTO-BACKUP", 430, 420, 110, 28, &H1B5E20, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSchedule").Font.Size = 8
    
    ' === SUMMARY BAR ===
    AL d, "lblInfo", "  0 backups  |  0 KB total", 20, 456, 520, 18, 8
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblInfo").ForeColor = &H666666
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblInfo").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' === STATUS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblStat", "  Ready.", 20, 478, 520, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblStat").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H666666
    d.Controls("lblStat").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblStat").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' === FORM CODE ===
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- Initialize: load backups ---
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- RefreshList: populate ListBox ---
    c = c & "Private Sub RefreshList()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = Me.Controls(""lstBackups"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Backups""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  No Backups folder found.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fn As String: fn = Dir(bp & ""\*.xlsm"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cnt As Long, totalSz As Double: cnt = 0: totalSz = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Do While fn <> """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fp As String: fp = bp & ""\""  & fn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sz As Double: sz = FileLen(fp)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    totalSz = totalSz + sz" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.AddItem fn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 1) = Format(sz / 1024, ""#,##0"") & "" KB""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 2) = Format(FileDateTime(fp), ""dd/mm/yyyy hh:nn"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cnt = cnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    fn = Dir()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Loop" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  No backups found.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  "" & cnt & "" backup(s)  |  "" & Format(totalSz / 1048576, ""#,##0.0"") & "" MB total  |  Folder: "" & bp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- CREATE BACKUP ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCreate_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CrErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Creating backup...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nm As String: nm = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Sanitize name: remove invalid chars" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bad As Variant, b As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  bad = Array(""\"", ""/"", "":"", ""*"", ""?"", """""""", ""<"", "">"", ""|"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each b In bad: nm = Replace(nm, CStr(b), """"): Next b" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoBackup(nm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtName"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Backup created successfully!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CrErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10007) & "" Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- RESTORE ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnRestore_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""lstBackups"").ListIndex = -1 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Select a backup to restore.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFF6600: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selFile As String: selFile = Me.Controls(""lstBackups"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Tag = ""CONFIRM"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Caption = ChrW(8635) & "" RESTORE""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").BackColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Restoring from '"" & selFile & ""'...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0: Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Do restore" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bp As String: bp = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Backups\""  & selFile" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AutoBackup(""PreRestore"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.EnableEvents = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim bkWb As Workbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set bkWb = Workbooks.Open(bp, ReadOnly:=True, UpdateLinks:=0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If bkWb Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10007) & "" Cannot open backup file!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GoTo RstDone" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sheets As Variant: sheets = DataSheets()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim okCnt As Long, failCnt As Long, i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = LBound(sheets) To UBound(sheets)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim sn As String: sn = CStr(sheets(i))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim srcWs As Worksheet: Set srcWs = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim dstWs As Worksheet: Set dstWs = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Set srcWs = bkWb.Sheets(sn): Set dstWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If Not srcWs Is Nothing And Not dstWs Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If RestoreOneSheet(srcWs, dstWs) Then okCnt = okCnt + 1 Else failCnt = failCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: bkWb.Close SaveChanges:=False: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RstDone:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.EnableEvents = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AuditLog(""Restore"", ""Restored "" & okCnt & "" sheets from "" & selFile)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Restore complete: "" & okCnt & "" sheets restored"" & IIf(failCnt > 0, "", "" & failCnt & "" failed"", """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = IIf(failCnt > 0, &HFF6600, &H2E7D32)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call RefreshList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Tag = ""CONFIRM""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Caption = ""CONFIRM?""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").BackColor = &HFF6600" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  WARNING: Restore will OVERWRITE current data! Click CONFIRM to proceed.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFF6600" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- DELETE ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelete_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""lstBackups"").ListIndex = -1 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Select a backup to delete.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HFF6600: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selFile As String: selFile = Me.Controls(""lstBackups"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Tag = ""CONFIRM"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" DELETE""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").BackColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Kill ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Backups\""  & selFile" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AuditLog(""Backup"", ""Deleted backup: "" & selFile)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call RefreshList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Deleted: "" & selFile" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Tag = ""CONFIRM""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Caption = ""CONFIRM?""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").BackColor = &HFF6600" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Click CONFIRM to permanently delete '"" & selFile & ""'""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- ListBox click resets confirm buttons ---
    c = c & "Private Sub lstBackups_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Tag = """": Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").Caption = ChrW(8635) & "" RESTORE"": Me.Controls(""btnRestore"").BackColor = &H1565C0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Tag = """": Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").Caption = ChrW(10007) & "" DELETE"": Me.Controls(""btnDelete"").BackColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""lstBackups"").ListIndex >= 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Selected: "" & Me.Controls(""lstBackups"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H444444" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- REFRESH ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnRefresh_Click(): Call RefreshList: Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  List refreshed."": Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H666666: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- OPEN FOLDER ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnOpen_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bp As String: bp = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Backups""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: If Dir(bp, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir bp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Shell ""explorer.exe """" & bp, vbNormalFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- CLOSE ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Call UnhookMouseWheel: Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstBackups_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstBackups"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- DATA SUMMARY ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSummary_Click(): Call DataSummary: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- EXPORT CSV ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnExport_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Exporting all data to CSV...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0: Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ExportAllDataToCSV" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" CSV export complete!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- VERIFY BACKUP ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnVerify_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Verifying backup...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0: Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call VerifyBackup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Verification complete.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- AUTO-BACKUP (manual trigger) ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSchedule_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Running scheduled backup...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H1565C0: Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ScheduledBackup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshList" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Auto-backup check complete.""" & vbCrLf
