    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  MODULE: modReceipts – Receipt Generation & Printing Engine
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModReceipts()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modReceipts")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Const RCP_SHEET As String = ""_TmpReceipt""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' === Helper: Get student details from StudentID ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Function GetStudentInfo(sID As String, ByRef admNo As String, ByRef sName As String, ByRef cls As String) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSID).Value) = sID Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      admNo = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      sName = ws.Cells(i, cFN).Value & "" "" & ws.Cells(i, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cls = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      GetStudentInfo = True: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetStudentInfo = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' === Helper: Get all school info from settings ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub GetSchoolInfo(ByRef sN As String, ByRef sAddr As String, ByRef sPh As String, ByRef sEm As String, ByRef sMotto As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sN = ""MAGANA PRIMARY SCHOOL"": sAddr = """": sPh = """": sEm = """": sMotto = """" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SETT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim k As String: k = UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Select Case k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_NAME"": If Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)) <> """" Then sN = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_ADDRESS"": sAddr = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_PHONE"": sPh = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_EMAIL"": sEm = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case ""SCHOOL_MOTTO"": sMotto = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' === Helper: Get current term and year ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub GetTermYear(ByRef sTerm As String, ByRef sYear As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sTerm = """": sYear = """" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SETT)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim k As String: k = UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If k = ""CURRENT_TERM"" Then sTerm = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If k = ""CURRENT_YEAR"" Then sYear = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "' === Helper: Calculate student fee balance ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub GetStudentFeeBalance(sID As String, cls As String, ByRef totalDue As Double, ByRef totalPd As Double, ByRef outs As Double)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  totalDue = 0: totalPd = 0: outs = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fW As Worksheet: Set fW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long, cLvl As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To fW.Cells(fW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cLvl = Trim(CStr(fW.Cells(j, 4).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If cLvl = cls Or Left(cls, Len(cLvl)) = cLvl Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      totalDue = totalDue + CDbl(fW.Cells(j, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pW As Worksheet: Set pW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To pW.Cells(pW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(pW.Cells(j, 2).Value) = sID Then totalPd = totalPd + CDbl(pW.Cells(j, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  outs = totalDue - totalPd" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function BuildOneReceipt(ws As Worksheet, startRow As Long, colOff As Long, payRow As Long, Optional copyLbl As String = """") As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pW As Worksheet: Set pW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sID As String: sID = CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fType As String: fType = CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim amt As Double: amt = CDbl(pW.Cells(payRow, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mode As String: mode = CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 5).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rcpNo As String: rcpNo = CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pDate As String: pDate = CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 7).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim admNo As String, sName As String, cls As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GetStudentInfo(sID, admNo, sName, cls)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sn As String, sAddr As String, sPh As String, sEm As String, sMotto As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GetSchoolInfo(sn, sAddr, sPh, sEm, sMotto)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sTerm As String, sYear As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GetTermYear(sTerm, sYear)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim c1 As Long: c1 = colOff + 1: Dim c2 As Long: c2 = colOff + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim c3 As Long: c3 = colOff + 3: Dim c4 As Long: c4 = colOff + 4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long: r = startRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R1: School Name ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = UCase(sn)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.Cells(r, c1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Size = 13: .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Interior.Color = RGB(27, 94, 32): .Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 28: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Insert Logo on Receipt if available ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rpLogo As String: rpLogo = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If rpLogo <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim rpLP As String: rpLP = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & rpLogo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Dir(rpLP) <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Shapes.AddPicture rpLP, msoFalse, msoTrue, ws.Cells(startRow, c1).Left + 2, ws.Cells(startRow, c1).Top + 2, 24, 24" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R2: Address | Phone | Email ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim infoL As String: infoL = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sAddr <> """" Then infoL = sAddr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sPh <> """" Then: If infoL <> """" Then infoL = infoL & ""  |  "": infoL = infoL & ""Tel: "" & sPh" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sEm <> """" Then: If infoL <> """" Then infoL = infoL & ""  |  "": infoL = infoL & sEm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = infoL" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.Cells(r, c1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Size = 7: .Font.Name = ""Segoe UI"": .WrapText = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Interior.Color = RGB(27, 94, 32): .Font.Color = RGB(230, 230, 230)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R3: FEE PAYMENT RECEIPT banner ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim banTxt As String: banTxt = ChrW(9632) & ""  FEE PAYMENT RECEIPT  "" & ChrW(9632)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If copyLbl <> """" Then banTxt = banTxt & ""   ["" & copyLbl & ""]""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = banTxt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.Cells(r, c1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Size = 10: .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Interior.Color = RGB(212, 165, 55): .Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 20: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R4: Receipt No + Date ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""Receipt No:"": ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = rcpNo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = ""Date:"": ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = pDate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c2).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Interior.Color = RGB(245, 245, 245)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R5: Student Name ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""Student Name:"": ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c2), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = sName: ws.Cells(r, c2).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c2).Font.Size = 10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R6: Adm No + Class + Term + Year ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""Adm No:"": ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = admNo" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = ""Class:"": ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = cls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- R7: Term/Year ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""Term:"": ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = sTerm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = ""Mode:"": ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = mode" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' === FEE BREAKDOWN TABLE ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Header Row ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""Fee Type"": ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = ""Amount (KSh)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = ""Paid"": ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = ""Balance""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Size = 8: .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Interior.Color = RGB(31, 56, 100): .Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 16: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Fee Data Rows: iterate all fee types for this student's class ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fW As Worksheet: Set fW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_FeeStructure"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fWpay As Worksheet: Set fWpay = pW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long, fCnt As Long: fCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gDue As Double, gPaid As Double, gBal As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  gDue = 0: gPaid = 0: gBal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For k = 2 To fW.Cells(fW.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fCls As String: fCls = UCase(Trim(CStr(fW.Cells(k, 4).Value)))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If fCls = UCase(cls) Or fCls = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim ft As String: ft = CStr(fW.Cells(k, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim fAmt As Double: fAmt = CDbl(fW.Cells(k, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Sum all payments for this student + fee type" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim fPd As Double: fPd = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim p As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For p = 2 To fWpay.Cells(fWpay.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If CStr(fWpay.Cells(p, 2).Value) = sID And CStr(fWpay.Cells(p, 3).Value) = ft Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          If IsNumeric(fWpay.Cells(p, 4).Value) Then fPd = fPd + CDbl(fWpay.Cells(p, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next p" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim fBal As Double: fBal = fAmt - fPd: If fBal < 0 Then fBal = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Write row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim marker As String: marker = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If ft = fType Then marker = ChrW(9654) & "" """ & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = marker & ft" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = Format(fAmt, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = Format(fPd, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = Format(fBal, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c2).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c3).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c4).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Size = 8: ws.Cells(r, c2).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Size = 8: ws.Cells(r, c4).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Highlight current payment row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If ft = fType Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c2).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Interior.Color = RGB(232, 245, 233)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ElseIf fCnt Mod 2 = 1 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Interior.Color = RGB(248, 248, 248)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Color balance" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If fBal > 0 Then ws.Cells(r, c4).Font.Color = RGB(198, 40, 40)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If fBal = 0 Then ws.Cells(r, c4).Font.Color = RGB(46, 125, 50): ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = ""PAID""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      gDue = gDue + fAmt: gPaid = gPaid + fPd: gBal = gBal + fBal" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      fCnt = fCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 14: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- TOTALS ROW ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""TOTALS"": ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = Format(gDue, ""#,##0""): ws.Cells(r, c2).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = Format(gPaid, ""#,##0""): ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = Format(gBal, ""#,##0""): ws.Cells(r, c4).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c2).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight: ws.Cells(r, c3).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight: ws.Cells(r, c4).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Interior.Color = RGB(200, 230, 201)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Font.Size = 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gBal > 0 Then ws.Cells(r, c4).Font.Color = RGB(198, 40, 40)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If gBal <= 0 Then ws.Cells(r, c4).Font.Color = RGB(46, 125, 50)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Borders(xlEdgeTop).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- This Payment Row (highlight) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c2)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""THIS PAYMENT:"": ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c3), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = ""KSh "" & Format(amt, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Size = 11" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Interior.Color = RGB(255, 249, 196)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 20: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Received by + Signature ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""Received by:"": ws.Cells(r, c2).Value = ""_______________""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c3).Value = ""Sign/Stamp:"": ws.Cells(r, c4).Value = ""_______________""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Bold = True: ws.Cells(r, c3).Font.Bold = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 18: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Footer ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r, c1), ws.Cells(r, c4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Value = ""This is a computer-generated receipt. Keep for your records.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Size = 7: ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Italic = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, c1).Font.Color = RGB(130, 130, 130): ws.Cells(r, c1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(r).RowHeight = 12: r = r + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Professional borders ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rng As Range: Set rng = ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow, c1), ws.Cells(r - 1, c4))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rng.Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous: rng.Borders.Weight = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rng.Borders.Color = RGB(80, 80, 80)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rng.Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Medium outer borders" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow, c1), ws.Cells(startRow, c4)).Borders(xlEdgeTop).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(r - 1, c1), ws.Cells(r - 1, c4)).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow, c1), ws.Cells(r - 1, c1)).Borders(xlEdgeLeft).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow, c4), ws.Cells(r - 1, c4)).Borders(xlEdgeRight).Weight = xlMedium" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  BuildOneReceipt = r - startRow   ' Return rows used" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- CleanupReceiptSheet: hides temp sheet, returns to Dashboard ---
    c = c & "' === CleanupReceiptSheet: always call after printing ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub CleanupReceiptSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(RCP_SHEET)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ws Is Nothing Then ws.Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dWs As Worksheet: Set dWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""Dashboard"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not dWs Is Nothing Then dWs.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.EnableEvents = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.StatusBar = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- PrepareReceiptSheet: creates or cleans the temp sheet ---
    c = c & "' === PrepareReceiptSheet: get clean temp sheet ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Function PrepareReceiptSheet() As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(RCP_SHEET): On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.DisplayAlerts = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Count))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Name = RCP_SHEET" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.DisplayAlerts = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": ws.Unprotect: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Visible = xlSheetVisible" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells.ClearContents: ws.Cells.ClearFormats" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: ws.Cells.UnMerge: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set PrepareReceiptSheet = ws" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf
    ' --- GenerateSingleReceipt: PDF-first, dual copy (School+Parent) ---
    c = c & "' === GenerateSingleReceipt: professional dual-copy PDF receipt ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateSingleReceipt(payRow As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RcpErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If payRow < 2 Then MsgBox ""No valid payment row to print."", vbExclamation, ""Receipt"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pW As Worksheet: Set pW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 1).Value)) = """" Then MsgBox ""Payment row "" & payRow & "" is empty."", vbExclamation, ""Receipt"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = PrepareReceiptSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""A"").ColumnWidth = 18: ws.Columns(""B"").ColumnWidth = 32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Columns(""C"").ColumnWidth = 16: ws.Columns(""D"").ColumnWidth = 30" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Build SCHOOL COPY (dynamic row count) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rcpRows As Long: rcpRows = BuildOneReceipt(ws, 1, 0, payRow, ""SCHOOL COPY"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cutRow As Long: cutRow = rcpRows + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Cut line ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(cutRow, 1), ws.Cells(cutRow, 4)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).Value = ChrW(9986) & ""  CUT HERE  "" & ChrW(9986)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).VerticalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).Font.Color = RGB(160, 160, 160): ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).Font.Size = 8" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).Font.Italic = True: ws.Cells(cutRow, 1).Font.Name = ""Segoe UI""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(cutRow).RowHeight = 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(cutRow, 1), ws.Cells(cutRow, 4)).Borders(xlEdgeTop).LineStyle = xlDash" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(cutRow, 1), ws.Cells(cutRow, 4)).Borders(xlEdgeTop).Color = RGB(130, 130, 130)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(cutRow, 1), ws.Cells(cutRow, 4)).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlDash" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Range(ws.Cells(cutRow, 1), ws.Cells(cutRow, 4)).Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Color = RGB(130, 130, 130)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Build PARENT COPY ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim parentStart As Long: parentStart = cutRow + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rcpRows2 As Long: rcpRows2 = BuildOneReceipt(ws, parentStart, 0, payRow, ""PARENT COPY"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lastPrintRow As Long: lastPrintRow = parentStart + rcpRows2 - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.PageSetup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PaperSize = xlPaperA4: .Orientation = xlPortrait" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesWide = 1: .FitToPagesTall = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .TopMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .BottomMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .RightMargin = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Zoom = False: .PrintArea = ""A1:D"" & lastPrintRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' --- Try PDF export first ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rcpNo As String: rcpNo = CStr(pW.Cells(payRow, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pdfDir As String: pdfDir = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Receipts""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: If Dir(pdfDir, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir pdfDir" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RcpErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pdfPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  pdfPath = pdfDir & ""\"" & rcpNo & ""_"" & Format(Now, ""yyyymmdd_hhnnss"") & "".pdf""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.ExportAsFixedFormat xlTypePDF, pdfPath, xlQualityStandard, , , , , False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pdfOK As Boolean: pdfOK = (Err.Number = 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo RcpErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If pdfOK Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call CleanupReceiptSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Shell ""explorer.exe """""" & pdfPath & """""", vbNormalFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Receipt saved as PDF:"" & vbLf & vbLf & pdfPath & vbLf & vbLf & ""The receipt has been opened for viewing/printing."", vbInformation, ""Receipt Ready""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Visible = xlSheetVisible: ws.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.Dialogs(xlDialogPrint).Show" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call CleanupReceiptSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "RcpErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CleanupReceiptSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Receipt Error (Row "" & payRow & ""): "" & Err.Description & vbLf & ""Error "" & Err.Number, vbCritical, ""Receipt Print Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- GenerateBulkReceipts: 4-up on A4 Landscape, EXACT mm layout per diagram ---
    '   A4 Landscape 297x210mm
    '   Margins: Left=15mm, Right=15mm, Top=15mm, Bottom=15mm
    '   Each receipt: 128.5mm x 85mm
    '   Horizontal gap (between left & right receipt): 10mm
    '   Vertical gap (between top & bottom receipt): 10mm
    '   Total width:  15 + 128.5 + 10 + 128.5 + 15 = 297mm ✓
    '   Total height: 15 + 85   + 10 + 85   + 15 = 210mm ✓
    '   Column layout (9 cols):
    '     Col A-D = left receipt  (128.5mm split: 32+42+26+28.5)
    '     Col E   = 10mm H-gap
    '     Col F-I = right receipt (128.5mm split: 32+42+26+28.5)
    '   Row layout per page (29 rows):
    '     Rows 1-14  = top receipt pair (85mm total)
    '     Row  15    = 10mm V-gap
    '     Rows 16-29 = bottom receipt pair (85mm total)
    c = c & "' === GenerateBulkReceipts: 4 receipts per A4 Landscape page, exact diagram layout ===" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Public Sub GenerateBulkReceipts(payRows() As Long, cnt As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo BulkErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cnt = 0 Then MsgBox ""No receipts selected."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = PrepareReceiptSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== COLUMN WIDTHS (mm → Excel chars) ==================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' 1 pt = 1/72 inch. Excel ColumnWidth in 'normal font chars'." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' At default Calibri 11, 1 char ≈ 7.5 pts (including border pixel)." & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' We use Application.CentimetersToPoints then divide by 7.5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Diagram widths (mm): col1=32, col2=42, col3=26, col4=28.5, gapCol=10, (mirror right)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Const MM_PT As Double = 2.8346   ' 1mm = 72/25.4 pts" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Const CHR_PT As Double = 7.5      ' 1 Excel char unit ≈ 7.5 pts (Calibri 11 default)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim wMM(1 To 9) As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(1) = 32       ' Col A: label column (left receipt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(2) = 42       ' Col B: value column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(3) = 26       ' Col C: label2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(4) = 28.5     ' Col D: value2  → total 32+42+26+28.5=128.5mm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(5) = 10       ' Col E: 10mm horizontal gap" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(6) = 32       ' Col F (mirrors A)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(7) = 42       ' Col G (mirrors B)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(8) = 26       ' Col H (mirrors C)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  wMM(9) = 28.5     ' Col I (mirrors D)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ci As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For ci = 1 To 9" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Columns(ci).ColumnWidth = (wMM(ci) * MM_PT) / CHR_PT" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ci" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== ROW HEIGHTS: 14 rows per receipt totalling 85mm = 240.94pts ========" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Raw proportional heights (pts) – will be scaled to hit exactly 85mm:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  R1 =SchoolHdr 28, R2=Banner 22, R3=RcpDate 20, R4=Div  5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  R5 =StudName 20, R6=AdmCls  20, R7=Div    5, R8=PayHdr 18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  R9 =PayData  18, R10=Total  22, R11=Div   5, R12=RecvBy 20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '  R13=Signature 20, R14=Footer 10   => raw sum = 233" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rh(1 To 14) As Double" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rh(1)=28: rh(2)=22: rh(3)=20: rh(4)=5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rh(5)=20: rh(6)=20: rh(7)=5:  rh(8)=18" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rh(9)=18: rh(10)=22: rh(11)=5: rh(12)=20" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  rh(13)=20: rh(14)=10" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rawSum As Double: rawSum = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ri As Long: For ri=1 To 14: rawSum=rawSum+rh(ri): Next ri" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rcpHtPt As Double: rcpHtPt = 85 * MM_PT   ' = 240.94 pts" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sc As Double: sc = rcpHtPt / rawSum" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For ri = 1 To 14: rh(ri) = rh(ri) * sc: Next ri" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== LAYOUT CONSTANTS ===================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ROWS_PER  As Long: ROWS_PER  = 14" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim GAP_COL   As Long: GAP_COL   = 5          ' column E" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gapRowHt  As Double: gapRowHt = 10 * MM_PT ' 10mm V-gap row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' STRIDE = receipt rows + 1 gap row + receipt rows (=29 rows per page)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim STRIDE    As Long: STRIDE    = ROWS_PER + 1 + ROWS_PER" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' colOff for left receipt = 0 (cols 1-4), right receipt = 5 (cols 6-9)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== BUILD EACH RECEIPT =================================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pageNum As Long: pageNum = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, pos As Long, bRow As Long, bCol As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    pos = (i - 1) Mod 4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If pos = 0 Then pageNum = pageNum + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pgBase As Long: pgBase = (pageNum - 1) * STRIDE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' pos=0 top-left, pos=1 top-right, pos=2 bot-left, pos=3 bot-right" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Select Case pos" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case 0: bRow = pgBase + 1             : bCol = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case 1: bRow = pgBase + 1             : bCol = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case 2: bRow = pgBase + ROWS_PER + 2 : bCol = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Case 3: bRow = pgBase + ROWS_PER + 2 : bCol = 5" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End Select" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Draw receipt content" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call BuildOneReceipt(ws, bRow, bCol, payRows(i))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Set row heights for this receipt block" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For ri = 1 To ROWS_PER" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Rows(bRow + ri - 1).RowHeight = rh(ri)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next ri" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== GAP GUIDES (cut lines) ============================================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lastRow As Long: lastRow = pageNum * STRIDE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pn As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For pn = 1 To pageNum" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim pgB As Long: pgB = (pn - 1) * STRIDE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    '--- Horizontal gap row (10mm) between top and bottom receipt pair ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim hGapRow As Long: hGapRow = pgB + ROWS_PER + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Rows(hGapRow).RowHeight = gapRowHt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: ws.Range(ws.Cells(hGapRow,1), ws.Cells(hGapRow,9)).UnMerge: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Range(ws.Cells(hGapRow,1), ws.Cells(hGapRow,9)).Merge" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(hGapRow,1), ws.Cells(hGapRow,9))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Interior.Color = RGB(248, 248, 248)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeTop).LineStyle    = xlDash" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeTop).Color         = RGB(130, 130, 130)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeTop).Weight        = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle  = xlDash" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Color      = RGB(130, 130, 130)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeBottom).Weight     = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hGapRow, 1).Value               = ChrW(9986) & ""  CUT HERE  "" & ChrW(9986)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hGapRow, 1).HorizontalAlignment  = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hGapRow, 1).VerticalAlignment    = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hGapRow, 1).Font.Color           = RGB(160, 160, 160)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hGapRow, 1).Font.Size            = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(hGapRow, 1).Font.Italic          = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    '--- Vertical gap column E (10mm) across full page height ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim vTop As Long: vTop = pgB + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim vBot As Long: vBot = pgB + STRIDE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(vTop, GAP_COL), ws.Cells(vBot, GAP_COL))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Interior.Color            = RGB(248, 248, 248)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeLeft).LineStyle  = xlDash" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeLeft).Color       = RGB(130, 130, 130)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeLeft).Weight      = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeRight).LineStyle  = xlDash" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeRight).Color      = RGB(130, 130, 130)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .Borders(xlEdgeRight).Weight     = xlThin" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim midVRow As Long: midVRow = pgB + Int(STRIDE / 2) + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).Value              = ChrW(9986) & ""  CUT  "" & ChrW(9986)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).Orientation         = 90" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).VerticalAlignment   = xlCenter" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).Font.Color           = RGB(160, 160, 160)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).Font.Size            = 7" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(midVRow, GAP_COL).Font.Italic          = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next pn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== PAGE SETUP: exact 15mm margins, Landscape A4, 1 page wide =========" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With ws.PageSetup" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PaperSize          = xlPaperA4" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Orientation        = xlLandscape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Zoom               = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesWide     = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FitToPagesTall     = pageNum" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .TopMargin          = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .BottomMargin       = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .LeftMargin         = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .RightMargin        = Application.CentimetersToPoints(1.5)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .HeaderMargin       = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .FooterMargin       = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterHorizontally = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .CenterVertically   = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .PrintArea          = ""A1:I"" & lastRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  '=== EXPORT AS PDF (open in default viewer) ==============================" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pdfDir As String: pdfDir = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\Receipts""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: If Dir(pdfDir, vbDirectory) = """" Then MkDir pdfDir" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo BulkErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pdfPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  pdfPath = pdfDir & ""\BulkReceipts_"" & Format(Now, ""yyyymmdd_hhnnss"") & "".pdf""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.ExportAsFixedFormat xlTypePDF, pdfPath, xlQualityStandard, , , , , False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pdfOK As Boolean: pdfOK = (Err.Number = 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo BulkErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If pdfOK Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call CleanupReceiptSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Shell ""explorer.exe """""" & pdfPath & """""""", vbNormalFocus" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox cnt & "" receipt(s) saved as PDF ("" & pageNum & "" A4 page(s), 4-up landscape)."" & vbLf & vbLf & pdfPath & vbLf & vbLf & ""PDF opened. Cut along the dashed lines."", vbInformation, ""Bulk Receipts Ready""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Visible = xlSheetVisible: ws.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Application.Dialogs(xlDialogPrint).Show" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call CleanupReceiptSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "BulkErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Application.ScreenUpdating = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CleanupReceiptSheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Bulk Print Error: "" & Err.Description & vbLf & ""(Err "" & Err.Number & "")"", vbCritical, ""Bulk Receipts""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmFeeReceipt – Receipt History & Bulk Print Manager
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateFeeReceiptForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmFeeReceipt", "Fee Receipt Manager", 680, 490)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER ===
    AL d, "lblH", "FEE RECEIPT MANAGER", 0, 0, 680, 36, 13
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblH").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblH").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("lblH").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblH").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 36, 680, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "lblSub", "View payment history, print individual or bulk receipts (4-up per A4 page)", 0, 42, 680, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblSub").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblSub").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblSub").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === FILTER ROW ===
    AL d, "lblFlt", "  FILTER", 20, 62, 640, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblFlt").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblFlt").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblFlt").BackColor = &H1565C0
    
    AL d, "lblDFr", "From:", 20, 86, 35, 16, 9
    AT d, "txtFrom", 58, 84, 90
    AL d, "lblDTo", "To:", 158, 86, 20, 16, 9
    AT d, "txtTo", 182, 84, 90
    AL d, "lblAdmF", "Adm No:", 286, 86, 50, 16, 9
    AT d, "txtFAdm", 340, 84, 90
    AB d, "btnFilter", ChrW(9654) & " FILTER", 446, 82, 90, 24, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnFilter").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnShowAll", "SHOW ALL", 546, 82, 90, 24, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnShowAll").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === COLUMN HEADERS ===
    AL d, "hSel", "#", 20, 114, 28, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hSel").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hSel").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hSel").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("hSel").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "hRcp", "Receipt No", 49, 114, 100, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hRcp").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hRcp").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hRcp").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    AL d, "hName", "Student", 150, 114, 150, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hName").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hName").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hName").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    AL d, "hAmt", "Amount", 301, 114, 80, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hAmt").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hAmt").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hAmt").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    AL d, "hType", "Fee Type", 382, 114, 90, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hType").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hType").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hType").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    AL d, "hDt", "Date", 473, 114, 80, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hDt").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hDt").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hDt").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    AL d, "hMode", "Mode", 554, 114, 106, 16, 8
    d.Controls("hMode").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("hMode").BackColor = &H5A3416: d.Controls("hMode").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === LISTBOX (multi-select) ===
    Dim lst As Object: Set lst = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstPay")
    lst.Left = 20: lst.Top = 130: lst.Width = 640: lst.Height = 240
    lst.Font.Size = 9: lst.Font.Name = "Consolas"
    lst.ColumnCount = 7: lst.ColumnWidths = "28;100;150;80;90;80;80"
    lst.MultiSelect = 1  ' fmMultiSelectMulti
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnPrintOne", ChrW(9113) & " PRINT SELECTED", 20, 380, 155, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnPrintOne").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnBulk", ChrW(9114) & " BULK PRINT (4-UP)", 185, 380, 170, 30, &H6A1B9A, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnBulk").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnSelectAll", "SELECT ALL", 365, 380, 100, 30, &HFF6F00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnSelectAll").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnDeselectAll", "DESELECT ALL", 475, 380, 100, 30, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDeselectAll").Font.Size = 9
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE", 585, 380, 75, 30, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === INFO & STATUS ===
    AL d, "lblInfo", "  0 payments loaded  |  0 selected", 20, 420, 640, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblInfo").ForeColor = &H666666
    d.Controls("lblInfo").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblInfo").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblStat", "  Ready.", 20, 440, 640, 20, 9
    d.Controls("lblStat").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblStat").ForeColor = &H666666
    d.Controls("lblStat").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblStat").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' === FORM CODE ===
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mPayRows() As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mPayCount As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFrom"").Value = Format(DateAdd(""m"", -1, Date), ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtTo"").Value = Format(Date, ""dd/mm/yyyy"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadPayments("""")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub LoadPayments(admFilter As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = Me.Controls(""lstPay"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Clear: mPayCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_PAY)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sW As Worksheet: Set sW = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  No payments found."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim mPayRows(1 To lr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, j As Long, cnt As Long: cnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = lr To 2 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sID As String: sID = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim admNo As String: admNo = """": Dim sName As String: sName = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 2 To sW.Cells(sW.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If CStr(sW.Cells(j, cSID).Value) = sID Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        admNo = CStr(sW.Cells(j, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        sName = sW.Cells(j, cFN).Value & "" "" & sW.Cells(j, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If admFilter <> """" And admNo <> admFilter Then GoTo SkipRow2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cnt = cnt + 1: mPayRows(cnt) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.AddItem cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 1) = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 6).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 2) = sName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 3) = Format(CDbl(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value), ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 4) = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 5) = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 7).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 6) = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 5).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "SkipRow2:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mPayCount = cnt" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  "" & cnt & "" payment(s) loaded  |  0 selected""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnFilter_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadPayments(Trim(Me.Controls(""txtFAdm"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnShowAll_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtFAdm"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadPayments("""")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstPay_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selCnt As Long: selCnt = 0: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To Me.Controls(""lstPay"").ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Me.Controls(""lstPay"").Selected(i) Then selCnt = selCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblInfo"").Caption = ""  "" & mPayCount & "" payment(s) loaded  |  "" & selCnt & "" selected""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSelectAll_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To Me.Controls(""lstPay"").ListCount - 1: Me.Controls(""lstPay"").Selected(i) = True: Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call lstPay_Click" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDeselectAll_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To Me.Controls(""lstPay"").ListCount - 1: Me.Controls(""lstPay"").Selected(i) = False: Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call lstPay_Click" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Print Selected (single) ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnPrintOne_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selIdx As Long: selIdx = -1: Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To Me.Controls(""lstPay"").ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Me.Controls(""lstPay"").Selected(i) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If selIdx >= 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        MsgBox ""For single print, select only ONE receipt."" & vbLf & ""Use BULK PRINT for multiple."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      selIdx = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If selIdx = -1 Then MsgBox ""Select a receipt to print."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = CLng(Me.Controls(""lstPay"").List(selIdx, 0))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Generating receipt..."": Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim payR As Long: payR = mPayRows(idx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Hide" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateSingleReceipt(payR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Receipt generated.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Bulk Print (4-up) ---
    c = c & "Private Sub btnBulk_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selRows() As Long, selCnt As Long: selCnt = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim selRows(1 To mPayCount)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 0 To Me.Controls(""lstPay"").ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Me.Controls(""lstPay"").Selected(i) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      selCnt = selCnt + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim idx As Long: idx = CLng(Me.Controls(""lstPay"").List(i, 0))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      selRows(selCnt) = mPayRows(idx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If selCnt = 0 Then MsgBox ""Select receipts to print in bulk."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  Generating "" & selCnt & "" receipts (4 per A4)..."": Me.Repaint" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Hide" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call GenerateBulkReceipts(selRows, selCnt)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Show vbModeless" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblStat"").Caption = ""  "" & ChrW(10003) & "" "" & selCnt & "" receipts generated ("" & Int((selCnt + 3) / 4) & "" page(s)).""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Call UnhookMouseWheel: Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstPay_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstPay"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' -----------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmImportRoll – Professional Import Wizard
' -----------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateImportRollForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmImportRoll", "Import Nominal Roll", 420, 510)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblHdr", "IMPORT NOMINAL ROLL", 0, 0, 420, 32, 12
    d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblHdr").BackColor = &HFF6F00
    d.Controls("lblHdr").TextAlign = 2
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 32, 420, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""
    
    ' === STEP 1: FILE SELECTION ===
    AL d, "lblStep1", "  1. SELECT FILE", 20, 42, 380, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblStep1").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblStep1").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblStep1").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblStep1").BackColor = &H1F3864
    
    AL d, "lblFile", "  No file selected.", 20, 62, 275, 20, 8
    d.Controls("lblFile").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblFile").ForeColor = &H999999
    d.Controls("lblFile").BackColor = &HF6F8FA: d.Controls("lblFile").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblFile").BorderColor = &HD0D0D0
    
    AB d, "btnBrowse", ChrW(9654) & " BROWSE", 305, 60, 95, 22, &HFF6F00, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnBrowse").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnBrowse").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' === Sheet selector ===
    AL d, "lblSh", "Sheet:", 20, 88, 40, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblSh").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSh").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AC d, "cmbSheet", 65, 86, 150
    d.Controls("cmbSheet").Font.Size = 8
    
    AL d, "lblRows", "", 230, 88, 170, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblRows").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblRows").ForeColor = &H666666
    
    ' === STEP 2: COLUMN MAPPING ===
    AL d, "lblStep2", "  2. DETECTED COLUMNS", 20, 112, 380, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblStep2").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblStep2").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblStep2").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblStep2").BackColor = &H5A3416
    
    AL d, "lblCols", "  Select a file to see column mappings.", 20, 132, 380, 70, 8
    d.Controls("lblCols").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblCols").ForeColor = &H555555
    d.Controls("lblCols").BackColor = &HFDF5EF: d.Controls("lblCols").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblCols").BorderColor = &HE0D0C0: d.Controls("lblCols").WordWrap = True
    
    ' === STEP 3: DATA PREVIEW ===
    AL d, "lblPrevHdr", "  3. DATA PREVIEW", 20, 208, 380, 18, 9
    d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblPrevHdr").BackColor = &H2E7D32
    
    AL d, "lblPreview", "  Preview will appear after file scan.", 20, 228, 380, 80, 7
    d.Controls("lblPreview").Font.Name = "Consolas": d.Controls("lblPreview").ForeColor = &H444444
    d.Controls("lblPreview").BackColor = &HF5F9F5: d.Controls("lblPreview").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblPreview").BorderColor = &HC0D0C0: d.Controls("lblPreview").WordWrap = True
    
    ' === PROGRESS BAR ===
    AL d, "lblBarBg", "", 20, 318, 380, 12
    d.Controls("lblBarBg").BackColor = &HE0E0E0: d.Controls("lblBarBg").Caption = ""
    d.Controls("lblBarBg").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblBarBg").BorderColor = &HD0D0D0
    
    AL d, "lblBar", "", 20, 318, 0, 12
    d.Controls("lblBar").BackColor = &H2E7D32: d.Controls("lblBar").Caption = ""
    
    AL d, "lblProgress", "", 20, 334, 380, 16, 8
    d.Controls("lblProgress").Font.Name = "Segoe UI": d.Controls("lblProgress").ForeColor = &H888888
    d.Controls("lblProgress").Font.Italic = True
    
    ' === ACTION BUTTONS ===
    AB d, "btnTemplate", ChrW(9783) & " DOWNLOAD TEMPLATE", 20, 358, 175, 28, &H1565C0, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnTemplate").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnTemplate").Font.Bold = True
    
    AB d, "btnImport", ChrW(10548) & " IMPORT NOW", 20, 392, 175, 32, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnImport").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("btnImport").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("btnImport").Enabled = False
    
    AB d, "btnCancel", "CANCEL", 305, 392, 95, 32, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCancel").Font.Size = 9
    
    ' === FOOTER ===
    AL d, "lblFoot", "  Supported: .xlsx .xls .xlsm  |  Row 1 must contain headers", 20, 434, 380, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblFoot").ForeColor = &HAAAAAA: d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Italic = True
    d.Controls("lblFoot").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    AL d, "lblFoot2", "  Auto-detects: Name, Adm No, Gender, Class, DOB, Parent, Phone, UPI, Birth Cert", 20, 450, 380, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblFoot2").ForeColor = &HAAAAAA: d.Controls("lblFoot2").Font.Italic = True
    d.Controls("lblFoot2").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Form Code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mPath As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mSheetIdx As Long" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- Initialize ----
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mPath = """": mSheetIdx = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- Browse Button ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnBrowse_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fd As FileDialog: Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Title = ""Select Nominal Roll Excel File"": fd.Filters.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Filters.Add ""Excel Files"", ""*.xlsx;*.xls;*.xlsm""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.AllowMultiSelect = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fd.Show <> -1 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mPath = fd.SelectedItems(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblFile"").Caption = ""  "" & Mid(mPath, InStrRev(mPath, ""\"") + 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblFile"").ForeColor = &H222222" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").Caption = ""  Scanning file...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  DoEvents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ScanFile(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- Sheet Change ----
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbSheet_Change()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mPath = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mSheetIdx = Me.Controls(""cmbSheet"").ListIndex + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mSheetIdx < 1 Then mSheetIdx = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ScanFile(mSheetIdx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- ScanFile: invoke ScanSourceFile and update UI ----
    c = c & "Private Sub ScanFile(shIdx As Long)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mSheetIdx = shIdx" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim info As Object: Set info = ScanSourceFile(mPath, shIdx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If info.Exists(""error"") Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblCols"").Caption = ""  Error: "" & info(""error"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnImport"").Enabled = False: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Populate sheet selector (only on first scan) ---
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""cmbSheet"").ListCount = 0 And info(""sheets"") > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sNames() As String: sNames = Split(info(""sheetNames""), ""|"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim si As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For si = 0 To UBound(sNames)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If sNames(si) <> """" Then Me.Controls(""cmbSheet"").AddItem sNames(si)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next si" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Me.Controls(""cmbSheet"").ListCount > 0 Then Me.Controls(""cmbSheet"").ListIndex = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Show row count ---
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblRows"").Caption = info(""rows"") & "" data rows, "" & info(""cols"") & "" columns""" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Build column mapping display ---
    c = c & "  Dim mStr As String: mStr = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdrs() As String: hdrs = Split(info(""headers""), ""|"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fn As String: fn = ""--"": If info(""colFN"") > 0 Then fn = hdrs(info(""colFN"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ln2 As String: ln2 = ""--"": If info(""colLN"") > 0 Then ln2 = hdrs(info(""colLN"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ad As String: ad = ""(Auto)"": If info(""colAdm"") > 0 Then ad = hdrs(info(""colAdm"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gn As String: gn = ""--"": If info(""colGen"") > 0 Then gn = hdrs(info(""colGen"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cl As String: cl = ""--"": If info(""colCls"") > 0 Then cl = hdrs(info(""colCls"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim db As String: db = ""--"": If info(""colDOB"") > 0 Then db = hdrs(info(""colDOB"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim gu As String: gu = ""--"": If info(""colGuard"") > 0 Then gu = hdrs(info(""colGuard"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ph As String: ph = ""--"": If info(""colPhone"") > 0 Then ph = hdrs(info(""colPhone"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim up As String: up = ""--"": If info(""colUPI"") > 0 Then up = hdrs(info(""colUPI"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bc As String: bc = ""--"": If info(""colBC"") > 0 Then bc = hdrs(info(""colBC"") - 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStr = ""  Surname "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & fn & ""    Other Names "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & ln2 & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStr = mStr & ""  Adm No "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & ad & ""    Gender "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & gn & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStr = mStr & ""  Class "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & cl & ""    DOB "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & db & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStr = mStr & ""  Parent "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & gu & ""    Phone "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & ph & vbLf" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStr = mStr & ""  UPI "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & up & ""    Birth Cert "" & ChrW(8594) & "" "" & bc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblCols"").Caption = mStr" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Show preview ---
    c = c & "  Dim prev As String: prev = info(""preview"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If prev = """" Then prev = ""  (No data rows found)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblPreview"").Caption = prev" & vbCrLf
    ' --- Enable import if name column detected ---
    c = c & "  If info(""colFN"") > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnImport"").Enabled = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").Caption = ""  Ready to import "" & info(""rows"") & "" rows.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").ForeColor = &H2E7D32" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""btnImport"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").Caption = ""  No Name column found. Check file headers.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").ForeColor = &HC62828" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblBar"").Width = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- Import Button ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnImport_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mPath = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ans As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ans = MsgBox(""Import students from this file?"" & vbLf & vbLf & mPath, vbYesNo + vbQuestion, ""Confirm Import"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans <> vbYes Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnImport"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""btnBrowse"").Enabled = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").Caption = ""  Starting import...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblProgress"").ForeColor = &HFF6F00" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  DoEvents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RunImport(mPath, mSheetIdx, Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' ---- Template Button ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnTemplate_Click(): Call GenerateImportTemplate: End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    ' ---- Cancel ----
    c = c & "Private Sub btnCancel_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  MODULE: modDatabase  (Database Browser backend)
' =============================================================
Private Sub CreateModDatabase()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modDatabase")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    
    ' --- Module-level cache ---
    c = c & "Private mData()   As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mHeaders() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mColCount As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mRowCount As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mFilterIdx() As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mFilterCount As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mTableName As String" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  InitDbForm
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub InitDbForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fra As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set fra = frm.Controls(""fraData"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lstTables"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each ws In ThisWorkbook.Sheets" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Left(ws.Name, 3) = ""DB_"" Or ws.Name = ""Setup_Grades"" Or ws.Name = ""DB_Promotions"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lstTables"").AddItem ws.Name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ws" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mTableName = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mColCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mRowCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mFilterCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.Controls(""lstHeaders"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.Controls(""lstData"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.ScrollLeft = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.ScrollWidth = fra.Width" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Ready - select a table.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  FilterTableList
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub FilterTableList(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srch As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  srch = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtTblSearch"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If srch = ""Filter tables..."" Then srch = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lstTables"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each ws In ThisWorkbook.Sheets" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Left(ws.Name, 3) = ""DB_"" Or ws.Name = ""Setup_Grades"" Or ws.Name = ""DB_Promotions"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If srch = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""lstTables"").AddItem ws.Name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ElseIf InStr(1, ws.Name, srch, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        frm.Controls(""lstTables"").AddItem ws.Name" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next ws" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  LoadTable  (cell-by-cell for reliability)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadTable(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo LdErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim clr As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dr As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cw As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colW As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim totalW As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fraW As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdrText As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim v As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fra As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lstH As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstTables"").ListIndex < 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mTableName = frm.Controls(""lstTables"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Len(Trim(mTableName)) = 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Loading "" & mTableName & ""...""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  DoEvents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(mTableName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lc < 1 Then lc = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lc > 17 Then lc = 17" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For cc = 1 To lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    clr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cc).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If clr > lr Then lr = clr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next cc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mColCount = lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim mHeaders(1 To lc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 1 To lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mHeaders(j) = CStr(ws.Cells(1, j).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set fra = frm.Controls(""fraData"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set lst = fra.Controls(""lstData"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set lstH = fra.Controls(""lstHeaders"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fraW = CLng(fra.Width)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  colW = 110" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  totalW = colW * lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If totalW < fraW Then totalW = fraW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  cw = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 1 To lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If j > 1 Then cw = cw & "";"" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cw = cw & colW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lstH.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lstH.ColumnCount = lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lstH.Width = totalW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lstH.ColumnWidths = cw" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lstH.AddItem mHeaders(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 2 To lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lstH.List(0, j - 1) = mHeaders(j)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.ColumnCount = lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Width = totalW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.ScrollLeft = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fra.ScrollWidth = totalW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.ColumnWidths = cw" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo LdErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dr = lr - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If dr < 0 Then dr = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mRowCount = dr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If dr > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim mData(1 To dr, 1 To lc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 1 To dr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For j = 1 To lc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        v = ws.Cells(i + 1, j).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If IsError(v) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mData(i, j) = ""#ERR""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        ElseIf IsNull(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mData(i, j) = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mData(i, j) = CStr(v)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim mFilterIdx(1 To dr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mFilterCount = dr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 1 To dr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      mFilterIdx(i) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Erase mData" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim mFilterIdx(1 To 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mFilterCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.txtSearch.Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.CurPage = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RenderPage(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Loaded "" & mTableName & "" ("" & dr & "" rows, "" & lc & "" cols)""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "LdErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""LoadTable Error: "" & Err.Description, vbExclamation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  FilterTable
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub FilterTable(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim srch As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim k As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim su As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mRowCount = 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  srch = Trim(frm.txtSearch.Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If srch = ""Search all columns..."" Then srch = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If srch = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim mFilterIdx(1 To mRowCount)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mFilterCount = mRowCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For k = 1 To mRowCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      mFilterIdx(k) = k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next k" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    su = UCase(srch)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ReDim mFilterIdx(1 To mRowCount)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    mFilterCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For i = 1 To mRowCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For j = 1 To mColCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If InStr(1, UCase(CStr(mData(i, j))), su) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mFilterCount = mFilterCount + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mFilterIdx(mFilterCount) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.CurPage = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RenderPage(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Filter: "" & mFilterCount & "" of "" & mRowCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  RenderPage
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub RenderPage(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ps As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tp As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sR As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim eR As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nR As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim rw As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim colW As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cwStr As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cj As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set lst = frm.Controls(""fraData"").Controls(""lstData"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mColCount > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.ColumnCount = mColCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    colW = 110" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    cwStr = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For cj = 1 To mColCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If cj > 1 Then cwStr = cwStr & "";"" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      cwStr = cwStr & colW" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next cj" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    lst.ColumnWidths = cwStr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""fraData"").Controls(""lstHeaders"").ColumnWidths = cwStr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ps = frm.PageSize" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ps < 1 Then ps = 50" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mFilterCount > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    tp = Int((mFilterCount + ps - 1) / ps)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    tp = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.TotalPages = tp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurPage > tp Then frm.CurPage = tp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurPage < 1 Then frm.CurPage = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sR = (frm.CurPage - 1) * ps + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  eR = sR + ps - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If eR > mFilterCount Then eR = mFilterCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  nR = eR - sR + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nR < 1 Then nR = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nR > 0 And mColCount > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For r = sR To eR" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      idx = mFilterIdx(r)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.AddItem CStr(mData(idx, 1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      rw = lst.ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      For j = 2 To mColCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        lst.List(rw, j - 1) = CStr(mData(idx, j))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next r" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblPage"").Caption = "" Page "" & frm.CurPage & "" / "" & tp & "" """ & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblRCount"").Caption = ""  "" & mFilterCount & "" records  |  "" & mColCount & "" cols""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  ExportCSV
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub ExportCSV(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo CsvErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mTableName = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mRowCount = 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fPath As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fPath = Application.GetSaveAsFilename(mTableName & "".csv"", ""CSV (*.csv),*.csv"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fPath = False Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fNum As Integer" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fNum = FreeFile" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Open CStr(fPath) For Output As #fNum" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hdr As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ln As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  hdr = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 1 To mColCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If j > 1 Then hdr = hdr & "","" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    hdr = hdr & Chr(34) & mHeaders(j) & Chr(34)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Print #fNum, hdr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To mFilterCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    idx = mFilterIdx(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ln = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For j = 1 To mColCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If j > 1 Then ln = ln & "","" " & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ln = ln & Chr(34) & CStr(mData(idx, j)) & Chr(34)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Print #fNum, ln" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Close #fNum" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Exported "" & mFilterCount & "" rows.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Exported "" & mFilterCount & "" rows."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "CsvErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Export error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  DeleteSelectedRow
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteSelectedRow(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo DelErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lstIdx As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim pgOff As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fPos As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dIdx As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ans As VbMsgBoxResult" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mTableName = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mTableName = ""DB_Users"" Or mTableName = ""DB_Settings"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Protected table."", vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""fraData"").Controls(""lstData"").ListIndex < 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Select a row first."", vbExclamation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lstIdx = frm.Controls(""fraData"").Controls(""lstData"").ListIndex" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  pgOff = (frm.CurPage - 1) * frm.PageSize" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fPos = pgOff + lstIdx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fPos < 1 Or fPos > mFilterCount Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  dIdx = mFilterIdx(fPos)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  sRow = dIdx + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ans = MsgBox(""Delete row "" & sRow & "" from "" & mTableName & ""?"", vbYesNo + vbExclamation)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ans <> vbYes Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(mTableName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo DelErr" & vbCrLf
