    c = c & "  ws.Rows(sRow).Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Deleted row "" & sRow" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadTable(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "DelErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Delete error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    ' =============================
    '  PrintTable
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub PrintTable(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo PrtErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lc As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mTableName = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(mTableName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lc = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.PageSetup.PrintArea = ws.Range(ws.Cells(1, 1), ws.Cells(lr, lc)).Address" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.PageSetup.Orientation = xlLandscape" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.PageSetup.FitToPagesWide = 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.PageSetup.FitToPagesTall = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.PrintPreview" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Print preview: "" & mTableName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "PrtErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Print error: "" & Err.Description, vbCritical" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub


' -------------------------------------------------------------
'  FORM: frmStudentDB – Student Database Browser & Editor
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateStudentDBForm()
    Dim FW As Single: FW = 780   ' form width
    Dim FH As Single: FH = 400   ' form height
    Dim M As Single: M = 10      ' outer margin
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmStudentDB", "Student Database", FW, FH)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    Dim ctl As Object
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HF7F7F7

    ' =========================================================
    '  HEADER BAR (26px)
    ' =========================================================
    AL d, "lblT", "  " & ChrW(9679) & "  STUDENT DATABASE", 0, 0, FW, 26, 11
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblT").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblT").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblT").TextAlign = 1
    d.Controls("lblT").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc2", "", 0, 26, FW, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc2").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc2").Caption = ""

    ' =========================================================
    '  FILTER BAR (28px)
    ' =========================================================
    AL d, "lblFltBg", "", 0, 28, FW, 28
    d.Controls("lblFltBg").BackColor = &HEEF0F2: d.Controls("lblFltBg").Caption = ""

    AL d, "lFC", "Class:", M + 6, 33, 34, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lFC").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lFC").ForeColor = &H333333: d.Controls("lFC").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbFltClass", M + 42, 32, 74
    d.Controls("cmbFltClass").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbFltClass").Height = 19

    AL d, "lFS", "Stream:", M + 126, 33, 42, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lFS").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lFS").ForeColor = &H333333: d.Controls("lFS").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbFltStream", M + 170, 32, 66
    d.Controls("cmbFltStream").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbFltStream").Height = 19

    AL d, "lFG", "Gender:", M + 246, 33, 42, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lFG").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lFG").ForeColor = &H333333: d.Controls("lFG").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbFltGender", M + 290, 32, 66
    d.Controls("cmbFltGender").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbFltGender").Height = 19: d.Controls("cmbFltGender").Style = 2

    AB d, "btnLoadList", ChrW(9654) & " LOAD", M + 366, 31, 60, 20, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnLoadList").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnLoadList").Font.Bold = True

    AL d, "lblStudentCount", "0 students", M + 436, 34, 90, 12, 8
    d.Controls("lblStudentCount").ForeColor = &H777777: d.Controls("lblStudentCount").BackStyle = 0

    ' =========================================================
    '  LEFT PANEL: Search + Student List
    ' =========================================================
    Dim lpW As Single: lpW = 300
    Dim pTop As Single: pTop = 60

    ' Search bar with icon
    AL d, "lblSrchBg", "", M, pTop, lpW - M, 24
    d.Controls("lblSrchBg").BackColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblSrchBg").Caption = ""
    d.Controls("lblSrchBg").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblSrchBg").BorderColor = &HC0C0C0

    AL d, "lblSrchIco", ChrW(9906), M + 5, pTop + 5, 14, 14, 9
    d.Controls("lblSrchIco").ForeColor = &H999999: d.Controls("lblSrchIco").BackStyle = 0

    AT d, "txtSearchName", M + 20, pTop + 3, lpW - M - 24, 18
    d.Controls("txtSearchName").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("txtSearchName").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    d.Controls("txtSearchName").BorderStyle = 0

    ' Column headers (navy strip)
    Dim lTop As Single: lTop = pTop + 26
    AL d, "lH1", " Adm", M, lTop, 72, 12, 7
    d.Controls("lH1").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lH1").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lH1").BackColor = &H1F3864
    AL d, "lH2", "Surname", M + 72, lTop, 64, 12, 7
    d.Controls("lH2").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lH2").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lH2").BackColor = &H1F3864
    AL d, "lH3", "Others", M + 136, lTop, 64, 12, 7
    d.Controls("lH3").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lH3").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lH3").BackColor = &H1F3864
    AL d, "lH4", "G", M + 200, lTop, 22, 12, 7
    d.Controls("lH4").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lH4").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lH4").BackColor = &H1F3864
    AL d, "lH5", "Stream", M + 222, lTop, 56, 12, 7
    d.Controls("lH5").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lH5").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lH5").BackColor = &H1F3864

    ' Student ListBox
    Dim lstTop As Single: lstTop = lTop + 12
    Dim lstH As Single: lstH = 260
    Dim lst As Object: Set lst = d.Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstStudents")
    lst.Left = M: lst.Top = lstTop: lst.Width = lpW - M: lst.Height = lstH
    lst.Font.Size = 8: lst.Font.Name = "Consolas"
    lst.ColumnCount = 5: lst.ColumnWidths = "72;62;62;20;54"
    lst.ColumnHeads = False: lst.IntegralHeight = False
    lst.BorderStyle = 1: lst.BorderColor = &HC0C0C0: lst.BackColor = &HFFFFFF

    ' =========================================================
    '  VERTICAL DIVIDER
    ' =========================================================
    AL d, "lblVDiv", "", lpW + 1, pTop, 1, lstH + 38
    d.Controls("lblVDiv").BackColor = &HC0C0C0: d.Controls("lblVDiv").Caption = ""

    ' =========================================================
    '  RIGHT PANEL
    ' =========================================================
    Dim rL As Single: rL = lpW + 6          ' right panel left
    Dim rpR As Single: rpR = FW - M - 8       ' right panel right edge
    Dim rW As Single: rW = rpR - rL          ' right panel total width
    Dim rr As Single: rr = 22               ' row height (comfortable)
    Dim lbW As Single: lbW = 58             ' label width
    Dim g As Single: g = 6                  ' gap between col pairs
    Dim y As Single: y = pTop + 2

    ' ---- Photo mini-panel (top-right) ----
    Dim phW As Single: phW = 98
    Dim phL As Single: phL = rpR - phW
    AL d, "lblPhotoBg", "", phL, y, phW, 108
    d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").BackColor = &HF0F2F4: d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").Caption = ""
    d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").BorderStyle = 1: d.Controls("lblPhotoBg").BorderColor = &HC0C0C0

    Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Image.1", "imgPhoto")
    ctl.Left = phL + 5: ctl.Top = y + 4: ctl.Width = phW - 10: ctl.Height = 80
    ctl.BorderStyle = 1: ctl.BackColor = &HFFFFFF: ctl.PictureSizeMode = 1: ctl.BorderColor = &HD0D0D0

    AB d, "btnPhoto", ChrW(9998) & " Photo", phL + 5, y + 87, phW - 10, 17, &H00695C, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnPhoto").Font.Size = 7: d.Controls("btnPhoto").Font.Bold = True

    ' ---- Field columns (left of photo) ----
    Dim fW1 As Single: fW1 = rW - phW - 6   ' usable width left of photo
    Dim c1L As Single: c1L = rL
    Dim c1T As Single: c1T = rL + lbW
    Dim c1W As Single: c1W = (fW1 - lbW * 2 - g) / 2
    If c1W < 86 Then c1W = 86
    Dim c2L As Single: c2L = c1T + c1W + g
    Dim c2T As Single: c2T = c2L + lbW
    Dim c2W As Single: c2W = c1W

    ' Row 1: Stud ID / Adm No
    AL d, "la", "Stud ID:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("la").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("la").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("la").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("la").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtSID", c1T, y + 1, c1W, 18
    d.Controls("txtSID").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("txtSID").Enabled = False: d.Controls("txtSID").BackColor = &HF0F0F0

    AL d, "lb", "Adm No:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lb").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lb").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lb").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lb").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtAdm", c2T, y + 1, c2W, 18
    d.Controls("txtAdm").Font.Size = 8

    y = y + rr
    ' Row 2: Surname / Other Names
    AL d, "lc", "Surname:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lc").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lc").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lc").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lc").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtFN", c1T, y + 1, c1W, 18
    d.Controls("txtFN").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "ld", "Others:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("ld").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("ld").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("ld").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("ld").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtLN", c2T, y + 1, c2W, 18
    d.Controls("txtLN").Font.Size = 8

    y = y + rr
    ' Row 3: DOB / Gender
    AL d, "le", "DOB:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("le").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("le").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("le").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("le").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtDOB", c1T, y + 1, c1W, 18
    d.Controls("txtDOB").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "lf", "Gender:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lf").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lf").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lf").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lf").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbGen", c2T, y + 1, c2W
    d.Controls("cmbGen").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbGen").Height = 18

    y = y + rr
    ' Row 4: Class / Stream
    AL d, "lg", "Class:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lg").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lg").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lg").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lg").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbCls", c1T, y + 1, c1W
    d.Controls("cmbCls").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbCls").Height = 18

    AL d, "lgStr", "Stream:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lgStr").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lgStr").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lgStr").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lgStr").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbStream", c2T, y + 1, c2W
    d.Controls("cmbStream").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbStream").Height = 18

    y = y + rr
    ' Row 5: UPI / Birth Cert
    AL d, "lh", "UPI:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lh").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lh").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lh").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lh").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtUPI", c1T, y + 1, c1W, 18
    d.Controls("txtUPI").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "li", "BirthCrt:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("li").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("li").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("li").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("li").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtBC", c2T, y + 1, c2W, 18
    d.Controls("txtBC").Font.Size = 8

    ' ---- Divider (below photo area) ----
    y = y + rr + 2
    AL d, "lblDiv", "", rL, y, rW, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv").BackColor = &HC0C0C0: d.Controls("lblDiv").Caption = ""
    y = y + 5

    ' ---- Full-width rows ----
    Dim fFullW As Single: fFullW = rW - lbW

    ' Row 6: Status / Blood Group
    AL d, "lj", "Status:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lj").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lj").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lj").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lj").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbSts", c1T, y + 1, c1W
    d.Controls("cmbSts").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbSts").Height = 18

    AL d, "lk", "Blood:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lk").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lk").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("lk").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("lk").BackStyle = 0
    AC d, "cmbBG", c2T, y + 1, rpR - c2T, 18
    d.Controls("cmbBG").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("cmbBG").Height = 18

    y = y + rr
    ' Row 7: Guardian / Phone
    AL d, "pa", "Parent:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("pa").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pa").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("pa").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pa").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtGN", c1T, y + 1, c1W, 18
    d.Controls("txtGN").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "pb", "Phone:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("pb").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pb").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("pb").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pb").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtGP", c2T, y + 1, rpR - c2T, 18
    d.Controls("txtGP").Font.Size = 8

    y = y + rr
    ' Row 8: Allergies / Special Needs
    AL d, "pd", "Allergy:", c1L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("pd").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pd").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("pd").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pd").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtAlg", c1T, y + 1, c1W, 18
    d.Controls("txtAlg").Font.Size = 8

    AL d, "pe", "SplNeed:", c2L, y + 3, lbW, 14, 8
    d.Controls("pe").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("pe").ForeColor = &H555555: d.Controls("pe").TextAlign = 3: d.Controls("pe").BackStyle = 0
    AT d, "txtSN", c2T, y + 1, rpR - c2T, 18
    d.Controls("txtSN").Font.Size = 8

    ' =========================================================
    '  ACTION BUTTONS
    ' =========================================================
    y = y + rr + 6
    Dim bW As Single: bW = 76
    Dim bH As Single: bH = 24
    AB d, "btnUpdate", ChrW(8634) & " Update", rL, y, bW, bH, &H1F4E79, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnUpdate").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnUpdate").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnDelete", ChrW(10005) & " Delete", rL + bW + 4, y, bW, bH, &HC62828, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnDelete").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnDelete").Font.Bold = True
    AB d, "btnClear", "Clear", rL + (bW + 4) * 2, y, 60, bH, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClear").Font.Size = 8
    AB d, "btnClose", "Close", rpR - 64, y, 64, bH, &H37474F, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Size = 8: d.Controls("btnClose").Font.Bold = True

    ' =========================================================
    '  STATUS BAR
    ' =========================================================
    Dim stY As Single: stY = FH - 22
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.", 0, stY, FW, 18, 8
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &H1F3864: d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblSt").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ' =========================================================
    '  USERFORM CODE
    ' =========================================================
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & "Public CurrentRow As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  CurrentRow = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call InitStudentDBForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbFltClass_Change(): Call PopulateFilterStreams(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnLoadList_Click(): Call LoadStudentList(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstStudents_Click(): Call LoadStudentFromList(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub txtSearchName_Change(): Call FilterStudentListByName(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbCls_Change(): Call PopulateStreams(Me, Me.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnUpdate_Click(): Call UpdateStudentDB(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelete_Click(): Call DeleteStudentDB(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnPhoto_Click(): Call BrowsePhoto(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClear_Click(): Call ClearStudentDBForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim dWs As Worksheet: Set dWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""Dashboard"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not dWs Is Nothing Then dWs.Activate" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

'  MODULE: modStudentDB – Student Database Backend Logic
' -------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CreateModStudentDB()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modStudentDB")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mStudentRows() As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private mStudentCount As Long" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  InitStudentDBForm
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub InitStudentDBForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbFltClass"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbFltClass"").AddItem ""All"", 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbFltClass"").Value = ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbFltGender""): .Clear: .AddItem ""All"": .AddItem ""M"": .AddItem ""F"": .Value = ""All"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbGen""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Male"": .AddItem ""Female"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbSts""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Active"": .AddItem ""Left"": .AddItem ""Suspended"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbBG"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each bg In Array(""A+"",""A-"",""B+"",""B-"",""O+"",""O-"",""AB+"",""AB-"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbBG"").AddItem bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next bg" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbCls"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSearchName"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lstStudents"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStudentCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Ready " & ChrW(8212) & " select a class and click LOAD.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  PopulateFilterStreams
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub PopulateFilterStreams(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbFltStream"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbFltStream"").AddItem ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = Trim(frm.Controls(""cmbFltClass"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Or cls = ""All"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""cmbFltStream"").Value = ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error GoTo 0: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Classes"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = cls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If ws.Cells(i, 2).Value <> """" Then frm.Controls(""cmbFltStream"").AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbFltStream"").Value = ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  LoadStudentList
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadStudentList(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo LdErr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fCls As String: fCls = Trim(frm.Controls(""cmbFltClass"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fCls = """" Then MsgBox ""Please select a Class first."", vbExclamation, ""Filter Required"": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fAll As Boolean: fAll = (fCls = ""All"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fStr As String: fStr = Trim(frm.Controls(""cmbFltStream"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fGen As String: fGen = Trim(frm.Controls(""cmbFltGender"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fStr = """" Then fStr = ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fGen = """" Then fGen = ""All""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Loading students..."": DoEvents" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lr < 2 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lstStudents"").Clear: mStudentCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblStudentCount"").Caption = ""0 students""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  No students in database."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReDim mStudentRows(1 To lr)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  mStudentCount = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sCls As String: sCls = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sStr As String: sStr = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sGen As String: sGen = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cGEN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If fAll Or sCls = fCls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      If fStr = ""All"" Or sStr = fStr Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        If fGen = ""All"" Or Left(UCase(sGen),1) = Left(UCase(fGen),1) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mStudentCount = mStudentCount + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "          mStudentRows(mStudentCount) = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "        End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSearchName"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RenderStudentList(frm, """")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "LdErr:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Error: "" & Err.Description" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  RenderStudentList (applies name filter)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Private Sub RenderStudentList(frm As Object, nameFilter As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstStudents"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nf As String: nf = UCase(Trim(nameFilter))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim shown As Long: shown = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To mStudentCount" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim r As Long: r = mStudentRows(i)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fullName As String: fullName = UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(r, cFN).Value) & "" "" & CStr(ws.Cells(r, cLN).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If nf = """" Or InStr(1, fullName, nf, vbTextCompare) > 0 Or InStr(1, UCase(CStr(ws.Cells(r, cADM).Value)), nf, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(r, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(shown, 1) = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cFN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(shown, 2) = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cLN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(shown, 3) = Left(CStr(ws.Cells(r, cGEN).Value), 1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(shown, 4) = CStr(ws.Cells(r, cSTRM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      shown = shown + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblStudentCount"").Caption = shown & "" students""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Showing "" & shown & "" of "" & mStudentCount & "" students""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  FilterStudentListByName  (called on txtSearchName_Change)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub FilterStudentListByName(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mStudentCount = 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RenderStudentList(frm, frm.Controls(""txtSearchName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  LoadStudentFromList
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadStudentFromList(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstStudents"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If lst.ListIndex < 0 Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim admNo As String: admNo = lst.List(lst.ListIndex, 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, cSID).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value) = admNo Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.CurrentRow = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtSID"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSID).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cADM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value   = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cFN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value   = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cLN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbGen"", ws.Cells(i, cGEN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtDOB"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cDOB).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbCls"", ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call PopulateStreams(frm, CStr(ws.Cells(i, cCLS).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbStream"", ws.Cells(i, cSTRM).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtGN"").Value   = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cPN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtGP"").Value   = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cPH).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtUPI"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cUPI).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtBC"").Value   = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cBC).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbSts"", ws.Cells(i, cST).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtAlg"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cALG).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtSN"").Value   = CStr(ws.Cells(i, cSN).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call SafeSetCombo(frm, ""cmbBG"", ws.Cells(i, cBG).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call LoadPhoto(frm, CStr(ws.Cells(i, cPHO).Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Editing: "" & ws.Cells(i, cFN) & "" "" & ws.Cells(i, cLN) & "" (Row "" & i & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Student not found.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  UpdateStudentDB
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub UpdateStudentDB(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Select a student from the list first."", vbExclamation, ""No Student Selected""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ValidateAdmForm(frm) Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim admVal As String: admVal = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsDuplicateAdmNo(admVal, frm.CurrentRow) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Admission Number '"" & admVal & ""' is already assigned to another student!"", vbCritical, ""Duplicate""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteStudentData(frm, ws, frm.CurrentRow, False)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Update"", ""Updated student: "" & frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value & "" "" & frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value & "" (ADM: "" & admVal & "")"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Student record updated successfully!"", vbInformation, ""Record Updated""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Updated: "" & frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value & "" "" & frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadStudentList(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  DeleteStudentDB
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteStudentDB(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.CurrentRow = 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Select a student from the list first."", vbExclamation, ""No Student Selected""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_STUD)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nm As String: nm = ws.Cells(frm.CurrentRow, cFN).Value & "" "" & ws.Cells(frm.CurrentRow, cLN).Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""DELETE student '"" & nm & ""'?"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""This action CANNOT be undone!"", vbYesNo + vbCritical, ""Confirm Delete"") = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(frm.CurrentRow).Delete xlUp" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Delete"", ""Deleted student: "" & nm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Student '"" & nm & ""' deleted."", vbInformation, ""Deleted""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call RefreshDashboardKPIs" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call ClearStudentDBForm(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadStudentList(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  ClearStudentDBForm
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub ClearStudentDBForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSID"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtAdm"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtFN"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtLN"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtDOB"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""cmbGen"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbCls"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""cmbStream"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtUPI"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtBC"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbSts"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""cmbBG"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtGN"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtGP"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtAlg"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtSN"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""imgPhoto"").Picture = Nothing" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ClearPhoto" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.CurrentRow = 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = ""  Form cleared. Select a student from the list.""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  MODULE: modSettings — School Info + Stream/Subject/Fee CRUD
' =============================================================
Private Sub CreateModSettings()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modSettings")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  ReadSetting / WriteSetting (NEW: School Info DB utilities)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function ReadSetting(key As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value))) = UCase(key) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ReadSetting = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ReadSetting = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub WriteSetting(key As String, val As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_Settings"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lr As Long: lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To lr" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If UCase(Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value))) = UCase(key) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Cells(i, 2).Value = val" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(lr + 1, 1).Value = key" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(lr + 1, 2).Value = val" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  LoadSchoolInfo / SaveSchoolInfo (NEW)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadSchoolInfo(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_NAME"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtMotto"").Value = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_MOTTO"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtAddress"").Value = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_ADDRESS"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtPhone"").Value = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_PHONE"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtEmail"").Value = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_EMAIL"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtYear"").Value = ReadSetting(""CURRENT_YEAR"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim trm As String: trm = ReadSetting(""CURRENT_TERM"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim j As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For j = 0 To frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").ListCount - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").List(j) = trm Then frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").ListIndex = j: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next j" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub SaveSchoolInfo(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(frm.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""School Name cannot be blank!"", vbExclamation, ""Validation Error""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not ValidateSchoolNameChange(Trim(frm.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value)) Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_NAME"", Trim(frm.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_MOTTO"", Trim(frm.Controls(""txtMotto"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_ADDRESS"", Trim(frm.Controls(""txtAddress"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_PHONE"", Trim(frm.Controls(""txtPhone"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_EMAIL"", Trim(frm.Controls(""txtEmail"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call WriteSetting(""CURRENT_YEAR"", Trim(frm.Controls(""txtYear"").Value))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").ListIndex >= 0 Then Call WriteSetting(""CURRENT_TERM"", frm.Controls(""cmbTerm"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AuditLog(""Settings"", ""School info updated: "" & frm.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call BuildDashboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""School information saved successfully!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""All reports, receipts, and dashboard will now use the updated details."", vbInformation, ""Settings Saved""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  InitSettingsForm (OLD + School Info init)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub InitSettingsForm(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call PopulateClassDropdown(frm, ""cmbSetCls"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbSubjLvl""): .Clear: .AddItem ""PP"": .AddItem ""Lower Primary"": .AddItem ""Upper Primary"": .AddItem ""Junior Sec"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbFeeCls"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .AddItem ""ALL""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim fc As Variant" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For Each fc In Array(""PP1"",""PP2"",""G1"",""G2"",""G3"",""G4"",""G5"",""G6"",""G7"",""G8"",""G9"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      .AddItem CStr(fc)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Next fc" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    .Value = ""ALL""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ' Term combo (NEW)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  With frm.Controls(""cmbTerm""): .Clear: .AddItem ""Term 1"": .AddItem ""Term 2"": .AddItem ""Term 3"": End With" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadSchoolInfo(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadSubjects(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadFees(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  Streams CRUD (OLD — restored with Edit)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadStreams(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lstStreams"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbSetCls"").Value: If cls = """" Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = cls Then frm.Controls(""lstStreams"").AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub AddStream(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbSetCls"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim strm As String: strm = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Or strm = """" Then MsgBox ""Select class and enter stream name."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Tag <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = CLng(frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Tag)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = strm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Stream updated to '"" & strm & ""'."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 1).Value = cls: ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = strm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Stream '"" & strm & ""' added to "" & cls, vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Value = """": Call LoadStreams(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub EditStream(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstStreams"").ListIndex < 0 Then MsgBox ""Select a stream to edit."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbSetCls"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim strm As String: strm = frm.Controls(""lstStreams"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = cls And CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = strm Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Value = strm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtStream"").Tag = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      MsgBox ""Edit the stream name and click Add to save."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteStream(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbSetCls"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstStreams"").ListIndex < 0 Then MsgBox ""Select a stream."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim strm As String: strm = frm.Controls(""lstStreams"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Delete '"" & strm & ""' from "" & cls & ""?"", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_CLASS)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row To 2 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value) = cls And CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = strm Then ws.Rows(i).Delete" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadStreams(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  Subjects CRUD (OLD — fully restored)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadSubjects(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""lstSubj"").Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""lstSubj"").AddItem ws.Cells(i, 3).Value & "" ("" & ws.Cells(i, 2).Value & "", Max: "" & ws.Cells(i, 4).Value & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub AddSubject(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim nm As String: nm = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lvl As String: lvl = frm.Controls(""cmbSubjLvl"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim mx As String: mx = frm.Controls(""txtSubjMax"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If nm = """" Or lvl = """" Then MsgBox ""Enter name and level."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If mx = """" Then mx = ""100""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Tag <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = CLng(frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Tag)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 1).Value = r - 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = lvl" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 3).Value = nm: ws.Cells(r, 4).Value = Val(mx)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtSubjMax"").Value = """": Call LoadSubjects(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Subject '"" & nm & ""' saved."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub EditSubject(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstSubj"").ListIndex < 0 Then MsgBox ""Select a subject to edit."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = frm.Controls(""lstSubj"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""cmbSubjLvl"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSubjMax"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(idx, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtSubjName"").Tag = idx" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Edit the fields and click Add to update, or change name and click Add for a new entry."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteSubject(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstSubj"").ListIndex < 0 Then MsgBox ""Select a subject."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim idx As Long: idx = frm.Controls(""lstSubj"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Delete "" & ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value & ""?"", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Rows(idx).Delete: Call LoadSubjects(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  Fees CRUD (OLD — fully restored with class filter + edit)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub LoadFees(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim lst As Object: Set lst = frm.Controls(""lstFees"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  lst.ColumnCount = 3: lst.ColumnWidths = ""120;80;80""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim filterCls As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: filterCls = frm.Controls(""cmbFeeCls"").Value: On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_STR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim rowCls As String: rowCls = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If filterCls = """" Or filterCls = ""ALL"" Or rowCls = filterCls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.AddItem CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 1) = ""KSh "" & Format(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      lst.List(lst.ListCount - 1, 2) = rowCls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub AddFee(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim tp As String: tp = Trim(frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim amt As String: amt = frm.Controls(""txtFeeAmt"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim cls As String: cls = frm.Controls(""cmbFeeCls"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If tp = """" Or Not IsNumeric(amt) Then MsgBox ""Enter fee type and amount."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If cls = """" Or cls = ""ALL"" Then MsgBox ""Select a specific class (not ALL)."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_STR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim r As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Tag <> """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = CLng(frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Tag)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Tag = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Fee updated for "" & cls & "": "" & tp, vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    r = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ws.Cells(r, 1).Value = ""FEE"" & Format(r - 1, ""000"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Fee added for "" & cls & "": "" & tp, vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(r, 2).Value = tp: ws.Cells(r, 3).Value = CDbl(amt): ws.Cells(r, 4).Value = cls" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Value = """": frm.Controls(""txtFeeAmt"").Value = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadFees(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub EditFee(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex < 0 Then MsgBox ""Select a fee to edit."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim filterCls As String: filterCls = frm.Controls(""cmbFeeCls"").Value" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_STR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selType As String: selType = frm.Controls(""lstFees"").List(frm.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex, 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selCls  As String: selCls  = frm.Controls(""lstFees"").List(frm.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex, 2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 2 To ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = selType And CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value) = selCls Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Value = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtFeeAmt"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""cmbFeeCls"").Value  = CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      frm.Controls(""txtFeeType"").Tag   = i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub DeleteFee(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If frm.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex < 0 Then MsgBox ""Select a fee."", vbExclamation: Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selType As String: selType = frm.Controls(""lstFees"").List(frm.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex, 0)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim selCls  As String: selCls  = frm.Controls(""lstFees"").List(frm.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex, 2)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If MsgBox(""Delete '"" & selType & ""' for "" & selCls & ""?"", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbNo Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_STR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026"": On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row To 2 Step -1" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If CStr(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) = selType And CStr(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value) = selCls Then ws.Rows(i).Delete: Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call LoadFees(frm)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  FORM: frmSettings — Admin Config Panel (Merged: Old + School Info)
' =============================================================
Private Sub CreateSettingsForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmSettings", "System Settings | CBC School MIS", 580, 580)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HFFFFFF
    
    ' === HEADER BAR ===
    AL d, "lblTitle", ChrW(9881) & "  SYSTEM CONFIGURATION", 0, 0, 580, 30, 12
    d.Controls("lblTitle").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblTitle").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblTitle").BackColor = &H455A64: d.Controls("lblTitle").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblTitle").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' === Accent divider ===
    AL d, "lblAccent", "", 0, 30, 580, 2
    d.Controls("lblAccent").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAccent").Caption = ""
    
    ' --- SECTION 0: SCHOOL INFO (NEW — full width top panel) ---
    Dim frI As Object: Set frI = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraSchoolInfo")
    frI.Left = 10: frI.Top = 38: frI.Width = 560: frI.Height = 108
    frI.Caption = " SCHOOL INFORMATION ": frI.Font.Bold = True: frI.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' Row 1: Name + Motto
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lSN", "Name:", 8, 18, 40
    Dim ctl As Object
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtSchoolName")
    ctl.Left = 48: ctl.Top = 16: ctl.Width = 200: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Font.Size = 8
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lMT", "Motto:", 258, 18, 40
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtMotto")
    ctl.Left = 298: ctl.Top = 16: ctl.Width = 250: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Font.Size = 8
    
    ' Row 2: Address + Phone + Email
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lAD", "Address:", 8, 40, 45
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtAddress")
    ctl.Left = 55: ctl.Top = 38: ctl.Width = 193: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Font.Size = 8
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lPH", "Phone:", 258, 40, 38
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtPhone")
    ctl.Left = 298: ctl.Top = 38: ctl.Width = 100: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Font.Size = 8
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lEM", "Email:", 408, 40, 35
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtEmail")
    ctl.Left = 445: ctl.Top = 38: ctl.Width = 103: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Font.Size = 8
    
    ' Row 3: Term + Year + SAVE button
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lTR", "Term:", 8, 64, 32
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.ComboBox.1", "cmbTerm")
    ctl.Left = 42: ctl.Top = 62: ctl.Width = 80: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Style = 2
    ALF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "lYR", "Year:", 132, 64, 30
    Set ctl = d.Controls("fraSchoolInfo").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtYear")
    ctl.Left = 164: ctl.Top = 62: ctl.Width = 55: ctl.Height = 18: ctl.Font.Size = 8
    ABF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "btnSaveInfo", ChrW(10003) & " SAVE SCHOOL INFO", 298, 60, 160, 24, &H2E7D32, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraSchoolInfo", "btnUploadLogo", ChrW(11014) & " UPLOAD LOGO", 465, 60, 85, 24, &H6A1B9A, vbWhite
    
    ' --- SECTION 1: STREAMS (Left Panel — OLD restored) ---
    Dim frS As Object: Set frS = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraStreams")
    frS.Left = 10: frS.Top = 155: frS.Width = 275: frS.Height = 175
    frS.Caption = " CLASS STREAMS ": frS.Font.Bold = True: frS.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ALF d, "fraStreams", "lCls", "Class Level:", 8, 16
    ACF d, "fraStreams", "cmbSetCls", 80, 14, 100
    ALF d, "fraStreams", "lSt", "Manage Streams:", 8, 38
    
    Dim lstStr As Object: Set lstStr = d.Controls("fraStreams").Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstStreams")
    lstStr.Left = 8: lstStr.Top = 52: lstStr.Width = 255: lstStr.Height = 65
    lstStr.Font.Size = 8: lstStr.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ALF d, "fraStreams", "lNew", "Name:", 8, 128
    Dim txtStr As Object: Set txtStr = d.Controls("fraStreams").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtStream")
    txtStr.Left = 45: txtStr.Top = 126: txtStr.Width = 95: txtStr.Height = 18
    txtStr.Font.Size = 8: txtStr.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ABF d, "fraStreams", "btnAddStr", "ADD", 145, 125, 38, 20, &H2E7D32, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraStreams", "btnEditStr", "EDIT", 185, 125, 38, 20, &HFB8C00, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraStreams", "btnDelStr", "DEL", 225, 125, 38, 20, &HC62828, vbWhite
    
    ' --- SECTION 2: SUBJECTS (Right Panel — OLD restored) ---
    Dim frJ As Object: Set frJ = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraSubjects")
    frJ.Left = 295: frJ.Top = 155: frJ.Width = 275: frJ.Height = 175
    frJ.Caption = " SUBJECTS & LEVELS ": frJ.Font.Bold = True: frJ.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    Dim lstSbj As Object: Set lstSbj = d.Controls("fraSubjects").Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstSubj")
    lstSbj.Left = 8: lstSbj.Top = 16: lstSbj.Width = 255: lstSbj.Height = 70
    lstSbj.Font.Size = 8: lstSbj.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ALF d, "fraSubjects", "lNm", "Subject:", 8, 95
    Dim txtSN As Object: Set txtSN = d.Controls("fraSubjects").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtSubjName")
    txtSN.Left = 55: txtSN.Top = 93: txtSN.Width = 105: txtSN.Height = 18
    txtSN.Font.Size = 8: txtSN.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ALF d, "fraSubjects", "lMx", "Max:", 170, 95
    Dim txtSM As Object: Set txtSM = d.Controls("fraSubjects").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtSubjMax")
    txtSM.Left = 200: txtSM.Top = 93: txtSM.Width = 40: txtSM.Height = 18
    txtSM.Font.Size = 8: txtSM.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ALF d, "fraSubjects", "lLv", "Level:", 8, 118
    ACF d, "fraSubjects", "cmbSubjLvl", 55, 116, 105
    
    ABF d, "fraSubjects", "btnAddSub", "SAVE", 8, 144, 50, 22, &H2E7D32, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraSubjects", "btnEditSub", "EDIT", 62, 144, 50, 22, &HFB8C00, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraSubjects", "btnDelSub", "DEL", 116, 144, 50, 22, &HC62828, vbWhite
    
    ' --- SECTION 3: FEES (Full Width — OLD restored with class filter) ---
    Dim frF As Object: Set frF = d.Controls.Add("Forms.Frame.1", "fraFees")
    frF.Left = 10: frF.Top = 340: frF.Width = 560: frF.Height = 165
    frF.Caption = " FEE STRUCTURE (by Class) ": frF.Font.Bold = True: frF.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ' Class filter row
    ALF d, "fraFees", "lFC", "Class:", 8, 20
    ACF d, "fraFees", "cmbFeeCls", 50, 18, 110
    ALF d, "fraFees", "lFSumTot", "(Select class to filter fees below)", 170, 20, 200
    d.Controls("fraFees").Controls("lFSumTot").ForeColor = &H888888

    ' Fee listbox (3 columns: Type / Amount / Class)
    Dim lstFe As Object: Set lstFe = d.Controls("fraFees").Controls.Add("Forms.ListBox.1", "lstFees")
    lstFe.Left = 8: lstFe.Top = 38: lstFe.Width = 540: lstFe.Height = 65
    lstFe.Font.Size = 8: lstFe.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    lstFe.ColumnCount = 3: lstFe.ColumnWidths = "220;90;90"

    ALF d, "fraFees", "lFT", "Fee Type:", 8, 114
    Dim txtFT As Object: Set txtFT = d.Controls("fraFees").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtFeeType")
    txtFT.Left = 60: txtFT.Top = 112: txtFT.Width = 155: txtFT.Height = 18
    txtFT.Font.Size = 8: txtFT.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ALF d, "fraFees", "lFA", "Amount:", 222, 114
    Dim txtFA As Object: Set txtFA = d.Controls("fraFees").Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtFeeAmt")
    txtFA.Left = 270: txtFA.Top = 112: txtFA.Width = 70: txtFA.Height = 18
    txtFA.Font.Size = 8: txtFA.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ABF d, "fraFees", "btnAddFee",  "ADD",  348, 110, 50, 22, &H2E7D32, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraFees", "btnEditFee", "EDIT", 402, 110, 50, 22, &HFB8C00, vbWhite
    ABF d, "fraFees", "btnDelFee",  "DEL",  456, 110, 50, 22, &HC62828, vbWhite
    
    ' --- Close button (centered) ---
    AB d, "btnClose", "CLOSE", 230, 515, 120, 26, &H37474F, vbWhite
    
    ' --- Status bar ---
    AL d, "lblSt", " Ready.  Configure school info, streams, subjects, and fees.", 10, 545, 560, 16, 7
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HF5F5F5: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H666666: d.Controls("lblSt").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    
    ' --- Form code (merged: old events + new school info + mouse wheel) ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize(): Call InitSettingsForm(Me): Call CenterForm(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbSetCls_Change(): Call LoadStreams(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub cmbFeeCls_Change(): Call LoadFees(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' School Info (NEW)
    c = c & "Private Sub btnSaveInfo_Click(): Call SaveSchoolInfo(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnUploadLogo_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo hE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim fd As Object: Set fd = Application.FileDialog(3)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Title = ""Select School Logo"": fd.Filters.Clear" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  fd.Filters.Add ""Images"", ""*.jpg; *.jpeg; *.png; *.bmp; *.gif"": fd.AllowMultiSelect = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If fd.Show = -1 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim sel As String: sel = fd.SelectedItems(1)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ext As String: ext = LCase(Mid(sel, InStrRev(sel, ""."")))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Copy original file for reports (AddPicture supports all formats) ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim origName As String: origName = ""SchoolLogo"" & ext" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: Kill ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & origName: On Error GoTo hE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    FileCopy sel, ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & origName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_PATH"", origName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' --- Convert to JPG for Login form LoadPicture ---" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim jpgName As String: jpgName = ""SchoolLogo_form.jpg""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim jpgPath As String: jpgPath = ThisWorkbook.Path & ""\"" & jpgName" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    On Error Resume Next: Kill jpgPath: On Error GoTo hE" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If ext = "".jpg"" Or ext = "".jpeg"" Or ext = "".bmp"" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' JPG/BMP already supported by LoadPicture — just copy" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      FileCopy sel, jpgPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_BMP"", jpgName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      ' Use WIA.ImageFile to convert PNG/GIF to JPG" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim wImg As Object: Set wImg = CreateObject(""WIA.ImageFile"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      wImg.LoadFile sel" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim wProc As Object: Set wProc = CreateObject(""WIA.ImageProcess"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      wProc.Filters.Add wProc.FilterInfos(""Convert"").FilterID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      wProc.Filters(1).Properties(""FormatID"").Value = ""{B96B3CAE-0728-11D3-9D7B-0000F81EF32E}""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      wProc.Filters(1).Properties(""Quality"").Value = 95" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Dim wOut As Object: Set wOut = wProc.Apply(wImg)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      wOut.SaveFile jpgPath" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "      Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_LOGO_BMP"", jpgName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Logo uploaded successfully!"" & vbLf & ""Close and re-open the workbook to see it on the Login page."", vbInformation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "hE:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""Error uploading logo: "" & Err.Description, vbExclamation" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' Streams (OLD)
    c = c & "Private Sub btnAddStr_Click(): Call AddStream(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnEditStr_Click(): Call EditStream(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelStr_Click(): Call DeleteStream(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' Subjects (OLD)
    c = c & "Private Sub btnAddSub_Click(): Call AddSubject(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnEditSub_Click(): Call EditSubject(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelSub_Click(): Call DeleteSubject(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' Fees (OLD)
    c = c & "Private Sub btnAddFee_Click(): Call AddFee(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnEditFee_Click(): Call EditFee(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub btnDelFee_Click(): Call DeleteFee(Me): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' Close + Mouse wheel (OLD)
    c = c & "Private Sub btnClose_Click(): Call UnhookMouseWheel: Unload Me: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer): Call UnhookMouseWheel: End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstStreams_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstStreams"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstSubj_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstSubj"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstFees_MouseMove(ByVal Button As Integer, ByVal Shift As Integer, ByVal X As Single, ByVal Y As Single): Call HookMouseWheelList(Me.Controls(""lstFees"")): End Sub" & vbCrLf
    ' Status bar clicks (OLD)
    c = c & "Private Sub lstSubj_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""lstSubj"").ListIndex >= 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim idx As Long: idx = Me.Controls(""lstSubj"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_SUBJ)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Selected: "" & ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value & "" ("" & ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value & "", Max: "" & ws.Cells(idx, 4).Value & "")""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub lstFees_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Me.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex >= 0 Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim idx As Long: idx = Me.Controls(""lstFees"").ListIndex + 2" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(S_FEE_STR)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Selected: "" & ws.Cells(idx, 2).Value & "" - KSh "" & Format(ws.Cells(idx, 3).Value, ""#,##0"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf
    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub


' =============================================================
'  MODULE: modLicense — Machine-Locked Licensing System
' =============================================================
Private Sub CreateModLicense()
    Dim m As Object: Set m = AddMod("modLicense")
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  SimpleHash — deterministic hash for IDs/keys
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Private Function SimpleHash(ByVal s As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim h1 As Long, h2 As Long, h3 As Long, h4 As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  h1 = 31: h2 = 37: h3 = 41: h4 = 43" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim i As Long, ch As Long" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For i = 1 To Len(s)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ch = Asc(Mid(s, i, 1))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    h1 = (h1 * 17 + ch) Mod 65521" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    h2 = (h2 * 19 + ch + h1) Mod 65521" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    h3 = (h3 * 23 + ch + h2) Mod 65521" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    h4 = (h4 * 29 + ch + h3) Mod 65521" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next i" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  SimpleHash = Right(""0000"" & Hex(h1), 4) & Right(""0000"" & Hex(h2), 4) & Right(""0000"" & Hex(h3), 4) & Right(""0000"" & Hex(h4), 4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  GetMachineID — reads hardware serial via WMI
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function GetMachineID() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo FallBack" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim wmi As Object, disks As Object, d As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim raw As String: raw = """"" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set wmi = GetObject(""winmgmts:\\.\root\cimv2"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set disks = wmi.ExecQuery(""SELECT SerialNumber FROM Win32_DiskDrive"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  For Each d In disks" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    If Trim(CStr(d.SerialNumber)) <> """" Then raw = Trim(CStr(d.SerialNumber)): Exit For" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Next d" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If raw = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim procs As Object: Set procs = wmi.ExecQuery(""SELECT ProcessorId FROM Win32_Processor"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Dim p As Object" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    For Each p In procs: raw = Trim(CStr(p.ProcessorId)): Exit For: Next p" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If raw = """" Then raw = Environ(""COMPUTERNAME"") & Environ(""USERNAME"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hsh As String: hsh = SimpleHash(raw & ""MGA_HWID_2026"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetMachineID = ""MGA-"" & Mid(hsh, 1, 4) & ""-"" & Mid(hsh, 5, 4) & ""-"" & Mid(hsh, 9, 4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "FallBack:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetMachineID = ""MGA-"" & SimpleHash(Environ(""COMPUTERNAME"") & Environ(""USERNAME"") & ""MGA_HWID_2026"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  GenerateExpectedKey — must match the developer's key gen tool
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function GenerateExpectedKey(machineID As String, schoolName As String) As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim seed As String: seed = UCase(machineID) & ""|"" & UCase(Trim(schoolName)) & ""|MGA_LIC_SECRET_2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim hsh As String: hsh = SimpleHash(seed)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GenerateExpectedKey = Mid(hsh, 1, 4) & ""-"" & Mid(hsh, 5, 4) & ""-"" & Mid(hsh, 9, 4) & ""-"" & Mid(hsh, 13, 4)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  License Sheet I/O (uses very hidden DB_License sheet)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Private Function GetLicenseSheet() As Worksheet" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Set GetLicenseSheet = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(""DB_License"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Function GetStoredLicenseKey() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = GetLicenseSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then GetStoredLicenseKey = """": Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetStoredLicenseKey = CStr(ws.Cells(2, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Function GetLicensedSchool() As String" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = GetLicenseSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then GetLicensedSchool = """": Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  GetLicensedSchool = CStr(ws.Cells(3, 2).Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Public Sub StoreLicenseData(key As String, school As String, machID As String)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error Resume Next" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = GetLicenseSheet()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Unprotect ""MIS2026""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(2, 1).Value = ""LICENSE_KEY"":    ws.Cells(2, 2).Value = key" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(3, 1).Value = ""LICENSED_SCHOOL"": ws.Cells(3, 2).Value = school" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(4, 1).Value = ""MACHINE_ID"":      ws.Cells(4, 2).Value = machID" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Cells(5, 1).Value = ""ACTIVATION_DATE"": ws.Cells(5, 2).Value = Format(Now, ""yyyy-mm-dd hh:nn"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Protect ""MIS2026"", UserInterfaceOnly:=True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  ws.Visible = xlSheetVeryHidden" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo 0" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  IsLicensed — main validation (called everywhere)
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function IsLicensed() As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  On Error GoTo NotLic" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim storedKey As String: storedKey = GetStoredLicenseKey()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If storedKey = """" Then IsLicensed = False: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim school As String: school = GetLicensedSchool()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim machID As String: machID = GetMachineID()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim expected As String: expected = GenerateExpectedKey(machID, school)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  IsLicensed = (UCase(storedKey) = UCase(expected))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "NotLic:" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  IsLicensed = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  CheckLicenseOrActivate — gatekeeper for system entry
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function CheckLicenseOrActivate() As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If IsLicensed() Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    CheckLicenseOrActivate = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    frmActivation.Show" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    CheckLicenseOrActivate = IsLicensed()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  ActivateLicense — validates and stores the key
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function ActivateLicense(enteredKey As String, schoolName As String) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Trim(schoolName) = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Please enter the school name."", vbExclamation, ""Missing School Name""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ActivateLicense = False: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim machID As String: machID = GetMachineID()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim expected As String: expected = GenerateExpectedKey(machID, schoolName)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If UCase(Trim(enteredKey)) = UCase(expected) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call StoreLicenseData(enteredKey, Trim(schoolName), machID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ' Also update school name in settings" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call WriteSetting(""SCHOOL_NAME"", Trim(schoolName))" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AuditLog(""License"", ""System activated for: "" & schoolName & "" on machine "" & machID)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""System activated successfully!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Licensed to: "" & schoolName & vbLf & ""Machine: "" & machID, vbInformation, ""Activation Successful""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Call AutoSaveWorkbook" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ActivateLicense = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Invalid activation key!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Please verify:"" & vbLf & ""1. The key was generated for THIS computer"" & vbLf & ""2. The school name matches exactly"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""Contact your developer for assistance."", vbCritical, ""Activation Failed""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ActivateLicense = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  ValidateSchoolNameChange — blocks unauthorized name changes
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Function ValidateSchoolNameChange(newName As String) As Boolean" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim licensed As String: licensed = GetLicensedSchool()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If licensed = """" Then ValidateSchoolNameChange = True: Exit Function" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If UCase(Trim(newName)) = UCase(Trim(licensed)) Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ValidateSchoolNameChange = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Else" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""Cannot change the school name!"" & vbLf & vbLf & ""This system is licensed to:"" & vbLf & licensed & vbLf & vbLf & ""Contact your developer to transfer the license."", vbCritical, ""License Violation""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    ValidateSchoolNameChange = False" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Function" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' =============================
    '  QuietLicenseCheck — silent check for embedding in forms
    ' =============================
    c = c & "Public Sub QuietLicenseCheck(frm As Object)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If Not IsLicensed() Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    MsgBox ""This system is not activated."" & vbLf & ""Please contact your developer."", vbCritical, ""License Required""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Unload frm" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    m.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub

' =============================================================
'  FORM: frmActivation — Machine-Locked Activation UI
' =============================================================
Private Sub CreateLicenseForm()
    Dim f As Object: Set f = AddForm("frmActivation", "System Activation", 390, 310)
    Dim d As Object: Set d = f.Designer
    f.Properties("BackColor") = &HF8F9FA

    ' === HEADER BAR (compact dark slate — full width) ===
    AL d, "lblTitle", ChrW(9899) & "  SYSTEM ACTIVATION", 0, 0, 390, 26, 10
    d.Controls("lblTitle").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblTitle").ForeColor = &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("lblTitle").BackColor = &H2D3436: d.Controls("lblTitle").TextAlign = 2
    d.Controls("lblTitle").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AL d, "lblAcc", "", 0, 26, 390, 2
    d.Controls("lblAcc").BackColor = &HD4A537: d.Controls("lblAcc").Caption = ""

    ' === Info text (20px margins) ===
    AL d, "lblInfo", "Send the Machine ID to your developer to receive an activation key.", 20, 36, 350, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblInfo").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblInfo").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ' === Machine ID row (label + textbox + copy btn inline) ===
    AL d, "lblMIDLbl", "Machine ID:", 20, 56, 64, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblMIDLbl").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblMIDLbl").ForeColor = &H333333
    d.Controls("lblMIDLbl").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    Dim ctl As Object
    Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtMachineID")
    ctl.Left = 88: ctl.Top = 54: ctl.Width = 212: ctl.Height = 20
    ctl.Font.Size = 9: ctl.Font.Bold = True: ctl.Font.Name = "Consolas"
    ctl.TextAlign = 2: ctl.Locked = True
    ctl.BackColor = &HFFFFFF: ctl.ForeColor = &HC62828
    ctl.BorderStyle = 1

    AB d, "btnCopy", ChrW(9733) & " COPY", 306, 54, 64, 20, &H455A64, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnCopy").Font.Size = 7: d.Controls("btnCopy").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ' === Thin divider ===
    AL d, "lblDiv", "", 20, 82, 350, 1
    d.Controls("lblDiv").BackColor = &HE0E0E0

    ' === School Name (compact) ===
    AL d, "lblSchLbl", "School Name (as licensed):", 20, 90, 170, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblSchLbl").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblSchLbl").ForeColor = &H333333
    d.Controls("lblSchLbl").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtSchoolName")
    ctl.Left = 20: ctl.Top = 106: ctl.Width = 350: ctl.Height = 20
    ctl.Font.Size = 9: ctl.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    ctl.BorderStyle = 1

    ' === Activation Key (compact) ===
    AL d, "lblKeyLbl", "Activation Key:", 20, 134, 120, 14, 8
    d.Controls("lblKeyLbl").Font.Bold = True: d.Controls("lblKeyLbl").ForeColor = &H333333
    d.Controls("lblKeyLbl").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    Set ctl = d.Controls.Add("Forms.TextBox.1", "txtKey")
    ctl.Left = 20: ctl.Top = 150: ctl.Width = 350: ctl.Height = 22
    ctl.Font.Size = 10: ctl.Font.Bold = True: ctl.Font.Name = "Consolas"
    ctl.TextAlign = 2: ctl.BorderStyle = 1

    ' === Buttons (side by side, 20px margins) ===
    AB d, "btnActivate", ChrW(10003) & " ACTIVATE", 20, 184, 216, 30, &H2E7D32, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnActivate").Font.Size = 10: d.Controls("btnActivate").Font.Bold = True
    d.Controls("btnActivate").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"
    AB d, "btnExit", "EXIT", 244, 184, 126, 30, &H757575, &HFFFFFF
    d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Size = 9: d.Controls("btnExit").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ' === Status bar (20px margins) ===
    AL d, "lblSt", " Enter activation key to unlock.", 20, 224, 350, 14, 7
    d.Controls("lblSt").BackColor = &HFFFFFF: d.Controls("lblSt").BorderStyle = 1
    d.Controls("lblSt").ForeColor = &H888888: d.Controls("lblSt").Font.Name = "Segoe UI"

    ' --- Form code ---
    Dim c$: c = "Option Explicit" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Call CenterForm(Me)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""txtMachineID"").Value = GetMachineID()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim sn As String: sn = ReadSetting(""SCHOOL_NAME"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If sn <> """" Then Me.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value = sn" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Private Sub btnCopy_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim d As Object: Set d = CreateObject(""New:{1C3B4210-F441-11CE-B9EA-00AA006B1A69}"")" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  d.SetText Me.Controls(""txtMachineID"").Value: d.PutInClipboard" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Me.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" "" & ChrW(10003) & "" Machine ID copied!""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Private Sub btnActivate_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim key As String: key = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtKey"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Dim school As String: school = Trim(Me.Controls(""txtSchoolName"").Value)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If key = """" Then" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "    Me.Controls(""lblSt"").Caption = "" Please enter the activation key."": Exit Sub" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  End If" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If ActivateLicense(key, school) Then Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Private Sub btnExit_Click()" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  MsgBox ""The system cannot be used without activation."" & vbLf & ""Contact your developer for an activation key."", vbExclamation, ""Activation Required""" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  Unload Me" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    c = c & "Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "  If CloseMode = 0 Then Cancel = True" & vbCrLf
    c = c & "End Sub" & vbCrLf

    f.CodeModule.AddFromString c
End Sub
